During this period, the Dragon Carp successfully advanced to a Fifth-Tier Pill Sovereign, and Lin Jing had refined his skills to the level of a Quasi-Fourth-Tier Alchemist.

Zzzzt—

As an Transformation Pill formed midair amidst crackling lightning, Lin Jing couldn't help but smile.

In truth, they had already developed the Thunder Tempering Method within two years. The Dragon Carp had fused various exotic flames into the Heavenly Thunder Flame, greatly enhancing its power. This allowed them to use Heavenly Thunder Flame for pill refinement, successfully drawing down Pill Tribulation to temper the pills.

However, a single pill could never withstand the sheer force of the Pill Tribulation.

Even though the Transformation Tribulation was far more powerful, Pill Tribulation was still comparable to the power of a Golden Core Stage attack, and a mere pill had zero resistance to lightning—it would shatter on impact.

Thus, they spent an enormous amount of time experimenting with materials that could be added to the Transformation Pill to increase its lightning resistance without affecting its transformation effects.

During this process, Lin Jing completely dismantled the last two Lightning-Avoiding Pills for research and consumed vast amounts of the Demon Court’s lightning-element resources.

If it weren’t for the Demon Court’s near-infinite support, even if Lin Jing had a hundred years, he wouldn't have been able to perfect this final Transformation Pill.

"As expected, the greatest enemy of research is funding."

Holding the successfully refined pill, Lin Jing didn’t immediately celebrate. He still couldn't guarantee what kind of Transformation Tribulation a demon beast would face after consuming the pill.

If the resulting tribulation remained as powerful as a Nascent Soul Stage Transformation Tribulation, then all their effort would have been for nothing.

"I should find another mosquito beast to test it on." Lin Jing muttered, gazing into the distance.

Just as he was about to take off, a white figure suddenly appeared in his vision.

"Holy Son, this humble one…" A large white-furred rat crawled forward.

"You again?" Lin Jing floated midair, looking toward the peak.

This white rat had previously been used for Pill Tribulation experiments, enduring Heavenly Thunder and seven different Treant Pills. That experience had caused its fur to turn completely white, though it had managed to restore some color over time as it progressed in its Foundation Establishment cultivation.

It refused to accept the identity of a mere "white lab rat."

It had worked hard and was now the leader of a group of five white rats.

Originally, Lin Jing had promised them that once all five had reached Foundation Establishment, he would send them to the Demon Court to become official disciples and start their path of cultivation. But in the end, all five refused to leave, choosing instead to continue following Lin Jing—even if it meant just standing guard at his doors.

"Holy Son, are you about to test a pill? I can do it!" The white rat eagerly volunteered.

Lin Jing shook his head. "You're only at mid-Foundation Establishment. This pill is extremely dangerous, and I don’t even know what kind of side effects it might have. It’s a nine-out-of-ten chance of death."

"But if I succeed, the benefits will be immense. After all, this is a pill personally refined by you, Holy Son!" the white rat said firmly.

"Did that guy put you up to this again?" Lin Jing asked knowingly.

The Pine Leaf Mouse had planted many spiritual plants around the cave residence during its free time, which the white rats were responsible for tending. Occasionally, it would also give them pointers on cultivation, as their paths were somewhat similar.

"It's not because of that senior… I just truly want to improve. I trust in your alchemy skills, Holy Son!"

"Fine. If you're so eager to improve, I'll give you this chance. But if you die, don’t blame me."

Lin Jing tossed the pill over. Since they had already successfully refined a Transformation Pill, creating more wouldn’t be difficult.

It didn't matter who tested it—what he really wanted to see was whether taking this Transformation Pill would still trigger a Nascent Soul-Level Transformation Tribulation.

"Thank you, Holy Son!" The white rat dropped to its knees in gratitude before scurrying up the peak and swallowing the pill.

The next moment—

Boom!

Thunder rumbled across the sky.

Staring at the dark clouds, the white rat gulped nervously, its eyes filled with fear.

"A Golden Core-Level tribulation… but just barely at the threshold."

Lin Jing’s eyes lit up with joy.

The Thunder Refining Method had indeed reduced the tribulation strength for those consuming Transformation Pills.

That said, this pill was only useful for Qi Refinement and Foundation Establishment demon beasts. Lin Jing hadn't yet improved its grade. If he did, he wasn't sure whether the tribulation strength would increase again.

Still, with a Golden Core-Level tribulation, while it remained extremely dangerous for regular Foundation Establishment demon beasts, it was no longer an insurmountable obstacle for talented prodigies at this stage.

For example, this white rat—while it couldn't be considered an elite prodigy, it was far from ordinary. After all, it had consumed four different Treant Pills and had been personally guided by the Pine Leaf Mouse in wood-element cultivation.

"Aaahhh!"

The white rat immediately activated its Hardening Ability, covering its body in Diamondwood Skin.

The next moment—

Crack!

The lightning struck, shattering its armor and leaving it half-dead on the ground.

But—it survived!

Though its flesh was scorched and torn, it had endured the tribulation.

And as the tribulation’s energy cleansed its body, its form began to shift—

From a white rat, it transformed into a white-haired boy, looking around six or seven years old, still retaining his rodent ears and tail.

"Why does it feel like this ability isn’t as strong as Mosquito Woman’s…?"

Lin Jing stroked his chin thoughtfully.

"So the Thunder Refining Method not only reduces the tribulation’s strength but also somewhat weakens the transformation power?"

Whatever.

As long as it worked. Demon power could be cultivated later.

With this pill, he was more than ready for the Alchemy Conference.

It was time to shake the world and announce the resurgence of the demon race!

Now, he just needed a high-profile demon beast for the demonstration.

Using some random, weak demon beast wouldn’t be impressive enough.

The test subject needed to be powerful, awe-inspiring—

A showstopper!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: Chapter 85: The Grass That Turns Back
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3 Chapter 85: The Grass That Turns Back

"Holy Son… does this mean I succeeded?"

A moment later, the white rat trembled as it struggled to its feet, looking like it was on the verge of death.

Lin Jing sighed.

This was exactly why the test subject for the Alchemy Conference needed to be strong.

Even if a demon beast successfully transformed using the Transformation Pill, if it ended up looking like this, it wouldn’t properly showcase the strength of the pill or the might of the demon race.

"You succeeded," Lin Jing said. "Congratulations… This is the Pill of Transformation. Since you’ve taken the form of a child, I shall name you Shu Tong."

"Shu Tong, for now, continue cultivating with your four companions. When I need you, I will summon you. That day shouldn’t be too far off."

"Thank you, Holy Son!!!"

In his eyes, this meant he had truly earned Lin Jing’s recognition!

The life-threatening test had been worth it.

With the experiment complete, Lin Jing examined Shu Tong’s condition one last time before leaving the cave to find his senior sister.

Although Shu Tong had transformed from a beast form into a humanoid demon, his cultivation and strength hadn’t changed much. The real difference lay in his intelligence and comprehension.

The key distinction between demon beasts and demons was that demons not only retained their powerful bodies but also gained the ability to cultivate most human techniques and spells.

In other words, they combined the strengths of both races.

To Lin Jing, Shu Tong’s transformation process was actually a normal case of demonization.

In contrast, the Mosquito Woman’s transformation seemed like an exception.

After all, mosquito beasts couldn’t be judged by the same standards as other demon beasts.

Of course, another possibility was that she had undergone a much harsher transformation process, which led to her powers increasing drastically.

"At least I lived up to expectations," Lin Jing said after finding Xu Qingyao. "I successfully refined a Transformation Pill that weakens tribulation lightning. The transformation effect might be slightly weaker, but it’s much safer."

"You really are a genius."

Xu Qingyao wasn't even surprised anymore.

A miracle-worker always managed to create miracles.

"So, do you need my help for something? You wouldn’t have come to me otherwise."

Lin Jing got straight to the point.

"I'm planning to participate in the Alchemy Conference in a few months, but I still need a suitable test subject for the Transformation Pill. While the pill’s side effects have been significantly reduced and the tribulation is now only at Golden Core level, not just any Foundation Establishment demon beast can survive it."

"The mosquito beasts aren’t an option—they require too many numbers to function."

"Hmm? Then how about…"

Lin Jing knew what she was going to say before she even finished.

"The Ice Soul Gu isn’t suitable either."

"I originally considered using it with the Transformation Grass, but that was only a last resort. There are two major risks involved.

First, gu worms have a unique life structure, and I don’t know if they can even transform properly.

Second, it’s already contracted to me. Just like how the Beast Taming Art can't form contracts with plant spirits, it’s possible that it also can’t contract with demon beasts that have transformed into human form."

"If it causes problems with my cultivation technique or contract system, it wouldn’t be worth the risk."

Xu Qingyao nodded in agreement.

"That makes sense. In that case, let’s find a Beast Taming Sect disciple and have them contract a white rat for testing first."

"It’ll also be a good way to assess the risks for Father and Ouyang."

"Has Senior Brother Ouyang left seclusion yet?"

Thunder Dragon suddenly asked.

"Ever since he returned from the Kirin Clan, he’s been in seclusion. Even though Senior Brother Ouyang contributed a lot at the Tea Gathering, Senior Sister still distributed an absurd amount of resources to every member of Sparrowfeather Squad. Without resources, of course, he needs to retreat and refine them."

"Because of that, even though I’ve already perfected the Transformation Method, I still haven’t had a chance to share the good news with him."

"Honestly, that’s not a bad thing," Lin Jing replied.

"If he had seen the hope of transformation too early, he would have grown impatient waiting. It’s better for him to remain in seclusion until the Transformation Pill is completely perfected."

"He’s still in seclusion…" Xu Qingyao pondered for a moment before saying, "Then how about we invite the Thunder Dragon Princess for testing instead?"

"Hm?"

Lin Jing blinked.

Xu Qingyao continued.

"Back when we first invited the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader to join our experiments, he refused. But as you said, from his perspective, that was an understandable decision—all creatures instinctively avoid risk."

"But now that the method has been verified, and it’s been recognized by the Demon Emperor, this test subject slot has become a highly valuable opportunity."

"If we show no resentment over his past rejection and still offer his daughter this chance, the Thunder Dragon Clan will be deeply grateful to us."

"And at that time… making them pay for their earlier shortsightedness wouldn’t be too much to ask, would it?"

Xu Qingyao smiled mischievously.

Lin Jing narrowed his eyes.

"So… what exactly does the Thunder Dragon Clan have that you're after?"

Xu Qingyao’s eyes gleamed.

"Obviously, their Dragon Scales and Blood!"

"You don’t know? Thunder Dragon Blood is considered one of the top ten body-refining treasures of the Tianyuan Continent!"

"It’s incredibly rare—even the Demon Court’s treasury doesn’t contain any. The Thunder Dragon Clan guards its blood extremely closely."

She lightly pinched Lin Jing’s arm, shaking her head.

"Look at you—so scrawny. Sure, I can tell you’ve trained your body, but you’re still too fragile."

"Forget about comparing yourself to those physically powerful demon beasts—even after I activated my half-demon bloodline at Foundation Establishment Perfection, my body is stronger than yours."

"As Beast Tamers, we have our Fusion Secret Art and Beast Weaponization, but that doesn’t mean we can afford to neglect our own physical strength. Especially you—as a Longevity Body, you should do everything possible to avoid injuries."

"Am I really that weak…?"

Lin Jing muttered.

In truth, the only body-refining he had done was through Diamond Fist.

Compared to the cultivators of the Ancient Kingdom, he was probably average.

But in Senior Sister’s eyes, after meeting more powerful body cultivators, he likely seemed weak.

It was true—he hadn’t had much time to train his body.

Most of his foundation came from Qi Refinement Thirteen-Layer breakthroughs.

"This isn’t about comparing yourself to others," Xu Qingyao said.

"The point is, with Thunder Dragon Blood, you’ll be able to greatly enhance your physical strength. You might not become peerless, but you’ll at least have the potential for a godlike physique."

"Preferably, we should try to get core dragon blood from the Thunder Dragon Ancestor. And when that happens…"

She grinned, patting Lin Jing’s shoulder.

"Make sure you save me a drop."

"Relying on you, Holy Son~"

Lin Jing was speechless.

Fine.

If this would forge a stronger body, then he’d give the Thunder Dragon Clan one more opportunity.

"Where is the Thunder Dragon Clan’s territory? Senior Sister, come with me."

"Oh… and let’s bring Mosquito Woman too. The Thunder Dragons should witness the first true demon transformation firsthand."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: Chapter 86: The Thunder Dragon Princess
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3 Chapter 86: The Thunder Dragon Princess

Qingzhou, Thunder Island.

Lightning crackled and roared as if the very clouds had become a vast sea of thunder. Amidst this stormy domain, high above Qingzhou, a colossal floating island loomed, shrouded in countless arcs of electricity.

This island was the territory of the Thunder Dragon Clan, one of the core demon clans of the Demon Court, situated deep within the chaotic Sea of Thunder.

For most cultivators, entering this domain was unthinkable. Anyone below Nascent Soul Stage wouldn’t even be able to make it past the outer lightning barrier, let alone step onto the island itself.

Buzzzzz—

At this moment, a group of uninvited guests had arrived at the Thunder Dragon Clan’s domain.

A ten-billion-strong swarm of mosquito beasts surged forward, each one shimmering with a crimson glow and exuding a terrifying presence. Even Core Formation demon beasts would normally avoid this region, yet these creatures moved freely, passing through the treacherous lightning barrier as if it were nothing.

Crackle!

As the dreadful mosquito swarm approached, deep within Thunder Island, the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader, who had perfectly comprehended the laws of thunder and lightning, suddenly opened his eyes.

Within this island, every arc of lightning was an extension of his divine sense. Yet now, what he sensed was an incomprehensible storm of ten billion mosquitoes.

"Cloud Sea Mosquito Beasts? Why would one of the Ten Terrors of the Cloud Sea appear here?!"

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader was stunned.

And it wasn’t just one—it was a swarm of ten billion.

Even most Nascent Soul cultivators would flee in the face of such an overwhelming force. Though the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader had reached the Peak Nascent Soul Stage, he did not dare underestimate such a bizarre and terrifying phenomenon.

Instantly, he manifested his true Thunder Dragon form and descended beyond Thunder Island to get a clearer look.

As his colossal dragon body materialized in the skies, the ten billion mosquitoes suddenly halted.

Then, to the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader’s shock, he saw a young man standing atop a massive mosquito at the heart of the swarm—his cultivation at Foundation Establishment Stage!

But even more astonishing—standing beside this mysterious young man was someone he knew very well.

"The Third Holy Maiden?!"

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader was momentarily stunned.

Yet, what truly unsettled him wasn’t just the Third Holy Maiden of the Demon Court standing slightly behind this young man, seemingly treating him as the leader—

It was the other figure standing beside him—a Mosquito Woman, possessing both human and mosquito beast features.

This characteristic… was something only demons could have!

"It has been a long time, Thunder Dragon Clan Leader," Xu Qingyao spoke slowly before gesturing toward the young man. "Allow me to introduce you—this is the Fourth Holy Maiden of the Demon Court, personally appointed by His Majesty the Demon Emperor—the Holy Maiden of Mosquitoes."

The Fourth Holy Maiden…?

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader’s heart trembled.

Could it be…

"Master, the chaotic energies here make it difficult for the swarm to remain stable for long," the Mosquito Holy Maiden suddenly spoke, addressing the mysterious young man as 'Master'.

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader fell completely silent.

Xu Qingyao continued her introduction. "Thunder Dragon Clan Leader, this young man is the Holy Son of the Demon Court, personally appointed by His Majesty the Demon Emperor—his status surpasses even the Four Holy Maidens."

The Holy Son…?

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader suddenly felt as though the Demon Court had become an entirely unfamiliar place.

"Thunder Dragon Clan Leader, could you disperse the surrounding lightning?"

When Lin Jing spoke, despite the vast difference in cultivation between them, the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader did not hesitate for even a moment. With a single command, he cleared the lightning storms in the area.

Then, his throat went dry. He had already guessed the truth.

"Greetings, Your Highness the Holy Son. Have you… found the key to the demon race’s resurgence?"

Lin Jing nodded. "Yes."

Beside him, Xu Qingyao sighed dramatically. "Oh, Thunder Dragon Clan Leader, when I invited you to participate in testing the Transformation Method, you outright refused. If you had accepted back then, your little princess might have become the Fourth Holy Maiden instead."

"You…"

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader was filled with bitterness.

So… it actually worked?!

For years, the Demon Court had desperately pursued a method for demon beasts to achieve transformation, struggling without success.

But now—it had been accomplished.

Looking at the majestic Mosquito Holy Maiden, the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader had complicated feelings.

If his daughter found out about this, she would probably throw a tantrum.

If his ancestor found out… he might just rip his scales off.

"Wait… Is he… Lin Jing, the Longevity Body?"

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader suddenly realized why Lin Jing looked familiar.

Lin Jing had not used any illusion techniques this time—he had come in his true form. Given the chaos he had caused among the Sky Lion Clan, many forces in Qingzhou were already familiar with his face.

"Thunder Dragon Clan Leader, though you refused before, I understand it was out of concern for your daughter's safety," Lin Jing said. "Now that I have developed a much safer version of the Transformation Pill, I will be attending the Qingzhou Alchemy Conference on the Demon Emperor’s orders. However, I need a demon beast to test the pill. Would you be willing to let your Thunder Dragon Princess participate?"

Upon hearing this, the Thunder Dragon Clan Leader was overjoyed.

Not only had the Thunder Dragon Clan avoided punishment for refusing the initial experiments, but they were now being offered a second chance!

"Your Highness the Holy Son, the Thunder Dragon Clan… will fully cooperate!"

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader lowered his head in gratitude.

"Good."

Lin Jing stood atop the giant mosquito and added, "However, this transformation opportunity is not a free gift. While the Transformation Pill is now much safer, there is still significant room for improvement…"

"I have heard that the Thunder Dragon Clan’s scales and blood have unique properties related to lightning. I would like to conduct further research using some Thunder Dragon blood. Can you authorize this?"

The Thunder Dragon Clan Leader nodded immediately. "This is a small matter. However, my daughter is not currently on the island. I will need some time to bring her back."

"Not on the island?" Lin Jing frowned. "Where is she? The Alchemy Conference is starting soon, and I will be heading to Tongtian Path shortly. Wait… she hasn’t reached Core Formation yet, has she?"

"Rest assured, Your Highness. My daughter is still at the Peak of Foundation Establishment. She has always been battle-hungry, preferring to defeat most prodigies in her realm before breaking through. She did the same in the Qi Refinement Stage, and now in the Foundation Establishment Stage, she is doing it again. Currently, she is traveling through Qingzhou under her elder brother’s escort, challenging human prodigies…

"I believe… she is currently at Tongtian Path."

"Oh? That makes things easier. Can you pinpoint her location? I will go to Tongtian Path myself."

At the same time, outside Lotus City, near Tongtian Path—

Lotus City had been established in Qingzhou by the Lotus Chamber of Commerce.

Years ago, when the Academy Great Transfer incident occurred, many academy prodigies were sent to Qingzhou. To protect them, the Lotus Chamber of Commerce had gathered them in Lotus City, waiting for the right opportunity to safely send them back to the Ancient Kingdom.

At this moment, a Thunder Dragon soared through the skies above the city.

"I heard this place is full of prodigies from the Ancient Kingdom. Any strong ones here? Come out and fight me!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Vol. 3 Chapter 87: Reappearance of the Dragon Palace
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol. 3 Chapter 87: Reappearance of the Dragon Palace

Outside Lotus City, thunder echoed through the skies.

The massive rumble immediately alerted the cultivators within the city.

Inside the city, a palace-dressed woman with the highest cultivation level opened her eyes and instantly teleported outside her cave dwelling.

Swish! Crack!!

Moments later, several Nascent Soul cultivators appeared beside her.

“Elder.....”

If Lin Jing were here, he would have definitely recognized that these Nascent Soul cultivators were all teachers from the academy.

Among them, Lin Jing had even taken classes from two of them.

Whether it was the Southern Mountain Demon Emperor’s invasion or the hosting of the Autumn Hunt, this academy elder had stepped forward.

During the Academy Great Transfer incident, not only Foundation Establishment students were affected—even Nascent Soul teachers and Nascent Soul Transformation elders had no way to resist the power of that teleportation treasure.

This group of academy experts happened to be the ones who landed in Qingzhou.

After arriving in Qingzhou, they didn’t rush to return to the Ancient Kingdom. First, traversing the Misty Forest was extremely dangerous. Second, many students were still scattered. As mentors, their top priority was to gather all the other geniuses who had also ended up in Qingzhou, and then return together to the Ancient Kingdom.

This Tongtian Path’s Lotus City was their temporary base. The academy teachers had long since spread word for all students who arrived in Qingzhou to gather here.

“That’s the Thunder Dragon Clan’s little princess,” one academy teacher spoke. “She’s been going around challenging human geniuses of the same realm lately... never thought she’d come to Lotus City too.”

“There’s a Thunder Dragon Prince at the Nascent Soul Transformation stage with her,” another said. “Just let a few students handle her. No need to provoke her. We don’t need to show ourselves...”

“I recall the Thunder Dragon Clan is a member of the Demon Court, right...” another teacher hesitated. “The Beast Taming Sect and the Demon Court are tangled together. Could it be the Demon Court already found our student Lin Jing...”

“Not sure if this Thunder Dragon Princess knows anything. Should we ask her?”

“Highly unlikely,” the palace-dressed woman said. “The Demon Court’s various races are more like an alliance. Each beast clan doesn’t have deep ties with one another. Although Xu Qingyao from the Beast Taming Sect became the Demon Court’s Third Holy Maiden, clans with a Void Mystical Demon Ancestor as their guardian, like this one, rarely have close relations with the Holy Maidens.

“Only those beast clans without a ‘Demon Ancestor’ to rely on would invest in the Holy Maidens, hoping to elevate their entire race. The Thunder Dragon Clan has always been isolated from the world—there’s no way they’d have deep connections with the Holy Maidens.”

“We don’t need to worry about Lin Jing. Just leave it to the Vice Dean.” As the palace-dressed woman finished speaking, one of the academy geniuses, under the teachers’ transmission, was already heading out of the city to face the Thunder Dragon Princess.

In Qingzhou, besides this group of academy powerhouses, even the Vice Dean—a cultivator at the Void Mystical Stage—had come to search for Lin Jing. Not because of his identity as a student or a genius of the Ancient Kingdom, but simply to prevent the Yin Corpse Sect and the Gu God Sect from gaining any advantage.

Since the Yin Corpse Sect cared so much about the Longevity Body, there was no way they could be allowed to have it. Finding and protecting Lin Jing was also a way to foil the enemies of the Ancient Kingdom and the academy.

But Lin Jing was just too good at hiding. Even with the Vice Dean at the Void Mystical Stage dispatched, they still hadn’t found him in Qingzhou.

Even after enlisting a seer from Tianji Pavilion, the best they could divine was that the Thunder Dragon was in Qingzhou.

That concealment item gifted by Senior Pine before parting had been a massive help.

“They’re here!!!”

At the same time, inside Lotus City, Lin Jing the “princess” looked at the dozen Ancient Kingdom geniuses flying toward her, eyes lighting up.

Indeed, those dozen or so academy students were also observing her, expressions solemn.

That breathtaking divine dragon form, over ten meters long, with gem-like scales crackling with lightning, made it impossible to raise any sense of resistance.

“Our teachers want us to fight that monster?”

Though these academy students had been tempered in various ways while stranded in Qingzhou, asking them to fight the Thunder Dragon Princess felt absurdly beyond their level.

With the Thunder Dragon Princess’ peak Emperor-tier bloodline, in the Ancient Kingdom, only those at the top of the Genius Rankings had the right to fight her.

And among the academy students transported to Qingzhou, the highest-ranked on the Genius Rankings was only “twenty-first.”

While being ranked twenty-first was still impressive, the gap between that and the top ranks was like heaven and earth.

Those at the top could easily crush ten ranked below them.

Everyone’s eyes turned toward a refined young man in brocade robes at Peak Foundation Establishment.

“Let me face you. I am Ji Changge of Ten Thousand Swords City, once ranked twenty-first on the Ancient Kingdom Genius Rankings!” The youth was a sword cultivator, now flying on his sword, arms folded behind his back. The flying sword beneath him was clearly of extraordinary quality.

“Twenty-first? That low?” the Thunder Dragon Princess said with a hint of disappointment in her eyes.

“That was in the past,” Ji Changge replied. Indeed, back then he was ranked twenty-first, but after arriving in Qingzhou, he had a fortuitous encounter and was no longer the same.

In these past few years, what he gained in Qingzhou far exceeded what he had from years of cultivation in Sword City and the academy.

Buzz.

A powerful sword intent surged from Ji Changge’s body, and sharp energy condensed into solid yellow flying swords all around him—one, two, three...

In an instant, 108 flying swords formed purely from sword intent gathered into a formation behind him.

Each sword radiated a chilling aura, their blades reflecting withered yellow leaves...

“Fully realized Withering Sword Intent—this sword intent can weaken an opponent’s spiritual energy...”

The surrounding academy students were shocked to see Ji Changge achieve full mastery of sword intent. The difficulty of mastering sword intent was no less than perfecting a spiritual physique.

However, even with such a display of power, the palace-dressed woman and several teachers secretly shook their heads. This sword intent alone was still no match for the Thunder Dragon Princess. After all, rumors said she had easily suppressed divine physiques elsewhere.

Boom!!!

Sure enough, moments later, the Thunder Dragon Princess took the brunt of the 108 perfected swords. The sword intent didn’t even scratch her lightning-covered scales.

Then, with a single claw, she sent Ji Changge flying.

“I told you, you’re too weak. Are you really the strongest Foundation Establishment cultivator here? I doubt it.” The Thunder Dragon Princess wasn’t interested in him at all. Her gaze shifted to two other academy students among the shocked crowd—the only ones who remained calm.

“There’s a terrifying power sleeping inside you two... far stronger than his... want to have a go?”

Following her gaze, the others looked toward a pair of siblings.

“The two Palace Lords of the Dragon Palace—Jiang Lin and Jiang Qi? She thinks they’re stronger than Senior Brother Ji?” The other students were stunned. Back at the academy, these two were only at mid-Foundation Establishment and hadn’t even made the rankings.

Though they had since reached Peak Foundation Establishment, no one thought they could compare to Ji Changge.

Many had wondered why Lin Jing handed the Dragon Palace he built over to these two. Could it be that this brother-sister duo wasn’t as simple as they seemed?

“How did she sense the Ice Soul Gu inside us...” The Jiang Family twins exchanged a glance, feeling troubled.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Vol. 3 Chapter 88: Return of the King
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol. 3 Chapter 88: Return of the King

“This Thunder Dragon Princess, why isn’t she satisfied after defeating one of us!”

“What did she just say? That Jiang Family Twin Physique is stronger than Ji Changge?” At the moment, the Thunder Dragon Princess’s comment surprised even the academy teachers.

Though the Jiang siblings had performed decently at the academy, compared to Ji Changge, they still came up short.

“Don’t forget, at the academy, they were in charge of the student group ‘Dragon Palace.’ They often carried out missions for the Demon-Slaying Bureau with the young master of the Demon-Slaying Gao Clan. You all should still remember who founded the Dragon Palace…” said the palace-robed elder.

“If they could earn Lin Jing’s trust, there’s no way they’re that simple. Maybe...” She was already beginning to suspect something.

“That Thunder Dragon Princess probably noticed something too.”

At this moment, the Jiang siblings stayed completely silent. They couldn’t understand how the Thunder Dragon Princess sensed the Ice Soul Lesser Gu inside them.

After all, Senior Pine had placed multiple seals on the Ice Soul Lesser Gu. As long as they didn’t reveal it on purpose, even an ordinary Nascent Soul Transformation cultivator wouldn’t notice.

Everything suggested that not even the academy’s Nascent Soul Elders or Nascent Soul teachers were aware of their Ice Gu abilities. But now this Peak Foundation Establishment Thunder Dragon... had sensed it? Unbelievable.

“We can’t fight... even though we only have the Lesser Gu, once exposed, we could still be targeted by the Gu God Sect. Let’s just surrender.” Through their twin-body connection, Jiang Lin secretly transmitted to her brother.

They were both transported to Qingzhou, and like Lin Jing, they hadn’t dared to use the Ice Soul Gu since.

“You must’ve sensed wrong. My sister and I are nowhere near Senior Brother Ji’s level—we couldn’t possibly be your match,” Jiang Qi stepped forward, cupping his fists slightly, speaking with regret.

“It’s a shame we can’t give you the fight you want.”

“You’re lying!!!” The Thunder Dragon Princess was frustrated. She couldn’t really tell what made the siblings so strong, but if her hidden elder brother said they were, then it must be true.

“Come on, show your true strength. You’re twins, right? I’ll let you fight together. If you can beat me, I’ll give you a drop of my scale blood.”

Thunder Dragon Scale Blood!

Upon hearing this, the observing academy powerhouses were shaken.

“Jiang Qi, Jiang Lin, if you’re confident, go ahead and fight. Thunder Dragon Scale Blood is one of the top ten body-refining treasures in the world. Even the lowest-grade scale blood would benefit you greatly…” the palace-robed elder transmitted to them.

Although she still didn’t believe the two could beat the Thunder Dragon Princess, the temptation of Thunder Dragon Scale Blood was just too great.

Even members of the royal family in the Ancient Kingdom probably didn’t get to temper their bodies with such blood. This princess probably assumed no one could beat her, so she made that grand promise.

Hearing the elder’s voice, the Jiang siblings felt conflicted, unsure what to do.

“Apologies, your highness. The power you sensed was passed to us by a senior. Without his permission, we cannot use it,” Jiang Lin said, her heart stirred by the offer of scale blood, but she knew even if they used the Lesser Gu, even if the two of them fought together, they still wouldn’t be a match for the Thunder Dragon Princess.

Better to let it go.

“So annoying. What kind of power needs permission to use? Is the person you mentioned here? Let them give permission now,” the Thunder Dragon Princess was getting impatient. The more unwilling they were to fight, the more curious she became.

She wasn’t letting today’s fight go.

“This senior of ours, he…” Jiang Qi just started to speak, when suddenly, a strange voice came from the void, making him and Lin Jing widen their eyes.

“He’s not the one we spoke of. Thunder Dragon Princess, if we seven wish to fight him, that’s our own choice—he doesn’t need to beg.”

A spatial vortex condensed in the sky, and from it stepped a white-robed youth, staring straight at the Thunder Dragon Princess.

“You just said that if someone can defeat you, they’ll get a drop of your scale blood. Is that true? What if I fight you instead?”

His appearance stunned both Jiang Lin and Jiang Qi—and even many of the city’s experts couldn’t believe it.

L...Lin Jing?!

The academy students were all shocked when they saw the face of the newcomer.

“Huh?” Even the Thunder Dragon Princess was confused. This so-called “senior” the siblings mentioned... was actually someone at the same Peak Foundation Establishment level as them?

“If you can beat me, I’ll still give you the scale blood—” Before she finished her sentence, Lin Jing smiled.

Though the Thunder Dragon Clan had already promised him five bottles of different-quality Thunder Dragon Scale Blood, he wasn’t about to turn down more. Even if he didn’t need it himself, he could give it to others—or his pet beasts!

“Then I’ll show you the power you’re so curious about.”

Lin Jing raised his hand as if to casually grasp the Thunder Dragon Princess from afar. At first, she didn’t care. But in the next instant, a terrifying chill burst from Lin Jing’s palm.

In the sky above, the cold instantly formed a massive phantom towering into the clouds—a giant spider. Its body was hidden in icy clouds, its aura terrifying. In terms of bloodline, it was no weaker than the Thunder Dragon Princess.

In just a blink, the Thunder Dragon Princess’s pupils contracted. She felt a mortal threat. Even the lightning arcing around her body froze completely.

Though they were on the same cultivation level, in this moment, the Thunder Dragon Princess felt an immense gap in strength—as if they weren’t even in the same dimension.

“Who... are you...”

“Brother...”

Realizing this young man could “one-shot” her, her first instinct was to call her brother.

But even as her whole body was frozen, her elder brother—who’d been secretly guarding her—did not act.

Because at that moment, the Thunder Dragon Prince clearly sensed who had just transported Lin Jing here.

“Ancestor…”

“This person…” In the void, the Thunder Dragon Prince looked at Lin Jing. The power of the Gu insect… that was one of the Ten Rare Gu—Ice Soul Gu.

But beyond that, there was a terrifying illusionary pressure that made even his bloodline tremble.

This was the Longevity Body Lin Jing—the same one who’d wreaked havoc on the Sky Lion Clan!

How was he transported here by their Ancestor?!

Right then, Lin Jing had used the Ice Soul Gu’s power to instantly freeze the Thunder Dragon Princess, leaving the gathered academy geniuses speechless.

Even Ji Changge, who had just been swatted away, stared at Lin Jing’s silhouette in the sky, suddenly understanding what it meant to be the “former No. 1 on the Genius Rankings.”

“Never thought...” And at that moment, Lin Jing—appearing in person over the city and beating the Thunder Dragon Princess in a high-profile move—smiled at the Jiang siblings.

“Didn’t expect to see you two got sent to Qingzhou too…”

“Senior Lin, you... why are you…” The twins were stunned. How could Lin Jing dare show up like this? Didn’t he know he was still being hunted by every major faction?

Even with the academy’s Vice Dean in Qingzhou, Lin Jing’s situation was extremely dangerous!

Not even a Void Mystical cultivator could fully protect Lin Jing here!

“Why am I here?” Lin Jing rubbed his chin and made something up, “Well, isn’t the Tongtian Tower’s Alchemy Conference starting? I just happened to refine a pretty good pill lately, so I wanted to join.

“I heard that during the conference, Tongtian Tower guarantees the safety of participating alchemists, right? Causing trouble during the conference would be disrespecting them...”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: . Chapter 89: Registration
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3. Chapter 89: Registration

What the...

No one expected that Lin Jing showed up just to sign up for the Tongtian Tower’s Pill Assembly.

This left the academy teachers inwardly in turmoil...

True, if Lin Jing successfully registers for the Pill Assembly, then during the event—whether it’s the Sky Lion Clan or the Yin Corpse Sect—they probably won’t dare stir up trouble in Tongtian City.

But what happens after the Pill Assembly ends?

Wouldn’t Lin Jing, still in Tongtian City, be like a turtle in a jar?

At that point, not only would his existing enemies come for him...

With his Longevity Body, even demonic beasts with no prior grudge would surely want a piece of the action.

Participating in the Pill Assembly... isn’t the wisest move.

Unless, the pill Lin Jing mentioned is something extremely special!

So special that it guarantees him victory in the Assembly.

Afterward, if the Tongtian Tower values his alchemy talent, they might offer him further protection.

A powerful dragon can’t suppress a local snake—in Qingzhou, cultivators from the Ancient Kingdom are still outsiders;
the Tongtian Tower is the true top dog among the human forces in Qingzhou.

In Qingzhou, aside from a few demonic beast powers, few can rival the Tongtian Tower.

If Lin Jing can gain its protection, then all the threats he currently faces would no longer be threats.

Could it be that Lin Jing plans to showcase his great talent in alchemy and join the Tongtian Tower?

In the teachers’ eyes, that possibility is ten times more likely than him joining the Demon Court.

After all, as someone with a Longevity Body, joining the Demon Court would be far too dangerous.

By contrast, although the Tongtian Tower is full of all kinds of people, it’s still a human faction—his Longevity Body’s flesh is useless to those of the same race.

On top of that, back in the Ancient Kingdom, Lin Jing had already shown formidable alchemy talent with things like the Rising Dragon Pill, so the teachers didn’t find it strange he might be seeking shelter from the Tongtian Tower.

But joining the Tongtian Tower... would be equivalent to leaving the Ancient Kingdom behind...

“Careful!”

Just as everyone’s attention was locked on Lin Jing, the void suddenly tore open, and a massive claw reached out from within.

The palace-robed elder from the academy, fearing it was targeting Lin Jing, instantly teleported outside the city—but the claw only dragged away the frozen Thunder Dragon Princess and didn’t seem to mean any harm to Lin Jing.

“Elder Fan, don’t let them get away! That Thunder Dragon still owes Senior Lin a drop of scale blood!”

The Twin Physique, seeing the Thunder Dragon Princess being dragged off, panicked.

“It’s fine. I believe that Thunder Dragon Princess will keep her promise,” Lin Jing waved his hand and said to the Twin Physique. That dragon was just being dragged back home.

They... would see each other again soon enough.

“It’s really you...” After Elder Fan arrived, one teacher after another appeared. They all stared at Lin Jing in disbelief.

In the end, it turned out Lin Jing had shown up on his own, rather than being found by the Ancient Kingdom.

“Lin Jing... just now you said you want to join the Pill Assembly—what do you mean by that?” Elder Fan asked. “Do you not understand the situation you’re in? I’ll contact the Vice Dean immediately and have him escort you back to the Ancient Kingdom!”

“Elder Fan.” Lin Jing gave a formal bow. “Please don’t trouble yourself.”

“The reward of this Pill Assembly happens to be something I need, so no matter what, I must take part in it.”

“As for safety, I’ve found a powerful protector from the Sky Lion Clan. With her protection, I don’t think there will be any major problems.”

“You mean...” Elder Fan’s gaze sharpened. They had already heard what Lin Jing did at the Sky Lion Clan.

At the time, the academy experts assumed the Sky Lion Holy Maiden Gu Qianqiu’s power was just a temporary bloom, but now Lin Jing was saying her power... still exists?

How could that be...

But... Lin Jing had just descended through a spatial vortex.

To open a portal like that, you basically need to be at the Void Mystical Stage—so does that mean the Sky Lion Holy Maiden Gu Qianqiu really still has that power?

“Even so, it’s still too dangerous!”

Elder Fan objected. Even with a Void Mystical Stage protector, there’s no guarantee Lin Jing will be safe.

The Yin Corpse Sect and the Gu God Sect alone had several Void Mystical cultivators—never mind the countless demonic beasts with Longevity Bodies!

“As long as I want to hide, no one can find us. Don’t worry, Elder. I’m still going to join the Pill Assembly.”

At this moment, Lin Jing naturally wouldn’t reveal that he had become the Holy Son of the Demon Court—that would ruin the bait.

A Void Mystical Stage protector was the perfect cover...

Someone who isn’t all-powerful but still has significant strength—when enemies find out, they’ll definitely rally more allies to attack him and split the spoils.

That way, he could fish up even more prey.

“Elder Fan, my mind’s made up. Everything else can wait until after the Pill Assembly. Inside the Tongtian Tower, there’s something I must obtain,” Lin Jing said.

“And as for the two of you, you’re staying here—but I’ll go ahead and take out what’s inside your bodies, so you don’t end up in danger because of it again.”

He looked at Jiang Lin and Jiang Qi and reached out.

Since they carried the Ice Soul Lesser Gu, leaving them outside posed a problem. Once the Gu God Sect’s experts arrive at Tongtian Dao, things could get messy.

Rather than taking them with him, it was better to remove the Gu now and return it later.

Jiang Lin and Jiang Qi cupped their fists slightly, feeling relieved.

Though they lost a powerful asset, at least they didn’t have to live in fear anymore.

That moment when the Thunder Dragon Princess locked eyes with them really scared the h*ll out of them.

“Elder Fan, aren’t you going to stop him???” one of the teachers asked as Lin Jing flew off toward Tongtian City.

“Sigh.” Elder Fan shook his head. “How? The one who brought him here is clearly at the Void Mystical Stage—likely that Sky Lion Holy Maiden, Gu Qianqiu.

We don’t know how Lin Jing got her protection, but clearly, being by her side is safer than staying here.”

“We should hurry and contact the Vice Dean.”

“From what he said, there’s something inside the Tongtian Tower that he must obtain. If my guess is right, it probably has to do with that Longevity Body.

For the Sky Lion Holy Maiden to gain that kind of power, the price must’ve been huge.

And as it happens, inside the Tongtian Tower is something that can offset such a price. That’s likely why Lin Jing insists on joining the Pill Assembly no matter what.”

“Let him go. Besides contacting the Vice Dean, I’ll also reach out to the Ancient Kingdom and call for more reinforcements.

If, after the Pill Assembly ends, we can bring Lin Jing and a Void Mystical Stage Longevity Body back to the Ancient Kingdom... that would be the best possible outcome.”

Elder Fan couldn’t help but fill in the blanks with his imagination.

Not long after, Lin Jing had truly arrived in Tongtian City in the flesh.

Since he hadn’t altered his appearance, someone quickly recognized him.

Lin Jing didn’t hesitate—he went straight to the Pill Assembly registration area of Tongtian Tower and pulled out the participation token once gifted to him by Alchemist Jie Geng...

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: . Chapter 90: Winds Stirring
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3. Chapter 90: Winds Stirring

There was still some time before the Pill Assembly began. Before it started, the Tongtian Tower would prepare an Alchemy Pavilion for each qualified participating alchemist to use for practice and preparation.

After Lin Jing registered, he naturally received his own personal pavilion.

However, to avoid interruptions, he chose not to stay there. Instead, he transformed and left in disguise to wait for the event to start.

And just this act of registration had already caused news of Lin Jing’s appearance to spread through Tongtian City at an absurd speed…

............

At the same time, on Thunder Island.

After the Thunder Dragon Crown Prince dragged the Princess back, he himself was then pulled back by the Thunder Dragon Clan’s Ancestor from afar.

Once the Clan Leader melted the frost on the Thunder Dragon Princess with lightning, she regained her senses.

With talent like that, no wonder he could create the Transformation Technique and gain recognition from the Demon Emperor.

“What the hell happened...” The Thunder Dragon Crown Prince was even more shaken. He looked at the Third Holy Maiden standing beside the Clan Leader and at the Mosquito Woman who appeared to be from the demon race, utterly stunned inside.

Then the Thunder Dragon Princess gasped softly and slowly woke up, blinking in confusion at her surroundings.

“F-Father? What is...” Her last memory was of being frozen by Lin Jing.

“I actually lost... That power was...” Fear gripped her heart.

“The one who defeated you was Lin Jing, the Longevity Body who previously caused an uproar at the Sky Lion Clan—formerly the number one Foundation Establishment prodigy of the Ancient Kingdom,” the Clan Leader said slowly.

“It was him?!” the Princess blurted out. No wonder…

As the young princess of the Thunder Dragon Clan, she naturally knew the Ancient Kingdom was the center of the Tianyuan Continent. Their prodigies were undoubtedly the strongest.

“But now, he holds another identity—he has been appointed the Holy Son of the Demon Court by the Demon Emperor himself! His Holiness created the Transformation Technique, and this time came to see you in hopes of inviting you to be a test subject for the pill.”

“His Holiness knew you love to fight, and likely wouldn’t be convinced unless you were defeated in battle—so, you’ve now seen his strength for yourself. From here on, follow him and obey his orders.”

“All for the sake of the Transformation Technique.”

“This is also the will of the Ancestor.”

The Thunder Dragon Princess opened her mouth slightly, her gaze shifting to the Third Holy Maiden and especially to the Mosquito Woman...

“Transformation Technique? Something like that... is really possible?”

Although the Demon Court had always sought the revival of the demon race, to a newer generation prodigy like the Princess, that goal had always felt abstract.

The so-called great revival of the demon race seemed more like a distant idea to these young prodigies.

She never imagined that one day, she would be part of it.

“Holy Son... Holy Son...” A moment later, her heart suddenly started racing. She couldn’t stop herself from becoming deeply curious about Lin Jing.

Strong, mysterious, of noble status. Clearly born of the Ancient Kingdom, yet he had become the Holy Son of the Demon Court—just what kind of person was this?

.............

Not long ago, news of Lin Jing's reappearance had completely swept through the Tongtian Dao and was now spreading across all of Qingzhou!

Cultivators everywhere were talking about it.

“Did you hear? That Thunder Dragon Princess who came to Qingzhou and went around challenging people ended up at Lotus City, where the Ancient Kingdom cultivators were gathered! Guess what? That Longevity Body Lin Jing, who caused chaos at the Sky Lion Clan, was in Lotus City too!”

“He fused with that Ice Soul Rare Gu, and with just one move, he drove back that arrogant Thunder Dragon Princess. He’s insanely strong! No wonder he was once ranked number one on the Ancient Kingdom’s Human List.”

“Wait, what? The Longevity Body showed up? Where is he now, still in Lotus City?”

“No, he went to the Tongtian Tower and signed up for the Pill Assembly. A lot of people saw him.”

“How did he even dare?!”

“During the Pill Assembly, Tongtian City is extremely safe—he should be fine.”

“Remember that other Longevity Body? That Sky Lion Holy Maiden, Gu Qianqiu? She forced a power-up using a secret technique and ended up with a grave illness. Only one of the Assembly’s rewards can alleviate it, so Lin Jing had no choice but to come and try to get it for her.”

“Apparently, Lin Jing was already a prodigy in alchemy back in the Ancient Kingdom, so he might really win that reward. If Gu Qianqiu recovers, then his safety is assured again.”

“So that’s how it is...”

A passing rogue cultivator interrupted their discussion: “That’s not what I heard. I heard Lin Jing wants to become the Tongtian Tower Master’s disciple and came to show off his alchemy skills at the Assembly in hopes of getting noticed.”

“Yeah, I heard that too. Apparently, Lin Jing used his Longevity Body’s blood and flesh to create a special longevity pill even humans can use. He has a high chance of winning first place in the Assembly. There’s precedent for Pill Assembly champions becoming the Tower Master’s named disciples.”

“Even if it’s only a named disciple, the Tongtian Tower Master is a Dao-Seeking Stage expert. Becoming his disciple would completely change Lin Jing’s fate!”

“The Tower Master is obsessed with pills—if someone makes a pill that interests him, they can become his disciple. And a Longevity Body alchemist? That’s probably never happened before.

Compared to that, the Ancient Kingdom’s Ancient Emperors care a lot about bloodline and only nurture their own clans. They’re not known for taking disciples. If I were a Longevity Body, I’d definitely ditch the Ancient Kingdom and latch onto the Tongtian Tower.”

“That’s not quite right.” Another passing rogue cultivator chimed in. “I heard Lin Jing is just using the Pill Assembly to buy time under the Tower’s protection! Rumor has it, multiple Void Mystical Demon Ancestors are eyeing his flesh and blood, so he fled to Tongtian Dao and is using the Assembly as cover while waiting for reinforcements from the Ancient Kingdom to protect him.”

Lin Jing had released more than a dozen different rumors.

Each one was extremely buzzworthy, easily spreading news of his reappearance far and wide.

Yinhou Secret Realm.

The Nine Infant Demon Lord had personally gone out to hunt Lin Jing, but unexpectedly ran into the Vice Dean of the Academy in Qingzhou. A fierce battle broke out, and the Demon Lord had to retreat to his lair to evade his powerful foe.

“The Longevity Body is joining the Pill Assembly?” Hearing this latest intel, the Nine Infant Demon Lord immediately contacted his ally in the Gu God Sect.

He knew capturing the Longevity Body under the Academy’s protection was impossible with just the Yin Corpse Sect’s strength.

“He’s finally shown up again.”

The Gu God Sect had sent one of their two great elders to Qingzhou—Elder Thunder, who hosted the Lightning Tribulation Gu in his body. After receiving the message from the Nine Infant Demon Lord, he chuckled...

“I’m only here for the Ice Soul Gu, not the Longevity Body.

With everyone else focused on fighting over his blood and flesh, I should be able to snatch the Gu with ease...”

Sky Lion Secret Realm.

The Sky Lion Ancestor received the news and, worried that he couldn’t devour this ‘big meat’ alone, began calling up his sworn brothers...

“You’ve all been eyeing our clan’s Longevity Blood for a while, haven’t you? Well, now’s your chance. Help me out—this Longevity Body from the Ancient Kingdom, you can split him up among yourselves.

All I want... is revenge. I only want our own Sky Lion Holy Maiden!!”

With Lin Jing’s rumors flying around, it wasn’t just his old enemies—

Even factions that had nothing to do with him were now drawn in, eager to dip their toes into this murky water.

“You’re saying that Longevity Body might’ve made a pill from his own flesh and blood that even humans can take?”

Many ancient monsters nearing the end of their lifespan also came out of seclusion, their eyes gleaming as they looked toward the Tongtian Tower:

“If it’s true that a Longevity Body’s pills can be used by humans too... now wouldn’t that be something...”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: . Chapter 91: Demon Emperor, You...
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3. Chapter 91: Demon Emperor, You...

The Pill Assembly was undoubtedly a major event in Qingzhou.

Every time the Pill Assembly came around, cultivators would speculate on what new spiritual pills might appear, paying close attention... wondering if these innovative pills could be useful to them!

However, this particular Pill Assembly was somewhat unusual.

Because of Lin Jing’s appearance, discussions about him were starting to overshadow the event itself!

Even within Tongtian Tower, Lin Jing’s participation was being taken very seriously.

There were concerns that if mishandled, Tongtian City could become a battlefield over the Longevity Body.

The Twelve Pill Sovereigns of Tongtian Tower—each a master of a distinct school of pillcraft—all possessed the ability to refine Sixth-Tier pills with ease. Under special circumstances where heaven, earth, and human conditions aligned, even Seventh-Tier pills might be within reach.

In Qingzhou, aside from the Tower Master of Tongtian Tower, these twelve represented the pinnacle of alchemy across the Tianyuan Continent.

Currently, the three overseeing this Pill Assembly—Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign, Divine Cauldron Pill Sovereign, and Creation Pill Sovereign—were in the middle of discussing Lin Jing’s participation.

“There are three ways to qualify for the Pill Assembly.”

“One: Each of Tongtian Tower’s affiliated forces gets one entry slot per Assembly.”

“Two: Win in alchemy contests held by Tongtian Tower across various regions to earn qualification.”

“As for the third, core members of Tongtian Tower have the authority to issue participation tokens externally.”

“This Lin Jing, he registered using one of those participation tokens.” Divine Cauldron Pill Sovereign, an elderly man radiating heat, extended his hand and tossed out a token.

“This token, I believe it was issued by your disciple.” He looked at the silver-haired woman nearby—Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign.

“I’ve already questioned my disciple about this matter,” Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign said. “My disciple, Jie Geng, did indeed give a participation token to someone, but that person was a young alchemist named Fire Dragon Alchemist, not Lin Jing. That alchemist appears to be under Demon Court’s Holy Maiden Xu Qingyao.”

“There are two possibilities here. One, the Fire Dragon Alchemist Jie Geng met is actually Lin Jing in disguise.”

“Or two, Lin Jing obtained the participation token from that Fire Dragon Alchemist.”

“Either way, it means the Longevity Body has already made contact with the Demon Court.”

“For Lin Jing to appear openly in Tongtian City, he must be under the protection of the Demon Court’s Third Holy Maiden… which means… with Sky Lion Holy Maiden Gu Qianqiu, the Third Holy Maiden Xu Qingyao, and experts from the Ancient Celestial Kingdom’s Academy backing him, he’s gathered quite the formidable alliance. If conflict breaks out, the consequences would be disastrous.”

“Even though we don’t yet know why the Longevity Body is attending the Pill Assembly, we must ensure no fighting erupts in Tongtian City.”

“A year ago, the Tower Master went into secluded cultivation and left the Assembly in our hands. In any case, we must not disturb the Tower Master’s cultivation…” Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign said. “Senior Brother Creation, you’re the strongest among us. When the time comes, we’ll count on you to personally warn anyone backing the Longevity Body.”

“No problem, but the real question is—what happens after the Assembly?” Creation Pill Sovereign, a handsome and carefree middle-aged cultivator, raised an eyebrow.

“If the rumors are true and Lin Jing has come to seek refuge with Tongtian Tower, should we protect him?” he asked with keen interest.

“Haha.” Divine Cauldron Pill Sovereign let out a loud laugh. “That depends on whether Lin Jing has the chops. Even if he wins the Assembly, it’s not worth it for Tongtian Tower to offend so many factions just to shelter him.”

“Unless his pills are truly shocking, but do you think a mere Foundation Establishment cultivator could pull that off?”

“Sure, I have talent in alchemy,” said Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign, taking out a Gluttonous Pill—a pill created for the Assembly, and indeed an impressive one. “But even with that level, I wouldn’t expect Tongtian Tower to protect me.”

After all, the Pill Assembly had drawn the attention of Void Mystical Demon Ancestors—likely fewer than a handful in number…

Even with Tongtian Tower’s deep foundation, would it really be willing to stir up trouble for the sake of a Longevity Body?

Not to mention, that Longevity Body wasn’t even a Qingzhou cultivator but one from the Ancient Celestial Kingdom.

“After the Assembly, we’ll find a reason to drive Lin Jing out of Tongtian City. These grudges… we don’t need to get involved. Let’s just see if we can fish any benefits from the chaos.”

The three Pill Sovereigns finalized their stance on Lin Jing’s participation.

In the blink of an eye, several months passed.

The start of the Pill Assembly drew closer and closer.

Despite the potential for major conflict, huge numbers of cultivators still flocked to Tongtian City.

The Pill Assembly was also big business.

Many new, effective pills would be snapped up in bulk by powerful factions the moment the event ended.

If you moved too slowly, you might not get any at all. After all, even the best alchemist had limited time and materials.

But if a faction could secure some uniquely effective pills early, they could rapidly boost their strength and outpace neighboring powers.

A single pill could change the fate of an entire city—that was entirely possible.

And now, with the Assembly about to begin and the net nearly cast, Lin Jing and Xu Qingyao were panicking.

“What do we do.”

“We can’t reach the Demon Emperor at all.”

Before Lin Jing refined the Transformation Pill and set off for the Thunder Dragon Clan, Xu Qingyao had clearly contacted His Majesty the Demon Emperor and informed him that Lin Jing would be attending this Assembly.

The Demon Emperor had agreed and said he would personally intervene when the time came.

But now, with the moment upon them—the Demon Emperor was missing!

“Where the hll could His Majesty the Demon Emperor have gone?”

Lin Jing was pssed. This was the critical moment! He’d been counting on the Demon Emperor to pull off some grand miracle—but he’d just gone off the grid?!

Lin Jing exhaled. “Should we just... not go?”

“Maybe next time.”

“Anyway, the only ones who care whether I show up are enemies. Screwing with them a little might not be such a bad idea.”

“Is that... really okay?” Senior Sister Tian furrowed her brow in deep thought.

“Whether it is or not, we don’t have much choice. There’s no way I’m entering the Assembly alone if we can’t contact His Majesty.”

“Even though my illusion techniques are decent, that place… at least a dozen Void Mystical eyes will be fixed on Tongtian City. Once I show up, hiding again will be a thousand times harder.”

“Without a protector, the day the Pill Assembly ends will be the day I die…”

With no better options, the two of them resigned themselves to ghosting the Pill Assembly...

Just as they were packing up and preparing to leave Tongtian City behind, suddenly—a rift opened up nearby...

And then, a girl barely into her teens stepped out, wearing a white dragon robe, silver-haired, with a round tigerish face, tiger ears, and a tiger tail.

Lin Jing and Xu Qingyao stared at the white-haired, tiger-eared, tiger-tailed girl in stunned silence, their worst fear slowly dawning...

“I’m late,” the girl said. “This Emperor has arrived.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: Chapter 92: Heavenly Demon Scroll
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3. Chapter 92: Heavenly Demon Scroll

“Y-Your Majesty the Demon Emperor?!”

Staring at this "demon girl," Xu Qingyao slightly opened her mouth, speaking in disbelief.

As much as she didn’t want to believe it, the aura emanating from the other party left her no choice.

This tiger-faced, white-haired girl in a dragon robe was none other than the Demon Emperor who ruled over the Demon Court!

...Her future master!

“You... you underwent Transformation?”

Xu Qingyao instantly understood why she had been unable to contact the Demon Emperor for a while.

“Mm. I found a method to cultivate that Tier-3 Transformation Grass up to near-Immortal quality—enough to affect me. After calculating that I could survive the Tribulation of Transformation, I took it directly,” the Demon Emperor said calmly, as if it were nothing.

“Understood...” Lin Jing took a deep breath.

“Then... Your Majesty, in your current state... are you able to fight?” he asked.

Because no matter how you looked at it, this transformation didn’t seem entirely successful...

“No need to worry. I only look like this because I practiced the Demon Clan technique of the Divine Tiger Clan. It granted me greater potential, which is why I took this form. In fact, compared to my old beast form, this one has greater potential for growth...”

“Just like a human growing from a child to an adult, their strength skyrockets.”

The Demon Emperor spoke indifferently. “So don’t worry. Just go to the Pill Assembly. Even if the Gu God of the Gu God Sect or the Corpse Emperor of the Yin Corpse Sect come after you, I’ll make sure they lose a piece of themselves.”

“Thank you, Your Majesty.” With the Demon Emperor’s promise, Lin Jing felt much more at ease. Still… could it really not be that she rushed her transformation too quickly and messed it up? Lin Jing didn’t dare ask.

Then, the Demon Emperor tossed out a scroll. “Refine this. You should be familiar with it.”

“It also comes from the Demonic Sky Sect. Its name is the Heavenly Demon Scroll.”

“Once refined, it will display soul images of any lifeforms within a certain range who harbor intense killing intent, hostility, or ill will toward you. If you kill the lifeform shown on the scroll with your own hands, your divine sense will grow stronger.”

“Eventually, your divine sense will allow you—just like this scroll—to sense whether any surrounding life harbors killing intent, hostility, or ill will toward you. No matter how well they hide it, your divine sense won’t be fooled.”

“For someone with the Longevity Body, this treasure should be of great value.”

Lin Jing solemnly accepted the Heavenly Demon Scroll.

“When the time comes, I’ll use the marks on this scroll to hunt down anyone inside or outside Tongtian City who bears malice toward you. No—more accurately, I’ll leave them barely alive, so you can kill them yourself and cultivate your divine sense.”

“I said all spoils of war would belong to you, and that includes their lives.”

“Get ready.”

The Demon Emperor slowly stepped into the void, then muttered to herself in a deserted place.

“As long as I can get the Longevity Body to cultivate the Heavenly Demon Divine Sense Technique, I should be able to prove that compared to the Ancient Emperor, I’m the true sovereign worthy of his loyalty.”

After all, she had practiced this technique herself. Even in its hazy form, she could sense the heart of that Longevity Body of the Ancestor.

This person harbored no real malice toward beasts or the demon race. He wasn’t a racist. On the contrary, upon seeing her transformation into a demon, what he showed was... curiosity.

Most human cultivators held to the belief that “those not of my kind must be evil.”

But perhaps because Lin Jing came from the Beast Taming Sect, he was different from most cultivators of the Ancient Kingdom.

That made the Demon Emperor realize—if the Demon Court sincerely treated the Longevity Body well, then he wouldn’t keep his distance just because of race.

Since that was the case, there was no need to treat Lin Jing as an outsider just because he was human. If she continued nurturing him as the heir to the Demon Court, the Demon Emperor was confident she could tie his heart to them, making him willingly work for the Demon Court.

Unless the Ancient Emperor married off the princess of the Ancient Kingdom to Lin Jing and took him as a disciple, she couldn’t think of any reason Lin Jing would return to the Ancient Kingdom instead of staying with the Demon Court.

And the Ancient Emperor definitely wouldn’t do that. After all, compared to the value he held for the Demon Court, Lin Jing meant far less to the Ancient Kingdom.

“I feel like... after my transformation, I’ve gotten smarter.” The Demon Emperor licked her paw, already itching to unleash carnage and test out this demon form.

...........

A few days later.

The Pill Assembly... was about to begin.

The event was held in a vast alchemy field in Tongtian City, with over a hundred separate pill refining platforms provided for participating alchemists.

At that time, each alchemist would need to refine pills on their assigned platform—simultaneously, in front of everyone!

In the end, pills would be judged by the Pill Sovereigns based on their effects and refining order.

This format was a huge test of an alchemist’s skill, since shifts in ambient temperature, spiritual energy, and even pill fragrance could interfere with others’ pill refining.

However, as long as it wasn’t intentional interference, any effects caused by normal pill refining were within the rules!

While the quality of the pill determined the score, any alchemist overly affected by external factors—no matter how magical their pill idea—would be told by Tongtian Tower to come back next time once they’d polished their technique. It was a sign their fundamentals weren’t solid enough.

“Where’s the Longevity Body?”

“Haven’t seen him yet.”

At this moment, the pill field was already packed with alchemists, but all the spectators were focused on one person—Lin Jing.

“There he is!” Finally, a moment later, Lin Jing appeared. But few could tell where he’d come from. It wasn’t until he walked toward his assigned pill platform in Firecloud Pill Robes that the surrounding crowd began to stir.

“This Longevity Body really knows how to hide. From now on, keep your eyes on him.”

In the void, countless Void Mystical Stage experts were also hidden. Elder Thunder of the Gu God Sect had been monitoring the pill field the entire time but still couldn’t figure out where Lin Jing had come from.

“Jiu Ying, your divine sense is stronger. Lock onto him!”

“Hold—” The Ancestor of the Sky Lions was also in Tongtian City at this moment, secretly observing the pill field. Although he wanted to seize Lin Jing right then and there, all the demon ancestors who had entered the city had already been warned by Tongtian Tower upon arrival. Naturally, none of them dared cause trouble during the Assembly and risk making enemies.

Many understood that the real battle would begin after the Assembly ended.

“You... are that Longevity Body, aren’t you?”

After Lin Jing had taken his place by his platform, to his side, a seductive woman with red curly hair licked her lips and looked at him.

“Our Ancestor is quite interested in you. After the Pill Assembly, would you be willing to meet in the city?”

Many spectators and alchemists looked over, instantly recognizing her—one of the concubines of the Skyfire Ancestor. That old Void Mystical monster had an overpowered cultivation method and frequently needed to vent his lust. He had countless wives and concubines, but it was said he was reaching the end of his lifespan and no longer even had the energy for dual cultivation… He’d become so desperate he was allegedly using boys and girls from his own bloodline to refine youth-restoring demonic pills.

Lin Jing calmly extended a hand toward her. A black scroll floated up and unfurled in the air.

The open scroll was filled with countless portraits—densely packed.

“Is your Ancestor’s face on this scroll? If it is, I wouldn’t mind meeting.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: Chapter 93: Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3. Chapter 93: Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor

"This is..."

Lin Jing took out the Heavenly Demon Scroll, and the scroll floated in midair.

The red-haired woman looked stunned.

She wasn’t alone—most cultivators who laid eyes on the Heavenly Demon Scroll didn’t recognize what it was.

But while they might not know what the scroll was, they did recognize the images on it!

"That’s the Nine-Infant Demon Lord from the Yin Corpse Sect... Why is his portrait on there?"

"And the Ancestor of the Sky Lions..." someone pointed out a lion-shaped Soul Image.

"The image of Skyfire Ancestor is here too! What the h*ll is this scroll?"

The scroll didn’t just show famous powerhouses—it was filled with images of powerful demonic beasts too.

Dozens of Moon Wolf Clan members, scores of Sky-Swallowing Serpents, and over a hundred Flesh-Eating Ants... all crammed onto the scroll.

"Could it be..."

"Could this be the lost supreme treasure of the fallen Demonic Sky Sect—the Heavenly Demon Scroll!?"

Suddenly, a voice rang out from the distance.

Among the three Pill Sovereigns descending from the Tongtian Tower, the Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign spoke up in shock.

"The Heavenly Demon Scroll can record the portraits of anyone within range who harbors strong hostility toward its holder..."

"After the Demonic Sky Sect was wiped out, the scroll vanished. I never expected it to show up here."

"Sun and Moon Boat Sect!"

As the Sun and Moon Pill Sovereign finished speaking, a stir rippled through the crowd at the Alchemy Conference.

Everyone looked at the scroll again, hearts pounding.

So many people and beasts in Tongtian City were secretly plotting against the Longevity Body... just on this scroll alone, there were several Void Mystical Demon Ancestors!

"Good eye, Pill Sovereign. This is indeed the Heavenly Demon Scroll." Lin Jing smiled upon seeing someone who recognized it.

Now that Lin Jing had confirmed it, the killing intent in the eyes of the cultivators and beasts revealed on the scroll only intensified.

They were all lurking in or around Tongtian City, watching the Alchemy Conference. Lin Jing exposing their intentions like this was practically a public slap in the face.

"That little brat—!" In one corner, the Vice Dean of the Academy tugged at his goatee, momentarily blacking out. He had no idea where Lin Jing got this thing from, but pulling it out now? Was Lin Jing trying to increase his enemies?

Right now, sure, many had ill intentions toward Lin Jing. But as long as they hadn’t acted, there was still a chance they’d back off based on how the situation developed.

Now though, Lin Jing had publicly called them out. Even if they couldn’t get him, they’d at least make sure he couldn’t walk away clean. After all, who wanted a terrifying, long-lived potential enemy running around?

"That was a death wish."

"What’s this human relying on?"

Several Demon Ancestors muttered under their breath, itching to make a move right then and there.

But just at that moment, a voice rang out—

"I’d like to see who dares touch him."

Just as everyone was doubting Lin Jing’s ability to survive what came next, a sharp sword aura pierced the heavens.

The void split open, and a gray-haired old woman in a sword robe stepped out, sword in hand.

Buzz!

The moment she appeared, it felt like the entire sky had been pierced through. In the crowd, the Academy’s powerhouses all lit up with recognition.

"It’s her!"

The Vice Dean of the Academy looked elated. They’d waited so long for reinforcements from the Ancient Celestial Kingdom, and to think she was the one to arrive.

With her here, the goateed Vice Dean felt way more confident about keeping Lin Jing safe after the conference ended.

"Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor, the elder of the Heavenly Sword Gate of the Ancient Celestial Kingdom—once hailed as the strongest sword cultivator under the heavens!"

Someone in the crowd recognized her.

A Void Mystical Stage Sword Cultivator.

Sword cultivators were already famous for their offense and unmatched combat power—let alone someone like Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor, a living legend.

She was the monstrous genius of sword cultivation from thousands of years ago in the Ancient Kingdom.

No one had expected the Ancient Celestial Kingdom to dispatch this kind of terrifying elder to protect a single Longevity Body.

"So you're Lin Jing," the Sword Ancestor said as she looked at him. "From now on, I’ll ensure your safety."

"Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor..." Lin Jing slightly bowed his head.

He’d considered that, as a student of the Academy, maybe the Academy would protect him. And that maybe, as a member of the Demon-Slaying Bureau, some of their people might back him up.

But he never expected that the one to arrive would be the elder of the Heavenly Sword Gate.

If there was any connection between them at all, it would be that he happened to know her personal disciple.

From the Ancient Kingdom—Cold Moon Sword Immortal.

But... he didn’t even have a deep relationship with her.

Sure, she’d tried to recruit him to join the demon-slaying team, hoping to use his Longevity Body to kill more demons together—but he’d always turned her down. At best, they’d only met a few times.

How could such a shallow acquaintance convince her master to come all the way to Qingzhou, risking conflict with multiple Void Mystical-level enemies?

But the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor, shrouded in sky-piercing sword energy, had her reasons.

After news of Lin Jing spread back to the Ancient Kingdom, many Void Mystical cultivators realized that the Longevity Body was in grave danger.

Even the Tongzi Xian of the Demon-Slaying Bureau, who held great hope for Lin Jing, hadn’t planned on traveling to Qingzhou to save him. After all, Lin Jing wasn’t just up against the Yin Corpse Sect and Gu God Sect—there were plenty of Void Mystical Demon Ancestors in Qingzhou alone.

But the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor had made a different choice.

"My disciple mentioned you once. Said you were the number one prodigy of the Ancient Kingdom thanks to your Longevity Body—your future limitless. Though she didn’t ask me to save you, probably afraid I’d say no given how old I am, I could tell she didn’t want you dying so soon."

"I’m over five thousand years old now, and I’ve failed three attempts at reaching the Dao. I’ve got less than a hundred years left. This trip, I came for two reasons. One—there’s a rumor you have a way to extend life. If it’s just gossip, then so be it. Two—I want to use the chaos of battle to make one last breakthrough. Fight for the Dao. And if I can help you survive in the process, maybe you’ll return the favor one day—lend a hand to Heavenly Sword Gate. For someone like you, with a Longevity Body, that shouldn’t be asking too much, right?"

She transmitted her voice directly to Lin Jing, laying her intentions bare—her lifespan was almost up.

So that’s how it was...

"Thank you, Senior." Lin Jing cupped his fists. Even if she had her own motives, the fact remained—she came to help him. That was enough for him to acknowledge the debt.

"Alright, Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor, don’t disrupt the order of the Alchemy Conference. During the competition, no one is allowed to attack the participants," the Creation Pill Sovereign spoke up.

From the void, countless cold gazes locked onto the Sword Ancestor.

"Heh... what a troublesome old woman."

"No wonder this Longevity Body was so arrogant—daring to show his face and even whip out the Heavenly Demon Scroll. Turns out, he had the backing of the former top sword cultivator under the heavens."

"But that old hag is nearing the end of her rope. With her current strength, she’s nowhere near enough to keep the Longevity Body safe!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 3: Chapter 94: The Alchemy Conference Begins!
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 3. Chapter 94: The Alchemy Conference Begins!

The arrival of the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor didn’t cause much of a stir.
