that guy’s blood relatives have been thirsting for revenge, saying that the hatred of killing a son is irreconcilable. Am I basically walking into the lion's den now?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 42: City in Chaos
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 42: City in Chaos

After entering Martial Emperor City, the two began intentionally or unintentionally inquiring about Cold Moon Sword Immortal, Feng Ning.

After entering the city, whether she stayed or returned to the Ancient Kingdom, she would surely have left some trace.

And the result... didn’t disappoint them.

Very soon, they heard that the disciple of Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor had entered the Feng Family.

But it didn’t seem like some kind of family reunion, and her true purpose was unknown.

"Let's go, the Feng Family."

Lin Jing and Gao Sheng exchanged a glance and headed straight for the Feng Family.

Meanwhile, in the Lei Clan, one of the Eight Great Families of Martial Emperor City,

"Lei Qianren, what are you trying to do?"

Several elders pressed down a middle-aged man with hair crackling with arcs of electricity, warning him sternly.

"Lin Jing, who killed my son, has entered Martial Emperor City!!"

"The one who killed Lei Zhen was clearly a young man called Fire Dragon Alchemist, not the Holy Son of the Demon Court!" said one of the clan elders solemnly.

The wild-haired middle-aged man glared coldly at them: "Now that the other side isn't even trying to hide his identity anymore, are you all still deceiving yourselves? That Fire Dragon Alchemist is the Holy Son of the Demon Court, Lin Jing!"

"I know you don't want to offend the Demon Court because of this incident."

"As a member of the Lei Clan, I should put the bigger picture first. That's why, whether in Qingzhou or the Western Desert, I never sought trouble. But now that he dares come under my nose, you expect me to endure it?"

"You’re just a Nascent Soul cultivator. Even if you can’t endure, what can you do? The Holy Son of the Demon Court is protected by the Thunder Dragon Clan’s Ancestor. Do you think you alone can harm even a hair on him? You’ll only bring ruin to the family!"

"That was my son too! A prodigy of the Lei Clan!!!" Lei Qianren roared: "Since the Holy Son of the Demon Court appeared in the Western Desert, I’ve been closely monitoring the area around Martial Emperor City. I can sense through lightning that the Thunder Dragon Clan’s Ancestor is not here. Besides, the city's artifact spirit wouldn’t allow a Void Mystical Demon Ancestor to enter the city!"

"So this is my only chance."

He exploded with spiritual power, pushing the others back.

"From today onward, I, Lei Qianren, sever all ties with the Lei Clan and withdraw from the family. Whatever actions I take next have nothing to do with the family."

With that, he turned and left. His true name faded from the family register. Seeing this, the elders’ expressions changed, but just as they were about to stop him, a voice suddenly rang in their ears.

"Let him go."

"Ancestor!!" The elders looked toward a certain direction in disbelief, unable to understand why their Void Mystical Ancestor would permit Lei Qianren’s foolishness.

"This is all fate," the Ancestor of the Lei Clan sighed from his seclusion.

Perhaps for some cultivators, faced with overwhelming threats, they would abandon everything to save themselves, even family. But there were exceptions. To Lei Qianren, his son’s death clearly outweighed everything else.

Even if seeking revenge made him morally wrong...

In the disputes of Cavern Heaven, life and death were up to fate, but that principle was only from the bystander's perspective, not the bereaved family's.

"Since he has severed ties with the family, we need not intervene. No matter what happens... if the Demon Court seeks revenge, so be it. Our Lei Clan may not be a match for the Demon Court, but the alliance still stands. The City Lord’s Mansion and the other seven families won’t stand idly by."

Back then, the City Lord's Mansion of Ghost City and the Four Small Families had signed an alliance oath: prosperity and ruin shared together. If one ally faced destruction, the others must give full support. Otherwise, their own fortunes would suffer backlash, and their bloodlines would be doomed forever.

Thus, even if the Eight Great Families of Martial Emperor City occasionally declined, they never perished.

..........

Martial Emperor City, Feng Family.

Lin Jing and Gao Sheng waited outside the Feng Family’s main residence.

Earlier, they had revealed their identities to the guards. Gao Sheng’s identity wasn’t much, but Lin Jing’s name made the guard tremble and rush inside.

"Speaking of which, it's pretty surprising that the famous Holy Son of the Demon Court only caused a stir after revealing his identity. On the way here, no one even noticed you!" Gao Sheng said in surprise.

"You forgot, illusion magic," Lin Jing smiled.

This clone of his was conserving strength, and although its illusion power wasn’t strong, it was enough to avoid harassment from low-level cultivators.

"I see..." Gao Sheng was about to say more when Lin Jing’s eyes suddenly narrowed.

The Pine Leaf Mouse clone that had been sleeping on his shoulder like a non-existent ornament also snapped open its eyes, leaping onto the stunned Gao Sheng and instantly teleporting them through space.

At the same moment, a thunderclap echoed across the sky above the Feng Family, followed by a thunderous voice falling over the city.

"Holy Son of the Demon Court, for killing my son, regardless of reason, our hatred is irreconcilable. Today, I, Lei Qianren, acting alone, will take your life!!!!"

Boom!!!

A thunderblade carrying the full might of a Nascent Soul expert's mana, will, and intent fell from the black clouds, crushing down toward Lin Jing. Violent lightning sealed him in a prison of thunder.

Gao Sheng, knocked out of the way by the Pine Leaf Mouse, widened his eyes in shock, reaching out across the sky toward Lin Jing engulfed in thunder.

Earlier, when entering the city, Lin Jing had mentioned having an enemy here. Gao Sheng hadn't thought much of it, but now he couldn't believe someone would be so insane as to openly attack the Holy Son of the Demon Court!!

After all, for the sake of the Holy Son’s dignity, the Demon Emperor himself had destroyed a major sect guarded by a Dao-Seeking expert! And you, a mere Nascent Soul cultivator of the Lei Clan, dared attack him!!!

"Don't mind me, save him!!!" Gao Sheng didn’t understand why the Pine Leaf Mouse wasn’t taking Lin Jing away at such a critical moment but instead saved him.

"Meh..." the Pine Leaf Mouse clone, always lazy, curled its lip.

Save what?

It's just a clone. If it died, so be it.

A living clone was certainly useful, but a dead one had its own value too: they could extort the Lei Clan later.

Besides... at that instant...

Even though it was his own life on the line, Lin Jing, looking up at the falling thunderblade, felt a bit of admiration for the wielder above the clouds. He didn’t think the man’s actions were wrong.

But admiration was one thing;
afterward, Lin Jing certainly wouldn't let him off.

At the Immortal-Burying Volcano, Lin Jing’s true body erupted with a vast aura, instantly alerting the Thunder Dragon Ancestor standing guard nearby, but the next moment, Lin Jing suppressed his aura again.

Outside the Feng Family, as the thunderblade slammed down and almost shattered Lin Jing’s illusionary body,

a terrifying Void Mystical force suddenly surged up from within the Feng Family.

It wasn’t the Feng Family’s Void Mystical Ancestor, but a ghostly divine force that shook the entire city.

"You're courting death."

A red-dressed Ghost Bride appeared in the sky.

The colossal thunderblade instantly dissipated.

Above the clouds, Lei Qianren, who had just been rejoicing that the Thunder Dragon Ancestor wasn’t present, found a ghostly hand piercing through his chest.

He stared in disbelief at the terrifying red-dressed ghost woman.

"Void Mystical ghost entity."

"Impossible... how could a Void Mystical ghost entity be in Martial Emperor City..."

At that moment, the series of shocking events in Martial Emperor City left countless cultivators stunned.

A Void Mystical ghost entity—something like that—how could it exist inside Martial Emperor City?

Many realized that the city's artifact spirit was probably malfunctioning;
otherwise, it would never have allowed a Void Mystical ghost entity to enter.

"Wait, no, why are you here? Don't pull this scam!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 43: A Pillow When You''re Drowsy
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 43: A Pillow When You're Drowsy

The Ghost Bride was in Martial Emperor City too—Lin Jing hadn’t seen that coming.

He was very curious...

You know, the entire Martial Emperor City was a Celestial Artifact, with an Artifact Spirit residing in it.

Maybe the Artifact Spirit wouldn’t bother with some low-level cultivators entering the city.

But for something like a Void Mystical ghost entity entering, there’s no way the Artifact Spirit wouldn’t notice.

For a Void Mystical ghost entity to make it in, there were only three possibilities:

One, the Artifact Spirit of Martial Emperor City had allowed it;

Two, the Artifact Spirit had a malfunction or was absent;

But regardless of which it was, Lin Jing knew—this clone of his probably didn’t need to die anymore.

This ghost woman actually remembered past ties, and despite how her appearance in Martial Emperor City could cause a major stir, she still chose to help his clone.

This whole situation gave Lin Jing a strange sense of déjà vu… back then, Gu Qianqiu had also gone to great lengths to save his clone!

“Lin Jing, are you okay?”

In a flash, another woman soared in on her sword. Cold Moon Sword Immortal, Feng Ning, landed beside Lin Jing, and right after, several powerful auras rose from the Feng Family’s main residence.

“Lei Qianren, causing trouble at my Feng Family’s doorstep? You must have a death wish!”

Though the Eight Great Families of Martial Emperor City outwardly maintained an alliance, Lei Qianren's brazen act of trying to assassinate a top genius right at their doorstep had enraged the Feng Family. They were deeply worried about getting dragged into this.

“Raaagh......·......”

But right now, Lei Qianren was already half-dead under the Ghost Bride’s ghostly grip—barely clinging to life, his vision blurry. He didn’t even have the strength to respond.

“Holy Son of the Demon Court... really... not so easy... to kill...”

“This Ghost Bride of the Void Mystical Stage… rumor had it she was but a remnant soul, sealed within Lin Jing’s body...”

“Why... why now is she not only at full power but appears completely whole—and even helps him fight...”

“....…” He shut his eyes and, with the last of his strength, tried to self-destruct his soul, but in the next instant, he was crushed into a mist of blood by Tang Ling, the Ghost Bride, and sent off to join her son.

“The Lei Clan, huh.” Cold Moon Sword Immortal Feng Ning frowned. She didn’t know when Lin Jing had offended the Lei Clan.

Meanwhile.

The commotion here also drew out numerous Void Mystical cultivators from Martial Emperor City. The Void Mystical Patriarchs of the Eight Great Families, successors of the Martial Emperor—all emerged from seclusion, alarmed by the Ghost Bride’s appearance.

“Ghost entity!!!”

“The Ghost Bride wanted by the Buddhist Sect?”

“Wasn’t she said to be sealed and near death? How could she exist in a fully intact form?”

“A mere ghost dares to openly kill a Core Formation powerhouse from the Eight Families in Martial Emperor City—does she think nothing of this city?”

One uninformed Void Mystical elder descended and immediately exerted a tremendous pressure on the Ghost Bride.

“Shut up.”

At that moment, Zuo Bo spoke too, looking heatedly at the gathered junior cultivators from Lin Jing’s side, completely unafraid:

“This Void Mystical ghost cultivator launched a public attack on the Holy Son of the Demon Court—do you not regard the Demon Court at all?”

“Your guardian spirit kills weak enemies for you—why is that allowed?”

“What, does Martial Emperor City want to start a war with the Demon Court?”

“If that’s the case, then from this day on, the entire demon race will wage war against Martial Emperor City. No truce until death. I have the authority to speak for the Demon Court. Which of you can speak for Martial Emperor City?”

“Holy Son of the Demon Court, don’t push things too far. This is just a clone. Besides, your clone is unharmed. As I understand it, you and that Lei Clan cultivator already had a blood feud over his son’s death. He attacked but failed, and died himself. Let this matter end here.”

At that point, a skinny, stick-like middle-aged man slowly spoke up.

He was the second successor of the Martial Emperor, a mid-stage Void Mystical cultivator, and long-time Vice City Lord of Martial Emperor City.

He’d already grasped the situation quickly.

“Ridiculous. Clone or not, even a single hair of mine isn’t something any random mutt can touch. Today, I want a proper explanation.”

Although Lin Jing’s clone wasn’t dead, he wasn’t about to give up this chance for compensation.

“Before Lei Qianren acted, he had already burned his family token and removed his name from the Lei Clan. This was a personal act. In the fight over the Cavern Heaven, life and death are left to fate. The Lei Clan never planned revenge—this was solely Lei Qianren’s decision.”

The Lei Clan’s patriarch, a blue-haired elder, spoke calmly, hoping Lin Jing would drop it.

“You’re the Lei Clan’s patriarch? You say he’s unrelated to the Lei Clan, so that makes it true?” Lin Jing smirked.

“Senior brother, hold on a second. The real issue now is, how did a complete Void Mystical ghost entity enter the city without the Artifact Spirit warning us...”

Amid the Void Mystical cultivators, a robust young man at the Nascent Soul stage stepped forward.

He frowned deeply, not paying Lin Jing much attention. He was more focused on how this Void Mystical ghost had entered the city.

Even if she had entered while sealed, at that level, the Artifact Spirit should’ve noticed.

Let alone the fact that she wasn’t sealed—rumor had it she was sealed inside the main body of the Demon Court’s Holy Son, but the Lin Jing here was only a clone.

“I’ve already tried contacting the Artifact Spirit, but got no response. Could it be it left with my master?”

The Vice City Lord looked out toward the skies but found that unlikely.

With so many Dao-Seeking experts maintaining the boundary wall, there was no reason to take the Artifact Spirit along.

At this moment, Lin Jing, feeling ignored, turned to the Ghost Bride and said,

“Help me kill a hundred cultivators from the Lei Clan...”

“....”

The Ghost Bride almost rolled her eyes. Help? No way. She’d already wasted energy rescuing a clone by mistake. She was annoyed enough, and Lin Jing still dared to ask her for favors!

But she also understood that Lin Jing only said it to draw attention.

“Holy Son of the Demon Court, don’t go too far.”

Sure enough, the Lei Clan’s patriarch reappeared with a flash of light and spoke angrily.

“So what if I am?” Lin Jing replied.

“Holy Son of the Demon Court, let it go. You weren’t hurt. Could you give me some face? The man is dead, the debt’s paid.”

The third successor of the Martial Emperor, the youngest Vice City Lord of Martial Emperor City, ranked sixth on the Fortune Gold List, a martial prodigy, and current holder of the Stone Man Gu—Wan Renzong—looked toward Lin Jing and spoke.

Once he spoke, no one thought Lin Jing would actually stop pursuing it. It was obvious he wanted the Lei Clan to pay something. In fact, a few other families who didn’t get along with the Lei Clan were secretly happy to see this unfold.

But unexpectedly, Lin Jing turned to Wan Renzong, squinting slightly, and said,

“Giving you face isn’t out of the question. Since you’re the Vice City Lord and want to handle this matter, then you can take the fall for the Lei Clan.”

Everyone: ?

Even the Lei Clan patriarch was confused. Why was Lin Jing suddenly targeting Wan Renzong?

“You, fight my true self.”

“If you win, I’ll drop this matter.”

“If you lose, I’ll take the Stone Man Gu inside your body.”

“Successor of the Martial Emperor—do you dare accept?”

So that’s what he’s after—the Stone Man Gu!

The strong cultivators of Martial Emperor City were all caught off guard. Even Wan Renzong was stunned.

He looked at the Fortune Gold List. Lin Jing’s cultivation was listed as mid-stage Core Formation. His temporary boost from the Heavenly Demon Physique hadn’t been recognized by the Gold List system.

Aside from that, only a Nascent Soul stage Dragon Carp had made it onto the rankings.

Given all that, Wan Renzong couldn’t understand why Lin Jing had the guts to challenge someone at the Nascent Soul stage like himself.

“One week from now, you and I will fight. I hope you’ll keep your word.”

He accepted the duel almost without hesitation. Mainly because the Artifact Spirit of Martial Emperor City seemed to be having issues—he really didn’t have the energy to waste on this grudge between the Lei Clan and the Demon Court’s Holy Son.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 44: A Useful Cultivation Technique
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 44: A Useful Cultivation Technique

The bet between the Holy Son of the Demon Court and the Martial Emperor’s successor brought the matter to a temporary close.

The Lei Clan’s Patriarch cupped his fists toward Wan Renzong and left without even glancing at Lei Qianren’s remaining soul.

The other Patriarchs fell silent, then left as well. Now it was just a matter of waiting seven days for the battle between the Martial Emperor’s successor and the Holy Son of the Demon Court.

Soon, only Lin Jing’s group and the Void Mystical Patriarch of the Feng Family—Feng Yu—were left at the scene.

“You were looking for me?” Cold Moon Sword Immortal glanced at Lin Jing and Gao Sheng, who was squatting not far away holding his head, looking confused.

What were these two doing together again?

And… what business did they have with her?

“Before we get to our matter, shouldn’t you explain how she ended up with you?” Lin Jing looked at the Ghost Bride.

“Long story short, you should know something about Senior Tang Ling. Her fiancée who went to the Western Desert battlefield may very well be one of our Feng Family’s ancestors.”

“She encountered me in the Western Desert and sensed a familiar bloodline, so we explored together and ended up here.”

“Huh???” Lin Jing froze, looking at the expressionless Ghost Bride, then at Feng Family’s Patriarch Feng Yu, who hadn’t left yet.

This Void Mystical old monster was silent too. He’d lived for thousands of years, but he really couldn’t say whether what the Ghost Bride and Feng Ning were claiming was true.

It was too long ago.

“The Feng Family’s origin predates even the founding of Martial Emperor City. Before the Ancient Kingdom was established, the Feng Family was already one of the top cultivation clans in this region. I honestly don’t know much about events from that far back.”

Feng Yu shook his head.

“But according to the records, the Feng Family’s ancestor wasn’t a female sword cultivator, but a male swordsmith named Feng Ling! This ghost fellow must be mistaken.”

“Which is why I said, your Feng Family’s ancestor Feng Ling is her descendant!” the Ghost Bride said.

“I’ve remembered everything. We had discussed our future child’s name—each taking one character from our names. She was Jiang Feng, I’m Tang Ling. That’s how the name ‘Feng Ling’ came to be!”

“In short, I want to see an artifact left by your Feng Family’s founder... there might be something...” The Ghost Bride looked at the Feng Family Patriarch.

“No way. I don’t care how many times you say it, the artifacts buried with Ancestor Feng Ling are not to be disturbed. I absolutely won’t allow this desecration.” Patriarch Feng Yu rejected her outright.

“Daoist friend, don’t go too far. What’s past is past. You and your fiancée were both female cultivators. If you died and she never took another partner, how could she have descendants?”

What Feng Yu meant was—even if the Feng Family’s founder were the descendant of the Ghost Bride’s fiancée, Jiang Feng must have married someone else. She and Tang Ling had long parted ways.

The Feng Family had nothing to do with the Ghost Bride anymore.

If it weren’t for the Ghost Bride’s overwhelming power—and the fact that she was brought here by Feng Ning, the Feng Family’s Dao-Seeking successor—Feng Yu wouldn’t even have entertained such a ghost.

But what worried Feng Yu was that this ghost woman was completely unyielding.

“We discussed this. Since two female cultivators couldn’t produce children, we decided to mimic the bloodlines of powerful spirit beasts and create a secret art to reproduce independently without mating. I had already completed half the technique when she left. She must have perfected it on her own afterward and birthed our descendant.”

The Ghost Bride was utterly confident in her fiancée, firmly believing she hadn’t found someone else.

“Absurd.”

The Martial Emperor-level cultivator from the Feng Family laughed in disbelief. That ghost was trying to flip open their ancestor’s coffin and then declare herself his fiancée?

Even Gao Sheng and the others nearby were dumbfounded by the conversation between these two ancient freaks.

What the h*ll were they even talking about?

He Ke and Feng Ning both said something as well.

Lin Jing finally interrupted them and said, “Anyway, Senior Tang Ling, how exactly did you get into Martial Emperor City with Fairy Leng Yue? From what I saw earlier, the city’s cultivators seemed shocked by your presence.”

“What method did you use to evade the Artifact Spirit?”

Tang Ling replied, “I don’t know. I just possessed her.”

“I also thought Senior Tang Ling would be blocked by the Artifact Spirit,” Feng Ning added.

“My plan was to negotiate with the City Lord’s Mansion to bring her into the Feng Family, but unexpectedly, we entered the city smoothly.”

After all, she was a Dao-Seeking successor now and had the qualifications to negotiate with the City Lord’s forces.

As for why she was willing to help the Ghost Bride... it was simply because along the way, the Ghost Bride had treated her very well.

She didn’t hesitate to deplete her own core power to help enhance Feng Ning’s sword path.

Once Feng Ning understood her story, she also acknowledged that this woman wasn’t some evil ghost.

“I see... so it’s really like those Martial Emperor successors said—the Artifact Spirit of Martial Emperor City may be malfunctioning?” Lin Jing stroked his chin.

Right now might be the city’s weakest point.

The Martial Emperor was gone, and the Artifact Spirit seemed to be having problems.

Still, Lin Jing didn’t have much interest in the city itself. His only goal was to get the Stone Man Gu.

“Senior Feng, how about this?” Lin Jing said. “You make an exception—take out an artifact of your ancestor and let Senior Tang Ling examine it.”

“No way......”

“In exchange, I, the Holy Son, will give your Feng Family a great opportunity!”

Patriarch Feng Yu frowned and looked at the Holy Son of the Demon Court, but the next moment, Lin Jing’s words made his pupils shrink.

“Have you heard of a top-tier formation cultivation technique from the Celestial Palace of the Immortal Realm? Divine Scripture of the Spirits.”

“Cultivators who train in this technique can use a deceased cultivator’s relic to summon a projection of their consciousness. If you bring out your ancestor’s artifact, I can help your Feng Family summon his consciousness into the present world for a brief period.”

“I heard your ancestor had the ability to forge near-immortal-grade swords, yet now your family has lost that skill. Wouldn’t you like to inherit it again, directly from your ancestor?”

“And at the same time, you can hear from Feng Ling’s own mouth whether your Feng Family and Senior Tang Ling have any connection.”

“Divine Scripture of the Spirits? Where did you get that technique?” Feng Yu stared intently at the Holy Son.

He had indeed heard of it—one of the top techniques of the Celestial Palace in ancient times.

It was because of this technique that the Celestial Palace dominated the continent for 50,000 years, even after losing contact with the Immortal Realm.

After all, this technique allowed a sect to fully utilize its legacy.

But wasn’t this technique lost along with the destruction of the Celestial Palace?

“Cavern Heaven.” Lin Jing pointed to the sky. “The Cavern Heavens are still controlled by the Celestial Palace of the Immortal Realm. Though the lower realm’s Celestial Palace was destroyed by Tianyuan Realm cultivators, the upper Celestial Palace doesn’t know. The Cavern Heavens continue to function autonomously, so it’s still possible to obtain some inheritances from them.”

Patriarch Feng Yu’s gaze sharpened. “If you can summon an image of our Feng Family’s ancestor, then... yes, we can follow your proposal and retrieve a relic.”

“Good.” Lin Jing looked toward Tang Ling—problem solved.

Seems this Divine Scripture of the Spirits really was useful. Otherwise, convincing the Feng Family’s Patriarch would’ve been pretty tough.

“Let’s go get it now.” The Ghost Bride was eager.

“No rush.” Lin Jing held up a hand. “Don’t rush. I still haven’t learned the Divine Scripture yet.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 45: Missing
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 45: Missing

You still haven’t...

Then what the hll are you talking about!

The Feng Family Ancestor and the Ghost Bride were so pissed they wanted to curse.

They didn’t even need to think to know—cultivation conditions for this kind of technique must be extremely harsh.

Who knows how many years it’d take just to learn the basics.

Not to mention, Lin Jing already seemed to have chosen Beast Taming Art as his primary path. Unless he reached the Nascent Soul Stage and gained an external incarnation, he probably couldn’t cultivate the Divine Scripture either.

“So when exactly will you be able to learn it?” the Ghost Bride Tang Ling couldn’t help asking.

The Ancestor Feng Yu wanted to awaken the ancestral teachings, and she also hoped to learn something from the Feng Family Ancestor.

“And it just so happens I have a pet beast that’s very compatible with this technique...” Lin Jing had barely finished speaking when their eyes lit up.

Indeed, top-tier cultivation techniques from immortal sects like the Immortal Palace weren’t always limited to use by the human race...

Letting a contract beast learn it was essentially the same as the beast tamer learning it himself.

“Then let the pet beast cultivate it. How long will it take?” Ancestor Feng Yu asked, “If anything’s needed, please don’t hesitate, Your Highness.”

Lin Jing smiled faintly.

That made a white-haired old man, whose hair fluttered like the wind, suddenly get a bad feeling.

“Unfortunately, that pet beast of mine was snatched by a Void Mystical Artifact Ghost: the Ghost Mother...”

“If the two seniors can help me catch that Artifact Ghost and get my pet back, I believe it won’t take long before it can summon Ancestor Feng Ling...”

“What kind of bullsht is that.” Tang Ling twitched. Why would an Artifact Ghost snatch your pet beast? Doesn’t that thing only steal magical artifacts?

“Void Mystical Artifact Ghost...” Ancestor Feng Yu also furrowed his brows. What’s going on now? How did this end up tied to another Void-level ghost creature!

Although he’d been in seclusion at Martial Emperor City, he still knew a bit about the three ghost entities that had shown up in the Western Desert.

“Artifact Ghost... Speaking of...” At this moment, the least noticeable person—Gao Sheng—suddenly sent a voice transmission to Lin Jing.

Seeing how Lin Jing’s few words might just convince two Void-level powerhouses to help catch the Artifact Ghost, Gao Sheng was full of admiration.

He hadn’t expected that Lin Jing had already encountered the Artifact Ghost!

But just now, he suddenly thought of a possibility, and his breathing quickened. He transmitted,

“Brother Lin, earlier didn’t you say the artifact spirit of Martial Emperor City has gone haywire? Could it be the Artifact Ghost’s doing? Since it’s the nemesis of magical artifacts, the ultimate artifact spirit, and can even control Celestial Artifacts, doesn’t that mean... it might also suppress the artifact spirit of Martial Emperor City!!”

“Hm?” Lin Jing was startled, then shook his head. He didn’t think that was likely.

After all, he had only recently encountered the Artifact Ghost.

Besides, Martial Emperor City was deeply tied to the Martial Emperor, a top-tier Dao-Seeking expert—if the artifact spirit had an issue, there’s no way the Martial Emperor wouldn’t react.

Lin Jing guessed the artifact spirit might just be tired of being stuck in the city and ran away for a breather. That seemed more likely.

“So, your pet beast was taken by the Artifact Ghost—what’s the actual situation?” the Ghost Bride pressed.

“My pet beast is a Mechanized Beast. It’s kind of like a magical artifact, so it was snatched by the Artifact Ghost,” Lin Jing said helplessly.

Though he could recreate another Longevity Turtle based on the blueprint...

What he really cared about wasn’t that.

It was that from the Qi Refinement Stage till now, he had personally upgraded that little thing over decades. It wasn’t just some item—it was a companion.

There were feelings involved. A new Mechanized Turtle just wouldn’t be the same!

He could only hope the old turtle that had been with him for decades was still in one piece.

“Got it...” Tang Ling nodded. Though it was a bit of a hassle, if it meant getting someone suitable to cultivate Divine Scripture and summon the Feng Ancestor... she didn’t even look back and flew straight out of the city.

“Artifact Ghost, huh? We’re both ghostly entities—shouldn’t be hard to find. I’ll go.” the Ghost Bride left those words behind.

Ancestor Feng Yu watched her go, hesitated to speak.

Lin Jing looked at him. “I’ll need your help as well, Senior Feng.”

“Now that the artifact spirit of Martial Emperor City’s acting up, I still have to guard the Feng Family. I may not be able to go to the Western Desert to help Your Highness find the Artifact Ghost...”

“It’s not about that. I heard that among the Eight Great Martial Families in Martial Emperor City, the Shi Family is known for their expertise in Mechanized Arts—said to be second only to Shenji Manor across the Tianyuan Continent. To help my pet beast get started with Divine Scripture faster, I may need to modify it. The Shi Family’s Mechanized Arts...”

Ancestor Feng Yu fell silent.

What a big ask.

“I understand... Some core Mechanized Arts tomes that aren’t strictly secret—I can get them for Your Highness.” He was going all out for the ancestral inheritance.

“Thank you, Senior.” Lin Jing chuckled. An unexpected bonus.

On the Tianyuan Continent, Shenji Manor ranked first in Mechanized Arts, the Shi Family second, and Qingzhou’s Danxuan Sect third!

The three powers used Mechanized Arts in very different ways.

Danxuan Sect used them to assist in alchemy, mastering unmanned pill refinement techniques.

The Shi Family used them to aid artifact refining and martial arts—their Martial Puppet techniques were no weaker than some average genius cultivators.

As for Shenji Manor—they were the ultimate authority in Mechanized Arts, applying the craft in all aspects and fields.

Originally, Lin Jing had planned to visit Danxuan Sect to improve his own Mechanized expertise and upgrade his turtle. But now that he was in Martial Emperor City, it wasn’t a bad idea to study the Shi Family’s techniques first.

Soon, Ancestor Feng Yu left as well.

Cold Moon Sword Immortal Feng Ning looked at Lin Jing. She understood that everything that had just happened—was unexpected.

Lin Jing and Gao Sheng had come to Martial Emperor City for her.

“Now that everyone’s gone, can you tell me why you two were looking for me?” she asked. Lin Jing and Gao Sheng exchanged glances and said together, “We need a quiet and private place.”

“Preferably outside the city!”

.............

Not long after, Cold Moon Sword Immortal learned the true identity of the Artifact Ghost from Lin Jing and Gao Sheng.

“So you’re saying, you want my master... to subdue this Artifact Ghost and use it to power the Celestial Sword?”

“Exactly. Right now, barely anyone knows about this. The chances of success are high. If Sword Ancestor can pull it off, her strength would definitely rank in the top ten of the Great Yuan Continent.” Gao Sheng rubbed his fists. “With a top sword cultivator like her, the Ancient Kingdom can develop even further.”

Feng Ning glanced at Lin Jing and found that the Holy Son of the Demon Court didn’t seem to oppose Gao Sheng’s idea.

She took a deep breath. She felt Gao Sheng’s decision was a bit too bold—he was from a Demon-Slaying Bureau family, a branch of the imperial court, yet he wanted to give this ultimate treasure to a sect powerhouse outside the royal system.

Still, as the personal disciple of the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor, she certainly wouldn’t say no.

She nodded solemnly and planned to use the special artifact given by her master to contact her, who was currently maintaining the Boundary Wall.

But in the next moment, her expression shifted—she realized she couldn’t reach her master!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 46: Nightmare Come True?
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 46: Nightmare Come True?

Same day.

After discovering that the artifact spirit of Martial Emperor City had malfunctioned, a few Martial Emperor successors immediately tried to contact the Martial Emperor, who was maintaining the Boundary Wall.

To prevent the Outer Realm's Heavenly Demons from easily entering the Tianyuan Realm, many Dao-Seeking experts of the Tianyuan Realm had gone to the Outer Realm to reinforce the Boundary Wall together.

The Ancient Emperor of the Ancient Kingdom, the Demon Emperor of the Demon Court, the Buddha Lord of the Buddhist Sect...

Maintaining the Boundary Wall was tiring and took effort, but it wasn’t like closed-door seclusion—it didn’t require complete isolation from the world.

However, the vice city lords of Martial Emperor City discovered that not only was the artifact spirit unreachable, but even the City Lord himself had seemingly gone missing, completely unreachable.

This situation made them deeply uneasy.

“Could something have gone wrong with the Boundary Wall over there??” They looked toward the Outer Realm.

“I can’t even contact the incarnation the Demon Emperor left in the Tianyuan Realm now...”

Elsewhere, unable to reach the Sword Ancestor, Cold Moon Sword Immortal frowned as Lin Jing pulled out a Tiger Fang to try as well.

“There must be something wrong with the Boundary Wall...

“The artifact spirit’s disappearance from Martial Emperor City is likely because the Martial Emperor summoned it away.”

Feng Ning looked grim. “Yeah. If I can’t reach Master, she must have been affected by something.”

“And the Lord of the Demon Court... probably ran into trouble too. Even withdrew their incarnation.”

What on earth has happened...

Just as everyone was growing more uneasy, a little mushroom popped out of Lin Jing’s body, looking panicked, and muttered, “...Don’t tell me Mushroom really guessed it right.”

“What is that?” Feng Ning froze when she saw the little mushroom. “A Spell Spirit Origin? What did it guess right.”

Lin Jing pushed the mushroom back and said, “It’s nothing. It once predicted that even with many Dao-Seeking experts maintaining it, the Boundary Wall might not be strong enough to stop the Outer Realm Demons.”

“All those Dao-Seeking experts might end up having a huge battle with the Heavenly Demons at the Boundary.”

“It’s probably thinking that since we can’t reach any of the top experts right now, maybe it really did happen...”

“Sh*t, but its guess actually makes sense. We can’t reach those experts now—maybe they’re fighting and too busy to respond.” Gao Sheng’s expression changed. He hadn’t known anything at first about the Golden Era’s arrival or the invasion of the Demon Sect.

That sort of intel wasn’t something a Nascent Soul junior could access. To know the inside story, you had to at least be Void Mystical stage—and not just any rogue Void Mystical cultivator, but one trusted by the major Dao-Seeking powers.

But during their time at Bodhi Temple, Lin Jing had told him everything.

Now, he could follow the conversation between Lin Jing and Cold Moon Sword Immortal just fine.

“It’s just a mushroom’s guess. No need to get so pessimistic,” Lin Jing said.

Sure enough, as soon as Lin Jing finished speaking, the mini flying sword in Feng Ning’s hand trembled slightly.

Seeing this, Feng Ning let out a breath. “Master responded. Looks like...”

She had just begun to say something when a booming voice rang out from the mini sword.

“Ning’er, a strong cultivator from the Demon Realm used some unknown method to break through the Boundary Wall maintained by many Dao-Seeking experts. I, along with His Majesty the Ancient Emperor and others, fought back. We managed to kill that Demon Realm cultivator, but we were severely injured...”

“The battle probably didn’t affect the continent.”

“The good news is, that Demon Realm cultivator was successfully killed.”

“The bad news is, that cultivator was only an external incarnation, sent in advance to scout out the Tianyuan Realm!”

“Now that the incarnation is dead, and it has gathered general intel on our realm, I fear it won’t be long before the Demon Realm’s real army arrives.”

“Master...” Cold Moon Sword Immortal couldn’t believe it. The Boundary Wall of the Tianyuan Realm had actually been breached!

Beside her, the little Spell Spirit Origin Mushroom popped out again, gulped nervously. Gao Sheng widened his eyes. This topic was terrifying.

But the one whose thoughts were spinning the most was still Lin Jing.

He glanced at the mushroom, feeling a chill run through him.

No way... this jinxed little thing...

What about Her Majesty the Demon Emperor...

Even now, he still couldn’t contact the Demon Emperor!

He feared her fate might really be just like what the mushroom predicted...

“Sword Ancestor, what about Her Majesty the Demon Emperor? Since the battle is over, why can’t I contact her?” Lin Jing asked from the side.

The Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor had already sensed the two beside Feng Ning through the mini sword. She continued,

“The Lord of the Demon Court...”

“The Lord of the Demon Court, the Ancient Emperor, the Buddha Lord, and the Martial Emperor City Lord—those four were the most seriously injured. They may need some time to recover... Your Highness, the Demon Emperor of the Demon Court was gravely wounded. Although this information isn’t widely known, you yourself must be cautious of Dao-Seeking experts from the three major Demon Sects. Ning’er, give one of the three life-saving sword intents I gave you to His Highness.”

Once the Sword Ancestor finished speaking, Feng Ning nodded and extended her hand, summoning one of the life-saving sword intents the Sword Ancestor had condensed after reaching the Dao-Seeking stage.

Whoosh.

A silver sword aura rose like a swimming dragon, radiating a mysterious energy.

Lin Jing didn’t stand on ceremony. He accepted it and fused it into his body. After thanking her, he signaled for Gao Sheng to explain the Artifact Ghost situation to the Sword Ancestor.

But by now, Lin Jing’s thoughts were no longer on the Artifact Ghost.

Her Majesty the Demon Emperor... was seriously injured.

That invading Demon Realm cultivator—just an external incarnation—was strong enough to leave the Tianyuan Realm’s top experts in that state.

“Judging from the Demon Body and the Heavenly Demon Divine Sense technique, the Demon techniques must be terrifying. Seems I shouldn’t hesitate anymore. For my external incarnation, I’ll just follow Senior Pine’s advice and cultivate the Demon Dao.”

“Now that Her Majesty the Demon Emperor is seriously injured, who knows how long it’ll take her to recover. My situation... has become unfavorable again. But thankfully, compared to the illusion that the Mushroom conjured, this isn’t the worst case yet. The Buddha Lord, the Ancient Emperor—they’re all badly wounded... the many Dao-Seeking experts all sustained injuries, more or less.”

“So next, I need to be wary of outliers like the Gu God or the Hall Master of the Netherworld Hall—those who don’t get along with most of the Dao-Seeking experts!”

Right now, Lin Jing had two choices: hide and wait for the Demon Emperor to recover, though no one knew how long that would take—or the second option: show something that would make enemies hesitate.

“Challenging the Martial Emperor successor was the right move. As long as I reveal the power of the Demon Body in battle, I can make potential enemies realize that I have the strength to go down with them. Even a Dao-Seeking expert wouldn’t want to bet on whether I can unleash a blow strong enough to shock them.”

As Lin Jing pondered, Gao Sheng had finished explaining the Artifact Ghost matter to the Sword Ancestor.

The Sword Ancestor was silent for a while before slowly speaking: “In my current state, I might be able to deal with a Void-level ghost creature, but defeating the Hall Master of the Netherworld Hall... that would be nearly impossible. However... I do have a plan.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 47: Playing Along With You, and You Took It Seriously?!
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 47: Playing Along With You, and You Took It Seriously?!

"Please speak, Master."

Cold Moon Sword Immortal looked at the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor.

"In the early years, I created a secret technique called ‘Sword-Nurturing Art’."

"This Sword-Nurturing Art is a healing secret technique. Once cast, I will transform into a sword soul and slumber within my natal spiritual sword! During this period, I will lose all consciousness. However, my injuries... will also rapidly recover in this process!"

"Apart from this trait, the Sword-Nurturing Art has another divine ability!"

"That is, during the time I am transformed into a sword soul, anyone cultivating the same technique as me may wield my slumbering sword and temporarily gain my sword dao power, realm, and insight! This realm... is unaffected by my injuries and is based on my peak state!"

"This Sword-Nurturing Art was created out of concern that I might be seriously wounded while the Sword Sect faced a crisis. With this technique, even if I’m gravely injured with less than a tenth of my power remaining, as long as I cast the Sword-Nurturing Art and become a sword soul, then my successor can still exert power close to mine."

"At the same time, in this state, I can rapidly recover from my injuries and regain my peak strength."

"This..." Cold Moon Sword Immortal was stunned. Her Master actually had such a secret technique. A hint of worry appeared on her calm face—she was afraid she might not carry the burden well.

"This divine ability..." Beside them, Lin Jing and Gao Sheng also looked like they'd seen a ghost. This secret art was insane. No wonder she was the top Dao-Seeking sword cultivator of this era.

"Then it’s decided." The Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor gave Cold Moon Sword Immortal no chance to refuse and said, "The Artifact Ghost is of great importance. You must succeed. Wield the sword and wait for my recovery."

"Yes... Master." Cold Moon Sword Immortal nodded helplessly.

Hearing this, Lin Jing and Gao Sheng looked at each other. This... although different from what they initially expected, probably still counted as gaining a Dao-Seeking level combat power, right?

At the same time.

Beyond the skies.

After finishing the conversation with Cold Moon Sword Immortal, the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor narrowed her eyes and looked toward a group of top powerhouses also outside the sky.

Second Ancient Emperor!

Demon Emperor of the Demon Court!

Buddha Lord of the Buddhist Sect!

City Lord of Martial Emperor City!

And several other top experts from Dao-Seeking factions.

Just earlier, she had told Lin Jing and the others that the top experts of Tianyuan had experienced a great battle and were all seriously injured.

But these powerhouses—none of them looked injured at all. Each one had a full and vigorous aura.

"Sky-Splitter, your Holy Son of the Demon Court seems to be with his disciple?"

"He told me you were seriously injured and had gone missing?" The burly Demon Emperor of the Demon Court crossed the boundless void and came up behind Li Shaolicheng, asking aloud.

"I informed them."

"Very bad." The Demon Emperor licked his lips and said, "Each of those old guys is full of schemes. Hope those youngsters don’t get toyed to death by them."

The Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor smiled and said, "Didn’t Your Majesty the Demon Emperor agree to this plan too?"

Not long ago, the Second Ancient Emperor suggested that the environment of the Tianyuan Continent was too gentle for these top prodigies.

Once they went to the Origin Realm, who knew what unknown dangers they would face.

He believed that these top prodigies should experience greater pressure while still in the Tianyuan Realm.

Let them face some life-threatening crises without the protection of elders!

Only in this way could they survive better once they reached the Origin Realm.

Many Dao-Seeking experts agreed with the suggestion and coordinated together to stage a collective "serious injury" act.

"With this method, we can also lure out and eliminate some potential threats on the Tianyuan Continent." The Second Ancient Emperor’s words hovered in everyone’s minds.

"Sky-Splitter, what script did you prepare for your disciple? Let me use it as reference." The Demon Emperor of the Demon Court asked.

"Hmm..." The Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor gave a slight smile and said, "Nothing much..."

She hadn’t arranged anything at all. Her disciple had naturally stumbled upon an excellent trial mission—

Competing with the Netherworld Hall for the war artifact spirit created by the Immortal Palace...

In this process, she would become a sword soul, constantly protecting her disciple and letting her gain experience fighting high-level cultivators. Who knows, she might even clash with the old veteran of the Netherworld Hall.

"Heh..." Seeing that the other party didn’t want to say more, the Demon Emperor stopped asking.

Anyway, he felt his own script design would definitely let Lin Jing and Xu Qingyao have lots of fun.

"Maybe it’ll help Lin Jing smoothly cultivate the Heavenly Demon Physique... I’m such a genius." The Demon Emperor patted his shoulder in admiration.

She looked toward the two Demon Emperors from Poseidon Palace and Misty Forest—she had already formed alliances with them, letting those two go provide trials for Lin Jing and the others.

.............

Shortly after.

News of several top Dao-Seeking experts being seriously injured spread rapidly.

Lin Jing’s main body—Tens of Thousands Direction, Immortal-Burying Volcano.

Before Lin Jing could inform the Thunder Dragon Ancestor about the intelligence obtained from his clone, the Thunder Dragon Ancestor had already rushed over in shock.

"Your Highness, this is bad, very bad."

The Thunder Dragon Ancestor arrived anxiously.

"Experts from the Demonic Sky Realm used some unknown method to easily break through the boundary wall maintained by Tianyuan’s top Dao-Seeking experts!"

"Forget ten years, not even one year held up."

Lin Jing felt his memory was muddled.

"Keep going."

"Her Majesty the Demon Emperor joined other Dao-Seeking experts in facing the enemy, but unexpectedly, those Demonic Sky Realm cultivators were too powerful. Though the Dao-Seekers managed to kill them, Her Majesty and several others were seriously injured. And unfortunately, the Yin-Yang Whale Emperor of Poseidon Palace and the Forest Sea Dragon Emperor of Misty Forest suffered relatively light injuries. Just after repelling the external threat, they’re now starting an internal conflict!!"

"Strong cultivators from both Demon Emperor factions have already entered Qingzhou. Seeing Her Majesty severely wounded and her power greatly reduced, they demand the Demon Court hand over the Transformation Technique. Even demon beasts from the ocean and forest have left their territories and are heading to the Western Desert, looking for Your Highness."

"Your Highness, let’s flee."

Lin Jing’s main body took a deep breath, brows tightly furrowed. He didn’t expect the first to strike after the Demon Emperor was injured would be these so-called ‘allies’ who had just fought together.

Still, with the Demon Emperor now injured, this was indeed the best opportunity for Poseidon Palace, Misty Forest, and other beast factions to seize the Transformation Technique.

"This time it’s for real, huh."

After being tricked by the Illusion Fungus once, encountering a similar situation again made Lin Jing feel a strange sense of unreality.

But this time, he had already received intel from the Sky-Splitting Sword Ancestor, so it should be undeniably real. Lin Jing instantly felt the pressure surge—but thankfully, he had already completed the Heavenly Physique...

"Run? Where would we run to." Lin Jing slowly spoke. "We can’t leave yet."

"I still have unfinished business in the Western Desert."

Lin Jing didn’t know when Her Majesty the Demon Emperor would recover her strength, but he knew that right now, if he wanted to help the Demon Court through this crisis, there was only one way.

Artifact Spirit!

Relying on the Heavenly Demon Physique would cost him too much—it could only be used in desperation.

But there was another way. As long as he and Sword Immortal Feng Ning could find the Ultimate Artifact Spirit, then he could borrow it to activate the Demon Court’s celestial artifact and blast Poseidon Palace and Misty Forest with it, unleashing divine might...

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 48: Dao-Seeking Is Enough
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 48: Dao-Seeking Is Enough

Not long after, a near-immortal-grade immortal sword fell into Cold Moon Sword Immortal’s hand.

Cold Moon Sword Immortal understood—this sword was none other than her Master in transformed form.

After receiving the sword, she activated her technique and instantly felt countless insights into the sword dao.

These insights were obscure and hard to grasp, but holding the immortal sword, Cold Moon Sword Immortal had a feeling that as long as she used it, she herself would be a Dao-Seeking-level Sky-Splitting Sword Cultivator, as if her Master had possessed her.

“Master said, upon hearing the news that the Second Ancient Emperor was injured, factions like the Gu God Sect started to stir, trying to investigate the truth...”

“The Snow Plains are also itching to move, intent on seeking revenge against the Ancient Kingdom.”

“The Ancient Imperial Prince and Ancient Clan Princess have used the True Dragon Secret Art to temporarily govern in place of the Second Ancient Emperor, gathering the entire nation's fortune into themselves....”

“Now, with the Ancient Kingdom facing threats from all sides, Master told me I must delay the Netherworld Hall, hold out until she recovers... in this kind of situation, if the Netherworld Hall captures the Artifact Spirit, the Ancient Kingdom will be in danger.”

By comparison, the other Dao-Seeking factions don’t have deep grudges with the demon sects, and the demon sects wouldn’t provoke Dao-Seeking-level forces for no reason.

“It’s the same situation in the Demon Court.” Lin Jing and Cold Moon Sword Immortal faced each other, both frowning tightly.

“Intelligence from the Qingzhou Demon Court reports that beasts from Poseidon Palace and Misty Forest have been constantly pressuring the Demon Court. It probably won’t be long before the beast army coming to capture me arrives in the Western Desert.”

“No worries. As long as I’m here, even if the Yin-Yang Whale Emperor and Forest Sea Dragon Emperor come, I might still be able to fight them.” Cold Moon Sword Immortal looked at her Master’s sword, feeling that she could perfectly channel her Master’s power.

“Let’s not.” Lin Jing smiled bitterly and said, “Even if you can wield Senior Sky-Splitter’s power, you’d better go easy. If you damage the sword and she can’t wake up, that’d be a disaster.”

The immortal sword flashed with light, as if strongly agreeing with Lin Jing’s words.

“Right now, our top priority is to find the Artifact Spirit. As long as we find the ultimate celestial artifact, we can suppress those harboring ill intent.”

Feng Ning asked, “Then will you still go through with your duel against Wan Renzong?”

“Of course.”

Lin Jing narrowed his eyes and said, “That battle is the perfect chance to shake up the forces pressing down on the Demon Court.”

The Heavenly Demon Physique has that kind of power.

............

In the blink of an eye, it was the appointed date for Lin Jing’s duel with Martial Emperor’s heir Wan Renzong.

In fact, compared to the Demon Court, Martial Emperor City was in a much better position.

Although the Martial Emperor was also seriously injured, Martial Emperor City wasn’t surrounded on all sides like the Demon Court.

During this time, Martial Emperor City had already learned of the Demon Court’s situation.

As it stood, the Demon Court was barely holding on—it was no threat to Martial Emperor City at all.

The experts in Martial Emperor City had thought Lin Jing, as the Holy Son of the Demon Court, would definitely cancel the duel, slip away, and hide from danger.

But to Wan Renzong and the others’ surprise, Lin Jing’s clone had shown no reaction these past few days—as if he was still waiting for the duel to arrive.

“If I said I’ll fight, then I’ll fight.”

Although Wan Renzong, Martial Emperor’s heir, wasn’t in the mood to fight, on the appointed day of the duel, he still stood below the city walls of Martial Emperor City’s peak, patiently waiting.

Many cultivators gathered to witness the battle, mainly from the Eight Martial Families of the city, but also some Buddhist powerhouses and Ancient Kingdom cultivators—all converged on Martial Emperor City. In truth, they weren’t just here to watch the outcome of a duel between the Holy Son of the Demon Court and the Martial Emperor’s successor.

It was also because—with the Demon Emperor gravely injured and Lin Jing of the Longevity Physique back on the radar of many demons and monsters—his appearance in Martial Emperor City could trigger those monsters to bare their bloodthirsty fangs. They wanted to see whether the Demon Emperor and the Martial Emperor were truly too injured to fight anymore...

“Why isn’t he here yet...”

“Did he run off?”

“Probably. The Fishman Ancestor from Poseidon Palace and the Flower Ancestor under the Forest Sea Dragon Emperor are both here. Clearly not here with good intentions. If the Demon Court’s leader really is, as rumored, gravely injured, then this Longevity Physique who can refine Transformation Pills is definitely a prize the other factions will fight over. In that case, I don’t believe the Holy Son of the Demon Court would dare show up...”

Above Martial Emperor City, a green-skinned fishman monster with a terrifying aura sat cross-legged among the clouds.

Besides him, a seductive red man-eating flower rooted itself in midair, watching the city.

These two creatures both had peak Void Mystical cultivation, just one step from Dao-Seeking.

Originally, such beings couldn’t even enter Martial Emperor City—but now that both the Martial Emperor and the City Spirit were “slumbering,” the city had no way to stop them.

In fact, not just these two. Elder Wind Gu of the Gu God Sect had also reappeared in the city. Failing to retrieve the Golden Light Gu last time, he now believed this could be the key to reclaiming several Rare Gu at once—if the rumors were true!

Of course, on his own, he couldn’t do it. But if the Gu God Sect’s leader—the one with the Yang Gu—joined in, then maybe.

“The Gu God Ancestor did sense an extraordinary battle in the heavens,” said the white-robed Sect Leader of the Gu God Sect. “But we must investigate further to avoid being tricked.”

BOOM!!!

BOOOOM!!!!

Just as everyone was starting to think Lin Jing wouldn’t show up for the duel, thunder exploded in the void. A thunder dragon with peak Void Mystical cultivation burst forth from lightning currents.

Standing atop its head, dressed in green robes, was Lin Jing, hands behind his back.

He came!

Seeing Lin Jing really appear, everyone was stunned—but what shocked them even more was that while the Gold List said Lin Jing’s cultivation was Mid Core Formation, the Lin Jing before them had actually reached Perfected Nascent Soul, completely inconsistent with the list!

“I’ve come to answer the challenge.”

Lin Jing stood on the Thunder Dragon Ancestor’s head, tapped his foot lightly, and landed on the city wall across from the Martial Emperor’s successor.

“But you’d best just surrender.” Lin Jing said lightly.

“Your cultivation...” Martial Emperor’s heir Wan Renzong frowned.

“Don’t the cultivators of Martial Emperor City know that I once taught another Longevity Physique the secret art called Heavenly Demon Physique? She can use it, so naturally, I can too. With this technique, I’m Core Formation, I’m Nascent Soul, I’m Nascent Soul Transformation.”

“Even if you’re invincible in the Transformation Stage, it won’t matter. With my Heavenly Demon Physique, Void Mystical is enough. Even if you can challenge Void Mystical from Transformation Stage, it’s still useless. I am Dao-Seeking—that’s all that matters. So, you’re no match for me. Just hand over the Stone Man Gu and we’ll all walk away peacefully.”

“This Heavenly Demon power of mine isn’t meant for someone like you. It wasn’t prepared for you.” Lin Jing smiled.

“Impossible.” Wan Renzong’s pupils shrank. Of course, he knew of the Heavenly Demon Physique, but the Martial Emperor had once said clearly that this secret art couldn’t be cultivated by ordinary people. Not only did it require enduring endless torment and a death-defying mindset, but even among billions of cultivators, perhaps not one would have the aptitude to match the Heavenly Demon Physique.

The Martial Emperor said even the Ancient Emperor had failed to cultivate it.

It was a technique meant for those from beyond the heavens.

In the Tianyuan Realm, few could ever hope to succeed.

Compared to the death-defying mindset, aptitude was actually more important.

The fact that the Sky Lion Holy Maiden managed it was already a miracle. But Lin Jing, with his Longevity Physique, didn’t have those conditions—how had he succeeded?!

Could it be because of the current situation in the Demon Court? That was impossible. At the time of the duel agreement, none of this had even happened!

And even if the circumstances aligned, the odds of two Longevity Physiques both having matching aptitude were just too slim.

“Huh? When did he master the Heavenly Demon Physique? Could he really have triggered it just by hearing bad news? Is his talent that freakish?”

Beyond the skies, still maintaining the boundary wall, the Demon Emperor of the Demon Court split her attention to monitor the lower realm. She was especially delighted, and couldn’t help but transmit to the black-lined Martial Emperor: “You don’t even need to write a script anymore. Look, my Demon Court’s Holy Son is already enough of a headache for your Martial Emperor City.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 49: Invincible Among Peers
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 49: Invincible Among Peers

“Heavenly Demon Physique?”

“What kind of secret art is that?”

Inside Martial Emperor City, not everyone was familiar with the Heavenly Demon Physique.

“That’s one of the legacies of the ancient number one Demon Sect—the Demonic Sky Sect. It's an extreme physique that allows you to burn ‘lifespan’ in exchange for cultivation boosts.”

“But even during the Demonic Sky Sect’s peak, very few disciples managed to cultivate this physique. It’s even said the Sect Leader himself never mastered it. There were rumors before… that the Longevity Physique the Sky Lion Clan of Qingzhou raised managed to break into the Void Mystical Stage in an instant and escape the demon cage. Looking at it now, it’s probably thanks to the Heavenly Demon Physique…”

“A Longevity Physique with an immense lifespan, paired with the Heavenly Demon Physique that allows you to trade lifespan for temporary power… that’s basically the strongest dual physique combo, on par with an Immortal Physique…”

“Still, even if the Holy Son of the Demon Court has cultivated this secret art, using it to battle the Martial Emperor’s successor is still too reckless… his base cultivation is just too low. Even with the Heavenly Demon Physique, from my point of view, he shouldn’t be going up against the Martial Emperor’s successor…”

A rogue cultivator spoke up: “It’s obvious— the greater the cultivation boost he wants, the more lifespan he has to burn. His base cultivation is only at the Mid Core Formation Stage. Even if he has the Longevity Physique, boosting to Nascent Soul Stage might be bearable, but if he pushes to Nascent Soul Transformation, even for a Longevity Physique, the cost in lifespan would be massive—absolutely brutal!”

“He already has a Rare Gu. Gaining or losing a Stone Man Gu doesn’t really mean much to him.”

“But in contrast, losing several thousand years of lifespan isn’t something easily replaced. The Longevity Physique just means you have more lifespan—it doesn’t mean you have infinite lifespan!”

“Also, even if he does push to the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage, that only might give him a chance to beat the Martial Emperor’s successor. The Heavenly Demon Physique only raises cultivation—it doesn’t raise one’s mastery of techniques. It won’t grant matching combat experience...”

“Wan Renzong, the Martial Emperor’s successor, cultivated all the way to Nascent Soul Transformation through countless real battles. He comprehended worldly power on his own without relying on avatars. On top of that, he inherited the Martial Emperor’s martial arts. Even old veterans at higher realms often can’t beat him!”

“And power obtained by forcibly boosting cultivation through secret arts? That might not even be equal to those veteran Nascent Soul cultivators. Meaning—if the Holy Son only boosts to Nascent Soul Transformation, he still may not be Wan Renzong’s match. Unless, as he said, he really boosts all the way to Void Mystical Stage!”

“But seriously, do you think that’s possible? From Core Formation to Void Mystical—do you know how much lifespan that would burn? Just for a Stone Man Gu, burning away nearly all your remaining time to live? If you were the Holy Son of the Demon Court, would you do it?”

“So, most likely, everything he said earlier was just to pressure the enemies, considering the current state of the Demon Court. He’s telling his enemies that he, the Holy Son, has the ability to instantly reach Void Mystical or even Dao-Seeking power—so don’t act rashly. As for this fight, at most, he’ll probably only push to Nascent Soul Transformation. There’s no way he’s going all the way to Void Mystical.”

This rogue cultivator’s view earned nods of agreement from many others.

The other successors of the Martial Emperor, the Martial Families of the city, the Buddhist powerhouses... all remained silently observant.

They clearly didn’t believe that Lin Jing would burn so much lifespan just for a Stone Man Gu.

“Nascent Soul Transformation is probably his limit. The Holy Son probably believes that reaching that stage and adding the power of his pet beasts will be enough to defeat Little Junior Brother. But he’s way too naive.”

The Martial Emperor’s second disciple spoke coolly.

“This brat is threatening us.”

A few Void Mystical cultivators with ill intent toward Lin Jing narrowed their eyes, especially the Fishman Ancestor and the Flower Ancestor. Though the Whale Emperor and Dragon Emperor were just putting on a show with the Demon Court leader, they hadn’t informed their subordinates.

It’s not that, from their perspective, their “young master” really intended to burn away lifespan.

Besides, the order they received was to find an opportunity to capture a living Longevity Physique.

If it was just a Longevity Physique without Nascent Soul Transformation guardians, they might still have a sliver of a chance. But if lifespan is added to the mix, and he really can burst into Dao-Seeking Stage momentarily—that’s tough. Worst case, even they might die.

The power of Dao-Seeking Stage, even if only for a few seconds, would be more than enough to kill Ling Zhi.

“Is that so...”

Lin Jing’s opponent, the Void Mystical successor Wan Renzong, though initially shocked, quickly calmed and analyzed that even with the Heavenly Demon Physique, lifespan burn would have limits.

His opponent had no reason to surrender outright!

And if the Holy Son of the Demon Court only raised his cultivation to Nascent Soul Transformation, even to the Perfected Stage, Wan Renzong wasn’t afraid at all.

He didn’t believe someone who only temporarily raised their realm by two major stages through a secret art could be that powerful…

Let alone the natural force control at Nascent Soul Transformation—even the basic power of a Nascent Soul Manifestation, something every Nascent Soul cultivator could wield—could Lin Jing even use that properly?

“Holy Son of the Demon Court, I’m not one to scare easily…” Wan Renzong spoke lightly, “You make it sound so easy, but do you really have the resolve to raise your cultivation all the way to Void Mystical?”

“Even if you do, that’d only make you a fake Void Mystical with extremely crude spatial power—just a shell of a realm, without divine abilities. Whether you can defeat me is still uncertain.”

“Cut the crap, bring it. If you think a few words will make me back off, then you really underestimate me, Wan Renzong.”

“Go ahead and burn your lifespan—let’s see which lasts longer: your years, or my fists.”

Lin Jing chuckled, “You’ve misunderstood. I was just giving an example. For this fight, I won’t even need Void Mystical power.”

“You’re at early Nascent Soul Transformation.”

“As long as I also step into early Nascent Soul Transformation, that’s enough to beat you.”

“Among my peers, I’ve never met an equal.”

“Even if, it’s just a temporary, false cultivation level.”

Even Lin Jing, a same-realm Immortal Physique, had been defeated—so there was no reason to fear a Martial Emperor’s successor.

If it were the young Martial Emperor himself, he might feel pressure. But if it’s just one of many successors…

If he lost, all the fortunes and opportunities he received would’ve been for nothing!

Wan Renzong’s eyes flashed. A terrifying, overwhelming aura burst from his body.

“Arm yourself!” he slowly rose into the sky.

“Then let’s begin.”

Heaven-Crushing Palm!

He struck through the air with one palm. In that instant, even lower-stage cultivators watching the move felt like their sense of space and time had shifted—they were suddenly standing upon boundless earth, looking up at an infinite sky. This palm seemed to place heaven and earth within its grasp. The ground trembled, the heavens cracked.

The one at the center of this technique would suffer the full might of a sky-shattering, earth-breaking blow.

“The natural force of heaven and earth, wielded by a Nascent Soul cultivator…” Even fellow Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators felt tremendous pressure just witnessing that palm. Though they weren’t the target, it still took great effort to resist being pulled into the technique’s domain.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 50: Heir of the Demonic Sky Sect
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 50: Heir of the Demonic Sky Sect

Boom!!!

Wan Renzong's palm came crashing down, its power terrifying—heaven and earth collapsing—as it struck toward Lin Jing.

Facing this palm, Lin Jing didn’t move. Kirin-shaped flames surged around him, and in an instant, a massive phantom image resembling a Nascent Soul Manifestation enveloped him.

This phantom outlined the form of a Flame Qilin, which took the hit from Wan Renzong’s palm head-on. Though its scales dented and cracked, as the flames spread, its injuries healed in an instant.

“Roar!”

The Flame Qilin bellowed, eyes burning with fury. Wan Renzong was blasted several meters back, standing in midair with surprise in his eyes as he looked at this beast, whose cultivation was also at the Perfected Nascent Soul Stage.

It was none other than Dragon Carp.

However, this was its defensive form after cultivating the Divine Dragon Transformation, temporarily sacrificing attack and speed for defense.

But after mastering the Heavenly Demon Physique, Lin Jing, in order to better capitalize on the cultivation advantage it granted, had taken time to learn a high-level Beast Taming Sect spell... Enhance.

Just like its name, this spell had a simple, straightforward effect—it allowed a Beast Tamer to expend their own mana to temporarily raise a contracted beast’s minor realm.

Originally, Lin Jing didn’t bother to learn this basic spell at all. After all, his own cultivation had always been lower than that of his beasts—how could he spare mana to enhance them?

But now, after elevating his realm through the Heavenly Demon Physique, although his spell mastery and combat technique hadn’t improved, his fundamental mana had undoubtedly received an epic-level boost.

Thus, with his mana massively amplified, Lin Jing finally had the ability to use Enhance.

“Ancestral-tier bloodline… solid defense...”

Wan Renzong, feeling numbness in his palm, spoke calmly. Although that palm was just a basic test strike, his physique and martial technique had long been refined through countless trials. For a Nascent Soul peak-stage beast to block it—this was a first.

“Then how about this palm…”

Following up casually, in the next moment, Wan Renzong’s Martial Dao True Spirit Manifestation surged forth. His mana shaped a hundred-meter-tall Martial Dao figure that looked exactly like him. Wan Renzong stood at its core, making a punching motion—and the figure mimicked him.

The same palm strike, now empowered by the True Spirit Manifestation, was vastly more powerful. As the giant’s fist came down, even though Dragon Carp was in an ultimate defensive stance, its massive body was forced to the ground under the oppressive might.

“Roar!!!” Dragon Carp grumbled inwardly. It wanted to clash using Immortal Flame to make the opponent suffer a little, but in an instant, it sensed an overwhelming aura rising from below.

In that split-second of clash, demonic energy surged across Lin Jing’s body. His inner fire burned away lifespan, and his cultivation instantly rose to the Nascent Soul Transformation Early Stage.

No one was surprised that Lin Jing would burn his lifespan to temporarily reach Nascent Soul Transformation.

What did surprise everyone, however, was that Lin Jing’s power upon entering that stage was ten times—or even a hundred times—more terrifying than most expected.

“That’s enough. You’re not yet proficient with Immortal Flame.” After Dragon Carp bought him a little time, its task was complete. Lin Jing at the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage exhaled slowly:

“Flame.”

With the Martial Emperor’s voice heavy on that single word, Lin Jing’s Manifestation threw its massive fist, which immediately disintegrated in midair. The entire Manifestation's body followed, crumbling into dust. Even Yu Wanli, who was within it, froze and hadn’t yet processed what had happened.

“Who said that before raising one’s cultivation, there would be realm but no matching divine abilities?”

The Martial Emperor’s terrifying white divine sense spread out, instantly enveloping the entirety of Yuanshen City. Every shift in wind or grass in the city entered the Martial Emperor’s awareness.

That terrifying divine sense, covering a city of a hundred million, was still not done—it slowly continued expanding westward, toward the Western Desert and the Ancient Kingdom.

“Upon reaching the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage, the Nascent Soul evolves into a Manifestation. In that process, a cultivator’s divine sense undergoes a transformation—if deeply integrated with techniques, it becomes willpower that affects the opponent’s seven senses. Like that palm earlier. Those who specialize in divine sense can even turn it into a lethal weapon—to kill with a thought, striking from anywhere.”

“Unfortunately for you, I already cultivated divine sense to a high level back during Foundation Establishment Stage. Even some Dao-Seeking cultivators can’t match me. The only thing that limited my use of divine sense—was my cultivation level.”

“Now, without the shackle of low cultivation, let me show you what my divine sense is truly capable of…”

Having killed multiple Void Mystical cultivators, dozens of Nascent Soul cultivators, and countless Core Formation and below, Lin Jing had tempered his demonic divine sense through endless bloodshed. Previously limited by his realm, he could only use it for insight. But now, with his Phantom Infant evolved into a Nascent Soul, he could wield divine sense offensively—fully unleashing the terrifying nature of the Demonic Sky Sect’s techniques.

“Perish!”

At the word “perish,” Wan Renzong felt a deafening boom in his brain and chest. He felt nothing—just blood pouring from his seven orifices. Darkness engulfed his vision, and he saw thousands of wailing souls crying out around him.

Pfft.

In midair, he coughed up blood. Everyone around looked on in shock and horror, completely unsure of what had just occurred.

In that moment, even Void Mystical cultivators hiding in the void felt as if eyes in the darkness were staring at them—sending chills down their spines.

This Holy Son of the Demon Court… the crowd of experts was stunned.

“You… you devil…”

At this point, Wan Renzong had never imagined that Lin Jing could truly exhibit such terrifying strength while remaining in the same realm. His heart trembled.

That’s right.

He remembered now. In the Tongtian City incident, it had been rumored that Lin Jing used the Heavenly Demon Scroll, a Demonic Sky Sect treasure, and the deaths of countless experts to refine his divine sense.

But he hadn’t expected that once Lin Jing possessed a Nascent Soul, the power of his divine sense would become so terrifying—as if a Demon Sovereign had broken free from its cage.

Most current cultivators had only ever heard about the Demonic Sky Sect in rumors or legends. This was the first time they had truly experienced one of its secret arts.

“Divine Technique: God-Slaying Blade.”

In a dazed moment, Wan Renzong activated his strongest divine technique. This ability, awakened back in Core Formation Stage, was known as God-Slaying Blade—comparable to a top-grade artifact. When used at Nascent Soul Stage, it could injure Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators.

However, just as he formed the blade, it was shattered by a single thought from Lin Jing. Wan Renzong vomited blood and was blown from the sky.

“Perish…”

This time, Lin Jing thought the fight was over. But this successor of the Martial Emperor was more resilient than expected. After three divine sense attacks—even Lin Jing felt a bit dizzy. Yet Wan Renzong, though he crashed heavily to the ground, still retained consciousness. He immediately used the power of the Stone Man Gu to burrow hundreds, thousands, even tens of thousands of meters underground, trying to regroup.

“Futile struggle. Under my divine sense, you can’t hide.” Lin Jing’s divine sense locked on.

To a cultivator who didn’t specialize in divine sense, it would be impossible to track Wan Renzong performing Earth Escape, even if they had a realm advantage.

But with a single thought, Lin Jing’s divine sense probed deep beneath the earth—ten thousand meters down—locking onto Wan Renzong.

Boom!

The fourth divine sense strike struck directly. Tens of thousands of meters underground, Wan Renzong’s eyes rolled back as he lost consciousness.

Lin Jing looked toward the sky. The Fortune Gold List shifted.

“Who said I used the Heavenly Demon Physique just for a Stone Man Gu? What I want… is first place on the Gold List! You… were just the first prey.”

The entire city fell silent.

“D*mn, d*mn, d*mn…”

Elsewhere in the sky, even Dao-Seeking experts observing the battle wore stunned expressions. The Demon Emperor of the Demon Court’s eyes gleamed with excitement. He felt like he’d raised the Martial Emperor’s successor poorly.

A mere Nascent Soul cultivator, utterly unable to withstand a blow.

“If that kind of power were his normal state, even my two sons probably wouldn’t be a match.” The Demon Emperor looked toward the void, in the direction of an Ancient Emperor, and said: “If I snatch away his Ancient Clan ranking, do you think he’d be mad?”

“Heh… that Holy Son of the Demon Court—he’s more like a successor of the Demonic Sky Sect than a Demon Court cultivator. You should be worried. If the Ancient Kingdom truly destroyed the Demonic Sky Sect back then, of course they’d fear someone inheriting its secret arts.” The Seventh Generation Ancient Emperor spoke up.

“Don’t blame me—it’s true I taught him the Demonic Divine Sense, but that Heavenly Demon Physique? Looks like that came from your Ancient Kingdom’s own Demon-Slaying Bureau!” The Demon Emperor quickly distanced himself from responsibility.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 4: Chapter 51: Child of Fortune
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 4 Chapter 51: Child of Fortune

“Very good...”

At the same time,

seeing his own disciple fall unconscious deep underground, the City Lord of Martial Emperor City sensed hostility coming from both the Ancient Kingdom and the Demon Court.

He shared the same thought as the Second Ancient Emperor: How is this a Beast Taming Sect cultivator from the Ancient Kingdom? How is this a Holy Son of the Demon Court? This is clearly, d*mn it, the heir of the Demonic Sky Sect. The Martial Emperor nearly cursed aloud.

“Stone Man Gu, hand it over.”

Lin Jing easily crushed the Martial Emperor’s successor, who had been ranked sixth on the Fortune Gold List, instantly seizing Wan Renzong’s fortune and taking his place among the top names.

It’s said that those who make it into the top ten of the Gold List are no different from the Child of Fortune of a world, and countless opportunities will fall into their laps.
