In the next moment, Lin Jing intensified the power of the poisonous Gu. Fang’s entire body convulsed as he frantically stuffed antidote pills into his mouth, ignoring the meridian ruptures, forcing spiritual power to suppress the toxin. But in his life, he had never encountered such a ferocious poison spell. No matter how he struggled, the toxin could not be suppressed and instead activated even more intensely.

He wailed in pain, horrified to find that the poison was devouring his life force. In just a short moment, he had lost thousands of years of lifespan.

“Spare me! Grandpa, spare me!”

Realizing he could not detoxify, he immediately submitted. But Lin Jing remained unmoved. After a while, the youth, drenched in sweat, gritted his teeth and threw all his resources to Lin Jing, saying, “I admit defeat, admit defeat. I originally planned to offer these to the mountain god, but now they’re all yours!”

He was internally collapsing. What the hell was this? A Nascent Soul cultivator who just entered the Origin Realm, how terrifying! Was this a sword cultivator or a poison cultivator?

Not only did he possess sword intent comparable to the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation, but his poisoning methods and poison power were so strong that even Fang, at the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation, was powerless to counter!

“I have planted the Gu poison in your body. Don’t think of any tricks. Otherwise, even if you break through to the Void Mystical Stage and flee back to your own Cultivation Realm, the poison will still activate. No one can save you. Now, answer my questions.” Lin Jing looked at the struggling youth rolling on the ground and shook his head.

Although this man had high cultivation, his strength on the Destiny Rankings of the Tianyuan Realm probably only ranked around twenty or thirty. It seemed he came from a cultivation realm far weaker than Tianyuan.

“Who chased you here?”

“It was the Cultivation Alliance. A few years ago, a cluster of immortal energy was born somewhere in the Origin Realm. Countless prodigies rushed to fight for it. Knowing I had no chance, I took advantage of the chaos to sneak into the Cultivation Alliance’s headquarters, Xianlin City, to steal something. Unexpectedly, there was a powerful prodigy guarding Xianlin City at that time... and I was chased all the way here.”

Lin Jing was silent. This guy... which cultivation realm’s prodigy was he? Really pathetic.

“The other three...” Lin Jing continued to ask.

“The other three are about as strong as I am. None of us can harm each other. They cultivate in other parts of the mountain. The Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices is huge, and we usually don’t interfere with each other... These three seem to have been chased here by cultivators of the Heavenly Demon Sect.”

“Mm.” After finishing his questions, Lin Jing asked the most crucial question.

“Tell me the information on the strongest cultivators in this Origin Realm.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 4: The Four Heavenly Kings
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 4: The Four Heavenly Kings

"Yes, yes, yes." The cultivator surnamed Fang cried inwardly and made his judgment: this guy came from a cultivation world, likely the same as his hometown, and was not a member of the Cultivation Alliance. Otherwise, he wouldn't be so clueless about the Origin Realm’s information.

However, he was certain that Lin Jing’s cultivation world had a very strong foundation. Most likely, it was a subordinate cultivation world of the "Immortal King’s Domain."

Immortals in the Immortal Realm were divided into four stages: True Immortal, Immortal Lord, Immortal King, and Immortal Emperor. Subordinate cultivation worlds under domains ruled by Immortal Kings naturally had a much stronger foundation than those governed only by Immortal Lords.

"Currently in the Origin Realm, the most powerful are four people!"

"They are known among other cultivators as the Four Heavenly Kings of the Origin Realm."

"First is Li Tianyi, a prodigy from the Cultivation Alliance, who possesses the Chaotic Immortal Physique."

Chaotic Physique!

Lin Jing slightly nodded in recognition. The Chaotic Immortal Physique was even more terrifying than the Creation Immortal Physique. This physique was perfectly compatible with any cultivation method;
there was no technique or spell it could not master, even those from alien races.

Of course, no cultivator had that kind of energy, but even mastering four or five top-tier methods that complemented each other was terrifying enough.

This was far stronger than the True Dragon Immortal Physique, which could grant the wisdom of dragon veins and perfectly mobilize dragon vein power.

"The second is Sheng Kun, one of the Heavenly Demon Sect’s sacred sons. It is said he has the same bloodline as the Heavenly Demon Sect’s Demon Lord in the Immortal Realm!! A demonic bloodline!!"

"This demonic bloodline has already been developed to near perfection, meaning he is almost no different from the young demons of the Immortal Realm. His terrifying demonic power surpasses even the immortal energy nurtured by the Origin Sources."

As expected!

Lin Jing was shocked in his heart. The prodigy of the Heavenly Demon Sect in the Origin Realm was also granted the demonic bloodline by the Heavenly Demon Sect of the Immortal Realm. Under their cultivation, this person had developed his bloodline far faster than Lin Jing himself.

Lin Jing had only recently formed his physique and was still far from perfection, yet this person had already reached simultaneous perfection.

"The third is a native spirit beast of the Origin Realm, a spirit born from a vast sea."

"The fourth is also a native spirit beast of the Origin Realm, born from a fallen meteorite that landed outside the stars of the Origin Realm and gained intelligence."

"These four are currently the strongest in the Origin Realm."

"Among them, Li Tianyi and Sheng Kun have stayed in the Origin Realm for a very long time. It is said they have been suppressing their cultivation realms, ready to break through to the Void Mystical Stage at any moment and leave the Origin Realm. The reason they haven’t left yet is because they fear that after their departure, the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast will massacre the prodigies of the Heavenly Demon Sect and the Cultivation Alliance. After all, apart from these two, there are almost no human prodigies capable of restraining these two native spirit beasts."

"Unlike the local mountain god here, who still abides by the Heavenly Dao rules and fears that the higher Immortal Gods will one day pay attention to the Origin Realm again, these Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast act without restrictions and have joined the battle for Origin Sources. Countless outworld prodigies have died at their hands. Therefore, most people believe that only when the Heavenly Demon Sect and Cultivation Alliance each produce a prodigy capable of replacing Sheng Kun and Li Tianyi and shaking the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast will these two spirit beasts choose to leave."

"Currently, due to mutual checks and balances, the Four Heavenly Kings mostly live hidden behind the scenes, rarely competing for Origin Sources themselves. Instead, they command prodigies from their factions to fight for them. Probably, only when Origin Sources of exceptionally high quality appear will they recklessly intervene."

"I see." Lin Jing understood. He pondered for a while. His current strength was still far from the top tier in the Origin Realm.

For example, Sheng Kun was only at the peak Nascent Soul Transformation stage, and his demonic bloodline was not yet fully perfected. The Heavenly Demon secret arts were beyond question, and his development level was certainly higher than Lin Jing’s.

Even if Lin Jing burned his lifespan to reach the Nascent Soul peak, he would definitely not be Sheng Kun’s match. The difference between forcibly raising one’s cultivation level and a naturally solid foundation was immense.

"You definitely want to obtain Origin Sources from those Seven Minor Heavenly Kings. The most complicated way is to join our faction, then share the spoils. We eat the meat, you drink the soup."

"But if you want to enjoy the Origin Sources alone, you need strength comparable to those seven."

Lin Jing felt that was easy to understand. The Chaotic Immortal Physique and perfected demonic bloodline were indeed towering barriers.

"The Heavenly Demon incarnation, without systematic cultivation by the Heavenly Demon Sect, would hardly reach Sheng Kun’s level. It can only be considered as an identification mark for infiltrating the Heavenly Demon Sect."

"As for my true self, the strongest combination of the Longevity Body and Heavenly Demon Physique cannot be perfectly utilized in the Origin Realm. I cannot rely on my cultivation stage to crush opponents."

"The Ancient Emperor and Demon Emperor want me to use the Longevity Body to outlast my opponents, but they didn’t expect native spirit beasts to be born in the Origin Realm and join the competition for Origin Sources. Their lifespans are no shorter than the Longevity Body’s;
relying on endurance alone is difficult."

"Therefore, there is only one way to rise in the Origin Realm..."

Lin Jing’s eyes flickered.

The Beast Taming Path.

Group assault.

As long as he, Pine Leaf Mouse, Dragon Carp, and Ice Soul Gu united as one, surpassing even one of the Four Heavenly Kings, he would still have a chance to become the fifth Heavenly King of the Origin Realm.

Besides that, Lin Jing looked at his storage pouch and breathed a sigh of relief.

That immortal ox corpse had successfully come with him to the Origin Realm.

Once he normalized to Nascent Soul, using the Divine Control Art in conjunction with the Yin Household Sect’s secret method to control celestial beasts, he might even be able to compete with the Four Heavenly Kings and their sect.

However, Lin Jing thought the best scenario was to capture more native spirit beasts like those on the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices and form his own faction. It would be ideal to subdue the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast as well, then he would truly rule the Origin Realm.

"Next, continue to condense spiritual stones."

Lin Jing did not take this cultivator’s life, nor did he remove the poison. Instead, he continued to make him condense spiritual stones to exchange for the chance to leave the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices.

Meanwhile, Lin Jing turned and flew toward the edge of the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices, curious to see what kind of mountain god it was.

After some time, Lin Jing reached the boundary of the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices.

He discovered it was surrounded by a natural grand formation composed of countless spiritual veins, cutting off all connections between inside and outside. Lin Jing’s true self could not pass using normal means. Even employing the top-tier Void Secret Art “Heavenly Demon Crossing” to traverse dimensional barriers failed to break through this natural formation!!!

"This mountain god..." Originally, Lin Jing had been skeptical about the cultivator surnamed Fang’s claim that the mountain god’s strength rivaled that of Immortal Physiques of the same stage. But now, he felt trouble brewing.

If this mountain god, which did not compete for Origin Sources, already possessed such power, then the two spirit beast Heavenly Kings who had absorbed massive Origin Sources would be even more absurd.

No wonder these spirit beasts were born in the place where the natural heavenly and earthly energy of the lower realm was richest...

Just as Lin Jing tried repeatedly and failed to break through, a lazy, shameless voice sounded in his ear.

"When did someone else come in again... Ah, you were directly teleported from another cultivation world, huh... That won’t do. Once you enter, if you want to leave, you have to pay. I planted this tree, I opened this path;
if you want to pass, pay the toll. It’s fair. I won’t hurt you, and you don’t have to complain to the great powers of the Immortal Realm. Let’s keep it fair. Well, you’re not a small fry, so I’ll charge you half price... No money? Then condense spiritual stones as tribute to this mountain god until you pay enough!"

Realizing he still couldn’t beat this mountain god, Lin Jing turned and left without wasting words. Although he carried resources enough to pay the toll and although burning his lifespan to the Nascent Soul peak might allow him to force his way out, he only wanted to leave and saw no need to waste so much.

Lin Jing chose to break through on the spot instead. He would let his true self, incarnations, and all pet beasts absorb the local spiritual energy to break through to Nascent Soul. After that, he could negotiate properly with this mountain god—ideally even subdue it.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 5: Nascent Soul Transformation
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 5: Nascent Soul Transformation

“That bane, why is he back again... Could it be that the Mountain God stopped him as well?”

Before long, Fang Wuming saw Lin Jing returning, muttering in his heart. But the next second, his heart jumped as he saw Lin Jing appear right in front of his cave dwelling.

“Fellow Daoist, after wandering around, I still find the spiritual energy here to be the densest.” Lin Jing spoke without any emotional fluctuation.

“Ah, here you go.” Fang Wuming cried silently. It was bad enough that he had invested all his resources, but now even the cultivation cave dwelling was thrown into the mix.

The worst part was that he had invested everything yet couldn’t show any dissatisfaction. He could only rub his hands and smile awkwardly: “Actually, if you can’t leave, there’s no need to be too upset.”

“Cultivating here is actually quite good.”

“This Origin Realm is rich with the natural power of heaven and earth, and the territory where the Mountain God is born has the densest spiritual energy—indeed the best in the entire Origin Realm! To be honest, looking across the whole Origin Realm, there are few places better than the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices for cultivation.”

“You can cultivate here peacefully. Once you break through to Nascent Soul Transformation, you’ll be invincible in the Origin Realm. Becoming the Fifth Heavenly King of the Origin Realm will definitely be within reach. At that time, this Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices will be yours to come and go as you please.”

It was no surprise that Fang Wuming was so submissive—after all, he was still poisoned by the toxin Lin Jing had left on him!

Right now, his greatest need was not to leave the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices, but to remove the Gu poison inside him!

“Mm.” Lin Jing nodded.

His words seemed like the kind of thing Lin Jing liked to hear, but they weren’t wrong. Lin Jing truly sensed that the spiritual energy within this Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices was terrifyingly dense—nothing in the Tianyuan Realm could compare.

If a congenital spiritual body cultivated here, it might achieve Nascent Soul Transformation within a hundred years.

That was why Lin Jing hadn’t been in a hurry to leave. Even if he left, he would still have to find a place to break through first. Since that was the case, he might as well choose this place.

...........

After taking over the cave dwelling that Fang Wuming had developed, Lin Jing set up several layers of formation arrays and then began his secluded cultivation breakthrough.

Rather than saying Lin Jing was trying to break through on his own, it was more accurate to say he summoned his three half-step Nascent Soul Transformation spirit beasts—Pine Leaf Mouse, Dragon Carp, and Ice Soul Gu—to break through one after another.

Lin Jing planned to use the feedback from their breakthroughs to guide his final realm breakthrough.

Having arrived in the Origin Realm, these three spirit beasts were quite excited. Bathing in such a place filled with natural power of heaven and earth, they seemed reluctant to return to the Tianyuan Realm!

“They’re over a hundred years old but still act like children.”

After releasing the spirit beasts, Lin Jing watched as they curiously explored the surroundings like puppies in a strange place, sniffing around to absorb the atmosphere.

Only when they were fully satisfied did they each find a place according to Lin Jing’s instructions and attempt their breakthroughs.

For them, without the burden of a longevity body, breaking through to Nascent Soul Transformation was quite simple. Their foundation, talent, and potential had long been sufficient to reach Nascent Soul Transformation. The only reason they hadn’t yet broken through was that they waited until arriving in the Origin Realm to do so.

While the spirit beasts were pushing their bottlenecks, Lin Jing inspected the resources Fang Wuming had offered. He found that the most valuable was still the Wind God Bow, a supreme magic treasure he had previously taken out, and shook his head.

“What a pauper... no wonder he has no money to leave.”

Before leaving, Lin Jing also double-checked his own magic treasures, and that inspection revealed a problem with his spiritual power.

The Hourglass of Time!

That realm treasure, whose internal space-time flow speed was the same as its enclosed cave realm, actually had some effect in the Origin Realm.

“Strange…” Zhu Shu frowned, but after a moment, she understood. That treasure was probably forged by the Immortal Palace using the Tianyuan Dragon Vein. It had no such miraculous effect in the small Tianyuan continent, but once outside the Tianyuan Realm, it could influence time in other regions.

“Well, it’s fine.”

Since the cultivation environment in the Origin Realm was so good, Lin Jing didn’t dwell on the Hourglass of Time. After tossing it into the deepest part of his storage bag, he began cultivating with his spirit beasts.

In the blink of an eye, a year passed.

In the Mountain God’s domain, Pine Leaf Mouse was the first to condense the Heaven-Earth Primordial Spirit form. Inside the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices, there was abundant vegetation. Besides the power of the earth veins, the spiritual power of plants was the densest, so its Nascent Soul transformed the fastest!

Lin Jing hadn’t taken Pine Leaf Mouse’s breakthrough seriously at first, but he had underestimated the changes that occurred when Pine Leaf Mouse reached Nascent Soul Transformation!

While at the Spirit Dao Sect, Pine Leaf Mouse successfully advanced the “Emperor Qing’s Longevity Technique” to the sixth layer.

However, limited by time, energy, and resources, Pine Leaf Mouse itself was only at the fifth layer and had not yet verified the sixth layer!

The fifth layer of “Emperor Qing’s Longevity Technique” already allowed the half-step Nascent Soul Transformation Pine Leaf Mouse to have control over vegetation comparable to Nascent Soul-level plant spirits. The sixth layer was even more powerful;
once mastered, control over plants would rival Void Mystical Stage plant spirits.

Unfortunately, this layer could not be reached by devouring ordinary spiritual plants. To master it, one needed to devour a certain quantity of quasi-immortal grade plants. Even Lin Jing at that time wasn’t rich enough to provide Pine Leaf Mouse with quasi-immortal grade spiritual plants for training.

It wasn’t that such plants couldn’t be found;
the cost-performance ratio was just too low. After all, quasi-immortal grade spiritual plants each had divine effects, like the immortal water lotus used for forging incarnations. Using them solely to boost Pine Leaf Mouse’s power was wasteful and far less cost-effective than directly consuming them.

However, what Lin Jing and Pine Leaf Mouse hadn’t expected was that the nearly solidified plant natural power condensed inside the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices was surprisingly high quality, unexpectedly meeting the cultivation requirements of the sixth layer of “Emperor Qing’s Longevity Technique.”

After Pine Leaf Mouse condensed the Heaven-Earth Primordial Spirit, it seemed able to directly mobilize and absorb this power. Its body uncontrollably began rapidly devouring the power of heaven and earth. The absorption speed was dozens of times faster than an ordinary Nascent Soul cultivator.

“What the hell is going on?!!!”

The Mountain God was almost instantly awakened by the sensation of natural energy being ravenously devoured nearby. It sensed the disturbance coming from Lin Jing’s side!

“That Nascent Soul brat who trespassed here!”

The Mountain God was stunned and couldn’t understand why this brat was absorbing spiritual energy so aggressively. Although restricted by heaven and earth’s rules, it was stuck at the Nascent Soul peak and couldn’t break through, so it didn’t need much spiritual energy for cultivation. But seeing someone enter its territory and absorb energy so violently, the Mountain God felt a bit displeased.

If this continued, it might soon turn from a lush green Mountain God into a desolate, yellowed wasteland, suffering severe damage to its appearance!

“This can’t continue. I have to drive them out.”

“No, kicking them out without paying is too easy on them.”

“Hmph, let’s see how much they can absorb!”

The Mountain God didn’t want to break the rules, so it began absorbing the earth vein power from outside its territory to strengthen the spiritual energy within its domain.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 6: Difficult to Send Off Buddha
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 6: Difficult to Send Off Buddha

“What happened…”

Not only did the Mountain God sense it, but Fang Wuming, who was not far from Lin Jing’s cultivation mountain peak, also felt the change in the spiritual energy of the Heaven and Earth here. He perceived that this vast spiritual energy was converging rapidly toward a certain location.

And that location was Lin Jing’s seclusion spot.

“Is he about to breakthrough Nascent Soul Transformation?? Such a huge commotion!” Fang Wuming’s heart stirred. When he broke through Nascent Soul Transformation, the noise wasn’t even one-tenth this loud! No wonder this ruthless guy, who could defeat him despite just having the Nascent Soul stage, was so formidable.

However, with such a massive disturbance, Fang Wuming was quite worried that it might disturb the Mountain God and cause displeasure. Fortunately, after a long time, the Mountain God showed no reaction…

“Such a pity, still a bit short!”

After an unknown amount of time, the Pine Leaf Mouse stopped absorbing the Heaven and Earth’s plant spiritual energy because this quality of spiritual energy was no longer sufficient to enhance its “Emperor Qing’s Longevity Technique.” In the end, “Emperor Qing’s Longevity Technique” was just one step away from reaching the sixth layer. But this step made Lin Jing and the Pine Leaf Mouse realize that ordinary Heaven and Earth energy was no longer enough;
they would probably need quasi-immortal-grade herbs and plants.

However, in terms of quantity, it shouldn’t require too many—perhaps just one or two plants could help the Pine Leaf Mouse break through this bottleneck.

Finally, the Pine Leaf Mouse, which had stabilized at the early Nascent Soul Transformation stage, opened its eyes. Its emerald glazed light flickered and flowed within, its expression somewhat strange.

Because with this breakthrough, its Glazed Immortal Eye divine ability had evolved again!!!

The last time the Glazed Immortal Eye evolved was when it condensed the Five Elements Demon Pill to break through the Foundation Establishment stage.

That extremely special Foundation Establishment breakthrough had allowed the Pine Leaf Mouse to synthesize Five Elements materials instead of only plants and herbs.

During the Pine Leaf Mouse’s attempt to breakthrough Nascent Soul, Lin Jing also prepared a similar nurturing plan to stimulate the Glazed Immortal Eye’s evolution again. He provided a Nascent Soul Pill forged using his own longevity blood as the core ingredient, intending to help the Pine Leaf Mouse gain stronger control over “Life Force.”

He hoped that through this method, after breaking through Nascent Soul, the Pine Leaf Mouse could synthesize “living creatures” and perform “life synthesis.”

However, obviously, it failed back then. Apart from synthesizing higher-tier materials, the Glazed Immortal Eye showed no other major changes.

Realizing that “life synthesis” couldn’t be achieved easily, Lin Jing gave up, understanding that “life synthesis” was too unnatural—probably even true immortals could barely accomplish it—so he no longer dared to hope.

But unexpectedly, this time, with only the simple goal of breaking through Nascent Soul Transformation, the Glazed Immortal Eye had a new evolution!

A secondary synthesis!

Now the Glazed Immortal Eye can resynthesize materials that have already been synthesized once, raising their quality. It can turn large amounts of originally low-grade synthesized items into a single, higher-grade synthesis of the same effect, which can be effective even against higher-level cultivators!

“Hey!!!”

Although the Glazed Immortal Eye evolved this time, the Pine Leaf Mouse protested with both hands. Doesn’t this mean its stockpile quantity will shrink again!

“Don’t be greedy for small gains.”

Lin Jing gave the Pine Leaf Mouse a tap with a stick.

The Pine Leaf Mouse hid in the corner, clutching the lump on its head, baring its teeth at Lin Jing.

“You can now easily open a small spatial pocket inside first-tier mutated red leaves. Synthesizing red leaves is also the most convenient resource for opening spatial pockets. If you can raise the quality of the red leaves and further expand the space within, imagine—an immortal-grade red leaf could probably open a space not smaller than Qingzhou.” Lin Jing licked his lips, making the Pine Leaf Mouse’s eyes light up.

“Squeak squeak…” After saying this, it ran off to experiment, wanting to see the current limits of red leaf synthesis and space opening!

It also sensed the spiritual energy, pondering which synthesized item’s quality improvement would be most useful.

Before Yan Wei Mouse broke through Nascent Soul Transformation, the Mountain God was the seventh to condense a Heaven and Earth Primordial Spirit after him.

On the surface, there seemed to be no fire-attribute natural spiritual energy within the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices, but in reality, it was just hidden deep.

During Dragon Carp’s condensation of the Heaven and Earth Primordial Spirit, it originally intended to absorb some solar energy casually to strengthen the solar flame, using that as the core to breakthrough.

However, during the breakthrough process, as its perception of the natural spiritual energy of Heaven and Earth intensified, it discovered something astonishing.

Beneath the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices, connecting to the Origin Realm’s earth core, in the deepest core, a terrifying Earth Core Extinguishing Flame was burning fiercely, reaching the level of immortal-grade fire.

At this moment, Dragon Carp finally understood why Fang Wuming said the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices possessed battle power comparable to the peak Nascent Soul Transformation stage.

This guy actually controls immortal-grade earth core fire.

In the Tianyuan Realm, besides Dragon Carp, who mastered the Flame Emperor’s divine ability, even the Tongtian Tower master could only temporarily have immortal-grade flame by relying on an immortal pill.

But in this Origin Realm, the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices could do this as well. Fang Wuming probably only knew the Mountain God was strong but not why.

Now, Dragon Carp finally understood.

… Dragon Carp felt terrified. If such a Buddhist-like Mountain God, who did not fight for Origin Sources, was this strong, then Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast must be even more powerful. No wonder one would need a Chaotic Immortal Physique and a perfected demon clan bloodline to counter them.

However, despite feeling scared, Dragon Carp did not let the Mountain God off. Since the Mountain God seemed willing to abide by the realm’s rules, it shamelessly absorbed the power of the Earth Core Immortal Fire, attempting to refine a portion of it to transform its own flame primordial spirit into a solar-earth core flame primordial spirit.

“Damn it, ten again!!!”

Sensing that one of its trump cards, the Earth Core Immortal Fire beneath it, was being triggered, the Mountain God immediately awakened and sensed the movement from Lin Jing’s side!

“Why is it them again? They’re courting death!”

The Mountain God was startled, not because the Earth Core Immortal Fire was triggered and thinking Lin Jing and the others deserved to die. The Earth Core Immortal Fire wasn’t actually its property. As a Mountain God born from Heaven and Earth, it had the ability to mobilize the power of this Earth Core Immortal Fire, but this immortal fire was essentially born from the Origin Realm’s earth core itself.

The Mountain God only thought Lin Jing and the others touching this immortal fire was courting death!

Even for itself, born naturally and intimately connected to the earth, it took tens of thousands of years of bitter cultivation to barely be able to mobilize this immortal fire’s power. So the Mountain God deeply understood how terrifying the Earth Core Immortal Fire was.

It had such a natural advantage, yet controlling the immortal fire was still so difficult. How dare these outsiders, human cultivators, provoke it, not afraid of being burned alive?

If they got burned to death by the Earth Core Immortal Fire, it wouldn’t be its fault.

However, after a long while, the Mountain God felt something was off.

It carefully sensed and suddenly realized that damn it, these people really could mobilize the immortal fire, and their control over the Earth Core Fire was not much worse than its own!

“Damn it…” The Mountain God broke out in cold sweat, feeling like it had encountered filth. It was one thing for the grass spiritual energy within its domain to be absorbed, but how could the Earth Core Immortal Fire beneath it also be absorbed? When would this end?

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 7: Deportation
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 7: Deportation

Compared to the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and the Dragon Carp, the Ice Soul Gu faced slightly greater difficulty in its breakthrough.

Firstly, its attributes were overly chaotic. Had it not devoured so many bizarre gu insects afterward and retained only its ice attribute, the breakthrough would have actually been easier.

Secondly, it possessed a "Death Gu Avatar." It wanted both its true form and avatar to achieve breakthroughs simultaneously. The Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp didn't have such complex requirements—their avatars remained at the Demonic Court working, leaving only their true forms to focus on.

"It's coming!"

This resulted in Lin Jing, as their beast tamer, benefiting from their successful Nascent Soul Transformations. With their breakthrough feedback, he surpassed the Ice Soul Gu and shattered his own bottleneck first.

Lin Jing's nascent soul rapidly grew and transformed, his perception of the surrounding natural energies becoming increasingly acute. The most critical step in breaking through from Nascent Soul to Nascent Soul Transformation was allowing the nascent soul to comprehend the natural forces of heaven and earth, thereby forging a Heaven-Earth Primordial Spirit.

Every cultivator's primordial spirit possessed different attributes. The Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse's primordial spirit was primarily vegetation-based, while the Dragon Carp's was flame-based.

Now, Lin Jing had reached the stage of shaping his primordial spirit with natural energies. However, reaching this stage didn't guarantee a successful breakthrough. Insufficient perception of natural forces during this phase could still lead to failure.

Unfortunately, Lin Jing hadn't taken this path with his avatar. His contracted beasts could substitute for avatars in enhancing his perception of natural forces. With the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp, forming either a vegetation or flame primordial spirit would be effortless for Lin Jing.

However, neither vegetation nor flame aligned perfectly with Lin Jing's path. Though vegetation harmonized well with his Longevity Body, it wasn't the optimal choice.

"According to ancient texts from the Immortal Palace, the natural forces of heaven and earth aren't limited to metal, wood, water, fire, earth and other basic elements—they encompass all phenomena in creation."

"Day, night, and stars are also part of nature's fabric."

"Gravity, life and death—these too are natural laws."

"The reason Tianyuan Continent cultivators typically choose wind, rain, thunder or lightning for their primordial spirits is because such elemental spirits are relatively easier to form."

"But consequently, these spirits are far from being the strongest..."

"If I'm to forge a primordial spirit, it must be the strongest and most suitable for me...!"

Lin Jing chose life and death—the inescapable fate and fundamental law governing all existence in creation, the extreme polarity dictating all transformations between heaven and earth.

"Ice Soul Gu, cease cultivation and assist my breakthrough."

At Lin Jing's command, the Ice Soul Gu momentarily paused before merging into his body. It allowed the Death Gu Avatar—forged from "Gu God's blood and Death Rare Beast bloodline"—to take dominance, offering its death essence for Lin Jing's control.

In the next instant, Lin Jing mobilized his longevity essence and death bloodline, making them circle his nascent soul like twin fish as it underwent metamorphosis. At this moment, everything around him seemed to freeze in his perception.

The power of life and death blurred the natural elements within the mountain—metals, rivers, flowing winds—replacing them with new visions. He saw blades of grass, but beyond their vegetal nature, he witnessed their entire life cycle: sprouts breaking through soil, tender shoots growing, then withering and returning to earth.

He saw birds hatching from eggs in trees, witnessed eagles falling silently from skies, closing their eyes in final repose.

"Life........"

For Lin Jing who simultaneously grasped the extremes of life and death, a life-death primordial spirit perfectly matched his current state.

The Dragon Carp finally settled down, while the bewildered mountain god still pondered whether Lin Jing's group had truly mastered the Earthcore Immortal Fire...

Before long, the mountain god made a more despairing discovery—under some mysterious influence, it seemed to be going into labor.

"Turns out the Longevity Body achieves completion during Nascent Soul Transformation. To perfect it requires mastery over death energy too..."

The completed Longevity Body drastically enhanced Lin Jing's vitality and lifespan. None of his current methods could conceal this overwhelming life force, which even leaked through his formation's gaps, dispersing across the mountain slopes.

Bathed in this vitality, numerous plants began undergoing strange transformations, developing spiritual intelligence and becoming new lifeforms.

The moment these plants evolved into sentient beings, a surge of life energy fed back into Lin Jing's primordial spirit, strengthening it further.

"What in damnation..." This development gave the mountain god stomach pains. As a comprehensive super mountain deity, no new spirits should be able to form within its domain without permission. Yet now, everything was in chaos.

Lin Jing also noticed these changes with astonishment. His perfected Longevity Body could actually animate plants into spirits—this approached the capabilities of a Creation Immortal Physique.

However, unlike the Creation Immortal Physique which could awaken intelligence in any natural object (even rocks), Lin Jing could currently only animate spiritual plants. Moreover, he suspected this effect was amplified by the Origin Realm's dense natural energies—such results would be impossible in the Tianyuan Realm.

Most crucially, spirits awakened by the Creation Immortal Physique obeyed their creator's commands, whereas Lin Jing suspected the creatures animated by his longevity energy might actually try to devour him after gaining sentience.

If that wasn't enough, Lin Jing made another startling discovery—as his Longevity Body perfected, the Death Rare Beast bloodline rotating alongside his longevity essence was also enhanced by the life energy, undergoing simultaneous evolution.

Amidst this interplay of life and death, while the Ice Soul Gu's true form remained at Nascent Soul stage, its avatar successfully condensed a death primordial spirit first, achieving Nascent Soul Transformation.

Torrential death energy surged from Lin Jing's body alongside the life force, jointly affecting the surroundings. Perhaps because Lin Jing had developed his death energy primarily through the Yin Corpse Sect's corpse manipulation arts, as vegetation gained sentience, the mountain god also discovered hordes of long-dead demonic beast corpses crawling out from its insides.

The mountain god felt a massive headache and full-body irritation.

"Could this be... a life-death primordial spirit?"

"Unacceptable. This youth cannot remain here—he's far too disruptive. He must be deported immediately."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 8: Immortal Ox
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 8: Immortal Ox

"What the hell is happening?"

Outside, Fang Wuming who was cultivating not far from Lin Jing also felt something strange.

Seeing the "zombie birds" and "zombie rats" emerging from the ground, he wasn't afraid since those undead creatures had very low cultivation levels. But these things shouldn't appear in the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices at all - he just felt something was off.

Moreover, the fruits on nearby trees suddenly split open with wide grins and started laughing creepily at him - not exactly a pleasant experience.

Boom!

Just as Fang Wuming suspected this might be another disturbance caused by Lin Jing, a deafening rumble shook the earth as a giant figure emerged from the ground. The mountain god's avatar looked toward Lin Jing's secluded cultivation site, about to demand this troublemaker leave its territory immediately... when suddenly, a pine leaf mouse riding on a leaf tore through space and appeared outside the multiple layered arrays, staring down the mountain god's avatar.

"Hey!"

The pine leaf mouse crossed its arms and examined the mountain god, making it clear the beast tamer's cultivation must not be disturbed.

Because this mountain god seemed to have lived for tens of thousands of years, accumulating unimaginable wealth from all the tolls it had collected over the millennia. The pine leaf mouse couldn't even begin to guess how rich it must be.

"Where did this rodent come from?" the mountain god cursed.

"Fine, I'll be generous - you can keep your stuff, just get the hell out of here!"

"You have one breath's time to scram from my territory!"

The mountain god roared, causing Fang Wuming who was hiding nearby to tremble in shock. This mountain god... was actually willing to let them go without demanding anything? Just voluntarily driving away this calamity?

Why couldn't he get this kind of lucky break?

"Squeak!!!" The pine leaf mouse absolutely couldn't allow any interference with Lin Jing's cultivation at this critical moment. It pulled out its newly upgraded mechanical bamboo spear that had reached Nascent Soul-level power, hoisting it onto its shoulder and aiming directly at the mountain god.

Simultaneously, it loaded its own demon core into the bamboo spear as ammunition.

Though the mountain god didn't recognize what the mouse was holding, being aimed at like this gave it an extremely bad feeling - somehow more threatening than even quasi-immortal energy.

"Mountain God-senpai..."

During their standoff, Lin Jing's voice suddenly emerged from the secluded cave.

Only then did the mountain god realize Lin Jing had opened a gap in the layered arrays, allowing his spiritual sense to extend outward.

"Honorable Mountain God, I wish to continue cultivating here a while longer. When my cultivation is complete, I will depart and leave you generous gifts. May we stay a bit longer?"

Lin Jing spoke politely. Originally the mountain god wanted to refuse, but when an overwhelmingly terrifying aura leaked from the cave, the mountain god was shocked.

It instinctively probed with its spiritual sense and was stunned to discover - beside Lin Jing's meditation spot lay the corpse of an immortal beast that had been dead for who-knows-how-many years.

Normally an immortal beast corpse wouldn't frighten the mountain god. But at this moment, white smoke streamed from Lin Jing's left eye while black smoke poured from his right - the dual-colored smoke connected to the dead ox's eyes, and horrifyingly, the zombie ox stood up and stamped its hooves, radiating an incomprehensibly powerful aura.

The mountain god got the distinct impression this ox could flip its true form over with a single kick!

"What kind of joke is this? I just broke through to Nascent Soul and haven't even stabilized my cultivation - how could I possibly control an immortal beast corpse and restore some of its living power?!" Lin Jing was internally panicking, completely baffled.

"Fellow Daoist Zhiyan?"

Facing the mountain god's repeated calls, Lin Jing suddenly regained clarity. After a moment's contemplation, he finally responded: "As you wish, Fellow Daoist."

With that, the mountain god abandoned its plan to evict them, deciding not to provoke this freak.

It cursed its bad luck for letting a monster nearly on par with the Four Heavenly Kings enter its domain!

The next moment, as the mountain god left, Lin Jing terminated the zombie-driving technique and spat out a mouthful of blood.

"Not bad."

"Using the power of life and death to activate the zombie-driving technique can indeed control this immortal ox corpse."

"But my cultivation is still too low. Even burning my lifespan to forcibly elevate my beast taming mastery to Void Mystical Stage using the Divine Control Art, manipulating this immortal ox remains quite strenuous."

"Earlier, I could barely control it for less than a second - good thing it successfully scared off the mountain god."

"But it's enough. With this trump card, even if only momentarily usable, I'll have self-preservation capability in the Origin Realm. At least I won't be bullied by those immortal physique geniuses or millennia-old Nascent Soul freaks."

Lin Jing wiped the blood away and grinned. It seemed his comfortable life in the Origin Realm would depend on this big ox.

His top priority now was increasing the ox's control duration - preferably to over five minutes - to accomplish more things.

With the mountain god no longer interfering, Lin Jing continued stabilizing his cultivation. Now the only team members who hadn't condensed their primordial spirits were the Heavenly Demon avatar and the Ice Soul Gu's true form.

Several days later...

Outside the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices territory.

An aristocratic, princess-like female cultivator was desperately fleeing through the mountain ranges.

Chasing after her in a teasing manner was a peak Nascent Soul cultivator.

"Fairy, hand over the dragon veins you're carrying and I won't harm you."

"In your dreams!" Gu Youran spat back, her face pale. She never expected such terrible luck - first getting teleported to a desolate wilderness, flying over a year to escape, then the first person she meets in the Origin Realm being a Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator!

[Take these premium dragon veins to cultivate with in the Origin Realm. But remember - never let Heavenly Demon Sect members discover them. Their Heavenly Demon Codex relies on devouring dragon veins for cultivation. To them, these premium veins may only be second in value to Origin Sources.]

Gu Youran recalled her father-emperor's warning. She had indeed sealed and hidden the dragon veins thoroughly, yet still got discovered.

Originally, with her experience dealing with Lin Jing - inheritor of Heavenly Demon techniques - and relying on her Postnatal Immortal Physique, she thought she could handle ordinary Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators.

But she'd been naive. While she could counter his Heavenly Demon secret arts, she never expected him to know "immortal techniques" - spells requiring immortal energy to activate. Such things were impossible to learn in the Tianyuan Realm. But the Origin Realm was different - Origin Sources could produce immortal energy. Using this, the Heavenly Demon cultivator had immediately wounded her with immortal techniques, catching her completely off guard.

"Then keep running! Let's see how far you get!" The Heavenly Demon cultivator snorted coldly. But the next instant, his expression changed sharply as he recognized they were approaching the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices territory.

"STOP RIGHT THERE!!!" He roared furiously, burning spiritual power in pursuit. He bitterly regretted not knowing the Heavenly Demon Crossing technique.

If this woman reached the Mountain and gained the mountain god's protection, even with the few wisps of immortal energy rewarded by the Holy Son - enough to activate immortal techniques a few times - he'd never be able to seize those premium dragon veins anymore. That mountain god's power was utterly terrifying.

"Damn bitch, I said STOP! You think entering the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices will save you? Don't push me! Even if I have to enter that damned mountain myself, I'll capture you! At worst I'll break through to Void Mystical Stage right inside and leave the Origin Realm! With these premium dragon veins and stripping your immortal physique origin, it'll still be worth it!" Seeing Gu Youran still fleeing, the Heavenly Demon cultivator raged internally, his fury reaching boiling point.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 9: The Savior
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 9: The Savior

Run! Run! Run!

Gu Youran fled with all her might, refusing to believe the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator's lies.

Though he claimed he'd let her go if she surrendered the dragon veins, Gu Youran didn't trust him.

Records stated the Heavenly Demon Scripture cultivated by these practitioners allowed perfect body possession.

With sufficient power, not only would possession never fail, but practitioners could even seize bodies of different genders and races.

Though she only possessed a Postnatal Immortal Physique, it was still an immortal-grade constitution. This demonic cultivator might covet her body for possession.

The thought of a strange male cultivator occupying her body made Gu Youran sick. She'd rather die than be captured.

"This is—"

The Tianyuan Ancient Kingdom had specialized methods for nurturing dragon veins, making theirs exceptionally potent—precisely why this demonic cultivator pursued her relentlessly.

Gu Youran marveled at the Origin Realm's excellent feng shui.

"If I reach that dragon vein, even without practicing the True Dragon Secret Arts, I have methods to utilize its power for counterattack!" she decided, simultaneously noticing the pursuing cultivator accelerating.

She barely had time to wonder why when an overwhelming spiritual power froze her completely, filling her with terror.

Then an ancient, resonant voice echoed:

"This tree I planted, this road I paved, to enter my mountain, tribute you must save!"

"Little lass, since you're being chased, offer me one supreme dragon vein, and I'll grant sanctuary. This Mountain God will block your foe!"

"What?!"

Shocked, Gu Youran realized the entire mountain range ahead possessed sentience—the dragon vein she'd sensed was merely part of it.

Incredible power!

Cold sweat drenched her. This Mountain God's strength dwarfed even her pursuer's, instantly immobilizing her. It might surpass even her brother or the Holy Son of the Demon Court.

The Origin Realm truly hid dragons among common snakes.

But compared to the demonic cultivator, the Mountain God seemed reasonable. With no alternatives, Gu Youran tossed a storage ring: "Take it!"

She sprinted deeper, but the voice followed:

"Swift little lass! Rest assured, I'll stop your enemy. But remember—entering requires tribute, and leaving demands more. Ten supreme dragon veins! Fail to pay, and you'll stay to condense spiritual stones for me!!"

"You!"

Gu Youran nearly cursed. With such power, the Mountain God could simply rob her! How shameless!

"Take all my dragon veins—just eliminate him."

Resigned, she reasoned that facing this greedy deity was preferable to body-snatching by the demonic cultivator. At worst, the Mountain God might possess her too.

"One guest, enter... But heed this, girl: avoid the forbidden zone marked ahead. If the filth there kills you, even I cannot intervene." The Mountain God indicated the danger area just as the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator arrived at the mountain's edge.

"Leave." The Mountain God's calm command shook heaven and earth.

"Damn it, too late..." The demonic cultivator scowled but called out: "Mountain God, I serve Sacred Son Sheng Kun of the Heavenly Demon Sect. That woman... is vital to our sect. Hand her over."

"Whether Sacred Rooster or Sacred Kun, my rules stand firm," the Mountain God retorted, unafraid. If pressed, it could always seek refuge with the Meteor Spirit Beast.

"Fine!" The cultivator fumed, yet coveted Gu Youran's dragon veins. Among countless veins harvested across worlds by the Heavenly Demon Sect, few matched the quality nurtured by Tianyuan's national fortune.

"I'm entering too!" Finally, he gritted his teeth, deciding to brave the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices.

His persistence gave the Mountain God pause.

"Well? Your rules apply equally. State your terms—once inside, how I handle her is none of your concern."

"True enough," the Mountain God grumbled, unused to such determination. Most pursuers abandoned chases after targets entered its domain.

But it understood—for fortune-devouring demonic cultivators, those dragon veins were irresistible.

After extorting several supreme magical treasures, the Mountain God permitted his entry.

Meanwhile, Gu Youran had barely relaxed inside the mountain when she sensed the demonic cultivator's approach. Cursing vehemently, she resumed fleeing.

"Damned Mountain God! You promised protection for one dragon vein, yet let him in!"

"Nowhere left to run!" The cultivator sneered, watching her scramble. "If this deity were reliable, outsiders wouldn't call this the 'Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices.'"

Lewd sacrifices—improper rites. What could one expect from such a wilderness god?

"Damn it!" Panicking as her sanctuary failed, Gu Youran suddenly detected another dragon vein pulse.

The mountain housed two veins—one belonging to the Mountain God, the other seemingly severed.

More astonishingly, this vein's resonance closely resembled Tianyuan's dragon veins.

As a princess, Gu Youran's sensitivity to her homeland's veins was acute.

"Brother?!" she gasped joyfully. Before their journey, the Second Ancient Emperor had given both her and the Ancient Imperial Prince dragon veins. Besides her, only he would carry Tianyuan veins.

Imagining fighting alongside him, Gu Youran accelerated—only to realize the pulse came from the forbidden zone!

"Halt!"

As she hesitated, a cultivator materialized, glaring coldly: "Unauthorized personnel, withdraw! This is my lord's cultivation territory. Advance further, and Fang will strike."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 10: Good Little Sister
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 10: Good Little Sister

"Run. Why aren't you running anymore?" Gu Youran was intercepted by Fang Wuming, while the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator closed in from behind.

The Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator swept his gaze over Gu Youran and Fang Wuming before bursting into laughter. "Another unlucky bastard chased into these mountains? You... you're that cultivator who sneaked into the Cultivation Alliance headquarters during the last Immortal Source War and got yourself wanted, aren't you?"

"Heavenly Demon Sect!!!" Fang Wuming's expression changed drastically upon seeing the pursuing cultivator, though Gu Youran's presence hadn't fazed him. Why would a Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator enter the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices?!

Fang Wuming scrutinized Gu Youran and concluded she must possess some extraordinary treasure that made the demonic cultivator unwilling to give up the chase.

"No need to run anymore." Gu Youran suddenly stopped fleeing and looked at Fang Wuming. Though she didn't recognize him, she recognized the formation he was guarding nearby.

That formation, constructed around dragon vein energy as its core, originated from the Tianyuan Ancient Kingdom—something she knew intimately. This confirmed her suspicion that her elder brother Gu Xinghe must also be here.

"Brother! Save me!" She called toward the distance. Ordinary methods couldn't breach the formation, but this particular formation had been taught to Lin Jing by the First Ancient Emperor. As a cultivator from the Gu Clan, she naturally possessed special techniques to transmit her voice through it—a secret method the Gu Clan used to summon their ancestors from seclusion.

Gu Youran's shout stunned Fang Wuming, shocked the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator, and even made the mountain god pause!

These two... knew each other?

"Oh no, they really might know each other." The mountain god belatedly realized the dragon vein energy she'd offered him bore similarities to what Lin Jing used in his formation—likely originating from the same region.

Siblings?

Fang Wuming gaped in astonishment.

The Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator frowned. Did this female cultivator have allies within the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices?

But so what?

Expressionless, he thought: Those who fled to the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices seeking the mountain god's protection had never escaped him before. True powerhouses wouldn't rely on some local deity...

"No one can save you—" He attacked without hesitation, ignoring Fang Wuming completely. A colossal demonic arm materialized in the air, its massive black palm grabbing toward Gu Youran.

Yet in the next instant, with a brilliant "BOOM," the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator's face twisted in shock. Then came a "BANG"—the enormous detached demonic arm was pierced through by a beam of light before exploding violently across the sky!!!

Following the light's trajectory revealed a floating demon core radiating the power of the Five Elements. Opposite it stood a squirrel balanced on a leaf, shouldering a slightly cracked bamboo cannon while staring curiously at Gu Youran.

"Pfft—" Before the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator could react, his perfected Heavenly Demon Finger technique had been obliterated by the Pine Leaf Mouse's mechanical cannon blast. The backlash made him vomit blood violently as he stared in terror at the suddenly appearing squirrel.

"Impossible!" he exclaimed in disbelief. That attack had rivaled the power of a Void Mystical Stage spell—only slightly weaker than a one-time immortal technique fueled by immortal energy! Where did this Nascent Where did a Soul Transformation–stage squirrel come from?!

Meanwhile, the Pine Leaf Mouse felt quite satisfied with its new weapon's performance. Mechanical bamboo spears had long fallen out of use, but its evolved Glazed Immortal Eye could enhance material quality. After some effort, it had upgraded this bamboo cannon to rival top-grade magic treasures. Combined with using its own demon core as ammunition... the combined power approached that of a quasi-immortal artifact.

The recoil nearly shattered the bamboo cannon though—the Pine Leaf Mouse decided it couldn't play like this too often. Too resource-intensive...

"Brother~~?" What puzzled the Pine Leaf Mouse most was when Lin Jing had become the Gu Clan princess's brother.

Simultaneously, Gu Youran's expression turned peculiar upon seeing the squirrel.

Wait... not her brother!

Then she remembered—the emperor had indeed gifted Holy Son Lin Jing a premium dragon vein. Meaning the dragon vein she sensed belonged to Lin Jing!

Though embarrassed by her mistake, Gu Youran didn't dwell on it. Whether it was Gu Xinghe or Lin Jing, she was saved either way.

"It's you."

At the same time, the Pine Leaf Mouse guarding Lin Jing turned its head. Hearing the commotion, Lin Jing had emerged from his cave dwelling, ascending step by step into the sky to observe Gu Youran.

"Hey!" The Pine Leaf Mouse teleported onto Lin Jing's shoulder. After patting its head, Lin Jing turned his attention to the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator.

"Who are you?!" The cultivator's pupils contracted. Though Lin Jing's cultivation was only at the early Nascent Soul Transformation stage, seeing that bizarre squirrel demon beast obediently perch on his shoulder gave him inexplicable pressure.

"Well done," Lin Jing thought to himself. This Gu Clan princess had conveniently delivered a Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator right to him—perfect for gathering intelligence about the sect in the Origin Realm to plant a doppelganger spy.

"You needn't know." Lin Jing's gaze turned icy as he regarded the cultivator like a dead man walking. That indifferent stare made the cultivator's scalp tingle—a primal sense of mortal danger screaming at him never to make an enemy of this man.

"Dammit..." The Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator acted decisively. A Postnatal Immortal Physique alone had given him trouble—now facing this mysteriously terrifying beast taming youth, he immediately activated his Heavenly Demon Physique, attempting to forcibly elevate his cultivation to the Void Mystical Stage and exploit world rules to escape the Origin Realm, abandoning this fight!

"He's trying to flee!" Both Gu Youran and Fang Wuming recognized his desperate ploy as he began burning his lifespan. Lin Jing naturally saw through it too.

"Stay." Lin Jing raised his arm, channeling the sealed demonic bloodline power from his Heavenly Demon doppelganger specifically against this cultivator. Instantly, the cultivator's face twisted in abject terror as his demonic energy was completely suppressed—his Heavenly Demon Physique activation failed!

"Just who—" he screamed in panic. What kind of monster was Lin Jing to possess the demonic bloodline reserved for Heavenly Demon Sect Holy Sons?! But under Lin Jing's demonic bloodline enhanced by Divine Control Art suppression, he could no longer speak—reduced to nothing more than a controlled beast.

BAM.

Lin Jing effortlessly slammed him face-first into the ground, his body trembling violently as he struggled. Witnessing this, Gu Youran and Fang Wuming both gasped—this Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator was undoubtedly powerful, yet in Lin Jing's hands... he couldn't even escape.

"Bind him." At Lin Jing's command, the little squirrel summoned vines to tightly restrain the prone cultivator. Only then did Lin Jing turn his attention back to Gu Youran, offering what he thought was a friendly smile.

"Princess little sister, I believe I accidentally saved your life just now. How about gifting me a few dragon veins as thanks? Otherwise that mountain god will extort them from you anyway—better they go to family than outsiders."

Gu Youran: "..."

Mountain God: "?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 11: Identity
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 11: Identity

"Thank you."

Gu Youran and Lin Jing weren't meeting for the first time. Thanks to their encounters in the Tianyuan Realm, she had managed to survive this confrontation with the Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator. Without those experiences, she wouldn't have been so fortunate.

"Don't mention it. Just consider what I proposed earlier." Lin Jing remained focused on his original goal.

Dragon veins were precious treasures that could accelerate the cultivation of his Heavenly Demon avatar.

"Speaking of which... why are you here?" Gu Youran glanced at the unconscious demonic cultivator, then at the unfamiliar cultivator who had addressed Lin Jing as 'my lord.'

"That's a long story." Lin Jing shot Fang Wuming a look, prompting the man to tactfully withdraw. He then scanned the sky, causing the mountain god's prying consciousness to withdraw as well.

Lin Jing proceeded to recount his experiences to Gu Youran.

After hearing his tale, Gu Youran pressed her lips together. "Seems your luck hasn't been great either. So this place is called the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices?"

"So did you actually listen to what I said earlier?" Lin Jing interrupted. "Rather than giving advantages to outsiders, why not help your own people? Instead of offering the dragon veins to the mountain god, give them to me. I'll take you away when the time comes."

"Hand over the dragon veins!" Lin Jing reiterated his demand.

Gu Youran suddenly recalled the mountain god's initial words. If the deity had marked Lin Jing's cultivation site as forbidden territory, didn't that imply the mountain god feared him?

"Does this guy... have some hidden trump card?"

She speculated silently. The mountain god possessed terrifying power, and while Lin Jing's Tianyuan Realm feats were impressive, they likely paled against an entity who had remained at the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation for tens of thousands of years.

"Made up your mind?" Lin Jing pressed.

The Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse had already absorbed vegetation essence, and the Dragon Carp had drawn upon geothermal energy. If his Heavenly Demon avatar now siphoned the mountain god's dragon vein fortune, Lin Jing worried about provoking the deity's wrath.

This princess's sister had arrived at the perfect moment.

"Fine." Gu Youran decided swiftly. "I'll give you the dragon veins if you guarantee my safe passage to the Cultivation Alliance."

Lin Jing nodded. "Agreed. I need to visit the alliance anyway."

"You should cultivate here for now. At mid-stage Nascent Soul Transformation, you're no match for that demonic cultivator. But if you reach the peak stage..."

"I'll also be cultivating here for a while longer. We'll depart together later."

After sealing their agreement, Lin Jing caught the dragon veins Gu Youran tossed his way and dragged the unconscious demonic cultivator back to his cave abode.

Watching Lin Jing's retreating figure, Gu Youran remained silent for a long moment... This was probably the best possible outcome.

Inside the cave:

Under the influence of Lin Jing's Gu poison, the unconscious Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator awoke with vacant eyes.

"What's your name?"

"Mo Luo."

"How many Heavenly Demon Sect members are currently in the Origin Realm?"

"...Mo Luo."

"You don't know?"

"What's your status within the sect here?"

Mo Luo responded mechanically: "Currently, the Origin Realm's Heavenly Demon Sect operates under Sacred Son Sheng Kun's leadership."

"Next are the Eight Demon Stars, who rank just below Sacred Son Sheng Kun. They retain autonomy to act independently without the sacred son's orders. Each is a personal disciple of a Heavenly Demon Sect's Seeking the Way powerhouse..."

"Then come ordinary sect members like myself. I'm among the more capable ones, favored by the sacred son for occasional duties. He sometimes bestows immortal energy to enhance our cultivation..."

Lin Jing continued questioning: "How many in the Origin Realm branch possess true demonic bloodlines?"

Mo Luo mumbled: "Two. Sacred Son Sheng Kun possesses a perfected demonic bloodline. Purple Sun, leader of the Eight Demon Stars, has a matured demonic bloodline. Rumor says if Purple Sun makes sufficient contributions here, he might earn sacred son status..."

Only two...

"Have you heard of Demon Emperor Tianchou?" Lin Jing probed for more intelligence.

This was one of the leads Mo Pine had provided - a top-tier Heavenly Demon Sect powerhouse who'd vanished near a spatial rift while returning to the Demon Realm. If this information held true and the emperor remained missing, Lin Jing could use his reputation to establish an identity here.

"Demon Emperor Tianchou..." Mo Luo seemed to search his memories.

"There was indeed such an emperor. Reportedly disappeared near a spatial rift while returning to the Demon Realm, presumed dead..."

"Oh? Are you certain?" Lin Jing narrowed his eyes. "Tell me everything you know about Tianchou..."

"And when exactly did you enter the Origin Realm?"

Much later:

Having extracted all useful information, Lin Jing eliminated Mo Luo. The man knew about his demonic bloodline - too dangerous to release into the Origin Realm or return to Sacred Son Sheng Kun.

Simultaneously, Lin Jing's Heavenly Demon avatar separated from him, morphing into a new identity:

A legacy disciple personally taken in by Demon Emperor Tianchou while she recuperated in a cultivation world after her spatial rift injuries!

While this status wouldn't immediately command all Origin Realm demonic cultivators, it granted prestige comparable to the Eight Demon Stars - enough to disregard the sacred son's orders. According to Mo Luo, with hundreds of Seeking the Way experts in the sect, one more legacy disciple wouldn't raise eyebrows.

"From today onward, you are 'Mo Yu.' The most valuable intel we obtained concerns Tianchou's signature technique - the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path! This sword art uses eight detached demonic arms wielding blades, evolved from the Heavenly Demon Finger technique. Even Mo Pine didn't know about this."

"This gives us perfect cover. Though we've only cultivated one demonic arm so far, we can have it wield a sword chaotically to mimic Tianchou's style."

"This will make the sect's elites more likely to believe you're truly Tianchou's heir!"

Lin Jing patted the avatar's shoulder. "The demonic path is treacherous. The Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental Mushroom will infiltrate the sect with you as support."

"Your mission: gain the sect's complete trust while enhancing your bloodline and power. Aim to become Sheng Kun's successor and take control of the Origin Realm branch..."

"Understood." The avatar sighed.

As for himself, Lin Jing clapped his hands. "I'll take the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp to escort Gu Youran to the Cultivation Alliance. Though my primary objective isn't the alliance... but something else entirely."

His eyes glinted, though now wasn't yet the time for confrontation with the mountain god.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 12: The Heaven and Earth Sect
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 12: The Heaven and Earth Sect

The cycle of four seasons passed, and another year went by.

During this time, Lin Jing’s Heavenly Demon Avatar successfully broke through to the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage.

The primordial spirit of the Heavenly Demon Avatar differs somewhat from a normal primordial spirit. More precisely, the Heavenly Demon Scripture, a cultivation method originating from the demonic sect of the Immortal Realm, is fundamentally different from conventional cultivation methods.

The Heavenly Demon Scripture enhances power by devouring others, dragon veins, and the world's fortune, while granting the cultivator a divine ability—the perfect soul usurpation technique.

Therefore, the bodies used by Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators are generally not their original bodies but those seized from other outstanding talents through soul usurpation.

As long as the Heavenly Demon Scripture is cultivated well, even a mortal-body Heavenly Demon cultivator can usurp an immortal body to change their constitution.

Thus, the primordial spirit of the Heavenly Demon Avatar tends to be a specialized soul for usurpation, not relying on the natural forces of heaven and earth.

Besides this, during this period, the original Ice Soul Gu also wanted to continue breaking through to Nascent Soul Transformation but was suppressed by Lin Jing, preventing its advancement and keeping its cultivation restrained.

Meanwhile, the original Ice Soul Gu would accompany the Heavenly Demon Avatar, imparting it with some swordsmanship skills to better disguise it as the successor of Demon Emperor Tianchou.

The reason for stopping the Ice Soul Gu’s original breakthrough was that after it broke through and merged with the Heavenly Demon Avatar, it might increase the bodily burden on the Heavenly Demon Avatar. After all, the soul contract with the Ice Soul Gu was signed with Lin Jing’s Control Dao original self, whereas the Heavenly Demon Avatar could not freely borrow the Ice Soul Gu’s power like the original.

Furthermore, without the bloodline contract blurring individual distinctions, it would be very difficult for the Ice Soul Gu to hide beside the Avatar. It could only rely on the Spell Elemental Mushroom’s illusions for concealment. Compared to hiding a Nascent Soul Transformation Gu insect, it was obviously easier to conceal a Nascent Soul Gu insect using the Spell Elemental Mushroom.

“It’s time.”

After staying in the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices for over two years, Lin Jing felt it was time to leave.

Although he wanted to cultivate here until reaching the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation, after witnessing Gu Youran’s plight, Lin Jing grew concerned about Senior Sister and the others.

He planned to wait until confirming that his companions in the Tianyuan Realm were safe before calmly continuing to improve his cultivation.

Crunch!

Lin Jing used Heavenly Demon Crossing and arrived at the Mountain God’s sleeping consciousness location, intending to have a final confrontation with this Mountain God.

“Hmm?”

The Mountain God awoke, fixing his consciousness on Lin Jing floating in the air, and said, “It seems you finally intend to leave. Leave quickly.”

“Take that princess sister of yours and leave my territory together!”

Lin Jing smiled and said, “Mountain God Dao Friend, there’s no need to rush me away. I said before, to thank you for letting me cultivate here, I will give you a big gift before I leave!”

“No, just leave.” The Mountain God thought Lin Jing was dragging things out. Did he really need anything from him?

If he truly wanted to give a gift, he wouldn’t have been greedy for the Mountain God’s dragon vein.

“Why not hear me out first?”

Lin Jing calmly said, “I wonder if Mountain God Dao Friend wants to leave the Origin Realm and go to the broader star realm?”

“The Origin Realm is a training ground given by various Immortal Realm powers to outstanding talents from all worlds. The highest cultivation here can only reach the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation. For outside cultivators, this rule does not matter because they can leave anytime. But for native beings like Mountain God Dao Friend, it is unfortunate.”

“It is the only place limited by the Heavenly Dao, with no way to break through to the Void Mystical Stage or leave the Origin Realm like those from other realms.”

“You can only spend your entire life stuck at the peak of Lin Jing’s level until death in the Origin Realm. Am I right?”

The Mountain God’s heart twitched.

“With your talent and foundation, Mountain God Dao Friend, if you could leave the Origin Realm, not only could you break through to the Void Mystical Stage or seek the Dao, but even ascend to become an immortal mountain in the Immortal Realm. That wouldn’t be impossible.”

“What currently limits you, no, limits all native spirit beasts in the Origin Realm, is a tough problem... that is, you cannot leave the Origin Realm!”

“But I have a solution.”

“You have a solution?? What solution could you possibly have? The Origin Realm’s beings cannot leave this realm. This is a rule set by great Immortal Realm powers!”

“Even Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators cannot break this rule to let higher-level cultivators enter or remain in the Origin Realm!” The Mountain God snorted coldly.

Lin Jing said, “It’s not so much a solution as a hypothesis.”

“Dao Friend, you should have noticed, I am a Control Dao and beast taming cultivator.”

“That squirrel absorbing the power of plants and trees, and that carp absorbing Earthcore Immortal Fire—they are my contracted beasts!”

“Although they are independent individuals, in the Origin Realm’s judgment, they are considered part of me. They can enter and leave the Origin Realm as one with me!”

“This might be a loophole deliberately left by my superior Immortal Realm sect. After all, that sect is among the top in the Immortal Realm.”

“So, Mountain God Dao Friend, what if you signed a contract with an outsider cultivator practicing the Beast Taming Art? Would the Origin Realm judge you as one individual, allowing you to leave the Origin Realm together through that cultivator?”

This was Lin Jing’s plan to conquer a host of powerful spirit beasts without fighting.

After he finished speaking, the Mountain God’s heart confirmed something.

Lin Jing continued, “Of course, this is currently just a guess. But I will test it. I will find a being in the Origin Realm, sign a contract with it, and see if I can bring it out of the Origin Realm to the outside world.”

“If the experiment succeeds, it will open a path for Origin Realm beings to leave the Origin Realm and reach the outside.”

“If it fails, there is no real loss.”

“You human brat...” The Mountain God felt stirred by Lin Jing’s big promise. It did sound feasible.

“What is your purpose!!!”

But the Mountain God did not trust Lin Jing’s goodwill and was sure he wanted something else.

“My purpose is simple.”

“I came to the Origin Realm alone, weak and insignificant. I probably cannot snatch Immortal Sources from the Cultivation Alliance and Heavenly Demon Sect.”

“So I hope many powerful native spirit beasts like you, Mountain God Dao Friend, who yearn for the outside world, can assist me in gaining more Immortal Power. In exchange, I will help you find a chance to leave the Origin Realm! At the same time, I will teach you my cultivation method for your own study.”

“Of course, snatching Immortal Sources is not only my private interest but will also help you leave the Origin Realm.”

“If I can improve the Beast Taming Art using Immortal Power to make it an immortal beast taming technique, it would undoubtedly increase the chances of leaving the Origin Realm!”

The Mountain God fell into deep thought.

“If you agree, Mountain God Dao Friend, we can continue talking. I plan to establish an organization whose members are all native spirit beasts of the Origin Realm! Since all members are born and nurtured by heaven and earth, we can call it the Heaven and Earth Society.”

A chance to leave the Origin Realm...

The Nascent Soul Transformation stage was stirred by the suggestion. It must have come from a powerful cultivator. Though reluctant to care, the Ice Soul Gu was mysterious and weak in strength, so it thought it worth a try.

“No way, but Heaven and Earth Society sounds a bit unpleasant.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 13: Star Dust Realm
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 13: Star Dust Realm

After Lin Jing skillfully persuaded the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices, the deity grew eager to cooperate. Lin Jing was the first outsider cultivator to truly consider the needs of the Origin Realm's native spirit beasts! Or perhaps others had noticed but lacked either the intention or capability to help these creatures overcome their predicament.

"Your current plan relies on this 'possibility' to convince me to help you recruit more spirit beasts?" asked the deputy sect master of the Heaven-Earth Sect. "My willingness to trust you doesn't mean others will share that trust!"

"I understand," Lin Jing replied, looking at the mountain god. "That's precisely why I need your help as deputy sect master. You know the Origin Realm better—we'll start by approaching the more reasonable powerhouses first. The difficult ones can wait until we've established our influence."

The mountain god curled its lips skeptically. It suspected others wouldn't be as easily swayed as itself.

"I'll quickly demonstrate the feasibility," Lin Jing said seriously. "When the time comes, spirit beasts within the Heaven-Earth Sect could establish long-term cooperation with my Beast Master Sect. Our elite disciples will continuously visit the Origin Realm to form equal contracts with native spirit beasts, then return to the outside world to dissolve the contracts and restore your freedom."

"Fine," muttered the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices. "After living this long, what's a little more time?" Having maintained its honest business for half a lifetime, it had grown weary of current affairs. While competing with outside elites like the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast for Origin Sources could enhance power, it offered no real future—only eventual reckoning by immortals. Lin Jing's proposal to leave the Origin Realm for broader horizons intrigued it far more.

"Then it's settled." Lin Jing smiled. "After I deliver the princess to her elder brother, I'll accompany you to invite various deities. Does the deputy sect master have any suitable candidates in mind?"

The Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices pondered. "A few, comparable to me in strength, unaffiliated with the two great spirit beasts. Whether they can be persuaded... The one I know best is Lady Nethersoil..."

"Freshly deceased cultivators often revive in her hands. But her services demand substantial tribute. Are you cultivating the Life-Death Primordial Spirit and the Dao of Life and Death? If so, you might find common ground with Lady Nethersoil."

Lady Nethersoil! Resurrection! Just hearing this, Lin Jing recognized another formidable Origin Realm spirit beast. Gaining her allegiance would significantly boost his influence here.

"Excellent. We'll visit Lady Nethersoil together later. Speaking of which..." Lin Jing suddenly pointed skyward. "Does the Origin Realm's starry void contain Star Beasts?"

The Origin Realm wasn't merely a planet but an expansive starry domain—a central world orbited by subsidiary stars, collectively forming the realm. Many cultivators practiced stellar cultivation, after all, with cosmic energy being a natural force. Some Lin Realm cultivators even ventured into the void for enlightenment.

"Star Beasts?" The mountain god blinked. "Why seek them?"

"As mentioned earlier, to test my hypothesis by contracting a native Origin Realm creature and attempting to take it away." Lin Jing explained, "My next target species would be Star Beasts. After all, I can't very well contract you, deputy sect master. Even if I didn't mind, you'd certainly object."

"Don't even fantasize about it," snorted the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices. "This mountain god won't be your test subject." What a joke—Lin Jing could even control Celestial Beast avatars.
