The deity had no doubt contracting with him would erase its consciousness entirely. If it ever contracted anyone, it would only be with some weakling who'd perish instantly if resisted. Only with guaranteed escape clauses would it feel secure. As for Lin Jing... the mountain god would never entrust its core existence to this eccentric.

"Exactly my point..."

"Star Beasts won't be easy to find," the mountain god said. "All Star Beasts in the Origin Realm's void have been claimed by the Meteor Spirit Beast, residing in the Star Dust Realm—the nearest celestial body to us and the Meteor Spirit Beast's territory. That creature's immensely powerful—Lady Nethersoil and I combined probably couldn't defeat it. Snatching Star Beasts from its grasp seems unlikely. What's so special about them anyway? Better to contract some newly sentient hillocks!" the mountain god suggested.

"Star Dust Realm... Meteor Spirit Beast..." Lin Jing pondered. The First Ancient Emperor's divinations had indicated Star Beasts as his most suitable next contracted beast race. While unclear why, Lin Jing felt they weren't a bad choice—if he planned to eventually leave the Tianyuan Realm for the cosmos, having a Star Beast companion skilled in void navigation and combat would prove useful.

"Let's table this for later and focus on immediate priorities." Lin Jing decided to postpone selecting Star Beast cubs until his strength matched the Meteor Spirit Beast's. For now, he'd divide efforts—his Heavenly Demon Avatar would approach the Cultivation Alliance while he contacted the Heavenly Demon Sect.

Several days later...

Lin Jing departed the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices with Gu Youran, who had broken through to late-stage Nascent Soul Transformation. Lin Jing envied her cultivation speed immensely. Similarly, Gu Youran marveled at Lin Jing's ability to casually escort her from the mountain, completely baffled by his cultivation methods despite her privileged Tianyuan Realm lineage and abundant resources...

"Our next destination is the Cultivation Alliance headquarters—Xianlin City. I wonder if others from the Tianyuan Realm have arrived yet. According to Fang Wuming, the Alliance isn't exactly benevolent—they don't unconditionally support cultivation worlds threatened by the Heavenly Demon Sect." Lin Jing glanced at Gu Youran, whose expression froze.

"What do you mean by that?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 14: Cultivation Alliance
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 14: Cultivation Alliance

"Isn't the meaning obvious?"

"Let me put it this way—our Tianyuan Realm isn't the first cultivation world to connect with the Cultivation Alliance through the Origin Realm."

"Although the Alliance's stated purpose is to unite all righteous cultivation worlds and help those invaded by the Heavenly Demon Sect resist the demons, that was merely an early slogan from when they were still developing."

"After the Cultivation Alliance grew in scale, absorbed numerous cultivation worlds, and gained enough strength to locally resist the Heavenly Demon Sect, they began selectively responding to certain worlds'... requests for assistance."

"The cultivation world Fang Wuming comes from was originally a private immortal cave belonging to a wandering Immortal Lord from the Immortal Realm. Its overall strength is mediocre, with only one Origin Realm quota—Fang Wuming himself."

"Though he was considered an absolute genius in his home world, by Tianyuan Realm standards, he's merely average."

"This should give you an idea of his world's level."

"Fang Wuming wasn't the first genius from his world to enter the Origin Realm. Like us, they learned of the Immortal Realm's upheaval and the lower realms' situation through the Origin Realm. Upon discovering this, their world immediately requested to join the Cultivation Alliance."

"So their world's invasion was only a matter of time."

"Facing such a world destined for Heavenly Demon Sect invasion, the Alliance should have actively guided them to join and provided support according to their principles. But..."

"According to Fang Wuming, because their world was too distant from Pangu Continent, lacked top-tier experts and talented geniuses, and had sparse resources, joining would bring no benefits to the Alliance. Thus, the Alliance consistently treated their requests with utter neglect."

"They outright refused to expend resources building an inter-realm teleportation array to Pangu Continent, essentially leaving them to fend for themselves."

"Having completely lost faith in the Cultivation Alliance, this guy... took advantage of Xianlin City's weakened defenses to steal resources for his own cultivation. Obviously, the unlucky bastard ended up being chased into the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices."

Gu Youran remarked, "There's no such thing as a selfless organization. The Cultivation Alliance's behavior is perfectly normal. Helping Fang Wuming's world has too low a return on investment—they'd only drag the Alliance down."

Lin Jing laughed, "As expected of an ancient kingdom's princess—you see things clearly. I bet the Ancient Emperor did plenty of similar things."

"You—" Gu Youran glared at Lin Jing, refusing to argue further. She continued, "So for Tianyuan Realm to join the Cultivation Alliance, we must first demonstrate sufficient value to these Alliance cultivators, correct?"

"Only if Tianyuan Realm's overall strength is great enough will the Alliance want us as 'allies' to jointly resist the Heavenly Demon Sect."

"If Tianyuan Realm would only burden the Alliance, they wouldn't spare us a glance, leaving us to our fate."

"Exactly," Lin Jing agreed. "Though Tianyuan Realm lost the Immortal Palace's legacy and some races stagnated due to its curse, our strength should still command the Alliance's respect... right?"

"Who knows," Gu Youran said. "...Our personal strength will likely be key to the Alliance's evaluation of Tianyuan Realm."

Lin Jing looked at this perceptive princess and nodded. "Correct. Fang Wuming mentioned that non-Alliance cultivators wishing to enter Xianlin City in the Origin Realm must first undergo a 'strength assessment.'"

"The Cultivation Alliance uses these non-member geniuses' strength to preliminarily judge their home realms' potential."

"Generally, the stronger the geniuses demonstrate, the more the Alliance values them and their home realm—and vice versa."

"So when we reach Xianlin City, we'll likely have to undergo their tests. Of course, the Alliance calls this 'identifying immortals and demons'—using combat to observe entrants and prevent Heavenly Demon Sect infiltration."

Gu Youran sighed, "How troublesome... I wonder if my brother and the others have already taken the Alliance's tests and entered Xianlin City."

......

Xianlin City.

The Origin Realm's premier metropolis.

Headquarters of the Cultivation Alliance.

This gathering place for human geniuses from countless realms bustled with activity as the main hub for inter-realm trade and exchange.

The entire city was encircled by towering walls covered in intricate formation patterns. Groups of Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators sat atop the walls, monitoring external movements.

Whoosh! Whoosh!

Two streaks of light approached Xianlin City in succession. A silver-armored cultivator immediately rose from the wall, intercepting their path.

"Halt!" The imposing figure in gleaming armor stood solemnly, spear trembling with spiritual energy. Lin Jing and Gu Youran stopped mid-flight to observe him.

Late-stage Nascent Soul Transformation...

"You two seem new to Xianlin City?" He raised an eyebrow inquisitively.

"Correct," Lin Jing answered.

"Which cultivation world do you hail from? Are you Alliance members?" he asked.

"Tianyuan Realm—not part of the Alliance. We lost contact with the Origin Realm long ago and only recently reconnected. Have any Tianyuan cultivators arrived before us?" Gu Youran inquired.

"Tianyuan Realm?" The armored cultivator frowned. "Never heard of it. Which Immortal Realm faction does it belong to?"

Lin Jing and Gu Youran exchanged glances, shocked to realize that after two years in the Origin Realm—having delayed so long—they were Tianyuan's first representatives to reach Xianlin City.

What could the other three be doing?

Hopefully they hadn't all encountered misfortunes too.

"Tianyuan Realm is the lower realm of the Immortal Palace. Have you heard of Tianming Realm?" Lin Jing suddenly recalled Tianming Realm's Alliance membership.

"Tianming Realm? The Immortal Palace? That one with an Immortal King?" The armored cultivator's demeanor instantly softened. "So you're under the Immortal Palace's jurisdiction like Tianming Realm! I know of it—Senior Brother Shangguan from Tianming Immortal Palace is a celestial physique genius, incredibly powerful!"

"In that case, fellow daoists, please wait while I notify an Alliance executive to prepare your entry ceremony!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 15: City Entry Assessment
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 15: City Entry Assessment

Xianlin City, White Jade Tower.

Seventy-two faint silhouettes gradually materialized around an immortal platform.

Some figures had blurred faces, others appeared expressionless, with only a few showing flickers of awareness in their eyes.

"According to a fellow cultivator from the Haiyuan Realm guarding the city today, two outsiders have arrived."

"They claim to be from the Tianyuan Realm. The Tianyuan Realm shares origins with the Tianming Realm, both being subordinate cultivation worlds under the Immortal Palace, a Immortal King-level power from the Immortal Realm!"

"For ages, the Tianyuan Realm has sent no talents to the Origin Realm, likely having lost the method to activate the dimensional teleportation array. Now, after tens of thousands of years, they've returned."

"Moreover, the Tianyuan Realm isn't yet a member of the Cultivation Alliance. Having been isolated for millennia, their current developmental state remains unknown."

"Following protocol, our Administration Hall will dispatch an overseer to test their strength and verify they aren't Heavenly Demon Sect spies. Who among you wishes to undertake this task?"

"Immortal Palace... Tianyuan Realm..." He murmured with keen interest.

"Shangguan," several voices chimed in, "your Tianming Realm also lost contact with Tianyuan long ago. Since they've rediscovered the path to the Origin Realm and sent talents here, we'll yield this opportunity to you."

"Much obliged. I'll handle their assessment then." The cultivator named Shangguan responded.

His identity? A premier talent of Tianming Immortal Palace—their strongest representative in the Origin Realm!!!

A formidable existence.

He once seized a wisp of Origin Source from Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators, using its immortal energy to forge a Postnatal Immortal Physique during crisis.

Though Tianming Immortal Palace joined the Cultivation Alliance only after being rescued, and relatively recently, Shangguan's potential secured him an overseer position effortlessly.

Among all overseers, his strength ranked highly.

With the Tianyuan Realm—sharing roots with Tianming—now arriving, other realm talents understood Tianming's influence within the Alliance would grow further.

Should Tianming successfully ally with Tianyuan, their combined voice would carry immense weight.

The Immortal Palace already stood among the mightiest powers beneath the few Immortal Emperor-level factions. Two subordinate realms uniting would undoubtedly birth new power players within the Alliance.

By letting Shangguan assess these newcomers, the overseers extended goodwill, allowing him first contact with talents from their sister realm.

"Calculating the time, soon my Tianming Immortal Palace will send new juniors here too. I wonder how these Tianyuan talents compare to ours."

Shangguan smiled faintly as his true form moved. He remained confident in Tianming's superiority—historical records showed their Immortal Palace's overall strength had surpassed Tianyuan's during their last exchanges!

...........

Besides Overseer Shangguan, other Xianlin City overseers emerged from cultivation, curious to observe the assessment.

Ordinary Nascent Soul cultivators without official positions also noticed the commotion, turning their attention toward the city outskirts.

"The overseers are mobilizing. Newcomers must have arrived."

"Let's watch the assessment battle."

"I wonder which overseer will conduct it. If the newcomers are weak, their cultivation hearts might shatter!"

All Alliance overseers represented elite talents from their respective realms. Though local Nascent Soul experts were proud, they recognized the gap between themselves and these overseers.

The bare minimum to become an overseer was possessing near-Immortal Physique combat strength and the destined potential to ascend through the heavenly tribulation.

Outside Xianlin City, Lin Jing and Gu Youran stood waiting.

Soon, they sensed numerous powerful spiritual senses focusing on them.

"You two are the talents from Tianyuan Realm?" Overseer Shangguan materialized before them, examining Early Nascent Soul–stage Lin Jing and Late Nascent Soul–stage Gu Youran.

Lin Jing appeared straightforward—Shangguan immediately identified him as a Beast Taming Art practitioner from the Immortal Palace lineage.

That a beast tamer could represent Tianyuan here seemed peculiar, as top Tianming talents rarely pursued this path.

But facing Gu Youran, Shangguan's expression turned grave.

This female cultivator... her strength felt unusual. Neither her techniques nor physique were discernible—likely non-standard Immortal Palace methods. Yet Shangguan wasn't surprised;
over millennia, some would inevitably modify palace techniques. Not necessarily improvements, but personal adaptations.

Shangguan's guess proved correct. Gu Youran practiced the "Serene Immortal Art"—a modified palace technique refined by the First Ancient Emperor. Its hallmark was adaptability to extreme environments like celestial voids, abyssal depths, or spatial rifts, maintaining transcendent power throughout.

The First Emperor created this variation fearing future calamities might sever the ancient dynasty's dragon veins and national fortune—which would cripple practitioners of the orthodox "True Dragon Secret Arts." Hence his decree that a portion of imperial talents must master the Serene Immortal Art alongside the main techniques. Even if Tianyuan exploded, the ancient lineage could rebuild from cosmic ashes.

"Welcome. Protocol requires me to verify you're not Heavenly Demon Sect infiltrators. The method is simple—spar with me briefly!"

"Hold nothing back—your performance will determine your residential arrangements and access privileges within the Alliance!"

"Who shall proceed first?"

Lin Jing and Gu Youran exchanged glances.

"I'll go first," Lin Jing offered.

He worried Gu Youran might underperform against an unknown opponent, so he'd scout the overseer's capabilities first.

"Mm." Gu Youran nodded.

Observing this, Overseer Shangguan narrowed his eyes curiously. The female cultivator clearly possessed greater strength—even he couldn't fully gauge her—yet their dynamic suggested Lin Jing took precedence.

"This junior brother, how should I address you?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 16: The Pledge
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 16: The Pledge

"I forgot to introduce myself earlier. I am Shangguan Ming. You may address me as Administrator Shangguan or Senior Brother Shangguan."

"In truth, we share quite some connection. If you truly hail from the Tianyuan Realm, we might even be considered fellow disciples of the same sect... because I come from the Tianming Realm—Tianming Immortal Palace." Administrator Shangguan revealed his identity with a faint smile.

Upon hearing this, both Lin Jing and Gu Youran were momentarily stunned.

Tianming Realm!?

What a coincidence!

No—this was no coincidence. Given that they'd revealed their origins from the Tianyuan Realm, it wasn't surprising for a prodigy from Tianming Immortal Palace to appear.

Except... this Shangguan Ming seemed unaware that the Immortal Palace of the Tianyuan Realm had been annihilated tens of thousands of years ago!

What "fellow disciples" could there possibly be?

After all... they bore no enmity toward the Immortal Palace.

The Immortal Palace had been destroyed by the Immortal Alliance, and the Immortal Alliance had been wiped out by the Ancient Kingdom. In a way, the Ancient Kingdom had even avenged the Immortal Palace.

"Greetings, Senior Brother Shangguan. I am Lin Jing, a practitioner of the Immortal Palace's Beast Taming Art."

Lin Jing chuckled, noting inwardly that the group of Tianming prodigies he'd previously humiliated hadn't yet entered the Origin Realm to relay intel about Tianyuan.

"Beast Taming Art..." Senior Brother Shangguan nodded. "Then let this junior brother undergo the assessment. No need for courtesy—summon all your contracted beasts at full strength."

"Aside from me, other administrators are observing this match. Even the head of the Administration Hall is watching."

"If Junior Brother's performance catches the hall master's eye, you might directly join the Administration Hall. This would also facilitate the Tianyuan Realm's future application to join the Cultivation Alliance."

Even without Shangguan Ming's words, Lin Jing had no intention of holding back. After all, he wanted his true self to attain a high position within the Cultivation Alliance's branch in the Origin Realm.

To gain status, one had to demonstrate sufficient strength.

And—military achievements.

Lin Jing's expression remained unchanged as he faced Shangguan Ming, but before him, a pale gray vortex of spiritual power swirled into existence. From within the vortex, the rigid corpse of a young man was abruptly summoned!

Not the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse.

Not the Dragon Carp.

But a corpse.

The moment this corpse appeared, the observing cultivators collectively gasped. Even Gu Youran's eyes widened in shock.

This... wasn't this the Heavenly Demon Sect prodigy who had pursued her?

Lin Jing had actually refined him into a zombie!

A Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator capable of chasing Gu Youran—a Postnatal Immortal Physique holder—and serving under Sheng Kun was undoubtedly no weakling.

Most of the Cultivation Alliance members present recognized his face instantly.

Thus, the moment he was summoned, an uproar erupted.

"Heavenly Demon Sect's Sacred Son—one of Sheng Kun's Hundred Demon Generals—Mo Luo!"

"He... how is this possible?"

"This form... a zombie?! You must be joking. When did Mo Luo get—"

The instant Lin Jing summoned Mo Luo, many cultivators were stunned. A few even suspected Lin Jing had allied with Heavenly Demon Sect forces to assault the Cultivation Alliance.

However, upon closer inspection, they realized Mo Luo was long dead—completely transformed into a zombie.

Yet this only amplified their shock. Mo Luo's strength and notoriety were well-known. Though not comparable to the personal disciples of the Heavenly Demon Sect's higher echelons, among the sect's prodigies, he was far from weak—his power rivaled that of the Cultivation Alliance's administrators!

"This Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator ambushed me upon my arrival in the Origin Realm, coveting the dragon veins I carried. I killed him in self-defense."

"Having slain even a demonic prodigy, Senior Brother need not suspect me of being a Heavenly Demon spy."

"Now, allow me to command him in battle against you." Lin Jing smiled faintly.

"Aren't you... a beast tamer?!" Shangguan Ming blurted out, though his greater confusion was how Lin Jing—at only the early Nascent Soul Transformation stage—could have killed Mo Luo.

For a moment, his suspicion toward Lin Jing's identity resurged.

"Taming beasts, plants, or corpses—all fall under the Control Dao. My Beast Taming Art has long evolved beyond its original form through my modifications," Lin Jing explained.

"Does Senior Brother still suspect we're demonic spies? If we were, I wouldn't bother deploying a Heavenly Demon corpse in battle. I merely heard the Cultivation Alliance offers substantial rewards—even immortal energy—for slaying Heavenly Demon Sect members, hence my display."

"Moreover, the demonic cultivators sent to the Tianyuan Realm were all exterminated by this fairy's elders. Thus, we couldn't possibly be affiliated with the Heavenly Demon Sect."

"Aside from us two, eight other cultivators from Tianyuan arrived, though they've yet to reach Xianlin City. Senior Brother may verify this later."

Hearing Lin Jing's composed explanation, Shangguan Ming nodded, temporarily choosing to believe him.

But the next moment, his expression abruptly changed as realization struck.

The other Cultivation Alliance administrators also paled, recalling something critical.

"Quick! Recall and seal that corpse!!!"

At Shangguan Ming's sudden warning, Lin Jing feigned confusion. The administrator urgently explained:

"The Sacred Son of the Heavenly Demon Sect made a vow to his Hundred Demon Generals—to ensure their loyalty, he promised vengeance upon their deaths!"

"Sheng Kun possesses a void beast capable of tracking the corpses of his Hundred Generals. Mastered in assassination and Heavenly Demon Crossing, its strength surpasses even the Generals—I'm no match for it! Destroy that corpse immediately, or you'll never escape that beast's gaze within the Origin Realm!"

Shangguan Ming feared he was too late—too many here already knew Lin Jing had killed Mo Luo. Though none could comprehend how he'd achieved this...

[It's... already too late.]

Shortly after Lin Jing produced the demonic corpse, spatial ripples shimmered outside Xianlin City. A pitch-black mantis-like demon emerged from the void, its eyes gleaming crimson as it launched a lethal slash toward Lin Jing's head.

Time seemed to freeze. Every spectator's heart leaped to their throats. The void beast's Heavenly Demon Crossing was terrifyingly swift—even the observing administrators failed to react, including Shangguan Ming standing before Lin Jing.

[I initially thought the mountain god killed Mo Luo... planned to let it go. But since it's a human cultivator...]

The void beast's bloody blade neared Lin Jing's neck—yet the instant their eyes met, the creature suddenly stiffened, suppressed by overwhelming beast-controlling energy.

In that moment, the void beast comprehended the mockery in Lin Jing's gaze and the smirk on his lips.

"Audacious, to attack within an alliance stronghold. Overconfident in your Heavenly Demon Crossing? I was just concerned one demonic corpse wouldn't suffice as my pledge... but adding the Sacred Son's pet should be... adequate."

Lin Jing had naturally extracted this intel from Mo Luo. This was all deliberate—a public display of slaying demonic forces to gain greater trust and authority within the Cultivation Alliance.

Simultaneously, a smug-looking red carp materialized before Lin Jing, prepared long in advance!

"!!!!!" It roared contemptuously at the would-be assassin, its body erupting with world-shaking flames. Solar Essence Fire and Geocentric Flame—both at immortal-grade—instantly formed a celestial furnace, engulfing the momentarily paralyzed void beast. The ensuing heatwave blasted even Shangguan Ming a hundred meters away before he could intervene.

"This—!!!" The abrupt reversal left everyone dumbfounded.

"The void beast!"

"That was Void Assassination Art—it really came! But... it failed?"

"Wait... were those immortal flames?!"

None had anticipated this beast tamer possessing a contracted beast wielding dual immortal fires. Now they understood how Lin Jing could subdue Mo Luo.

For he had just instantly suppressed even the Sacred Son's pet!

"How is this possible...?" Shangguan Ming, sent flying by the Dragon Carp's fiery shockwave, wore an expression of utter disbelief. That demonic pet had been immobilized by beast-controlling energy—just what level had this guy's Control Dao reached to affect the Sacred Son's creature?!

"Thank you for the warning, Senior Brother—though slightly belated. Fortunately, this void beast proved... underwhelming." Lin Jing stood calmly beside the Myriad Flame Cauldron, then turned to Shangguan Ming. "Shall we continue?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 17: Heavenly Demon Sacred Son
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 17: Heavenly Demon Sacred Son

"Continue...?" Shangguan Ming's lips twitched.

Continue my ass.

With this situation unfolding, the city entrance examination couldn't possibly proceed.

It wasn't that he feared Lin Jing.

But he was genuinely shocked by Lin Jing's display of power!

Clearly, someone capable of cultivating the 《Beast Taming Art》 and representing Tianming Immortal Palace possessed talent far beyond his expectations.

The path of beast taming had been perfected by the man before him.

During that split-second confrontation, though his body couldn't react in time, his spiritual sense had keenly observed the moment when Lin Jing locked eyes with the void beast.

The creature froze as if encountering some primordial predator!

"That beast tamer's spiritual power has an unbelievable suppressive effect on 'beasts'—like a god among creatures!"

Xianlin City housed not just human cultivators but also shape-shifted demonic cultivators. Their senses were sharper than Shangguan's, and though not directly targeted, they too felt a ripple of overwhelming dread in that instant!

Upon reflection, it made sense—a beast tamer without specialized methods couldn't possibly control powerful demonic beasts.

But this level of suppression was absurd! A single glance had paralyzed the pet of the Heavenly Demon Sect's Sacred Son! This void beast had once assassinated a Cultivation Alliance prodigy right before the Administration Hall leader's eyes and escaped unscathed!

Shangguan Ming felt relieved he was human;
at least he wouldn't experience such bestial suppression in combat.

He even suspected the immortal fire carp had subdued its opponent so easily thanks to Lin Jing's tamer abilities tipping the scales.

"What a pity the Beast Taming Physique hasn't evolved alongside my improved 《Beast Taming Art》 to suppress all races," Lin Jing mused, noting Shangguan's expression. Though its range hadn't expanded, the physique's pure beast-suppression had significantly strengthened through his refinements.

BOOM!

A youth draped in violet feathered robes descended into White Jade Tower, lightning crackling around him like a thunder-bathed immortal.

"Hall Leader!"

Many cultivators bowed respectfully—this was Yan Yunshuang, leader of the Administration Hall, bearer of the innate Five Thunder Immortal Physique.

Innate immortal physiques differed fundamentally from acquired ones. Yan Yunshuang had been struck by heavenly tribulation at birth, yet instead of harm, he'd toyed with the lightning, emerging at Foundation Establishment perfection.

Five distinct immortal thunders had accompanied his arrival into the world.

In his native cultivation world, Yan Yunshuang was undisputed protagonist material. Even after ascending to Pangu Continent and the Origin Realm teeming with elites, he'd effortlessly risen to stand among the mightiest, assuming leadership of the Cultivation Alliance's Origin Realm Administration Hall.

Yan rarely bothered with new arrivals—unless they proved extraordinary. And Lin Jing's capabilities surpassed "extraordinary."

While the void beast matchup involved an elemental advantage, none could deny Lin Jing surpassed most Administration Hall officers in strength.

"Even with my thunder-speed reflexes, I couldn't have intercepted that void beast mid-Heavenly Demon Crossing. Regardless, Lin Jing reacting to the ambush means his reflexes exceed mine!"

That was terrifying.

In truth, Lin Jing's reaction stemmed from multiple factors: familiarity with Heavenly Demon Crossing, powerful spiritual sense, and coordinated preparation with his Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse, Dragon Carp, and Death Gu—multiple eyes awaiting the ambush.

"Plans? Refine it into pills. Unless you have alternatives?" Lin Jing stroked his chin.

"That void beast carries imperial bloodline spatial attributes—it'll undoubtedly reach Demon Emperor level at the Seeking the Way realm."

"Such waste to refine it. Hand it to the Administration Hall—we'll purchase it with immortal qi condensed from Origin Sources, ensuring fair compensation," Yan Yunshuang proposed.

"Immortal qi? Acceptable." Lin Jing smiled.

The Origin Realm spawned ordinary Origin Sources every decade, rare ones every century, and supreme ones every millennium. Each source periodically produced immortal qi until exhausted.

Lower realm cultivators unrefined by the Immortal Realm couldn't assimilate Origin Sources to self-generate immortal power, but could temporarily store qi for one-time spellcasting.

This allowed learning specific immortal techniques to enhance strength.

A lower realm cultivator wielding immortal qi rivaled minor immortals. Mo Luo had only reversed his defeat against Gu Youran thanks to immortal qi bestowed by Sheng Kun, enabling an immortal technique.

Lin Jing doubted he could secure an Origin Source soon. Trading with the Cultivation Alliance for research-grade immortal qi made a decent interim solution.

"Junior Brother Shangguan, these two aren't Heavenly Demon Sect spies. Conclude the examination. We'll need portraits of the remaining eight Tianyuan Realm cultivators—the Alliance will assist in locating them," Yan Yunshuang declared.

"Additionally, might Junior Brother consider joining the Administration Hall? Your merits already qualify you. Though Tianyuan Realm isn't yet an Alliance member, I believe accession is imminent!" Any realm producing talents like Lin Jing couldn't be weak.

Moreover, Lin Jing's decisive action against Sheng Kun's pet marked him as formidable. Yan Yunshuang wanted him as an operative.

The Heavenly Demon Sect included many demons—Lin Jing would make an excellent blade against them...

As Yan extended the invitation, he noticed Lin Jing suddenly tense, gazing skyward.

Again, Lin Jing's reaction outpaced his. But when Yan followed his gaze, shock overwhelmed him.

A void vortex yawned open in the heavens, revealing a colossal Heavenly Demon visage peering down.

"Again?" Lin Jing muttered. Every Alliance cultivator monitoring the scene reeled in disbelief at the sight.

"Heavenly Demon Sect's Sacred Son—Sheng Kun!!"

None had imagined the Sacred Son would sense his pet's capture and personally observe Xianlin City! Even during the last Origin Source descent, Sheng Kun hadn't appeared. Yet now, for a mere pet, he manifested!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 18: Immortal City Tremors
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 18: Immortal City Tremors

When the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son suddenly appeared, Yan Yunshuang on the side reacted as if facing a formidable enemy. He never expected this Void Beast would be more important to the Sacred Son than Origin Sources.

"I have no intention of attacking juniors like you. Its mission failure proves its inferior skill, but it cannot die yet." The Heavenly Demon Sacred Son immediately declared he wouldn't attack those present. Yet in the void, a phantom arm of the Heavenly Demon manifested, reaching toward the Myriad Flame Cauldron - clearly intending to rescue the Void Beast.

"BOOM!!!"

As the massive demonic arm stretched forth, the Dragon Carp instantly felt tremendous pressure. To its shock, its Myriad Flame Cauldron shattered almost instantly.

This was unbelievable. To trap this beast, it had painstakingly constructed the cauldron using two distinct types of Immortal Flames. Not only should it be impossible to shatter, but even approaching it would instantly melt normal Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators. Yet the Sacred Son merely pressed down with an arm - not even a real arm, just a phantom projection - and shattered the cauldron. The perfect demonic bloodline's power was truly astonishing.

"Let him have it. This Void Beast is the offspring of one of Sheng Kun's guardians. When Sheng Kun became Sacred Son, the Demon Emperor who Seeks the Dao gifted his descendant to Sheng Kun as a pet. He might ignore the Eight Demon Stars or the Hundred Demon Generals, but never this Void Beast."

"I'm nearly unable to suppress my cultivation realm. It's unwise to fight him over a mere beast. The once-in-a-millennium premium Origin Source will emerge soon, and I must conserve strength for that..." Just as a sweating Yan Yunshuang stood frozen in indecision, a voice sounded in his ear, bringing immense relief.

It was Li Tianyi of the Chaotic Immortal Physique, secluded beneath the immortal city - the true authority of the Cultivation Alliance in the Origin Realm.

"If only I had Senior Brother Tianyi's power..."

Compared to the premium Origin Source, even an emperor-blooded Void Beast, however precious, could be relinquished. Yan Yunshuang sighed.

Yet just as everyone stood frozen, watching the Sacred Son take the beast, Lin Jing beside the Dragon Carp suddenly shouted.

To Lin Jing, the Sacred Son wasn't rescuing a pet - he was stealing resources. Though currently no match for the Sacred Son, Lin Jing wouldn't simply let his prize be taken.

"Mo Luo, attack."

His soft command echoed like thunder in the silence.

"My spoils of war cannot be taken so easily by anyone."

"Do I, Lin, have no face to maintain?"

Lin Jing slowly raised his head. His Life-Death Primordial Spirit activated - one eye turning pure white, the other pitch black, emitting intertwined energies of life and death. Simultaneously, the summoned corpse of Mo Luo manifested the same fundamental fluctuations in its eyes.

"ROAR!!!"

In that instant, amplified by life-death energy and corpse-driving arts, Lin Jing seemed like the resurrected sect master of the Yin Corpse Sect, making the zombie Mo Luo's power exceed even its living form.

BOOM!!!

The zombie Mo Luo charged at the arm seizing the Void Beast. To everyone's shock, it clamped onto the massive arm with its teeth and violently wrenched - tearing the phantom limb asunder. The Void Beast fell from the sky with the severed arm.

The entire city trembled.

Shangguan Ming and Yan Yunshuang gaped in horror. Even Li Tianyi beneath the city revealed astonishment.

"Life-Death Primordial Spirit."

"The life essence born of a perfected Longevity Body, combined with a Rare Beast's death-infused bloodline."

"This man..."

"Seeking death!!!" The Sacred Son hadn't even glanced at Lin Jing when his subordinate was killed and pet captured. But now this nobody dared interfere, provoking his fury.

"Life-Death Primordial Spirit... Brat, you think that lets you challenge me?" Recognizing Lin Jing's power source, the Sacred Son laughed angrily. He indeed had the right to call Lin Jing a junior - though both were Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators, when Sheng Kun dominated the Origin Realm, Lin Jing hadn't even begun cultivating.

Having dwelled in this realm for untold years, Sheng Kun's foundations ran deep.

BOOM!!!

This time, Sheng Kun didn't use a projection - part of his true form manifested. A materialized demonic arm replaced the phantom, extending from the void with overwhelming demonic energy, grasping toward Lin Jing and the falling Void Beast.

Seeing this, Li Tianyi below the city changed expression, realizing the Sacred Son's condition far surpassed his own.

"Perhaps excessive physical prowess isn't always beneficial," Li Tianyi murmured. To remain in the Origin Realm, he'd repeatedly severed his cultivation. Yet even without active training, his Chaotic Immortal Physique spontaneously advanced his realm until even he couldn't suppress it further.

By comparison, demonic bloodlines faced fewer such issues, as their cultivation speed couldn't match the Chaotic Immortal Physique.

"Pity." Li Tianyi wouldn't intervene, considering Lin Jing too reckless.

Under the genuine Heavenly Demon arm's pressure, the zombie Mo Luo controlled by Lin Jing exploded instantly, making Lin Jing vomit blood.

The blood's alluring longevity aura instantly drove the city's demonic beasts into frenzy. Though lacking the two kings' discernment to recognize Lin Jing's power source from his Life-Death Primordial Spirit, the spilled blood revealed his physical essence.

"Longevity Body! A perfected Longevity Body!" someone exclaimed in shock.

That a Longevity Body could cultivate to Nascent Soul Transformation and enter the Origin Realm was unprecedented.

"Your flesh shall feed my pet," Sheng Kun's icy voice came from beyond the void.

"It deserves that?" Lin Jing wiped blood calmly and waved his arm.

BOOM!!!

A massive Celestial Beast corpse materialized at Lin Jing's summon. Its deafening roar shattered the heavens as Lin Jing stood beside the immortal-blooded beast's remains, their combined auras cracking the void itself. The demonic arm froze midair, unable to advance.

"Heavenly Demon Sacred Son? If you want my spoils, pay the price. The Administration Hall promised immortal energy - if you want it, bring equivalent Origin Sources to trade!"

"Otherwise, I'll gladly battle to see who laughs last!"

As Lin Jing spoke, everyone stared dumbfounded at the immortal-blooded beast corpse confronting the Sacred Son. Who was this man who could control Celestial Beast remains at mere Nascent Soul Transformation? Was the Beast Taming Path truly this formidable?

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 19: First Confrontation
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 19: First Confrontation

The walls of Xianlin City radiated with brilliant light, as if enveloped in celestial radiance. Upon the city walls, cultivators swallowed hard as they watched the stark contrast between heaven and earth.

In the sky above, a colossal hand extended from the void, seemingly intent on annihilating the world, its demonic energy arcs resembling black dragons. On the ground below, a man and an ox emanated overwhelming demonic might. The collision between the life-death activated demonic power and the giant arm directly erupted with countless spatial disturbances, signifying that both forces had nearly reached the pinnacle of power within the Origin Realm.

Under such intense confrontation, the cultivators of Xianlin City hastily activated the city's protective formation to shield the city from the terrifying shockwaves of these two powers.

"You..." While everyone was stunned by the power Lin Jing displayed, Sheng Kun finally acknowledged Lin Jing's existence, discarding his previous dismissive attitude as waves of emotion surged within him. He never expected this cultivator who had slain Mo Luo and subdued his pet would possess such a trump card.

"A flying ascension realm immortal-blooded demon ox corpse."

"No Nascent Soul Transformation cultivator could possibly control this." Sheng Kun murmured.

This immortal ox corpse was equivalent to an immortal artifact! Even Seeking the Way cultivators needed proper methods to control such artifacts, let alone a mere Nascent Soul Transformation cultivator.

For the first time, Sheng Kun felt threatened.

"Burning lifespan..." Sheng Kun realized Lin Jing was using a secret technique similar to the Heavenly Demon Physique, exchanging his lifespan for the ultimate sublimation of "Control Dao realm."

Through continuous lifespan combustion, Lin Jing's Control Dao realm had already surpassed Nascent Soul Transformation, reaching the Void Mystical Stage. Combined with the life-death power from his Life-Death Primordial Spirit - the supreme energy for controlling corpses - this enabled him to mobilize the immortal ox corpse.

Recognizing this, Sheng Kun couldn't help but marvel. For ordinary cultivators, this combat method would be sheer recklessness. Even if they could briefly contend with him this way, they would soon perish from lifespan exhaustion.

But!

Everyone now knew Lin Jing possessed the Longevity Body - a perfected Longevity Body at that. His lifespan was at least fifty times that of normal cultivators. While ordinary Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators had two thousand years of lifespan (three thousand for those focusing on longevity cultivation), Lin Jing started with at least one hundred thousand years!!!

This lifespan exceeding Seeking the Way cultivators by tenfold gave Lin Jing absolute capital for arrogance, allowing him to freely use any lifespan-burning secret technique, treating vitality as spiritual power!

Interesting!

At this moment, Sheng Kun set aside his hatred over his subordinate's death and pet's severe injury, calmly stating: "Longevity Body cultivators rarely reach your level. I've seen various divine and immortal physiques, but this is my first encounter with a perfected Longevity Body. However, even with sufficient lifespan to burn, your foundational realm is too low. Your primordial spirit power cannot sustain control over this immortal ox corpse for long."

"He still isn't your match..."

Before Sheng Kun finished speaking, the immortal ox corpse opened its mouth, spewing immortal-grade corpse flames toward the sky. The gray flames instantly made onlookers feel their bodies decaying, forcing them to retreat hastily while protecting themselves with spiritual power.

"So what?" Lin Jing responded.

Boom!!!

The corpse flames entwined the Heavenly Demon's arm. Rather than anger or counterattack, Sheng Kun allowed the flames to gradually corrode the arm, merely responding indifferently: "With your talent, joining the Cultivation Alliance is a waste."

"I'll give you an opportunity - pledge allegiance to me. A perfected Longevity Body... combined with the Heavenly Demon Physique, once the Heavenly Demon Physique matures, even as a Nascent Soul Transformation cultivator, you could contend with Seeking the Way cultivators beyond this realm."

"The Cultivation Alliance is merely a group of weaklings barely surviving under the Heavenly Demon Realm's demonic might."

"If you want Origin Sources, I can provide them."

Boom!!!!

As Sheng Kun's words faded, a chaotic divine light erupted from the city, instantly annihilating the falling void beast into nothingness.

Li Tianyi of the Chaotic Immortal Physique had originally intended to stay uninvolved. But Lin Jing had exceeded all expectations. While he could disregard Lin Jing's previously displayed talent, now he had to intervene - he absolutely couldn't allow Lin Jing to join the Heavenly Demon Sect.

Even at the risk of battling Sheng Kun and both breaking through realm boundaries, he couldn't let the Heavenly Demon Sect gain such an asset with potential to become a Fifth Heavenly King.

"Sheng Kun, this isn't your territory. Get lost! How dare a mere avatar run wild in Immortal City!" Li Tianyi summoned a quasi-immortal artifact - a Chaos Bell. As bell tones spread, the Heavenly Demon arm was instantly repelled, and countless cracks appeared in the void projection.

"Li Tianyi..." Sheng Kun snorted coldly, surprised this opponent could still act... He couldn't help feeling regretful.

"Longevity Body... consider my proposal..."

"Scram!"

Li Tianyi shouted again, causing Origin Realm's rules to resonate with his words. As if his speech became law, a force violently sealed the void in the sky.

"Young Alliance Master!!!"

Seeing Li Tianyi appear, many Xianlin City cultivators showed joyous expressions.

Noticing this, Lin Jing also glanced sideways.

Shrouded in chaotic light mist, Li Tianyi's form and face remained indistinct, but Lin Jing could sense his gaze.

"Junior brother, are you unharmed?" After repelling Sheng Kun, Li Tianyi relaxed. Fortunately, his gamble paid off - Sheng Kun's true body was far from Xianlin City. For just a pet, he could only send an avatar quickly, avoiding an all-out battle.

Moreover, having directly exterminated Sheng Kun's pet, Li Tianyi wasn't worried about retaliation. With Lin Jing controlling the immortal ox, they now both posed threats to Sheng Kun. By allying with Lin Jing, they could outnumber Sheng Kun two-to-one.

Li Tianyi observed Lin Jing - his true purpose in appearing was preventing Lin Jing from joining the Heavenly Demon Sect.

"The legendary Chaotic Immortal Physique..." Lin Jing also regarded Li Tianyi. His objective was achieved - he never intended to truly battle the demon sect's sacred son. As Sheng Kun said, he currently wasn't a match and couldn't sustain controlling the immortal ox for long.

But Lin Jing believed that by demonstrating sufficient power, Li Tianyi wouldn't remain passive. Given the current standoff between the Cultivation Alliance and Heavenly Demon Sect, Li Tianyi would surely protect him to bolster the Alliance's strength against the demon sect!

Clearly, his gamble succeeded - Li Tianyi indeed intervened. Unexpectedly, even Sheng Kun had developed interest in him, an outsider cultivator not originating from the Heavenly Demon Realm!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 20: Ice... Ice!!
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 20: Ice... Ice!!

"Too exaggerated..."

"Who exactly is this beast tamer named Lin Jing? To think he could match the Heavenly Demon Sect's sacred son in presence."

"Longevity flesh..." Many demonic cultivators of the Cultivation Alliance still felt lingering palpitations from the scent of longevity flesh. However, seeing Lin Jing withdraw his celestial ox, they all felt a sudden chill.

"This guy is about to become the Young Alliance Master's favored subordinate." Shangguan Ming and Yan Yunshuang exchanged shocked glances. They too had sensed Lin Jing's monstrous potential. It was obvious why Li Tianyi had taken the risk to intervene!

Both Li Tianyi and Sheng Kun stood at the threshold of breaking through to higher realms. The only reason they remained was concern for their respective factions' foundations in the Origin Realm, fearing their bases might be destroyed after their departure.

For a long time, both sides had hoped to find successors who could replace them. Yet within the Heavenly Demon Realm and Cultivation Alliance, they were peerless talents—finding replacements wouldn't be easy. The Heavenly Demon Realm did have other sacred sons, but their cultivation had long surpassed the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage.

As for the Cultivation Alliance, its foundation was slightly weaker than the Heavenly Demon Realm's. Li Tianyi was the Alliance's strongest Nascent Soul Transformation Stage genius. Until now, no one had expected the first contender approaching their level to be a newcomer unaffiliated with either faction.

However, Li Tianyi believed Lin Jing's allegiance was certain—having come from Tianyuan Immortal Palace and seeking the Cultivation Alliance, joining was inevitable. As long as Lin Jing wasn't mistreated, he wouldn't be tempted by the Heavenly Demon Realm's offers.

With Lin Jing recruited, the external Cultivation Alliance would gain a steady supply of immortal energy.

"Monster." While others didn't understand Lin Jing's capabilities, Gu Youran stood nearby in complete shock. She never imagined Lin Jing possessed a celestial ox corpse as his trump card, nor that he'd so quickly become a promising talent in the Young Alliance Master's eyes before even entering the city.

She dared not imagine—if Lin Jing's avatar could similarly infiltrate the demonic sect and become Sheng Kun's confidant, how terrifying would that be?

"Many thanks for senior brother's assistance."

"But this void beast..." Lin Jing glanced at the void beast Li Tianyi had reduced to ashes.

"No matter." Li Tianyi said, "During my seclusion, I didn't expect that demon to dare invade our immortal city. Thanks to junior brother's bravery in battle, he failed to rescue this menace."

"Your valor hasn't gone unnoticed. The Cultivation Alliance will provide you with an Origin Source for cultivation."

"If I'm not mistaken, this junior sister also possesses an 'Immortal Physique'. Today, our Alliance gains two supreme talents—what fortune! Allow me to personally host you both and explain our Alliance's affairs, facilitating Tianyuan Realm's future membership!" Li Tianyi continued.

His words made many gasp as they looked at Gu Youran—another Immortal Physique!

"Just as I thought!" Shangguan Ming's heart raced. How could Tianyuan Realm, inferior to Tianming Realm mere millennia ago, produce such exceptional talents now? Were the other eight also...

Meanwhile, many enviously watched Tan Li. To be personally hosted by the Young Alliance Master and introduced to the Immortal Alliance! Tianyuan Realm would likely become nobility within the Alliance immediately upon joining.

"Many thanks." Lin Jing bowed again. An Origin Source...

He'd never contacted immortal energy before—how much would it accelerate his cultivation? Could it help narrow the gap between him and the two faction leaders?

Currently, he couldn't estimate how many years those two had accumulated at the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage. Even with life-burning techniques, matching them remained difficult.

..........

Xianlin City, White Jade Tower

While Li Tianyi hosted Lin Jing and Gu Youran, Lin Jing's Heavenly Demon Avatar chose not to directly approach the Heavenly Demon Sect.

Directly seeking Sheng Kun would be too obvious. Seeking the three Seeking-the-Way demonic disciples—the Eight Demon Stars—would be beneath him.

Among the Eight Demon Stars, only one possessed true demonic bloodline. Thus, Lin Jing's avatar's bloodline ranked top three within the Origin Realm's Heavenly Demon Sect.

There was no need to directly submit to anyone. Establishing his reputation first and having others seek him out would be optimal.

Lin Jing planned to utilize the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast's subordinate creatures. Since he might later seek a contract with the Meteor Spirit Beast, the Sea Spirit Beast's minions became his primary target.

His true self had obtained the first Origin Source. Now his avatar needed one for cultivation too. In fact, being formed from immortal water lotus, his avatar might wield immortal energy more adeptly than his true self. Currently, his true self with the celestial ox corpse was stronger, but after contacting immortal energy, who could say?

"The decennially produced Origin Source won't appear for two more years—I can't wait that long."

According to intelligence, the Sea Spirit Beast's subordinate "Snow God" had once seized an Origin Source. Though mostly depleted, it would suffice temporarily.

"Next, I'll raid the Snow God's territory for its Origin Source. Even failing would serve my purpose—just drawing attention through battle would achieve my goal."

Lin Jing's Heavenly Demon Avatar headed north, soon entering a snowy domain. According to the mountain god, while the Snow God was slightly weaker, it remained formidable—an immortal ice manifestation wielding terrifying frost power.

Had the mountain god not possessed Earthcore Immortal Fire countering ice, their battle's outcome would've been uncertain.

Facing such a natural deity, victory wasn't guaranteed. Yet Lin Jing's avatar proceeded undaunted.

Victory mattered little—even the Origin Source was secondary. His true motivation was the greedy passenger within—the Ice Soul Gu couldn't imagine anything more delicious than carving something off the Snow God.

Ice Gu: () Immortal ice... immortal ice... ICE!!!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 21: The Path of Celestial Beasts
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 21: The Path of Celestial Beasts

"This is an Origin Source, which absorbs the spiritual energy of heaven and earth along with the essence of the sun and moon. Every three hundred and sixty days, it produces a wisp of immortal energy. Each Origin Source will dissipate after generating about a hundred wisps of immortal energy."

"This particular Origin Source has its seal intact, with no immortal energy leaking out. It can last for a hundred years. Now, I present it to Junior Brother Lin."

In the White Jade Tower of Xianlin City, after welcoming Lin Jing and Gu Youran inside, Li Tianyi of the Chaotic Immortal Physique immediately offered the Origin Source.

"Many thanks, Senior Brother." Lin Jing didn't stand on ceremony and accepted the Origin Source, which resembled a transparent jade stone about the size of a fist, emanating an ethereal aura.

Seeing Lin Jing take the Origin Source from the stone box, Li Tianyi smiled and asked, "Junior Brother, do you know the several uses of this Origin Source?"

"I'm all ears," Lin Jing replied attentively.

"First, it can be used to cultivate <
Immortal Dao Techniques>
that require immortal energy. However, these techniques demand vast amounts of immortal energy—normally only feasible to practice in the Immortal Realm. With just the immortal energy produced by an Origin Source, progress would be painfully slow."

"Second, it can power <
Immortal Dao Spells>
that require immortal energy to activate. Finding a suitable immortal technique requires much less immortal energy to begin with compared to cultivation techniques. This is actually the mainstream use of immortal energy in the Origin Realm."

"Others prefer techniques that nourish themselves during cultivation, like <
Immortal Guidance Art>
, a fundamental body tempering technique that's easy to learn. Its effect is to channel immortal energy into the body to strengthen one's physique..."

"The former has higher requirements but once mastered, allows one to unleash devastating spells capable of defeating stronger opponents. However, without continued immortal energy supply, the spells become unusable. The latter has lower requirements, with each wisp of immortal energy permanently enhancing one's power. Even without future access to immortal energy, the gained strength remains."

"This White Jade Tower actually houses numerous immortal techniques collected by the Cultivation Alliance. Later, Junior Brother may select one to practice... However..."

"However?" Lin Jing looked at Li Tianyi.

Li Tianyi explained, "However, this only applies to ordinary cultivators."

"For Junior Brother, there's actually another use."

"What might that be?"

"Junior Brother is a beast tamer. Beasts are also important treasures."

"If I'm not mistaken, that carp of yours is a Rare Beast! Possessing Rare Beast Divine Abilities, am I correct?"

Lin Jing understood now.

"Rare Beast Divine Abilities are actually modified special immortal techniques. However, since they lack immortal energy, these abilities are merely embryonic forms of immortal techniques that can be activated with ordinary spiritual power!!"

"Junior Brother should know that Rare Beast Divine Abilities can also be powered by immortal energy instead of spiritual power. Moreover, immortal energy can make these abilities 'evolve', bringing them closer to complete immortal techniques."

"During this process, the Rare Beast's bloodline will also evolve toward immortal-grade bloodlines. Our Cultivation Alliance has many demons transformed from Rare Beasts. Their cultivation process might serve as reference for nurturing 'spirit beasts'."

"If during this process, a spirit beast's bloodline evolves to the ultimate *immortal-grade bloodline*, becoming a Celestial Beast, even an Immortal Physique would have to retreat before its Rare Beast Divine Abilities..."

"Junior Brother himself possesses the corpse of an immortal-grade bloodline demon beast, so he should understand the power of such bloodlines..."

"Therefore, you might want to consider allocating more immortal energy for this purpose." Li Tianyi smiled, expressing goodwill.

Many Rare Beasts...

Lin Jing fell silent. Earlier outside the city, he had indeed sensed many demonic beasts' auras.

It seemed that Rare Beasts, extremely rare in the Tianyuan Realm, weren't so uncommon when considering the entire lower realm.

After all, in this Cultivation Alliance, there were probably many with Immortal Physiques, so having more Rare Beasts wasn't particularly surprising.

However, Rare Beasts varied in quality. Lin Jing believed that the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp's inherited Rare Beast Divine Abilities ranked among the top tier he had encountered.

"Thank you for the reminder, Senior Brother." After Li Tianyi's advice, Lin Jing thought that instead of using the immortal energy himself, his true form should focus on strengthening his spirit beasts.

After all, Rare Beasts were already semi-immortal entities.

Originally, Lin Jing had thought that compared to his immortal-energy-affinity Water Lotus incarnation, his true form might not utilize immortal energy efficiently. Given this, he decided to fully commit to the beast taming path—directly using immortal energy to strengthen his spirit beasts, striving to help them become Celestial Beasts as soon as possible.

Once they became Celestial Beasts, his true form's power would naturally elevate as well.

All beast taming secret techniques could then unleash greater power.

As Lin Jing and Li Tianyi conversed, Gu Youran remained silent nearby. Only when Li Tianyi inquired about the Tianyuan Realm did Lin Jing introduce Gu Youran properly.

"Regarding Tianyuan Realm matters, Senior Brother Li should consult her. Her father is currently the strongest in Tianyuan Realm, while her grandfather was formerly the strongest. She knows the Tianyuan Realm much better than I do."

"Oh??" Li Tianyi looked at Gu Youran with slight surprise.

"Is the Fairy the daughter of the Tianyuan Immortal Palace's master?" Through the Tianming Realm, Li Tianyi knew that palace masters were typically the strongest in their factions.

However, facing Li Tianyi's question, Gu Youran calmly stated, "The Tianyuan Immortal Palace... has long fallen."

"Now, the Tianyuan Ancient Kingdom is the foremost power in Tianyuan Realm."

Li Tianyi's mouth opened slightly in surprise. It was rare for an Immortal King's lower realm legacy to perish completely.

"A nation-type power then..." Li Tianyi's focus returned to Lin Jing, asking, "Then Junior Brother Lin..."

"Could you be a disciple of the Tianyuan Ancient Kingdom's strongest cultivator?"

After all, Lin Jing and Gu Youran seemed close. Moreover, for a Longevity Body to reach perfection surely required powerful backing.

Lin Jing smiled slightly, "Not quite. Although I was once a cultivator of the Ancient Kingdom, I later joined the Demon Court dominated by demonic beasts. Now I'm the Holy Son of the Demon Court. Essentially, Princess Youran and I are more like enemies than friends..."

Even the unparalleled genius Li Tianyi fell silent momentarily. What kind of situation was this? A walking longevity medicine in the eyes of demonic beasts was actually their Holy Son???

This utterly perplexing identity made Li Tianyi speculate whether Lin Jing's current strength resulted precisely from growing up in such extreme circumstances.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 22: The Demon Emperor''s Successor?
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 22: The Demon Emperor's Successor?

The land of wind and snow, Dragon Spine Mountain Range.

This place earned its name from the remains of an imperial-blooded divine dragon that fell here long ago, its skeletal spine eternally frozen within the snowy peaks.

The being that slew this imperial-blooded dragon was none other than the master of these mountains - a sentient immortal ice that had awakened consciousness.

The Dragon Spine Mountains harbored no other lifeforms, only endless winter, making it an absolute forbidden zone that few outsiders dared approach.

Yet today, amidst the howling blizzard, a one-armed figure clad in black robes suddenly appeared, hovering in the air above the mountain range as he released an overwhelming spiritual sense.

"Found it..." A glint flashed in the Heavenly Demon Avatar's eyes beneath his black hood as he raised his arm high. The heavens instantly split open with a spatial rift, from which an enormous black arm slowly emerged.

BOOM!

Terrifying demonic energy radiated from the arm. At this moment, the Snow God - who normally only awakened when summoned by the Sea Spirit Beast - abruptly opened her eyes deep within the mountains and gazed skyward.

"Seeking death."

Though the Snow God was sentient immortal ice, she typically appeared in humanoid form - a hundred-meter-tall giantess composed entirely of ice and snow, resembling a deity.

Her massive form descended through the blizzard as she immediately manipulated endless icy winds to engulf the uninvited guest Lin Jing. Simultaneously, the Heavenly Demon Avatar burned his lifespan to forcibly elevate his cultivation to the Nascent Soul peak using his Heavenly Demon Physique!

With their cultivation levels now equal, the demonic arm resonated with Lin Jing's bloodline, unleashing even more terrifying power. Witnessing this, the Snow God felt a flicker of surprise.

Demonic bloodline!

"Could it be... No, it's not."

She studied the Heavenly Demon Avatar, concluding that Lin Jing must be another demonic star possessing the demonic bloodline besides the Heavenly Demon Sect's Sacred Son. Yet their auras differed drastically, clearly not the same person.

"Even with a demonic bloodline, you..." The Snow God snorted coldly. Though demonic bloodlines were fearsome, she didn't fear them - she'd experienced the Heavenly Demon Finger technique countless times.

The blizzard surged toward the demonic arm, but what happened next surprised her. Lin Jing didn't use the conventional Heavenly Demon Finger technique. Instead, the massive arm behind him didn't counter with finger techniques, but clenched empty air to form a colossal sword entirely of frost! The arm swung down, the sword light slashing toward the oncoming blizzard!!!

The Ice Soul Gu had completely fused with the Heavenly Demon Avatar, imparting near-Void Mystical Stage swordsmanship mastery. The combination of Heavenly Demon Finger and the adaptable Primordial Chaos Sword Intent allowed the avatar to unleash a strike surpassing Nascent Soul level!!

BOOM!!

The blizzard shattered as sword intent continued piercing forward, making the Snow God's pupils constrict. A fusion of Heavenly Demon Finger and sword arts??

In her memory, no Heavenly Demon Sect genius fought like this... Just who was this person?

Not only did he possess the rare demonic bloodline, but he'd also modified the Heavenly Demon Finger technique to perfectly integrate with sword arts. What could such a Heavenly Demon Sect genius want in her territory?

"This friend of Thunder Dragon Ancestor's descendant is truly a genius. In terms of swordsmanship talent, he's absolutely inferior to Skyrend Sword Ancestor, perhaps even weaker."

The Heavenly Demon Finger was already an extremely refined technique capable of unleashing ultimate power alone. Only top-tier figures like Demon Emperor Tianchou - who possessed the demonic bloodline - could attempt secondary modifications.

For ordinary people trying to imitate Demon Emperor Tianchou by having the demonic arm wield a sword, forget about combining two powerful techniques - just preventing the two forces from conflicting and annihilating each other would require burning high-grade incense. After all, both sword intent and demonic energy were extremely domineering forces.

Yet the Primordial Chaos Sword Intent of Thunder Dragon Ancestor's swordsman friend had the unique characteristic of combining with other Daos to form new sword intents, exhibiting exceptional compatibility with all techniques. This made combining the two techniques much easier for Lin Jing.

The fused Heavenly Demon Sword Intent - combining the avatar's demonic energy and Ice Soul Gu's sword intent - forced the Snow God to hastily mobilize more natural energy to block.

BANG!!!

Countless explosions of ice and snow froze the Heavenly Demon Sword Intent, but then the Snow God witnessed an even more astonishing sight.

The Heavenly Demon Avatar calmly opened its mouth while... eight sword-wielding demonic arms floated behind him!!

The eight-armed Heavenly Demon form exuded overwhelming pressure.

This wasn't because Lin Jing's avatar had cultivated eight demonic arms through Heavenly Demon Finger mastery, but rather the illusionary mushrooms accompanying the avatar had used the one real arm as a template to conjure seven additional copies.

Using "Reverse Void Technique" to make illusions reality, they achieved perfect deception. Though their power couldn't match real demonic arms, when combined with "Sword Formation Technique," they still provided massive amplification.

"I heard you possess Origin Sources. Having just arrived in this realm, I've yet to witness their appearance. Hand them over, and I'll spare your life." Demonic words echoed across the heavens.

...........

The battle at Dragon Spine Mountain Range lasted several days, its shocking energy waves detectable by increasingly more cultivators. The spreading blizzard transformed ever-larger areas into glacial wastelands.

Deep in the void, atop a massive meteorite, sat a black-haired youth.

His terrifying aura made the surrounding space tremble violently with each breath.

This was none other than the true body of Heavenly Demon Sect's Sacred Son Sheng Kun. When his avatar had descended earlier to rescue his pet, he'd seemed unharmed, but afterwards, his cultivation nearly destabilized, forcing him to immediately enter seclusion to suppress it and prevent accidental breakthrough that would expel him from the Origin Realm.

During this seclusion, Sheng Kun grew increasingly anxious - if Lin Jing fell into the Cultivation Alliance's hands, the balance between the two factions in the Origin Realm would surely collapse...

This anxiety persisted until a shadowy figure appeared beside him.

One of the Hundred Demon Generals.

Sheng Kun looked over: "Shadow Demon, what news from the Cultivation Alliance?"

"Not from the Alliance, Holy Son, but another demonic bloodline bearer has arrived in the Origin Realm!!"

"Oh?"

"He battled the Snow God at Dragon Spine Mountains to a standstill, even forcing her to reveal her immortal ice origin. Only when other spirits came to her aid did he retreat. His strength is extraordinarily terrifying - perhaps even surpassing that other one!"

"Whose successor is he?" Sheng Kun asked.

Shadow Demon hesitated before answering: "He doesn't appear to be a disciple of any current Dao-seeking demonic expert in the Demon Realm. He specializes in using sword arts with demonic arms, possibly inheriting the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path - a secret technique belonging to the long-missing Demon Emperor Tianchou! Aside from her, we've never heard of anyone else mastering it!!"

"What?" Sheng Kun stood up, astonished. "Demon Emperor Tianchou? That loner who single-handedly conquered seven cultivation realms? Didn't she die?"

"She only fell into a stellar rift - presumed dead but never confirmed!" Shadow Demon clarified.

"True!!" Sheng Kun suddenly laughed wildly. Among female powerhouses of the Demon Realm, Demon Emperor Tianchou ranked in the top three - an exceptionally fearsome demoness. After her disappearance, the sect had mourned for years.

Now it seemed she might still live, having trained a successor.

"I must meet this person to verify personally," Sheng Kun declared. If Demon Emperor Tianchou still lived, and if he could secure her support, it would greatly benefit his bid to become the Heavenly Demon Sect's sole Sacred Son. After all, this reclusive powerhouse had never favored any faction before. She had no preferences - but now that she had a disciple, certain matters would no longer be hers alone to decide. By building good relations with her successor, that person would naturally become associated with him.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 23: Deceiving Heaven to Cross the Sea
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 23: Deceiving Heaven to Cross the Sea

"Another demon-blooded cultivator has entered the Origin Realm with astonishing combat power?"

"Fought evenly with the Snow God without immortal energy enhancement?"

"What's happening? The newcomers these days are all so formidable!"

Not only had the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son received this news, but the Cultivation Alliance had also obtained intelligence.

"Find this person and eliminate him immediately," ordered Yan Yunshuang, the leader of the Enforcement Hall, his face dark with malice. "He's severely injured from battling the Snow God - this is the perfect opportunity to kill him!"

The Enforcement Hall sprang into action. Unlike the Heavenly Demon Realm's scattered talents, the Cultivation Alliance moved as one, seizing this chance.

Meanwhile, Lin Jing's true form had selected an immortal technique from the Cultivation Alliance and entered seclusion again. The technique he chose was simple - "Immortal Binding Chains," a sealing-type immortal art. His purpose wasn't mastery, but research. He hoped to upgrade his existing mortal techniques into immortal arts by studying how to power them with immortal energy.

This approach was necessary because while the Cultivation Alliance possessed many immortal techniques, none suited his Beast Taming Path.

Assuming a fake identity was the easiest part of infiltrating the Heavenly Demon Sect. The true challenge was deceiving Sheng Kun's Heavenly Demon Mind Detection Technique - an ultimate ability that could sense others' thoughts, discern their intentions, and detect lies. This technique had made it nearly impossible for the Cultivation Alliance to plant spies in the sect.

With Sheng Kun's perfect demonic bloodline, his mastery of this technique undoubtedly surpassed Lin Jing's mental defenses. Deceiving him wouldn't be easy - this wasn't something Lin Jing could accomplish alone.

Fortunately, he only needed to fool Sheng Kun at the Nascent Soul Transformation stage, not the entire sect full of Seeking the Way realm experts. The Seeking the Way powerhouses of the Tianyuan Realm had made thorough preparations to assist Lin Jing's infiltration.

Origin Realm Cave

While recovering, the Heavenly Demon Avatar swallowed a pill - a quasi-immortal elixir called "Heart-Beguiling Pill" jointly refined by the Tongtian Tower Master, the Immortal Pill Spirit, and the Ancient Emperor's group, using Gu God's Blood as its core ingredient.

Its function? To deceive even oneself.

To truly fool an enemy, one must first fool oneself. Upon taking the pill, the avatar completely forgot its true identity, severing all connection with the original body and creating entirely new memories. At this moment, it became completely detached from Lin Jing. Without external intervention, it would forever forget its original identity.

Three safeguards ensured the avatar could eventually regain its memories: the Ice Soul Gu, the Spell Elemental Mushroom, and Lin Jing's true form.

"Damn it!" The avatar smashed its fist against the cave wall in frustrated rage. "Still too weak!"

"I could suppress that Snow God before it used its Primordial Ice Essence, but once it activated that power... Not only did I fail to obtain immortal energy, but I got severely injured when its reinforcements arrived. Can I really not acquire immortal energy alone to help Master...?"

Soon, the avatar completely forgot its identity as Lin Jing's clone, genuinely believing itself to be the true successor of Demon Emperor Tianchou, here in the Origin Realm to gather enough immortal energy to heal its master's injuries.

Inside its body, the Ice Soul Gu nibbled on fragments of immortal ice from the Snow God while the illusion mushroom pondered how to execute their demon sect script. In the avatar's new memories, both the Ice Soul Gu and the elemental mushroom were precious treasures bestowed by its master, more valuable than its own life.

Several days later, Sheng Kun located the avatar first by tracking its demonic bloodline. Space tore open as the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son descended from above.

The moment he arrived, the recovering avatar's eyes snapped open. Eight spectral arms manifested behind it as it unleashed the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path! Razor-sharp sword intent shattered the cave roof, shooting toward the sky.

Facing this probe, Sheng Kun remained expressionless, casually dispersing the attack with a wave. "No need for hostility. I am Sheng Kun, Sacred Son of the Heavenly Demon Sect - like you, a bearer of demonic bloodline."

"Heavenly Demon Sacred Son..." The avatar rose from the cave, narrowing its eyes. "What do you want?"

"Are you Demon Emperor Tianchou's successor?" Sheng Kun asked. "How should I address you?"

"What if I am?"

"Master named me Mo Yu. But as the Demon Emperor's successor, according to sect rules, I shouldn't need to obey you, a mere Sacred Son, should I?"

"Indeed. I'm not here to give orders," Sheng Kun replied. "I merely wish to confirm - is Demon Emperor Tianchou still alive? She was an important powerhouse of the demon realm... Please answer truthfully."

"Alive!" Mo Yu declared. "After accidentally entering a spatial rift, Master fell into a remote cultivation world - my homeland. Though severely injured, she's currently recovering. I came to the Origin Realm at her command to gather immortal energy for her healing."

"So I have no time for other sect matters."

Sheng Kun nodded while continuously monitoring Mo Yu's mental fluctuations, confirming the truth of these statements. Demon Emperor Tianchou must be gravely injured, stranded in a resource-poor world where she couldn't heal, forced to train an outsider disciple to seek medicine here.

"Is that why you attacked the Snow God's territory? To steal immortal energy?" Sheng Kun asked. "Those beings aren't easy opponents. At your current strength, you can't take immortal energy from them."

"Come with me. I can help you grow stronger and provide immortal energy. Leave Tianchou's healing to me."

"No need," Mo Yu coldly refused. "This is Master's test for me. I require no assistance."

"Fool!" Sheng Kun scolded. "Precisely because Tianchou preferred acting alone did she end up in this state! The Origin Realm isn't as simple as you think. Alone, how long until you gather enough resources? By then, her condition might worsen beyond recovery! Is this how you repay her for sharing her precious bloodline with an outsider like you?"

Sheng Kun realized the situation must be dire if Tianchou had parted with her bloodline essence to empower an outsider. To prevent her death abroad and potentially gain a powerful ally, he resolved to intervene.

Moreover, he saw great potential in Mo Yu. Compared to the other uncooperative demon-blooded individual, he preferred dealing with Tianchou's successor.

"Besides, I'll soon leave the Origin Realm. Before departing, you could tell me about your cultivation world. I might reach Tianchou before you to offer aid."

"So... have you reconsidered?" Sheng Kun's piercing gaze locked onto Mo Yu.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 24: Fateful Duel
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 24: Fateful Duel

"Wise choice!" Seeing the successor of Demon Emperor Tianchou ultimately choose to follow him, Sheng Kun appeared quite satisfied. "You won't regret this decision."

"If you wish to obtain Origin Sources to heal your master's injuries, you must first possess sufficient strength to acquire them. Two years from now, a new Origin Source will emerge within the Origin Realm, triggering fierce competition among the elite talents of various factions."

"Twenty-two years later, an exceptional Origin Source will appear in the Origin Realm - a once-in-a-millennium opportunity! Whether you aim for the ordinary Origin Source or that millennium-grade treasure, what you need most is invincible strength."

"Your current abilities are decent, but in this Origin Realm, you'd barely scrape into the top ten. Even if you manage to seize some Origin Sources through luck during chaotic battles, such fortune can't last forever. Sooner or later, you'll perish in this realm."

"Therefore, your immediate task is rapid power advancement. At minimum, you must reach Nascent Soul Transformation perfection." With that, the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son tossed Mo Yu a jade bottle and a scroll.

"This Immortal-Containing Bottle holds a hundred strands of immortal energy. The jade scroll records a simple immortal technique called 'Ascension Art'."

"The Ascension Art can rapidly enhance your spiritual power by consuming immortal energy. With this bottle's aid, I demand you advance from early-stage Nascent Soul Transformation to great perfection within one year."

"When the Origin Source emerges in two years, I expect you to successfully seize it. If you accomplish this, I'll help you obtain even greater power."

"Correct. At that time, I want you to kill someone for me!" Sheng Kun narrowed his eyes. "Though I, the Cultivation Alliance's Chaotic Immortal Physique holder, and those two celestial spirits won't intervene, these factions still have numerous cultivators stronger than your current self."

"For instance, the Cultivation Alliance has that freak who can control celestial beast corpses. In your present state, you'd certainly lose against him. However..."

"He cannot maintain control over the celestial beast corpse indefinitely. Find the right method, and defeating him becomes simple." Sheng Kun turned to Mo Yu. "If possible, I want this person dead. At minimum, kill his pet beast, seize the corpse, and inflict serious damage!"

"Accomplish this for me, and I'll grant you a century-grade premium Origin Source!"

"Premium Origin Source..." A glint flashed in Mo Yu's eyes. With such treasure, his master's injuries could heal completely. As he agreed, the Ice Soul Gu and Spirit Mushroom within him exchanged puzzled glances, scratching their heads with a vague sense of unease.

"Junior Brother Lin Jing, you've emerged from seclusion..."

"Senior Brother Li, has something happened?" In Xianlin City, Lin Jing had just exited his Cultivation Alliance-assigned abode when Li Tianyi immediately sent a voice transmission.

After briefly surveying his surroundings, Lin Jing inquired further, prompting an instant reply: "Come discuss matters."

Powerful spatial energy then transported Lin Jing to a tea room where Li Tianyi sipped immortal tea before speaking: "Junior Brother, are you aware of the next Origin Source's emergence?"

"Naturally."

"Regarding those special Origin Sources, the major factions of the Origin Realm have an unwritten rule prohibiting certain individuals from intervening, leaving the competition to others."

"Your appearance initially delighted me - with your strength, no one could challenge you for ordinary Origin Sources. However, the Cultivation Alliance recently obtained crucial intelligence."
