"What?" Lin Jing feigned ignorance.

"Another demonic cultivator with heavenly demon bloodline has entered the Origin Realm... Moreover, this individual appears to be the successor of Demon Emperor Tianchou, one of the Heavenly Demon Realm's supreme experts!" Li Tianyi said gravely. "Demon Emperor Tianchou mastered unparalleled sword arts. Her successor has inherited this complete legacy and possesses considerable power."

"I fear Sheng Kun might recruit this person. Should Sheng Kun assist him substantially, complications may arise during your Origin Source competition."

Lin Jing pondered before responding: "No matter. I don't even fear the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son, let alone some Demon Emperor successor."

Li Tianyi shook his head. "You don't fully understand the Heavenly Demon Sect. Sheng Kun's master and Demon Emperor Tianchou were peers. Meaning, if this successor truly inherited Tianchou's legacy, his potential might rival Sheng Kun's."

"Their only difference might be resource disparity."

"I see..." Lin Jing nodded. "I'll remain vigilant. Actually, I emerged to inform you of my plans to leave Xianlin City temporarily to seek superior cultivation sites."

"While Xianlin City excels, it's not the Origin Realm's most naturally potent location."

"Of course." Li Tianyi agreed, as over half the Cultivation Alliance's members trained outside the city. Lin Jing's plan was perfectly reasonable.

"However, Junior Brother, remain cautious. Sheng Kun has you marked."

Lin Jing smiled. "Surely he wouldn't risk compromising his chances at the millennium-grade Origin Source twenty-two years hence just to deal with me. I'll be careful."

"Additionally..." Li Tianyi continued, "Shortly before your emergence, the Carefree Immortal submitted portraits of eight individuals from the Tianyuan Realm. We've located one."

"The Origin Realm's vastness limits the Cultivation Alliance's reach to perhaps ten or twenty percent. Finding people here proves extremely difficult. Your fellow realm cultivator encountered misfortune - they landed directly in the Nethersoil's territory upon arrival."

"Nethersoil?" Lin Jing started - the familiar name belonged to the mountain god's close associate. Coincidentally, he'd planned to join the vice sect leader in subduing Lady Nethersoil.

Li Tianyi explained: "While negotiating with Lady Nethersoil to resurrect a companion, one of our cultivators spotted a female cultivator in the Nethersoil who strongly resembled a portrait."

"Lady Nethersoil appears to have detained her. This isn't unusual - though these rogue spirits avoid provoking core members of major factions like the Heavenly Demon Sect or Cultivation Alliance, they relish bullying powerless 'rogue cultivators' without backing."

Lin Jing understood. As the mountain god's associate, Lady Nethersoil was undoubtedly wicked.

"Which one is it?" Lin Jing sighed, suspecting the ancient kingdom siblings had drained their group's luck. Had the First Ancient Emperor's method for protecting ancient clan members involved redistributing misfortune?

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 25: Nethersoil
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 25: Nethersoil

"It's this person." Li Tianyi took out a portrait, and Lin Jing fell into deep thought upon seeing it.

The Cold Moon Sword Immortal, Feng Ning?

"Junior brother needn't worry about her safety. If I'm not mistaken, she possesses the Lunar Yin Physique, correct?"

"Yes." Lin Jing nodded. The Cold Moon Sword Immortal's Lunar Yin Physique originated from a Divine Physique Pill, making it an acquired Lunar Yin Physique to be precise.

"That explains it. According to the cultivator's report, she seems to be serving as a 'Nether Maiden' in the Nethersoil!"

"Lady Nethersoil possesses the ability to 'resurrect the dead,' though reviving the deceased consumes tremendous energy even for her. To reduce her burden, she created the 'Nether Array,' where cultivators with Lunar Yin Physiques serve as the array's meridians, sharing part of the energy consumption."

"If my judgment is correct, this fairy was retained by Lady Nethersoil precisely because of her Lunar Yin Physique. Lady Nethersoil has already collected several dozen such physiques..."

Several dozen...

Learning that Feng Ning was temporarily safe eased Lin Jing's mind, but this made the trip to Nethersoil all the more urgent.

"Does junior brother intend to visit Nethersoil to find your fellow realm cultivator?" Noticing Lin Jing's expression, Li Tianyi asked.

Before Lin Jing could answer, Li Tianyi waved his hand dismissively. "Junior brother, I think you should abandon the idea of rescuing this fellow cultivator."

Lin Jing frowned. "Why?"

Li Tianyi explained, "Becoming a Nether Maiden isn't necessarily bad. Lady Nethersoil doesn't treat Lunar Yin Physique holders as expendable materials."

"On the contrary, to maintain the Nether Array, she distributes the Origin Sources and immortal energy she obtains through trades to these Nether Maidens, allowing them to cultivate and enhance their magical power."

"From this perspective, these Nether Maidens might not even compete for Origin Sources themselves. Instead, thanks to their physiques, they receive immortal energy directly from Lady Nethersoil—quite an opportunity indeed."

"Moreover, Lady Nethersoil values these Nether Maidens greatly. Retrieving one would be extremely difficult and costly. Additionally, although Lady Nethersoil is a rogue cultivator spirit, she maintains good relations with all factions. Challenging her would be tremendously hard."

"Most importantly, recently I eliminated the pet of the Demonic Sect's Holy Son, yet he made no significant response. Do you know why?"

Lin Jing suddenly realized, "That void beast... could it also be resurrected in Nethersoil??"

Li Tianyi nodded. "If the Demonic Sect's Holy Son is willing to pay a steep price, Lady Nethersoil might truly accomplish it. This means if you go to Nethersoil now, you might encounter the Demonic Sect's Holy Son again—extremely dangerous."

"All things considered, I advise against searching for your companion now. Why not wait until you're stronger and your companion has gained sufficient benefits from Lady Nethersoil before seeking her out?"

"Thank you for the advice, senior brother. I'll postpone my trip to Nethersoil for now." Lin Jing clasped his hands respectfully.

Pleased to have persuaded Lin Jing, Li Tianyi nodded approvingly—he particularly favored sensible juniors who listened to advice, as they tended to live longer.

The next day.

Lin Jing embarked on his journey to Nethersoil.

Though Li Tianyi's advice was reasonable, Lin Jing hadn't taken it to heart.

He wasn't going as a Cultivation Alliance member, but as the Heaven-Earth Sect's sect master.

The Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices was Lady Nethersoil's old friend. With the mountain god's introduction, his visit wouldn't be a simple search or trade, but an attempt to completely subdue Lady Nethersoil.

"Sect Master, you've finally returned."

Several days later, when Lin Jing passed through the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices territory, the mountain god had already transformed into a stone figure, awaiting him.

"The mountain is gone. What about those people?" Lin Jing asked the mountain god about Fang Wuming and the others' whereabouts.

"All sealed within my body, asleep. Don't worry about them escaping or spreading rumors," the mountain god replied.

"Good, let's go." Lin Jing grew increasingly excited, wondering if he could successfully persuade Lady Nethersoil...

Nethersoil was located in a scorched, barren land—this realm, like the previous snowy mountains, was sparsely populated.

At the center of this land stood a ghost city. Lady Nethersoil's spirit-like consciousness unexpectedly looked into the distance.

"The Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices... what brings him here now?"

It had been hundreds of years since their last meeting.

"Sister Tian, are you there?" Outside the Nether King's domain, the shrunken Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices stood on Lin Jing's shoulder, having displaced the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse, shouting inward.

Moments later, Lady Nethersoil's consciousness emerged.

"Lewd Sacrifices... who is this human?"

"Him? He's our hope for leaving the Origin Realm. I've staked my future on him," the mountain god boasted.

"What nonsense." Lady Nethersoil observed Lin Jing irritably, then made an astonishing discovery.

She exclaimed in shock, "A perfected Longevity Body? And a Life-Death Primordial Spirit?"

Good heavens, this was even more suitable than the Lunar Yin Physique for maintaining her array—perhaps even serving as the array's core!

Lady Nethersoil's eyes instantly lit up, but the next moment, Lin Jing snorted lightly and activated the "Corpse Dissolution Fusion True Art" from the corpse-driving secret techniques, temporarily grafting part of the Celestial Ox's corpse onto himself.

A pair of demonic ox horns grew from Lin Jing's head as he instantly emitted a terrifying aura. His yin-yang eyes locked onto Lady Nethersoil, who shuddered, sensing pressure no less than that from the Four Heavenly Kings.

"Nethersoil, mind your manners," the mountain god said. "I've found a way to leave the Origin Realm, though it still requires preparation. Are you interested in joining us?"

With that, he tossed a memory stone. Upon contact, key information about the Beast Taming Art, Lin Jing, and the Heaven-Earth Sect immediately surfaced in Lady Nethersoil's mind.

"No deal!" After reviewing it, Lady Nethersoil refused outright. "I won't participate in some uncertain plan!"

Though she didn't actively join the Origin Source wars, she had plenty of immortal energy sources. She wouldn't work for Lin Jing to help him compete for Origin Sources, nor provide him with immortal energy to gamble on some uncertain venture.

"Perhaps reconsider," Lin Jing said. "I simply believe the Origin Realm limits your ambitions, Lady Nethersoil. Beyond it, the Cultivation Alliance and Heavenly Demon Realm are locked in constant battle—countless cultivators die every moment. That land of death would better suit your dominion..."

"How about this—we won't force you to join us. We only ask for your neutrality, that you don't aid our enemies. In return, I'll appoint you as honorary deputy sect master of the Heaven-Earth Sect. When we succeed, we'll still take you out of the Origin Realm. What do you say?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 26: Recruitment
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 26: Recruitment

After finishing their discussion, Lin Jing and the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices temporarily took their leave, giving Lady Nethersoil ample time to consider their proposal.

The Mountain God followed Lin Jing and couldn't help but ask, "What's the meaning of this? When I joined the Heaven-Earth Sect, I had to follow you into battle, but she gets to be an honorary deputy sect master without lifting a finger? Why the special treatment?"

Lin Jing waved his hand dismissively. "It's not that she won't do anything. Lady Nethersoil clearly doesn't fully trust our grand plan yet, nor does she trust you as deputy sect master. Forcing her would be pointless."

"As long as she shows even the slightest interest in our plan and accepts the honorary deputy position, we've already halfway succeeded."

"Why?" The Mountain God didn't understand.

Lin Jing glanced at it and explained, "Even without any official duties, her mere membership in the Heaven-Earth Sect makes it easier for us to recruit other strange deities."

"With just the two of us, our persuasiveness is limited. But if other spirits see that both the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices and Lady Nethersoil have joined, our credibility increases dramatically."

"The more initial members we have, the greater our momentum becomes, making it easier to attract more recruits. After we pull off one major operation, we won't even need to invite people - spirits will come flocking to us voluntarily!"

"You're right!" The Mountain God chortled in agreement.

Two days later, Lady Nethersoil indeed summoned Lin Jing and the Mountain God for another audience. She looked at the Mountain God and said, "Based on our years of friendship, I'll trust you this once."

"But let's be clear - I won't provide any resources or fight your battles for you."

"At most, I won't help your enemies resurrect the dead or assist your opponents."

"That's more than enough!" Lin Jing smiled slightly and tossed out a token. "This represents your position as honorary deputy sect master of the Heaven-Earth Sect. Please keep it safe."

"Also, while we won't ask you to take action, I do have one more reasonable request I hope you'll agree to."

"What?" Lady Nethersoil grew wary.

"Ten cultivators from my cultivation world came to the Origin Realm. As I understand it, one of them - a Lunar Yin Physique possessor - happens to be detained in your Nethersoil. She's my good friend, and the deputy sect master's good friend as well. Might I ask for her return?"

"That female cultivator is from your world?" Lady Nethersoil sighed in frustration. Damn it all - she'd just spent considerable resources helping that woman master the Nether Maiden Art, and now they wanted her back?

"Indeed. Of course, the Nethersoil is perfectly safe. She could continue cultivating here if you wish - we'd just ask that you treat her well. Perhaps she could serve as a messenger between you and me?" Lin Jing pressed his advantage further.

..........

Nethersoil Ghost City.

Within the city, atop a massive array composed of countless stacked skulls, dozens of Nascent Soul Transformation female cultivators with Lunar Yin Physiques sat in various positions, using their Yin Spirit power to refine the array.

Among them sat Cold Moon Sword Immortal Feng Ning. Compared to the other Lunar Yin Physique cultivators who had been here for untold years, her arrival was recent, and her mind was still filled with thoughts of escaping this damned place.

"Using force... you still haven't given up?" she thought to herself. From her very first encounter with Lady Nethersoil, she had chosen to resist by force - only to discover she wasn't even worth a single move from the ancient being who had lived for tens of thousands of years. She judged that even the sect master and others would be no match for that old monster.

"If those dozens of Lunar Yin Physique cultivators could unite under my command and jointly execute the Lunar Polarity Sword Array, perhaps..." But Feng Ning knew this was impossible...

"All hail Lady Nethersoil!!!"

Suddenly, one of the Nether Maidens spoke up, and all the array-refining Nether Maidens stopped to kowtow as Lady Nethersoil's consciousness descended from the sky.

Forced to play along, Feng Ning had no choice but to join the charade. At least Lady Nethersoil hadn't persecuted her and had even provided cultivation resources. Otherwise, given her temperament, she would have fought the deity to the death regardless of the consequences.

"Hmm." Lady Nethersoil's gaze swept over the Nether Maidens before settling on Feng Ning. "You - from today onward, you need no longer refine the array. I appoint you as Nethersoil Holy Maiden with other duties to follow."

"???" Feng Ning froze in shock, as did the other Nether Maidens who all turned to stare at her.

None could understand why Lady Nethersoil would show such favor to a mere Nascent Soul Transformation beginner with an acquired Lunar Yin Physique!

Under countless envious and jealous gazes from the other Lunar Yin Physique cultivators, Feng Ning tightened her grip on her formless sword intent and followed Lady Nethersoil away in bewilderment.

Lin Jing had made one final request of Lady Nethersoil - if the Sacred Son of the Demon Sect came to the Nethersoil to resurrect his pet, she must immediately notify him.

This clearly fell within the terms of "not helping your enemies resurrect the dead or assisting your opponents."

After semi-recruiting Lady Nethersoil, Lin Jing and the Mountain God Deputy Sect Master found their subsequent tasks much smoother.

Guided by the Mountain God, the pair aggressively sought out rogue spirits who hadn't joined any faction, pulling them into their organization.

Most spirits initially hesitated, but upon seeing veteran Origin Realm figures like the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices and Lady Nethersoil had joined, they naturally dropped their reservations and united under the Heaven-Earth Sect with the shared goal of leaving the Origin Realm.

In what seemed like no time, two years passed.

The once-per-decade moment of Immortal Source birth drew near.

During this period, Lin Jing hadn't wasted a single moment, expanding the Heaven-Earth Sect's membership into the double digits. Beyond the Mountain God and Lady Nethersoil, they'd recruited sixteen more Nascent Soul Transformation spirits. While none matched the individual strength of those two, their combined force was formidable, each possessing power no less than a Demon Star of the Heavenly Demon Sect.

The only regret was Lin Jing's lack of absolute command over them - the group was held together by shared ambition.

But then again, neither the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son nor the Chaotic Immortal Physique possessor could perfectly command their respective factions either. In this regard, they were evenly matched.

As undercurrents swirled, the biggest gap between Lin Jing and his rivals Sheng Kun and Li Tianyi - their respective forces - was gradually closing...

"The Immortal Source has appeared!!!"

Several days later, somewhere in the Origin Realm, immortal light illuminated the heavens as countless cultivators rushed toward it. While the Immortal Source appeared randomly within the Origin Realm, its radiance shone across the entire realm, allowing everyone to locate it. Nearby cultivators rejoiced, while those farther away could only hurry toward the site with all their might, hoping for a chance to seize it.

"So it begins..." Lin Jing, currently traveling through the Origin Realm, and Mo Yu, secluded in meditation elsewhere, were both drawn by the Immortal Source's light and immediately set out, determined to make their mark in the Origin Realm with this first major confrontation.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 27: Fated to Me
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 27: Fated to Me

The contest for Origin Sources does not guarantee victory simply by having greater strength.

To seize an Origin Source, one must also have fate on their side.

From the moment an Origin Source appears until it fully forms, roughly one day passes.

During this day, no one can directly grab the Origin Source. Meanwhile, the radiant light of the Origin Source spreads throughout the entire Origin Realm, announcing its location.

At this time, cultivators nearer to the Origin Source can prepare in advance, such as setting up large formations nearby to defend.

As for those farther away, it’s uncertain if they can reach the Origin Source’s gestation place within one day. Even if they do arrive smoothly, they will have expended a great deal of spiritual power in rushing there.

When cultivators from afar arrive, their condition may have deteriorated significantly, and the dangers encountered en route bring numerous unpredictable factors.

Ultimately, the battle to seize the Origin Source is a chaotic fight involving many. Whoever reaches the Origin Source first, without a speed that leaves others far behind, will inevitably face attacks from numerous cultivators. Thus, under all these variables, almost no cultivator can claim the Origin Source every single time.

The Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices followed Lin Jing, sensing the birth of the Origin Source and inquiring.

It was an honest being who had lived for countless years but had never once seized an Origin Source.

“It’s too early. It’s not yet time for the Heaven-Earth Sect to show up,” Lin Jing said, glancing at it. “This time, I’ll go seize it myself.”

“It’s just an ordinary Origin Source;
it’s not worth a big fuss. The thousand-year Origin Source in twenty years will be your stage.”

“Fine then.” The Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices shrugged its mountain peak shoulders, showing disinterest.

After speaking, Lin Jing summoned Dragon Carp.

He measured the distance himself;
the Origin Source’s birth place was not close, so he had to hurry.

For such a long distance, Lin Jing had two fastest movement spells. One was Heavenly Demon Crossing, the fastest but with enormous consumption. His true body couldn’t use it casually, so it wasn’t very suitable.

The second was the Buddhist Light Technique. Although not as fast as Heavenly Demon Crossing, it consumed much less energy.

But considering he was a Beast Tamer, Lin Jing felt there was no need to travel personally... he seemed to have a faster mount!

“Neigh~~” After Dragon Carp was summoned, it shifted directly from its most controllable carp form into the fastest dragon pegasus form.

The pegasus form was pure white, with a blazing fiery mane running from the head along the spine to the tail. From its head sprouted a horn-like organ resembling a dragon horn. Its eyes burned fiercely like a dragon’s, majestic and awe-inspiring.

Now, Dragon Carp had cultivated the Divine Dragon Transformation to the fifth layer. After shifting to speed form, its attack and defense dropped sharply, but its speed multiplied by five times compared to normal.

Whoosh!!!

The pegasus’s flames streaked across the sky. The Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices watched Lin Jing leave with a slight sigh.

“Really fast!!!”

“Fast, yes, but kind of a useless horse. After this run, this horse is half dead.”

As Dragon Carp’s true body set off, Lin Jing’s Heavenly Demon Avatar also stepped out of the cultivation cave. Two years had passed, yet his cultivation still hadn’t reached the peak of the Origin Realm, only a minor completion of the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage.

In his heart, after a year, he still hadn’t reached Nascent Soul peak.

Compared to his true body, the avatar’s cultivation speed was many levels faster.

Moreover, in the following year, he refined his body even stronger by utilizing the affinity of the Immortal Water Lotus with immortal energy.

“So far away...” The Origin Source birth place was also very distant from the Heavenly Demon Avatar, who sighed, feeling quite displeased. He hoped the next supreme Origin Source would be nurtured right above his head.

“No choice, even if far, it must be taken.” His eyes flickered as he formed hand seals with one hand, summoning the Heavenly Demon Arm from the void. He landed on the palm, riding the arm and flying off, not choosing the high-consumption Heavenly Demon Crossing. After all, he needed to conserve energy to fight for the Origin Source.

This Origin Source gestation place was outside the Tian Continent in the Origin Realm, on an island.

This place was the territory of the Sea Spirit Beast, home turf of the oceanic spirits. So from the moment the Origin Source appeared, countless sea spirits gathered to surround it!

“Hahaha, it seems this Origin Source belongs to our ocean,” a divine dragon composed entirely of water elements circled in the air, eyes burning fiercely.

“Don’t be so happy so soon. Cultivators from other factions haven’t arrived yet,” a mermaid-like being slowly rose from the sea, eyes scorching as it looked toward the mountain source.

“Enough nonsense. Those who have arrived, first follow me to arrange the Absolute Sea Heaven-Crossing Formation to fend off enemies!” shouted a monster made entirely of seaweed.

Before long, these ocean spirits, using their geographical advantage, cooperated to set up a heavenly formation. Eighteen soaring water tornadoes enveloped the immature Origin Source.

When land cultivators arrived and saw the Origin Source locked tightly within the water tornadoes, they frowned and looked at the sea spirits inside the Absolute Sea Heaven-Crossing Formation, sighing deeply.

“This Origin Source’s location is really bad.”

“It’s right in the Sea Spirit Beast’s territory.”

“With so many ocean spirits maintaining the formation to protect the Origin Source, it will be hard to break through quickly. After half a day, when the Origin Source matures, they’ll take it and dive into the sea. This Origin Source will then be completely unreachable by others.”

“Origin Sources are rare! Even so, we have to try.” Suddenly, a huge meteor pierced through the clouds and crashed into the Absolute Sea Heaven-Crossing Formation. On the meteor flew a rocky bird riddled with pits.

It was the Meteor Spirit Beast’s monster cultivator from the Star Dust Realm!

“Attack together—”

In an instant, cultivators from the Cultivation Alliance, the Heavenly Demon Sect, and the Star Dust Realm’s monsters temporarily put aside faction disputes and simultaneously unleashed their divine powers to destroy the Absolute Sea Heaven-Crossing Formation.

Boom! Boom! Boom!

Under continuous assault, the Absolute Sea Heaven-Crossing Formation suffered only slight damage. Though seemingly outnumbered, the ocean spirits were not at a disadvantage in number. Furthermore, being on the sea provided abundant water spiritual energy, making the formation exceptionally solid.

“Heh heh heh, useless,” a group of sea spirits under the Sea Spirit Beast mocked the striving cultivators while maintaining the formation.

In such a short time, other factions couldn’t gather enough people to break the formation!

With the day almost over, they would soon control the Origin Source’s return to the sea and divide it among themselves.

Just then, another human cultivator arrived at the battlefield.

“Neigh~~~” A fiery pegasus stepped on white clouds. The elegant and handsome Lin Jing looked lightly down at the Origin Source inside the eighteen soaring water tornadoes from the sky, smiling.

“Seems it’s not yet mature... This thing is fated to me.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 28: Slaughtered Beneath the Steed
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 28: Slaughtered Beneath the Steed

Near the Origin Source, new cultivators arrived every few minutes. Yet no matter how many came, the sea spirits paid them no heed. The grand formation powered by the vast ocean's energy was absolutely unbreakable.

However, the latest arrival made the sea spirits suddenly tense. "This person... Could it be that legendary Longevity Body wielder who controls immortal beast corpses?"

Lin Jing rode forth on horseback, drawing attention from other factions too. Yan Yunshuang, leader of the Administration Hall from the Cultivation Alliance, had arrived with numerous alliance members to seize the Origin Source. Dozens of Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators were also scattered about, though Lin Jing sensed none carried true demonic bloodlines - the strongest being merely a few Demon Stars.

The gathering included those with Postnatal Immortal Physiques, descendants of the Heavenly Demon lineage, and extraterrestrial spirits. All were stymied by the Absolute Sea Formation just as the Origin Source was about to emerge. Seeing Lin Jing, Yan Yunshuang brightened. "Brother Lin! Perfect timing. None of us can breach this formation, but with your immortal corpse's power..."

Murmurs erupted through the crowd. "So it's really him - the Longevity Body user who controlled an immortal corpse to oppose the Sacred Son!"

"Tch... Only early Nascent Soul Transformation stage? Is he truly that formidable?"

"Don't underestimate him. See that dragon-horse he rides? Those flames are Immortal Fire!"

After his confrontation with the Sacred Son, Lin Jing had faded from public view. His appearance here was expected - newcomers to the Origin Realm always craved the Origin Source, believing themselves chosen. Only veterans understood it depended more on luck, like these sea spirits fortunate enough to be near its birth site. Most cultivators wisely conserved strength for better opportunities after several failed attempts.

"I can only manipulate the corpse briefly - breaking the formation would be my limit. I'd have no energy left to escape if attacked." He considered the many alliance members present, his avatar en route, and prearranged preparations. "Perhaps there's still a chance."

BOOM!

Lin Jing acted decisively. The Origin Source Li Tianyi had given him before had proven invaluable - its two strands of immortal energy greatly benefited his Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp. "Bull Demon King, charge!" he shouted as the massive celestial ox corpse materialized with world-shaking might, barreling toward the Absolute Sea Heaven-Crossing Formation.

"MOOOO!!!"

The corpse Lin Jing had named Bull Demon King charged from low altitude, capturing everyone's attention. "Hold fast! It's just a corpse!" The sea spirits maintaining the formation trembled violently but resisted stubbornly. Yet how could fireflies contend with the moon? When the ox impacted the barrier—CRACK—a black dot appeared, spiderweb cracks radiating outward instantly.

PFFT! Sea spirits were sent flying, faces contorted in agony. Watching cultivators cheered, but the ox pressed forward relentlessly. None dared approach the beast that had so easily shattered the formation, leaving it to bulldoze through the remaining sea spirits toward the Origin Source.

"AVOID!!!" The ox bellowed as Lin Jing spurred his dragon-horse forward. Time seemed to freeze amidst a web of frantic mental transmissions:

"Wait! At early Nascent Soul stage, even burning his lifespan won't sustain corpse control long."

"When he exhausts himself, even with Yan Yunshuang's help, he won't keep the Origin Source."

"Who's there?!"

Just as everyone prepared to snatch the prize from Lin Jing, disaster struck. A spatial rift tore open within the formation. A colossal arm wielding a quasi-immortal artifact sword swung at Lin Jing!

"Heavenly Demon Sect?!" The crowd was stunned. Lin Jing still had energy to control the ox, and the Origin Source wasn't fully formed yet. Which reckless demonic cultivator would strike now?!

"Who?!" Even other demonic cultivators and Demon Stars gaped at the blade. Both the void-tearing Heavenly Demon Crossing technique and the terrifying demonic arm surpassed their own arts! The attack crossed stellar distances instantaneously—too fast for Lin Jing to command the ox to block.

"So you're Lin Jing?" A hoarse voice echoed from the void. The blade's radiance eclipsed the sky. Lin Jing's expression twisted violently as his quicker dragon-horse hurled him toward the Origin Source, half-transforming into a qilin to intercept. But the blade fell—SHING—bisecting the steed in an explosion of blood and fire, its death wail piercing the heavens.

The backlash from his familiar's death made Lin Jing vomit blood, his life force severely damaged. The shock severed his connection to the immortal corpse. The crowd reeled—who was this terrifying newcomer who'd slain one of Lin Jing's beasts so easily? The backlash conveniently robbed Lin Jing of corpse control!

"The Sacred Son?!"

"So the Longevity Body's link was unstable—just serious injury broke it!"

"Such boldness, precision... and power! Who is he?!"

As shock rippled through the onlookers, the Origin Source fully manifested. Lin Jing's face darkened as he seized it, swiftly recalling the ox and Dragon Carp's corpses. His shoulder-mounted Pine Leaf Mouse produced a space-warping leaf, whisking them away from the chaos. En route, the mouse scattered spatial markers for rapid retreat after securing the prize.

"Escape?" The demonic cultivator's true form emerged—a black-robed figure standing atop the demonic arm, icy gaze tracking Lin Jing's flight. "No prey escapes Mo Yu's grasp."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 29: Nirvana Flame
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 29: Nirvana Flame

"It's you!!!"

After the Heavenly Demon cultivator who called himself Mo Yu declared "No prey has ever escaped from Mo Yu's grasp," a furious voice rang out from below - it was the Snow God, the very same deity Mo Yu had robbed last time.

Just as Mo Yu was about to pursue Lin Jing, he spotted the Snow God and couldn't help but feel annoyed. After all, the Snow God happened to be prey that had escaped him previously.

I just finished boasting, and now you show up to embarrass me? Does Mo Yu have no face left to lose?

However... the Snow God's appearance was actually perfect timing.

With just a glance from Mo Yu, a void suddenly tore open behind the Snow God. A sword light flashed out with speed comparable to the earlier ambush against Lin Jing.

The Snow God paled in terror, but even Lin Jing couldn't react to such an attack - naturally she failed to dodge. Her body was cleanly bisected, letting out a pained wail.

"My Primordial Ice Essence!!!"

"Natural spirits truly are hard to kill."

"If you were flesh and blood, you'd already be dead."

Mo Yu coolly observed as other spirit beasts under the Sea Spirit Beast's command rushed to protect the Snow God. Leaving behind these words, he departed under everyone's gaze to continue chasing Lin Jing.

A year ago, he'd used immortal energy to rapidly advance to the Great Perfection stage of Nascent Soul Transformation.

But Mo Yu knew Great Perfection alone wouldn't be enough to kill Lin Jing outright.

So the following year, he painstakingly studied assassination sword techniques, merging the Heavenly Demon Crossing, illusion arts, and Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path into one - pursuing ultimate concealment and speed combined.

If frontal combat couldn't easily kill his opponent, then making his attacks utterly unpredictable would dramatically increase his success rate.

"What now..." The four factions present were stunned as Lin Jing and Mo Yu departed one after another. No one had expected the battle for Origin Sources to be this intense.

"After them!" Soon some cultivators chose to follow, hoping to profit from their conflict.

Meanwhile...

After dozens of spatial jumps via the Pine Leaf Mouse, Lin Jing had teleported far away.

"It seems my avatar's cultivation is progressing well."

Lin Jing wiped blood from his lips. Of course - while his true self had obtained Origin Sources, over two years they'd only produced two strands of immortal energy, which he'd given to the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp.

Enhanced by immortal energy, the Pine Leaf Mouse's Glazed Immortal Eye evolved. At the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage, it could originally only synthesize up to 5th-tier materials, but with immortal energy it reached 6th-tier - though that experiment nearly cost the mouse half its life, proving immortal energy's incredible value.

As for the Dragon Carp, already possessing numerous powerful exotic flames and having fused its Flame Emperor divine ability to the limit after absorbing Earthcore Immortal Fire - the immortal energy boost raised its ceiling further, allowing fusion of another powerful flame obtained along its path. Subsequent enhancements might not be as dramatic, but immortal energy's value remained undeniable.

Meanwhile, thanks to Sacred Son Sheng Kun's investment, his avatar directly received 100 strands of prepared immortal energy - a massive cultivation advantage.

"Come out."

Lin Jing summoned the bisected Dragon Carp. The two halves instantly transformed into flames, from which a phoenix cry rang out. The flames swirled midair before coalescing back into a complete carp.

"..." The Dragon Carp whimpered in pain. They'd agreed this was acting - couldn't he have cut gentler? Couldn't they have used illusions to fake its death?

"Without truly dying once, this grand performance wouldn't be perfect," Lin Jing said lightly.

"Though our illusion skills are advanced, with so many geniuses present, someone might see through it. Comparatively, even if the Nirvana Flame is noticed, it's inconsequential."

The flame Dragon Carp used was called Nirvana Extinction - the life flame of a fire spirit from the Heaven-Earth Sect, part of whose essence Lin Jing had exchanged for the carp to refine.

Nirvana Flame allowed entering a death-like state when suffering fatal damage, then reviving through flame power. The only cost was temporary inability to use flame energy.

Lin Jing had planned everything since obtaining this exotic flame, having the Ice Soul Gu awaken his avatar's memories in advance for this day.

"Though we can't give Origin Sources to the avatar, having him publicly display overwhelming power to instantly kill my spirit beast despite my celestial beast protection should satisfy Sheng Kun. After this battle, he'll likely receive even greater support."

"My true self obtained the Origin Sources. Though losing some face, it's no real loss since the spirit beasts didn't truly die. Most importantly, the avatar muddying the waters will draw attention away from me, preventing having to deal with all factions after obtaining the treasure."

Currently, after teleporting away using spatial leaf markers, Lin Jing's avatar was pursuing wooden clones created by the Pine Leaf Mouse. Others would likely follow Mo Yu and the clones, allowing his true self to safely return to Xianlin City.

"Let's continue."

Lin Jing called to the panting Pine Leaf Mouse. Wiping sweat, it resumed teleportation. These spatial leaves had been synthesized to 5th-tier, each equivalent to a teleportation array marker - surpassing even Heavenly Demon Crossing in range, though the cost was substantial, requiring meticulous preparation from the leaf stage onward.

Much later elsewhere...

After Mo Yu destroyed the wooden clone decoy with one sword strike, he declared: "Enough, we stop here."

Swallowing another Heart-Beguiling Pill, the now memory-wiped demon grew sullen, raging impotently at failing to seize the Origin Sources.

"Lin Jing, I'll kill you!!!"

This made the Spell Elemental and Ice Soul Gu sweat nervously.

"Boss, boss, that kid was too fast."

"How about we go after that Snow God again? Take back the Origin Sources we failed to get last time."

"We can't return empty-handed." The Ice Soul Gu tempted.

"You're right." Mo Yu coldly turned to the pursuing faction cultivators. "Since these fools want to profit from others' conflicts and enjoy the show, they'll pay the price."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 30: Brother Kun, No
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 30: Brother Kun, No

Several days later.

The battle for the Origin Sources came to an end.

News about this Origin Source competition began spreading rapidly throughout the Origin Realm.

"Finally found someone - humans."

Among the clouds, the Ancient Imperial Prince exhaled as he sat cross-legged on a dragon-patterned compass.

After arriving in the Origin Realm, he had lost his direction. Though he wanted to find human settlements, he could only sense threatening alien presences multiple times. Left with no choice, he had to first find a place to temporarily improve his cultivation before making further plans.

Until the day the Origin Sources appeared.

Seeing the glow of the Origin Sources, he thought it was an opportunity - the competition site would surely gather many cultivators, making it possible to find companions...

Fortunately, though he didn't reach the destination, he did successfully find human cultivators other than himself. Just as he was about to intercept these two people, he noticed they looked terrified, as if fleeing for their lives.

"Fellow Daoists..."

The Ancient Imperial Prince called out, but the two showed no intention of stopping. After a brief hesitation, he flew alongside them at the same speed to inquire.

"Fellow Daoists, what happened? Are you being pursued?"

"Who are you?"

Seeing someone shamelessly following them, the two fleeing cultivators didn't give the Ancient Imperial Prince a friendly look.

"I'm Lin Jing, just arrived in the Origin Realm recently. I wanted to ask about the location of the Cultivation Alliance." The Ancient Imperial Prince didn't give his real name, casually using an alias.

"You dare call yourself Lin Jing?" The two cultivators became even more displeased, rolling their eyes, thinking the Ancient Imperial Prince was making fun of them.

Ancient Imperial Prince: ?

Not angered, he directly tossed two bags of top-grade spirit stones to them. Seeing the spirit stones, the two realized the Ancient Imperial Prince was sincere and couldn't help but speed up while explaining: "Stop talking nonsense, we'll explain when we reach safety. That Mo Yu has gone completely mad with robbery."

"Absolutely must not let him catch us..."

"Mo Yu???" The Ancient Imperial Prince was stunned and continued following them to learn more.

"You just entered the Origin Realm, so you might not know. This Mo Yu is the successor of Demon Emperor Tianchou from the Heavenly Demon Sect, possessing demonic bloodline with terrifyingly powerful strength."

"You say your name is Lin Jing - true or false? Anyway, in the Origin Realm, there's another Lin Jing who's a favorite of Young Alliance Master Li Tianyi. Rumor has it the Young Alliance Master intends to cultivate him as a successor! But even such a person had his spirit beast instantly killed by Tianchou's successor with one sword strike during the recent Origin Source competition!"

"Now, no one knows where Lin Jing has fled to, which has made Mo Yu dissatisfied. He's gone completely mad everywhere. The two of us are fleeing desperately precisely to avoid being caught by him."

"What!!" The Ancient Imperial Prince's pupils contracted sharply. What? That freak Lin Jing's spirit beast was actually killed?

Is the Origin Realm this dangerous?

Wait.

Mo Yu... The Ancient Imperial Prince suddenly looked strange. Could this be one of his own incarnations?

After all, such a weird name didn't seem like something a normal person would come up with. That guy hadn't even named his own spirit beast - when forced to name an incarnation, he probably couldn't think of anything good.

"Fellow Daoists, could you take me to the Cultivation Alliance? Lin will surely repay you generously."

Similar situations to the Ancient Imperial Prince's were happening to other cultivators from the Tianyuan Realm. They had all failed to find human cultivators in a short time, ending up in various remote places without locating Xianlin City. But guided by the glow of the Origin Sources this time, they soon successfully found cultivators coming to compete for the Origin Sources.

And with speechless expressions, they learned about Lin Jing's battle achievements.

Not long after, Mo Yu, having plundered some resources, returned to his cave dwelling.

Although he failed to seize the newly formed Origin Source, he did successfully rob several spirits of considerable immortal energy, making the trip worthwhile.

Unfortunately later, these spirits gathered together, and he was truly no match, forced to retreat first.

"Failed to seize the Origin Source?"

After Mo Yu's return, not long after, Sacred Son Sheng Kun arrived outside his cave dwelling and spoke slowly.

Boom.

Opening the stone door of the cave dwelling, Mo Yu looked at Sheng Kun and said: "I've disappointed you, Sacred Son. I failed to accomplish what you entrusted to me. As for the 100 strands of immortal energy you gifted me, I'll gather and return them to you as soon as possible."

"Haha, what use do I have for you returning a hundred strands of immortal energy?" Sheng Kun entered the cave dwelling and spoke lightly: "Actually, it's not your fault."

"Managing to ambush and kill one of his spirit beasts, severing his connection to the Origin Source - you already had victory within grasp. But who could have expected that guy would have another spirit beast with spatial abilities surpassing ordinary Void Mystical Stage cultivators?"

"That spirit beast transported him an extremely far distance in just one breath, continuously changing over ten locations. Even with Heavenly Demon Crossing, it would be hard to track. This time, it's truly not your fault."

"Though you failed to seize the Origin Source, killing one of his spirit beasts already satisfies me greatly. Therefore, I'll still fulfill what I promised you."

"I'll help you become stronger!"

"Of course, not just for you, but also to help Senior Demon Emperor Tianchou recover faster."

A strange light flashed in Mo Yu's eyes.

"Thank you, Sacred Son." He couldn't help but feel moved, thinking the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son was quite decent.

Sheng Kun nodded. He had seen Mo Yu's potential and naturally wouldn't completely abandon the opportunity to win over Demon Emperor Tianchou just because of one failure.

"Actually, demonic bloodlines also have grades. Roughly, they can be divided into ordinary demon blood and royal demon blood. You, I, and those hundred-plus Seeking the Way demons in the Heavenly Demon Realm with demonic bloodlines - what we possess are all ordinary demon blood."

"Even at its peak, ordinary demon blood isn't truly a match for top-tier immortal physiques like the 'Chaotic Immortal Physique.' Yet I can fight Li Tianyi to a standstill. Do you know why?"

Mo Yu shook his head.

"Heh, I observe that you seem to have never performed soul usurpation, correct?!" Sheng Kun scrutinized Mo Yu: "But that's normal. Coming from a minor realm, you naturally couldn't maximize the advantages of the 'Heavenly Demon Scripture' before. The advantage of the 'Heavenly Demon Scripture' is its ability to perform perfect soul usurpation, even if the target is an immortal physique."

"The reason I can contend with Li Tianyi isn't because of perfected demonic bloodline, but because this body isn't my original - it was obtained through soul usurpation, an innate immortal physique body!"

"The combination of immortal physique and demonic bloodline is where my true strength lies!"

"So for you to grow stronger quickly is also simple - just usurp an 'innate immortal physique' and you'll naturally grow stronger rapidly. Moreover, has no one told you? Continuous soul usurpation can purify demonic bloodlines! I'll teach you a chant that can enhance bloodline strength during the usurpation process."

"Usurp an immortal physique?" Mo Yu was stunned.

"Yes. In this Origin Realm, immortal physique cultivators aren't rare. Finding a suitable immortal physique cultivator to usurp would only benefit you. For example, the Five Thunder Immortal Physique from the Cultivation Alliance's Administration Hall is a good choice, though the Five Thunder Immortal Physique still isn't strong enough..."

"Years ago, I captured an innate immortal physique cultivator from the Cultivation Alliance. That immortal physique's seniority surpasses even Li Tianyi's - a peerless genius who guarded the Origin Realm's Cultivation Alliance before Li Tianyi. Now, that immortal physique cultivator is sealed by me in a crystal. If you don't mind, I'll gift you this 'Innate Limitless Immortal Physique.'" Sheng Kun spoke seriously: "I hope after usurping it, next time you can kill that Longevity Body."

Hearing this, Mo Yu's heart pounded.

Innate Limitless Immortal Physique!

But when Sheng Kun took out an exquisitely beautiful fairy sealed in transparent amber, Mo Yu fell into deep thought.

"I'll protect you during the process. Change bodies now."

"A woman? Sacred Son, no thank you."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 31: Second Soul Usurpation
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 31: Second Soul Usurpation

"Don't want it?"

Sheng Kun was instantly infuriated when he heard this.

"Just because the target is a female cultivator, you refuse?"

"The path of cultivation is arduous. Many cultivators would sacrifice their very lives for immortality, yet you'd abandon the *Limitless Immortal Physique* over such a trivial matter?"

"Do you even comprehend what you're rejecting?"

"If not for my current cultivation being insufficient to perform another perfect soul usurpation, I would have kept this Limitless Immortal Physique for myself!"

Seeing Mo Yu still hesitating, Sheng Kun turned away in disappointment.

"I'll give you one year to reconsider. Think carefully - if you wish to save your master."

"The Heavenly Demon Scripture's fourth level allows the first perfect soul usurpation. After usurpation, one retains their original physique, techniques, and spell mastery while gaining the target's innate talents."

"At the fifth level, a second perfect soul usurpation becomes possible. I've now reached this stage."

"Meaning even if I take this Limitless Immortal Physique, it's only temporary. As long as I quickly find another target, I can change back..."

"Never mind. It's just temporary. For my master's sake, what wouldn't I endure?" After internal debate, Mo Yu decided to proceed.

The Limitless Immortal Physique knew no limits. Ordinary cultivators hitting a realm's peak would stagnate until breaking through, but this physique could ignore such bottlenecks. One could theoretically cultivate endlessly within a single realm - reaching Qi Training Layer 100, 1000, or even 10,000 - building an unsurpassable foundation or forging an entirely unique cultivation path.

Ironically, in the Origin Realm where Nascent Soul Transformation was the ceiling, this physique's advantage should have been overwhelming. One could cultivate indefinitely at the Nascent Soul level without fear of breaking through to Void Mystical Stage and being expelled. To Mo Yu, the Limitless Immortal Physique's potential here should surpass even perfected demon blood and the Chaotic Immortal Physique. He wondered how its owner had been captured.

"This woman must possess terrifying strength. Though sealed for countless years with depleted spiritual power, usurping her remains dangerous. I should recall Sheng Kun to safeguard the process."

Just as Mo Yu moved to summon Sheng Kun, his Spell Elemental and Ice Soul Gu urgently intervened:

"No! Absolutely not!"

The Heart-Beguiling Pill affected the physical body. Changing vessels would expose them before Sheng Kun! Their experiments proved the pill worked on avatars, but they'd never tested it on something as heaven-defying as the Limitless Immortal Physique.

"You're suggesting I abandon this body?" Mo Yu asked, confused.

"Exactly! The risk is too great. This woman dominated the Origin Realm before Sheng Kun and Li Tianyi. Who knows what contingencies she prepared? Even with Sheng Kun protecting you, this usurpation would be extremely dangerous."

"Why not discuss making her your second target?"

The Ice Soul Gu explained: "You have two perfect usurpations available. First take a less risky vessel to gain experience, then come back for the Limitless Immortal Physique when better prepared!"

"There's some logic there. But that means I'd be stuck with this physique until reaching the Heavenly Demon Scripture's sixth level for a third chance?" Mo Yu frowned.

"Great achievements demand flexibility," the Ice Soul Gu suggested. "Leave now to find another immortal physique elsewhere."

The priority was escaping Sheng Kun's surveillance. They couldn't risk changing bodies under his watch.

"Fine." Mo Yu trusted the Ice Soul Gu - a gift from his master - more than Sheng Kun. Without it, he could never have inherited the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path. Decision made, he stepped from the cave, the Ice Soul Gu going dormant.

"Holy Son."

Activating the communication artifact Sheng Kun left, a voice immediately echoed from the void:

"Decided so quickly? I gave you a full year."

"I've considered carefully," Mo Yu replied. "While I appreciate your offering the Limitless Immortal Physique, I sense extraordinary depth in her. Even with the Heavenly Demon Scripture, I lack complete confidence."

"Now that I've reached the fifth level with two usurpations available, perhaps I should first take a weaker immortal physique to gain experience before attempting this one?"

After a pause, Sheng Kun responded:

"Very well."

"In that case, I'll teach you a method to enhance demonic bloodline during usurpation."

"May these two usurpations perfect your demonic lineage..."

Later, contemplating the technique, Mo Yu gazed where Sheng Kun had vanished:

"This Demonic Sect's Holy Son exceeds my expectations."

"Other cultivators overestimated Lin Jing for lasting briefly against him."

"A perfected demonic bloodline alone would overwhelm Lin Jing, let alone Sheng Kun's Heavenly Demon Scripture - certainly at the Nascent Soul-corresponding fifth level with two perfect usurpations."

"Meaning besides his demonic blood, he likely possesses at least two immortal physiques - dual physique constitution!"

"Even if inferior to Chaotic or Limitless Immortal Physiques, their combined power must be terrifying."

"Excellent. Once I replicate his dual physiques and perfected demonic blood, Lin Jing won't escape me again."

Hearing Mo Yu's muttering, the Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental exchanged exasperated glances. Their "amnesiac" avatar had truly fixated on opposing his original self.

Yet Sheng Kun's generosity surprised them - leaving the Limitless Immortal Physique behind! The Ice Soul Gu speculated: in the Cultivation Alliance, this physique's owner must hold status rivaling the Young Alliance Master, with a formidable Seeking-the-Way master. What rewards might await if they sold rather than usurped her?

"Mogu mogu! (Or have our original save the Limitless Immortal Beauty from demons - a hero rescuing the fair maiden...)" The Spell Elemental Mushroom began scripting new scenarios, though this might get Mo Yu killed by "Brother Kun," hardly ideal for the avatar.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 32: The Acceleration Method
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 32: The Acceleration Method

"If I don't seize this 'Limitless Immortal Physique', what other physiques are worth taking over?" Mo Yu fell into deep thought. There were certainly no shortage of immortal physique cultivators in the Origin Realm.

However, there were differences between immortal physiques, and not every one would suit him. Taking over a physique that conflicted with his current path would be worse than not seizing one at all.

"A sword path or spatial path physique would obviously provide the greatest boost to my strength if they matched these attributes."

"The problem is, I've never heard of any sword path or spatial attribute immortal physique geniuses in the Origin Realm."

"Forget it, let's first find a place to help you break through. Once you reach Nascent Soul Transformation perfection, the boost to my strength should be no less than obtaining an immortal technique," Mo Yu said to the Ice Soul Gu.

When Lin Jing had released Mo Yu and the Ice Soul Gu, the latter had been at Nascent Soul perfection. After all this time, the Ice Soul Gu's main body remained at that stage. The assistance it provided Mo Yu was limited to near-Void Mystical Stage mixed sword path attainments.

Due to the vast gap in cultivation realms, the boosts in other areas weren't particularly significant. Previously, various concerns had temporarily restricted the Ice Soul Gu's advancement. But now that the avatar had reached the pinnacle of the Origin Realm's power levels and used immortal energy to thoroughly strengthen its body inside and out, even if the Ice Soul Gu fully achieved Nascent Soul Transformation and permanently merged with the avatar to provide various powers, it wouldn't place too much burden on the avatar.

At that point, the avatar's combat power could still increase substantially.

"Let's go to the Snow God's territory for your breakthrough. We previously heavily injured her, and later stole fragments of her Primordial Ice Essence during the hunt. These conditions should be sufficient for your perfect transformation."

Crunch!

The demonic avatar stepped into the void, crossing entire regions with each step, quickly returning to the Dragon Spine Snow Mountain. As expected, the heavily injured Snow God hadn't returned to her territory but had gone elsewhere to recover, conveniently leaving this snowy land for the avatar's use.

"Ice Soul Gu, condense your immortal ice nascent soul. I'll protect you during your breakthrough."

............

Xianlin City.

After the Origin Source competition had basically concluded, Lin Jing's main body first found the Mountain God deputy sect master to discuss some matters before returning to the Cultivation Alliance headquarters.

His return immediately drew out the Chaotic Immortal Physique possessor Li Tianyi.

"Brother Lin, I heard your spirit beast was slain by Demon Emperor Tianchou's successor?" Li Tianyi appeared concerned on the surface, but internally he was speculating whether Lin Jing could still control that Celestial Beast corpse after this setback.

"No matter." Lin Jing, who had landed on the White Jade Tower, clasped his hands. "Although I was indeed careless and successfully ambushed by that Mo Yu, it didn't harm my foundational energy."

"While my Dragon Carp spirit beast was indeed killed, it possesses 'Nirvana Immortal Fire' which granted it a new life, though it will be weakened for some time."

"Even without the 'Nirvana Immortal Fire', as long as my main body isn't slain, I can still use beast taming secrets to revive them."

"I didn't continue fighting Mo Yu only to avoid mutual destruction that might give other cultivators opportunities."

"I see, no wonder Brother Lin's condition still seems quite good. Congratulations on successfully obtaining Origin Sources so soon after arriving in the Origin Realm." Li Tianyi narrowed his eyes with a smile.

This beast taming cultivator was more formidable than he'd imagined.

"For the next ten years, Brother Lin will undoubtedly be a prominent figure in the Origin Realm. For safety's sake, it would be better not to wander about. Why not seclude yourself in Xianlin City for a millennium to properly digest the Origin Sources you've obtained?" he suggested.

Though Lin Jing was strong, one man couldn't withstand many enemies. If various factions conspired against him, they could certainly succeed.

The recent Origin Source competition had shown Lin Jing lacked good defenses against spatial assassination techniques. Li Tianyi didn't want to see such talent fall before reaching its peak.

"Good, I was thinking the same."

"However."

"Senior Brother Li, though I currently possess two Origin Sources, each only produces one strand of immortal energy per year. Ten years would yield merely ten strands - the production rate is too slow. Is there any method to accelerate the output?" Lin Jing inquired.

He wanted to recklessly expend dozens of immortal energy strands like his avatar could.

"Naturally there is." Li Tianyi said. "There are secret methods to hasten Origin Source immortal energy production. However, these methods damage the Origin Source itself - it's forcing growth. An Origin Source that could normally produce a hundred strands might only yield eighty or ninety percent after acceleration, making it quite uneconomical."

"Alternatively, Brother Lin could trade Origin Sources directly for immortal energy. But most cultivators use any immortal energy they obtain almost immediately. Few preserve large quantities in special vessels."

"Doesn't the Cultivation Alliance have any reserves?" Lin Jing asked, since Sheng Kun had clearly preserved some.

Li Tianyi shook his head regretfully. "The Cultivation Alliance has many members with great demand for immortal energy. We don't maintain large reserves."

Lin Jing sighed. In that case, he'd have to use the acceleration method. Losing ten to twenty percent was acceptable.

He needed to maximize his combat power before the premium grade Origin Sources emerged.

"Could Senior Brother Li teach me this acceleration method?"

"Certainly!" Li Tianyi nodded, also hoping Lin Jing could strengthen himself quickly, given his limited time remaining.

..........

Lin Jing's cave abode.

Looking at his two Origin Sources, he summoned the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp.

The Pine Leaf Mouse looked utterly exhausted while the Dragon Carp appeared already dead.

"I've obtained the Origin Source acceleration method."

"In the coming period, we'll use immortal energy to strengthen your Rare Beast Divine Abilities."

"Though we've subdued numerous wild spirits these past two years, most don't trust us, let alone feel loyalty. Our current strength isn't enough to make them follow wholeheartedly - it's only through the Mountain God and Nether Earth's influence that we've temporarily gathered them."

"Especially after news spreads of my spirit beast being slain, morale in the Heaven-Earth Sect will further deteriorate. Even if the Mountain God explains, it will be difficult to clarify matters."

"So I've informed the Mountain God to hold the Heaven-Earth Sect's first assembly in five years to discuss our future direction and plans."

"At that time, we won't be facing individual spirits but over a dozen powerful Nascent Soul Transformation spirits simultaneously. We must possess strength sufficient to awe them - this meeting will be crucial for the Heaven-Earth Sect's survival."

His gaze fell upon the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp. "It's up to you two now. I'll give you all our resources and assist your cultivation. Both of you - stay sharp!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 33: Slaughter Immortal Physique
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 33: Slaughter Immortal Physique

In the blink of an eye, a year passed.

Lin Jing used acceleration techniques to catalyze the Origin Sources, rapidly nurturing strands of immortal energy. He poured all this immortal energy into cultivating the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp.

After consuming vast amounts of immortal energy, the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp's improvements exceeded Lin Jing's expectations. Even without deliberate cultivation, after absorbing dozens of immortal energy strands, they had both reached the late-stage Nascent Soul Transformation realm.

The power of the Immortal Realm was indeed far superior to the spiritual energy of the lower realms.

Moreover, practicing their Rare Beast Divine Abilities with immortal energy accelerated their progress significantly. The Pine Leaf Mouse could now use its Glazed Immortal Eye with much greater ease, no longer suffering from eye strain or temporary blindness after material synthesis.

However, Lin Jing believed their most remarkable improvement lay in their bloodlines.

Li Tianyi had been correct—Rare Beasts were semi-immortal entities. The process of strengthening their abilities with immortal energy naturally advanced their bloodlines toward immortal-grade.

Though the Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp hadn't fully evolved into immortal-blooded creatures yet, their bloodline potency had become terrifyingly strong. The Dragon Carp had evolved to Emperor-grade bloodline, matching the strength of demon emperors who ruled entire regions!

The Pine Leaf Mouse, inherently weaker, had reached Quasi-Emperor-grade bloodline—just one step away from Emperor-grade.

This made Lin Jing wonder: if they obtained that once-in-a-millennium supreme Origin Source, could they elevate both creatures to immortal-blooded Celestial Beasts?

His determination to acquire that supreme Origin Source grew stronger, even if it meant confronting Li Tianyi and Sheng Kun.

With surplus immortal energy remaining, Lin Jing remained in seclusion, unaware of recent events—such as more Tianyuan Realm cultivators finally locating Xianlin City.

The Ancient Imperial Prince, the senior sect sister... apart from Cold Moon Sword Immortal remaining in the Nethersoil and the Wu God Hall's Holy Son still missing, most Tianyuan cultivators had gathered here to cultivate.

Thanks to the foundation Lin Jing had established, they received excellent treatment upon entering the city.

The most significant development involved a red-haired madman appearing in the Origin Realm—a killer who slaughtered indiscriminately, targeting Cultivation Alliance members, Heavenly Demon Sect disciples, and rogue cultivators alike.

The Cultivation Alliance had dispatched numerous elites to eliminate him, but all failed. The fortunate ones escaped;
the unlucky perished on the spot.

"Slaughter Immortal Physique."

Lin Jing soon learned about this cultivator—affiliated with neither the Heavenly Demon Sect nor the Cultivation Alliance, but possessing an extreme constitution: the Slaughter Immortal Physique!

This physique allowed unlimited cultivation breakthroughs and ability enhancements through killing alone. Given enough victims, one could reach the Seeking the Way realm astonishingly fast.

No one knew his origins or background—only that a millennium ago, he had wreaked havoc in the Origin Realm before suddenly vanishing. Many assumed he'd broken through to the Void Mystical Stage and been expelled from the realm. His reappearance now suggested he'd self-sealed until recently breaking free.

"Alliance strategists speculate he sealed himself for the millennium-cycle supreme Origin Source," came the report. "Such cultivators manipulate their lifespans to remain in the Origin Realm longer by halting cultivation progress."

The Ice Soul Gu tossed aside Yan Yunshuang's request for aid. The Slaughter Immortal Physique's power was insignificant—few in Lin Jing's faction could oppose him. Though Yan sincerely hoped the Ice Soul Gu would intervene, it lacked interest.

"Yan claims Wu God Hall's Holy Son Wuta likely fell to this killer, explaining his absence among the gathered Tianyuan cultivators."

The Ice Soul Gu's relationship with Wuta extended only to some ranking competitions—hardly worth avenging. Still, as fellow natives, if Lady Nethersoil fully submitted someday, perhaps resurrection could be arranged.

"Just reject Yan." The Ice Soul Gu had no interest in the Slaughter Immortal Physique and planned to continue seclusion. However, it knew someone who would be very interested—the demonic incarnation, Mo Yu.

Before the Ice Soul Gu's breakthrough, Mo Yu had been searching for suitable possession targets. The Slaughter Immortal Physique seemed perfect.

This constitution allegedly developed extraordinarily powerful inner demons during ascension due to excessive killing—its sole weakness. Yet for demonic cultivators, inner demons were ideal nourishment for Heavenly Demon Finger cultivation.

Possessing this body could elevate Mo Yu's Heavenly Demon Finger mastery, potentially achieving dual-armed form—not the eight-armed state of Demon Emperor Tianchou, but still significant progress.

"Though if the rumors of the Slaughter Immortal Physique's power are true, possession might fail," Lin Jing worried—until an urgent message arrived from the Ice Soul Gu.

[Emergency! Cracks appeared in the crystal sealing the Limitless Immortal Physique—the one gifted by the Demon Sect's Sacred Son!]

"Seal!"

At Dragon Spine Snow Mountain—now occupied by the incarnated Mo Yu and Ice Soul Gu—everything had proceeded smoothly except one development: the Limitless Immortal Physique's seal had weakened, disrupting Mo Yu's hunt for the Slaughter Immortal Physique.

Though Mo Yu hastily reinforced the seal, his inferior sealing skills allowed a wisp of the Limitless Immortal Physique's consciousness to escape.

"Demon! Release me! Possessing me benefits you nothing—my master will destroy you outside!"

"Did you struggle so hard just to say this?" Mo Yu remained unmoved, continuing reinforcement. The sealed physique likely sensed its separation from Sheng Kun, hence the resistance.

"Heh... You truly believe Sheng Kun gave me to you out of kindness?... Do you know she schemes against you? That despite being the Demon Sect's male Sacred Son, her original form was female...?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 34: Heavenly Demon Factions
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 34: Heavenly Demon Factions

"So what if she is?"

Lin Jing had never heard that Sheng Kun's original body was female. There were no such rumors about her in the Cultivation Alliance of the Origin Realm either.

But it was indeed possible - starting as female, then repeatedly performing soul usurpation on male cultivators to obtain better physiques wasn't strange at all.

After all, that very Sheng Kun had arranged for him, a male cultivator, to take over this Limitless Immortal Physique.

What Mo Yu couldn't understand was - even if Sheng Kun was originally female, what did that have to do with scheming against him?

"Still don't get it? She's cutting off your immortal path."

The voice continued emanating from the woman sealed within the crystal.

"You truly know nothing about the Heavenly Demon Sect."

"It was indeed correct not to rashly attempt soul usurpation on you." Mo Yu remarked. This Limitless Immortal Physique appeared to be completely sealed, yet was astonishingly aware of external events. Apparently ordinary conversations could still reach her.

Sheng Kun probably didn't realize her sealing of the Limitless Immortal Physique was imperfect.

Who knew what hidden cards this physique possessed? Attempting usurpation unprepared might lead to being counter-killed.

"Do you know the Heavenly Demon Sect is divided into many factions? Do you know how these factions are distinguished?"

"By the targets of soul usurpation!"

"Different usurpation targets gradually alter a Heavenly Demon cultivator's destiny."

"For example, one faction only possesses Demonic Beasts. After multiple usurpations, their destiny changes, allowing cultivation of the Heavenly Demon immortal technique 'Demon Beast Ascension Record'."

"Another faction only possesses fetuses in the womb. Upon meeting conditions, they can cultivate the 'Samsara Heavenly Demon Scripture'."

"Compared to techniques like the Five Heavenly Demon Styles, these immortal methods are the sect's true core, never taught to ordinary disciples."

"Most Heavenly Demon Sect prodigies don't even know this."

"For ordinary talents, the sect leadership doesn't care what they possess - that's their own opportunity. The leadership only categorizes them into different factions based on final usurpation results for specialized training."

"If you follow Sheng Kun's arranged path and use her provided methods, your destiny will naturally be categorized into her faction, limited to cultivating only their faction's Heavenly Demon immortal techniques. Did your master never tell you this?"

The Limitless Immortal continued: "Within the sect, Sacred Sons and Daughters aren't determined solely by talent or strength rankings. Each faction puts forward their strongest prodigy. It's about background."

"If you're branded as part of the 'Yin-Yang Faction', you'll never qualify for Sacred Son position. Sheng Kun will forever suppress you. Your future cultivation techniques will depend entirely on her master - the ancestral elder of the Yin-Yang Heavenly Demon faction. You'll ultimately become nothing but Sheng Kun's lackey."

"Moreover, only by becoming Sacred Son/Daughter can one receive the sect's ultimate training and potentially ascend to Royal Demon Bloodline!"

"Did your master never mention any of this?"

"Then again, your master Tianchou belongs to no faction - a lone wolf who probably disregards such matters. But with his power backing you, you could establish your own usurpation faction and become a Sacred Son-level disciple. Why submit beneath Sheng Kun?"

Mo Yu fell into contemplation. So that was Sheng Kun's scheme? How pedestrian.

"Ha. I have no interest in obtaining Royal Demon Bloodline or becoming Sacred Son. I only wish to quickly help my master recover. If her scheme is merely this trivial, then regrettably, I don't mind."

"Even if branded 'Yin-Yang Faction', so long as I gain Sheng Kun's support."

"Fool!" The Limitless Immortal seethed. "A demonic cultivator pretending at master-disciple affection? Tianchou never considered your immortal path - you're just a tool for her recovery. Once healed, your affairs won't concern her."

"She might even reclaim the demonic bloodline bestowed upon you after you complete her task!"

"How many master-disciple betrayals has the Heavenly Demon Sect seen?"

"Sheng Kun wants Tianchou's successor as her pawn. Tianchou only sees you as a recovery tool. Nobody considers your immortal path. If others won't, shouldn't you?"

"For now, your best option is to possess no one - or temporarily only possess same-sex cultivators without using Sheng Kun's 'bloodline enhancement method'."

"As an outsider, even if you reach the Heavenly Demon Realm's headquarters, you'll never be valued..." Her tone suddenly softened. "Cooperate with me instead. Leave the sect. My master is deputy leader of the Cultivation Alliance. I can swear heavenly oaths - free me, and I'll recommend you for high position in the Alliance..."

Mo Yu instantly reinforced the crystal's seals, cutting off all communication.

How did this Limitless Immortal know so much about internal Heavenly Demon affairs? Though if her master was indeed the Alliance's deputy leader, such knowledge wasn't impossible.

"Sheng Kun...Yin-Yang Faction...So possessing opposite-sex bodies while using her methods would lock my destiny into only cultivating Yin-Yang Heavenly Demon techniques?" Mo Yu pondered. This indeed restricted his future cultivation path.

"What do you two think?" He mentally asked Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental.

What opinion could they have? It mattered little. Mo Yu's identity was fake anyway. Tianchou's affairs would inevitably be exposed, making any Sacred Son position impossible. Following Sheng Kun's arrangements was the only way to gain her full trust and more resource investments to become her successor in the Origin Realm.

"Don't worry, I won't be swayed by this Limitless Immortal's temptations. My life was given by my master. My own immortal path and future aren't worth considering. Even if she reclaims this demonic bloodline, I'll stop at nothing to gather more Origin Sources to heal her - repaying her nurturing kindness."

Stepping into voidspace, Mo Yu departed to seek the Slaughter Immortal Physique, disregarding the immortal's words entirely. Watching this, Ice Soul Gu could only marvel at the Heart-Beguiling Pill's potency. What master did he have? Only its true self!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 35: Sect Assembly
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 35: Sect Assembly

One month later, shocking news spread throughout the Origin Realm. The recently awakened Slaughter Immortal Physique that had troubled all factions had been captured alive by Mo Yu, the personal subordinate of Demon Emperor Tianchou.

Mo Yu had essentially gotten lucky. After months of relentless battles, even the formidable Slaughter Immortal Physique couldn't maintain peak condition indefinitely. True to form, he avoided direct confrontation, instead ambushing his target at its weakest moment to secure victory in a single strike.

After severely wounding the Slaughter Immortal Physique, Mo Yu had his Ice Soul Gu freeze it solid.

"Chose the Slaughter Immortal Physique, did he?" Though Sheng Kun wasn't specifically monitoring Mo Yu, she kept tabs on all developments in the Origin Realm. Upon learning of the capture, she immediately understood his plan - to use this body for soul usurpation practice.

"Fortunately it's a human host. Had he chosen a demonic beast or spirit, I would have needed to intervene. The Slaughter Immortal Physique isn't a bad choice actually." Sheng Kun breathed a sigh of relief.

...........

Five years passed in the blink of an eye.

While Mo Yu remained engrossed in his soul usurpation attempt, Lin Jing's true form finally emerged from seclusion. Despite the Longevity Body's notoriously difficult cultivation path, five years of bathing in copious immortal energy had propelled him to mid-stage Nascent Soul Transformation.

"Who knew soul usurpation would be so tedious..."

Emerging from his cave abode, Lin Jing shook his head upon sensing his clone still engaged in the prolonged process. He decided to leave the clone be - protected by the Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental, ordinary cultivators couldn't interfere with the soul usurpation. Even if powerful enemies attacked, Sheng Kun certainly wouldn't remain idle.

More pressing matters demanded his attention. The five-year deadline with the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices approached - this would mark his first formal assembly as Heaven-Earth Sect Master before the entire membership.

Establishing absolute authority hinged on this event. Lin Jing had prepared extensively: elevating his Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp to their limits, their bloodlines now at Emperor-grade, their Rare Beast Divine Abilities as natural as common spells with new evolutions. Most crucially, he'd cultivated an exceptionally powerful state during this period...

Beyond securing the sect's allegiance, Lin Jing harbored a hidden objective for this assembly.

"Longevity Immortal Physique."

He murmured the words. Neither the Ancient Imperial Prince nor Gu Youran possessed innate immortal physiques, yet through ancient imperial secret techniques, they'd elevated their constitutions to postnatal immortal grade. Lin Jing had obtained these methods from the First Ancient Emperor.

The core method involved terrifying amounts of world fortune combined with the imperial clan's Boundary Breaking Bird to surpass physical limits. After confronting the Demonic Sect's Sacred Son, seizing an Origin Source, and establishing the Heaven-Earth Sect, Lin Jing clearly sensed himself becoming one of the Origin Realm's protagonists, gradually earning its favor.

The slightest fortune from the Origin Realm eclipsed anything the Tianyuan Realm could offer - the difference was heaven and earth. Before losing this sensation, while his clone attempted its first physique usurpation, the sect master planned to test the ancient imperial physique technique, hoping to evolve his Longevity Body to immortal grade.

Extended lifespan would be secondary - his life essence would grow incomparably potent. If he could simultaneously obtain equally powerful death essence, he might control Celestial Beast avatars for days of continuous battle. Only then, with his true form and the Heaven-Earth Sect's spirits, would he truly qualify to challenge the Four Heavenly Kings.

"Gaining recognition as the Heaven-Earth Sect Master respected by countless spirits, leading these powerful native Origin Realm beings - the fortune I'd receive would surpass even Li Tianyi and Sheng Kun. This would fulfill one condition for cultivating the Longevity Immortal Physique."

"Without a rare beast like the Boundary Breaking Bird, breaching the Longevity Body's limits proves difficult. Fortunately, immortal energy provides alternative assistance."
