The Cultivation Alliance's Immortal Techniques Pavilion contained methods for enhancing physiques using immortal energy. Shangguan Ming of Tianming Realm had relied on this very technique combined with immortal energy to achieve postnatal immortal physique.

Few in the Cultivation Alliance had succeeded through this method - it demanded exceptional aptitude. Unsure of his own qualifications but lacking better options, Lin Jing resolved to try.

"Combining both methods to elevate the Longevity Body - success or failure hinges on this."

As he prepared to depart Xianlin City, a voice sounded in his ear:

"Junior brother, where are you going?"

"Hit a bottleneck. Going out to clear my mind."

"I see..." Li Tianyi's voice transmitted: "Then be careful. That Mo Yu reportedly captured the Slaughter Immortal Physique likely for usurpation. Should he succeed, his power will increase dramatically."

"Given your history, he'll certainly come for you. Beware his assassinations."

"Don't worry senior brother, I've already found a way to counter his assassination attempts." Lin Jing clasped his hands before departing without looking back.

...........

Half month later.

Nethersoil.

Despite Lady Nethersoil's incessant grumbling, Lin Jing and Deputy Sect Master Mountain God ultimately chose her domain for the first sect assembly. The reasoning was simple - selecting any other location would prompt her to skip the event entirely, leaving Lin Jing powerless to compel her attendance.

BOOM!

Arriving astride his pegasus-formed Dragon Carp, Lin Jing was greeted by the waiting Mountain God. "Your power has grown considerably," the deputy observed. "Planning to establish authority through strength?"

"Both kindness and severity." Lin Jing dismounted, adding: "I've prepared a grand gift for you all."

"What??" The Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices asked curiously.

Lin Jing chuckled. "A bigger, more fragrant pie guaranteed to please."

"Speaking of which... since spirits can only reproduce asexually, have you considered crossbreeding with Lady Nethersoil to produce an offspring strong enough to dominate immortal physiques?"

Deputy Mountain God stared blankly: "What exactly have you been researching all these years?!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 36: Hybrid Spirit Creature Technology
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 36: Hybrid Spirit Creature Technology

"You'll find out soon enough."

Lin Jing maintained an air of mystery, deliberately withholding information as this was his new discovery.

"Enough talk for now. You prepare for the Sect Assembly while I meet a friend."

"Oh..."

Watching Lin Jing's departing figure, the Mountain God twisted his lips: "If you won't tell me, I don't care to know. Besides, this Mountain God has no interest in that Nethersoil woman anyway. 'Mountain and Earth Mountain King' sounds so vulgar compared to 'Mountain and Sea' - though the Sea Spirit Beast is terrifying..."

Deep in the Nethersoil.

At the Saintess's residence.

A female cultivator sat meditating with a sword planted beside her.

Sensing spatial fluctuations, she quickly opened her eyes, revealing a surprised expression.

"Lin Jing."

Lin Jing approached Cold Moon Sword Immortal Feng Ning and said, "Long time no see. How's your cultivation going here?"

"Thanks to you, I don't have to maintain the grand formation like the other Nether Maidens and can focus on cultivation." Feng Ning replied.

She had been summoned alone by Lady Nethersoil and appointed as the Nethersoil Saintess, an experience that puzzled her greatly.

Only after persistent questioning did she learn that her duty as Saintess was to serve as messenger between Lady Nethersoil and Lin Jing.

It was Lin Jing's arrival and discussions with Lady Nethersoil that granted her relative freedom.

This realization shocked Feng Ning. Though she initially knew little about the Origin Realm, the other Nether Maidens were quite knowledgeable.

From them, she learned Lady Nethersoil ranked among the top-tier powerhouses beneath the Four Heavenly Kings in the Origin Realm.

Among countless spirit creatures of the Origin Realm, her strength ranked within the top ten, capable of easily suppressing ordinary immortal physiques.

Even representatives of immortal and demon factions treated Lady Nethersoil with utmost respect, given her vast supernatural abilities - including resurrecting the dead.

In such circumstances, Feng Ning saw no way to escape the fate of a Nether Maiden.

Yet at that moment, Lady Nethersoil declared: "You are now the Nethersoil Saintess, free to cultivate here and move about at will."

"What kind of deal did you strike with Lady Nethersoil?" Feng Ning asked.

Isolated in the Nethersoil, Feng Ning knew nothing of outside events or the relationship between Lady Nethersoil and Lin Jing.

She had long wondered - whether Lin Jing offered treasures or fought his way to make Lady Nethersoil concede, neither possibility seemed likely.

"You'll know soon enough." Lin Jing chuckled. "I see you've reached the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation. The cultivation environment here must be excellent. Time to leave, isn't it?"

"Yes. Using the techniques Lady Nethersoil taught and the Nether Altar's energy, my Nether Physique has reached perfection, even showing mutation tendencies." Feng Ning glanced at the distant Nether Altar.

"But dozens of Nether Maidens have all achieved perfect Nether Physiques like me. With such formidable combat potential, why does Lady Nethersoil only use them to maintain the grand formation? Just how powerful is she really..."

"She's lived tens of thousands of years as a spirit creature. Given that much time, even a dog could become divine." The Sect Master shook his head.

"Come, let's visit Lady Nethersoil."

"They should be arriving soon."

"They?" Feng Ning looked puzzled.

For ceremonial purposes, Lin Jing had Lady Nethersoil provide land and the Mountain God construct a grand hall.

Accompanied by Feng Ning, they arrived at the hall where Lady Nethersoil's avatar waited. She glared at Lin Jing irritably: "You certainly know how to create trouble. If your so-called 'surprise' disappoints me, sect master or not, I won't let you off easily."

Sect Master? What did that mean? Feng Ning felt startled.

"He loves keeping secrets." The Mountain God Deputy Sect Master arrived, saying: "The time approaches. They should arrive soon - my avatars have already met them."

This... Feng Ning observed the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices, sensing his unfathomable power.

"Thank you for your efforts."

Lin Jing expressed gratitude just as over a dozen brilliant lights emerged beyond the Nethersoil, growing increasingly radiant while carrying tremendous power. These lights converged on the hall at astonishing speed.

BOOM!

A lightning bolt arrived first - a dragon-like creature composed of magnetite crackling with electricity, its eyes blazing with domineering light.

SWISH!

Next landed an elegant flower spirit formed entirely of petals and leaves, her leafy skirt swaying as she smiled at those present.

A phoenix-like flame shadow, an elderly treant, and even the Cloud Sea itself manifested in true form, transforming the area into a fairyland.

A full dozen terrifying Nascent Soul-level spirit creatures descended, shocking Feng Ning. She could tell any single one surpassed even the Ancient Imperial Prince with his immortal physique in strength. What could bring so many formidable beings together here...

"Greetings, Sect Master, Deputy Sect Masters."

What stunned Feng Ning even more was seeing these peak Nascent Soul spirit creatures - some rivaling Void Mystical Stage cultivators - actually bowing to Lin Jing on the dais...

Still calling him Sect Master...

Stranger still, they addressed both the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices and Lady Nethersoil as Deputy Sect Masters!

Feng Ning whirled to stare at Lin Jing, utterly baffled by his schemes.

"Good to see you all again." Lin Jing smiled faintly.

"Sect Master, we heard your spirit beast was slain by a Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator during the Origin Source competition! Is this true?!" The magnetite dragon demanded, eyes scrutinizing.

Lin Jing had expected some dissatisfaction among them.

"A mere demonic cultivator poses no threat. It was merely a golden cicada shedding its shell strategy. Our Heaven-Earth Sect doesn't fight meaningless battles."

"The Sect Master possesses my Nirvana Flame - not so easily killed." The Nirvana Bird interjected.

"Then why summon us? To take revenge on the Heavenly Demon Sect?" A turtle-shaped mountain spirit asked.

Lin Jing's gaze swept across them: "No."

"I gathered you today... to strengthen the Heaven-Earth Sect."

"Our numbers remain too few. Whether compared to the Cultivation Alliance, Heavenly Demon Sect, or those two Spirit Beasts' factions, our combat power falls far short."

"These past years, I've developed a technique called Hybrid Spirit Creature Technology... which should rapidly enhance our sect's overall strength."

"I now wish to demonstrate this technique to you all - consider it your first sect benefit since joining the Heaven-Earth Sect."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 37: Reproduction is the Primary Productive Force
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 37: Reproduction is the Primary Productive Force

"Hybrid Spirit Creature Technology???"

The crowd erupted in murmurs, finding the name of this secret technique rather peculiar. What nonsense was this?

"Sect Master, instead of researching how to get us out of the Origin Realm, you're playing with this 'Hybrid Spirit Creature Technology'... Can't you focus on something more important?" complained one of the spirit creatures.

Lin Jing chuckled and said, "You'll understand once you see this."

With a wave of his hand, the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse appeared before the group of spirit creatures. Narrowing their eyes, they examined the summoned creature before them.

"Everyone," Lin Jing continued, "Do you know what an animal's most fundamental instinct is?"

"Reproduction!"

"Whether they're demonic beasts or humans, reproducing offspring to continue their species and pass on their bloodline is an absolute instinct. Demonic beasts and humans can pass down their bloodlines and power generation after generation, combining the efforts of multiple generations to accomplish something."

"Of course, this doesn't mean we can't reproduce. Using our power to enlighten similar objects around us or on our bodies, granting them independent intelligence - this is how we view reproduction. But in reality, it's not true reproduction."

"I believe most of you here don't cultivate the spirit creatures you've enlightened as successors, but merely treat them as subordinates."

"Because you know the offspring you enlighten will never surpass you in talent, potential, or future achievements. You have no expectations for them - what you can't accomplish, they certainly can't either. Continuing like this only leads to each generation becoming weaker than the last."

"This is the difference between animals and spirit creatures. When animals reproduce, even if the parents are ordinary, there's a chance for bloodline mutations. Two ordinary humans might give birth to an immortal physique, two common demonic beasts might produce offspring with kingly potential - this is one reason animals are so enthusiastic about reproduction."

"Although the Heavenly Dao didn't grant us spirit creatures this ability, in exchange, we received much longer lifespans than ordinary animals. What takes animals multiple generations to accomplish, we can achieve within our own lifespan."

"But what if I told you I have a method to allow natural spirit creatures to produce offspring with talents and potential several times superior to our own? In such cases, would you be willing to nurture them? To entrust your ambitions and will to the next generation?"

"Consider this - currently in the Origin Realm, spirit creatures stand equal to demonic beasts and humans. But that's only because you all are the first generation of spirit creatures born from the Origin Realm, the most talented. You have the strength to contend with outsiders and outlast generation after generation of human prodigies. But no matter how long your lifespans, they're not infinite. Future generations of spirit creatures born in the Origin Realm will only grow weaker."

"Meanwhile, humans and demonic beasts maintain relatively stable inheritance through reproduction. In tens of thousands of years when you've turned to dust, even if the new talents entering the realm are only at the same level as current ones, the Origin Realm will present a completely different picture. Spirit creatures will become mere materials for their pill refining and artifact forging. Competing for Origin Sources? Don't make me laugh."

"You're saying you can help us produce offspring with better talents than ourselves? Impossible!!" Even the Nethersoil Saintess voiced her doubts now, finding this increasingly hard to believe.

The spirit creatures present had all existed since ancient times, born from the mountains and rivers of the Origin Realm gaining intelligence after billions of years of nurturing. Those conditions were nearly impossible to replicate - their enlightened descendants could never surpass themselves who had undergone eons of tempering.

"That's why I mentioned needing hybridization technology!" Lin Jing said seriously.

"Just like when demonic beasts take human form and produce half-demons with humans - these hybrids inherit talents from both sides, possessing greater potential."

"Through our own enlightenment and asexual reproduction, we indeed can't produce superior offspring because everything comes solely from ourselves with no external influence to drive bloodline evolution."

"But what if different types of spirit creatures could reproduce? If a mountain god could produce offspring with shared bloodlines from a lake spirit??"

"That's even more impossible," the spirit creatures retorted. Were they being taken for fools? The theory sounded nice, but how could it be done?

"Just watch."

Lin Jing took out a red stone. "Do you know what this is?"

"Flamegold - decent spiritual properties. If tempered in spiritual flames for a thousand years, it could develop intelligence. If enlightened with immortal fire, it could immediately gain sentience and become a metal spirit creature!" the mountain god immediately identified.

Lin Jing nodded, then produced a purple-gold stone.

"Purplegold Stone! That's from my cave - when did you take it?" the Lodestone Dragon exclaimed in surprise.

Purplegold Stones formed under constant baptism of Violet Heaven Divine Lightning, containing thunder properties. The Lodestone Dragon itself was a supreme-grade Purplegold Stone that had gained intelligence. Its method of reproduction was simply using its immortal thunder power to enlighten other Purplegold Stones.

"Pine Leaf Mouse." At Lin Jing's call, the mouse jumped onto his shoulder, its eyes radiating emerald green light like glazed immortal radiance.

"Could it be..." Feng Ning, who had been observing quietly, focused intently.

As the Pine Leaf Mouse gazed at the two stones Lin Jing had placed together, something miraculous happened. Under the glow from its eyes, the two spiritual stones bizarrely merged into one - a new stone interwoven with red and purple, fire and lightning!

This scene made the spirit creatures pause in astonishment.

This was one of the new evolutions of the mouse's Glazed Immortal Eye ability after Lin Jing enhanced it with immortal energy - it could now synthesize two different resources into a brand new item.

[Blazestone: Contains powerful thunder and flame energy. When detonated, its power is limitless. After absorbing heaven and earth's spiritual energy for a hundred years, it can develop intelligence and become a living creature.]

"Everyone, I'm sure you can see the energy contained in this Blazestone far surpasses what the Flamegold and Purplegold Stone could achieve separately. They've perfectly merged without damaging the materials' inherent spirituality like refining artifacts or pills would, still retaining the potential to develop intelligence."

"Isn't this perfectly merging two types of spirit creatures?" Lin Jing chuckled. "Do you still think producing more talented offspring is just a pipe dream?"

"Imagine taking a supreme-grade mountain vein from Vice Sect Master Mountain God and a handful of supreme-grade nethersoil from Vice Sect Master Nethersoil, merging them to produce offspring - how powerful would that be..."

Lin Jing himself was already excited, having decided to hybridize a supreme-grade spirit creature for himself. He was certain these spirit creatures before him would be equally tempted.

Sure enough, every spirit creature present now had eyes glowing red and green, staring hungrily at the Pine Leaf Mouse behind Lin Jing. What kind of immortal technique was this?!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 38: Child of Fortune
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 38: Child of Fortune

"Lewd Sacrifices, let's follow the sect master's plan. I'll provide the soil, you provide the mountain - let's give this a try!"

To Lin Jing's surprise, Lady Nethersoil was actually the first to show interest in trying this.

It wasn't unreasonable for Lady Nethersoil to be tempted. Due to maintaining good cooperative relationships with various factions, she needed the most manpower.

If the spirits she personally enlightened could shoulder responsibilities, she wouldn't need to capture humans with Nether Physiques!

From another perspective, the Nethersoil Generals she personally enlightened couldn't even compare to the innate potential of humans with Nether Physiques.

Given the choice, who would bother capturing humans and nurturing outsiders when they could use their own people?

"You're really going along with this?" The Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices was startled.

"This sect master doesn't seem completely useless. Even if the plan to leave the Origin Realm fails, if he can help me produce descendants comparable to immortal physiques, I'll acknowledge him as sect master." Lady Nethersoil licked her lips.

"I was originally worried - if we really can leave the Origin Realm someday, what would happen to my territory and foundations? My useless subordinates couldn't protect them. But now there's a solution. If we can produce a talented descendant, we can entrust it to them," another spirit thought.

"Sect Master, can only spirits reproduce among themselves? If I obtain blood from Li Tianyi with his Chaotic Immortal Physique or the Sacred Son of Demons, could I produce descendants combining their bloodlines?"

The spirits' attention had completely shifted to reproduction, finding the concept novel. Several spirits who had taken a liking to each other had already decided to cooperate and produce two or three offspring together.

Lin Jing forced a smile. He wanted different spirit species to crossbreed, not for them to set their sights on humans.

Whether enlightened beings could synthesize with bloodlines was something neither Lin Jing nor the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse had tested.

"Combining different bloodlines requires massive energy consumption, so we definitely can't meet everyone's demands immediately..."

"But there's plenty of time. For the next Origin Source in five years, our Heaven-Earth Sect still won't compete. I myself don't plan to compete either. Our target is the premium Origin Source fifteen years from now."

"These fifteen years, I'll remain with Lady Nethersoil. During this period, I'll distribute reproduction opportunities based on your strength. The stronger you are, the more offspring you can produce."

"When it comes to reproduction, we'd rather have quality than quantity. We need eugenics, controlled reproduction, planned births. Let the strongest reproduce first to ensure every effort yields maximum results."

"These fifteen years, everyone should focus on improving strength - not just to earn more reproduction rights, but mainly because the battle for the premium Origin Source in fifteen years will be crucial."

"At that time, for the premium Origin Source, Sheng Kun, Li Tianyi, the two great Spirit Beasts, and many reclusive old monsters will likely join the competition. That will also be our carnival - not just for the Origin Source, but for 'superior bloodlines'!"

"In such battles, even the two great Spirit Beasts will inevitably get injured. If you can seize a meteor fragment or ocean crystal then, producing descendants inheriting their talents wouldn't be impossible. That's an opportunity - combined with your own bloodlines, you might produce offspring surpassing both Spirit Beasts in talent!"

"Even if obtaining the Spirit Beasts' bloodlines proves difficult, the quantity and quality of spirits under their command far surpass our Heaven-Earth Sect's, making them worth coveting."

Hearing this, the spirits exchanged glances. Though they understood Lin Jing aimed to strengthen the Heaven-Earth Sect by acquiring talented spirit members this way, the temptation of producing superior offspring remained immense.

In later generations, even certain humans would seek partners with higher education, intelligence, height, or fair skin to produce slightly better descendants. Now these spirits realized the other half of their offspring's genes could be obtained through plunder, making them quite excited.

Originally these lone spirit warriors had little interest in competing for Origin Sources - otherwise they would have joined the two great Spirit Beasts' factions long ago. But now they discovered the Origin Source competition was actually the perfect stage to plunder superior bloodlines.

Many spirits suddenly lost their resistance to helping the sect master compete for Origin Sources.

"So this is the so-called bigger, better carrot," the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices realized. After hearing this, even it wanted to join the Origin Source battlefield to covet some of the Sea Spirit Beast's bloodline.

Previously when the sect master produced many enlightened spirits within it, the Mountain God found them annoying because aside from causing trouble, they were useless.

But for descendants inheriting talents from the Sea Spirit Beast or Meteor Spirit Beast? The Mountain God wouldn't mind at all.

"In the coming period, everyone can prepare your own life essences."

"The first phase of the Heaven-Earth Sect meeting concludes here. I need... to enter seclusion for a while. The second meeting will be announced later."

Lin Jing waved his sleeve and turned to leave, letting the spirits freely form groups. His immediate objectives were already half accomplished.

"Farewell, Sect Master!!!"

After Lin Jing demonstrated his unique abilities and the possibility of leaving the Origin Realm, spirits who initially resisted being led by a human now set aside some prejudices, realizing the Heaven-Earth Sect could genuinely benefit them now.

Feng Ning glanced at the massive spirit group before following Lin Jing... The premium Origin Source competition in fifteen years? It seemed Lin Jing planned to use these spirits to snatch food from the tiger's mouth then.

"If before, the Heaven-Earth Sect's spirits didn't completely acknowledge me as sect master, now their respect for me has undoubtedly increased significantly."

"Now I represent the hope for spirits to leave the Origin Realm and produce more talented descendants. Spirits are nature's darlings, born of heaven and earth, part of the Origin Realm. Bound together with them, I can feel the Origin Realm's fortune rapidly gathering toward me - this fortune is unimaginably vast, far surpassing what the top rank on the Golden Ranking during the Golden Age could compare to..."

Lin Jing gasped in pleasant surprise, quickly activating his immortal physique technique to use this fortune energy to strengthen his current Longevity Physique.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 39: Longevity Immortal Physique
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 39: Longevity Immortal Physique

Inside the cave abode arranged by Lady Nethersoil for Lin Jing.

Lin Jing began his attempt to break through to the Immortal Physique realm by combining the fortune power of the Origin Realm with ancient clan secret techniques.

After undergoing the baptism of vast Origin Realm fortune, Lin Jing could clearly feel subtle changes occurring in his already perfected Longevity Body.

This change manifested in how his very essence had transformed. Previously, only his flesh and organs held unimaginable attraction for demonic beasts, capable of extending their lifespans. But now, even a single strand of his hair, a drop of his sweat, or even his breath had become priceless treasures with life-extending properties!

However, Lin Jing could only describe this state as "Half-step Peak Perfection of the Longevity Immortal Physique". There was still a gap before true transformation, with no significant increase in his lifespan yet.

"If I don't have the Boundary Breaking Bird, I'll use immortal energy instead!"

Lin Jing multitasked, simultaneously operating the ancient clan technique and the Cultivation Alliance's "Immortal Gate Mystic Arts". On one hand, he gently nourished his Longevity Body with fortune power, while on the other, he violently channeled immortal energy through his body. This energy ravaged his flesh, continuously breaking it down and reconstructing it while leaving traces of immortal essence.

These two methods for improving physical constitution were fundamentally different. One was extremely gentle but required the divine abilities of the Boundary Breaking Bird - conditions Lin Jing currently lacked. The other was brutally violent, forcing cultivators attempting to achieve Postnatal Immortal Physique to face death before rebirth, resulting in few successes and many ending severely injured or half-dead.

"Physique divine abilities..."

"Some special physiques inherently possess powerful divine abilities."

"Like the Lunar Yin Physique! Its ability manifests as phenomena."

"During my battle with Zhao Qingyue of the Zhao family's Lunar Yin Physique at Hidden Dragon Academy, she displayed the Radiant Moonlight phenomenon. I originally thought such physique abilities were exclusive to powerful divine or immortal physiques. Never expected my Longevity Body to develop one."

Lin Jing sighed emotionally.

His Longevity Body's divine ability reminded him of an ancient poem:

"The immortal touches my crown, bestowing longevity through connected fates."

This wasn't an offensive ability, but it allowed Lin Jing to tap into the life potential of those below his cultivation level, extending their lifespans.

An unexpected gain, but not what he currently needed most. As he continued, even his enhanced body began cracking under the immortal energy's violent assault. Precious Longevity Blood seeped from his splitting skin, nose and mouth.

"Such waste..."

"This can't continue."

"The Dragon Carp is suffering too much." Even though Lin Jing transferred half the pain to his Dragon Carp through beast-taming arts, he still gritted his teeth in agony, realizing he couldn't sustain this - he was growing weaker.

He decided to take another risky approach, using a third method to enhance his Longevity Physique for mutual nourishment.

"Pine Leaf Mouse..." Lin Jing called out. Watching her master spraying blood like a fountain, the Pine Leaf Mouse swallowed hard with tremendous willpower before obediently collecting each drop of spilled Longevity Blood.

Using her Glazed Immortal Eye ability, she synthesized countless blood droplets to enhance their quality.

Then Lin Jing reinfused the enhanced Longevity Blood back into his body.

............

"What the hell is that noise?"

Lady Nethersoil's consciousness rose, sensing disturbances from the secluded cultivation site she prepared for the sect master.

Although this location was directly beneath her, Lin Jing had isolated it using several dragon veins and seven quasi-immortal artifacts, making it nearly imperceptible.

But as time passed, the commotion inside could no longer be concealed by ordinary barriers. Lady Nethersoil's keen senses detected terrifying life source energy brewing within.

As a spirit specializing in death dao, her death source power rivaled immortal physiques, far surpassing the death essence within the Undying Black Serpent. This was why she was nearly unkillable and could even resurrect others.

Precisely because death and life reflect each other, Lady Nethersoil could acutely sense that Lin Jing's cultivation site was nurturing life source energy even more powerful than her death essence.

"Could it be...?!"

She suddenly remembered - Lin Jing possessed the Longevity Body. Normally, only one possibility could cause such a sudden surge in life source energy... he must have achieved Postnatal Immortal Physique, evolving his Longevity Body into a Longevity Immortal Physique!

"How is this possible? Can the Longevity Body truly reach immortal physique level?"

Though not an outer realm cultivator herself, Lady Nethersoil regularly dealt with top talents from beyond this realm. Through their exchanges and extracting memories from the deceased, she possessed extensive knowledge of both inner and outer realms. Yet she'd never heard of Longevity Body reaching immortal physique level - even normal perfected Longevity Bodies were rare outside this realm.

"Vice Sect Master... standing guard for me?"

After Lady Nethersoil had been secretly observing for some time, a hearty laugh suddenly came from within the barrier. Lin Jing emerged in white robes.

Though his life aura had now withdrawn, Lady Nethersoil's eyes narrowed - she was certain his physique had undergone another transformation!

"Longevity Immortal Physique? Congratulations, Sect Master," Lady Nethersoil said.

"Perhaps. Without precedent, I'm not certain what level I've reached," Lin Jing smiled faintly. He only knew his Longevity Body had truly transformed under the triple reinforcement, and his current lifespan was a hundred times that of normal cultivators at his level.

Far exceeding a perfected Longevity Body.

This might indeed qualify as Longevity Immortal Physique.

Normal Nascent Soul Transformation cultivators lived about 2,500 years, but Lin Jing conservatively estimated his lifespan had reached 200,000 to 300,000 years.

Even with the Longevity Body's slow cultivation speed, this duration was enough for even a dog to achieve ascension - truly worthy of being called an immortal physique.

This terrifying vitality frightened even Lin Jing himself. After all, only 100,000 years had passed since the ascension channels closed. With his current lifespan, barring accidents, he could witness entire eras unfold.

"Vice Sect Master, I've exhausted all my immortal energy enhancing my physique. Since you regularly interact with the Cultivation Alliance and Heavenly Demon Sect, you must have accumulated considerable Origin Sources and immortal energy. Could you lend some to your sect master?"

"Also, my Life-Death Primordial Spirit is now severely imbalanced with excessive life force. Do you happen to have any death source cultivation techniques?" Lin Jing asked earnestly.

"You little..." Lady Nethersoil nearly cursed, remembering their agreement about not taking even a needle from her as merely an honorary vice sect master. But before she could finish, Lin Jing continued:

"I'll first have the Pine Leaf Mouse help you conceive eighteen children. Of course, the immortal energy consumed for the immortal techniques will need to be replenished by you, Vice Sect Master."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 40: Slaughter Heavenly Demon
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 40: Slaughter Heavenly Demon

Time flowed on, five years later.

A new Origin Source was about to be born. Regardless of whether the cultivators from various factions were prepared, the march of time never stopped. The time of the millennial war was drawing ever closer.

"The Origin Source has been born!!!"

One day, a ray of immortal light streaked across the sky like a thunderclap illuminating all directions.

Seeing the light, many prodigies surged forward. Unlike last time when the ocean spirit beasts enjoyed overwhelming advantage, this top-tier Origin Source appeared in a desolate land, so almost no one could seize it easily.

"Ten more years."

In Xianlin City, Li Tianyi stood among the clouds wearing a white Dao robe. His eyes were filled with the chaos box, knowing that the time for his departure was drawing near.

"Let’s see how that guy performs." On a broken fragment of void, Sheng Kun showed a feminized expression of his initial form in this no-man’s land. He closed his eyes, uncertain how Mo Yu’s soul usurpation was progressing.

a stone figure full of pits and hollows, with faint starlight spreading over its surface, quietly sat upon the throne of stars, bathing in the boundless starlight.

"Let her... come in." The stone figure spoke calmly, looking at the approaching subordinate. The silver-white rock hound immediately prostrated itself, then exited the hall.

After a moment,

a creature resembling an ice sea angel slowly descended into the grand hall of the Meteor Spirit Beast. Its entire body was semi-transparent, and at the center of its transparent form was a sea-blue crystal. It fluttered transparent wings as it descended from the sky.

"Canghai."

"State your purpose."

The Meteor Spirit Beast looked at the Sea Spirit Beast... As the two strongest spirit beasts in the Origin Realm, they rarely met except to compete for critical Origin Sources, and their relationship was far from cordial.

"This time, I want to cooperate with you, first driving out the two human fellows to prevent unexpected changes," said the Sea Spirit Beast in a voice that was indistinguishable in gender. "You must have sensed it as well.

The Origin Realm’s fortune energy is transferring strangely. My divination-specialized subordinates have deduced that some humans are devouring this fortune."

"You are more skilled in deduction;
you shouldn’t fail to perceive this. If this continues, with gains and losses opposing each other, it will be extremely unfavorable for the war ten years from now."

"Therefore, I propose... before the birth of the top-tier Origin Source, we launch a surprise attack on the Cultivation Alliance and the Heavenly Demon Sect, forcing Ji Tianyi and Sheng Kun out of this world. When the top-tier Origin Source is born, you and I can then compete fairly."

"Indeed strange..." The Meteor Spirit Beast slowly spoke, "The Origin Realm’s fortune energy has always favored the spirit beasts born from the Origin Realm’s heaven and earth. How exactly are these humans snatching the fortune that originally belonged to us?"

"Although it’s not serious now, over time, the consequences will be unimaginable..."

"You attack Sheng Kun;
I will attack Li Tianyi," said the Sea Spirit Beast. "Unlike before, this millennium sees the Heavenly Demon Sect and Cultivation Alliance in a shortage of talent. Only Sheng Kun and Li Tianyi are human prodigies capable of bearing great responsibilities..."

"Besides these two, there are no Nascent Soul prodigies from outside the Origin Realm who can threaten us."

"Even if we end up severely wounded after battling them, no other human prodigies can take advantage of the situation."

.........

When the two little spirit beasts met, it was also the most heated phase of the Origin Source scramble. Ocean spirit beasts, star realm spirit beasts, Heavenly Demon cultivators, alliance cultivators, and various scattered cultivators all fought fiercely around that Origin Source.

"Is there no one who can control the immortal gate this time like last time?"

"My pet was killed, and my primordial source damaged. Without decades of recuperation, recovery is impossible."

"It must be that treacherous Mo Yu! He suddenly appeared and ambushed the Slaughter Immortal Physique! That guy is shameless, only knows how to ambush."

"He captured the Slaughter Immortal Physique alive, definitely for soul usurpation. Soul usurpation consumes enormous energy. Even if successful, adapting to the new body takes a long time. If I were him, I would consolidate for a long time before risking anything. Moreover, whether he can usurp successfully is another matter."

Every century, several exaggerated prodigies would appear. This century, they were Mo Yu and Lin Jing. Fortunately for the Origin Realm, these two seemed unable to emerge for a while.

However,

the cultivators of the Origin Realm still underestimated Mo Yu’s soul usurpation speed. Normally, soul usurpation is extremely energy- and time-consuming. Even Heavenly Demon cultivators need time to digest new power.

But Mo Yu was special. With the help of the Ice Soul Gu, his progress was astonishingly fast. The innate talent of the Gu insect was to control others’ bodies, and with Ice Soul Gu’s assistance, Mo Yu’s soul usurpation was not very dangerous.

The side effects of usurping the Slaughter Immortal Physique—massive heart demon power and killing intent backlash—were exactly restrained by Mo Yu’s inherently pure divine body.

So...

puff

On the battlefield of the Origin Source scramble, as a streak of light cut across the void, several cultivators were forced to exit their primordial spirits, watching in horror as a newly cut void rift to the Origin Source appeared, all staring toward one direction.

"Who!!"

"This Origin Source... is mine." On the void path, a figure in black clothes and red hair slowly descended. Many cultivators’ pupils constricted in disbelief upon seeing the familiar figure.

"Are you kidding? So soon..." Yan Yunshuang of the Cultivation Alliance stared at Mo Yu in shock. In just a few years, Mo Yu not only successfully usurped the Slaughter Immortal Physique but completely assimilated its power.

That sword just now didn’t attack anyone, but its killing intent made many cultivators feel death’s threat. Without thinking, they abandoned their physical bodies and fled, although the attack wouldn’t have harmed them.

Faced with the even more terrifying Mo Yu, many cultivators broke out in cold sweat. The Slaughter Immortal Physique had already thrown the Origin Realm into chaos years ago. This demon who usurped it was clearly more dreadful.

Not to mention other factions, even several Demon Stars from the Heavenly Demon Sect present looked grim. Even if Mo Yu seized the Origin Source, it had nothing to do with them. Only Sheng Kun’s Heavenly Demon Hundred Generals present showed joy.

They belonged to the same interest group as Mo Yu and knew this was the successor sought by the Holy Son!

If nothing unexpected happened, once the Holy Son departed, the person they would swear allegiance to would be Mo Yu.

Therefore, the stronger Mo Yu became, the happier they were.

"Fully developed demon bloodline, Slaughter Immortal Physique..."

After a long time, in the Star Dust Realm, upon learning that this Origin Source was obtained by a Heavenly Demon cultivator, the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast were unconcerned. Although Mo Yu’s talent potential was strong, it was far from threatening them.

They could even hand the problem to their core followers to handle.

As the millennial war approached, under their orders, in recent decades, no truly powerful spirit beast general had appeared to fight over this ordinary Origin Source, all conserving strength and awaiting the war.

Compared to the top-tier Origin Source, this ordinary one was nothing.

This Mo Yu... they planned to deal with him during the upcoming strikes.

"Awaken the army..."

Under the awakening of the two great spirit beasts, countless “same-species descendants” sleeping within the empty shells of the Origin Source began to awaken.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 41: Demon Emperor
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 41: Demon Emperor

"You... have improved."

When Mo Yu and Sheng Kun met again after ten years, Sheng Kun was particularly pleased to see Mo Yu's significant increase in strength.

With the Millennium War approaching, the stronger Mo Yu became, the more helpful he would be to her.

When the time came, it would be a battle of "king versus king" among the Four Heavenly Kings, but even the minor players could be troublesome. Having enough powerful followers to deal with the enemy's followers was equally crucial.

After all, one should never underestimate weak followers—the power of "formations" was exceptionally formidable. When enough cultivators combined their strength, they could deliver a fatal blow even to high-level cultivators.

"How does soul usurpation feel?"

"With the cultivation technique you gifted me, my bloodline strength has improved significantly."

"Haha, naturally." Seeing that Mo Yu had indeed used the technique she gave him to begin refining his destiny, Sheng Kun was even more satisfied.

Once he usurped the Limitless Immortal Physique next time, the terrifying power of the physique would shape the yin aspect.

"If luck is on your side during the next usurpation, your demonic bloodline should also reach perfection."

"Take this." Sheng Kun waved her arm and tossed a piece of immortal stone toward him.

"This is..." Seeing the Origin Source she threw at him, Mo Yu looked surprised.

He could sense that this Origin Source was vastly different from the ones he had seized before!

"This Origin Source is a rare treasure. Only one appears in the Origin Realm every century. Use it for cultivation."

"And this!"

Sheng Kun then took out a formation banner and said, "This is an immortal artifact—a Time Dao artifact. It doesn’t require a cultivator’s energy to activate, but it needs Origin Source as fuel. Once activated, no matter where you are, it can alter the flow of time inside and outside the banner."

"In ten years, a supreme-grade Origin Source will emerge. I’ll lend you this artifact for ten years. With this rare Origin Source, I want you to successfully usurp the 'Limitless Immortal Physique' and perfect your demonic bloodline within this decade. Can you do it?"

Sheng Kun’s generosity shocked Mo Yu. Even though he knew she was scheming to permanently bind him to her faction, seeing this rare Origin Source and the immortal artifact left him speechless.

"Thank you, Holy Son. I won’t disappoint you."

......

Sheng Kun had no choice but to invest the rare Origin Source and immortal artifact in Mo Yu. She estimated she had at most ten years left.

After ten years, regardless of whether she succeeded in seizing the millennium supreme-grade Origin Source, she would no longer be able to stay in the Origin Realm.

By then, the Heavenly Demon Sect would undoubtedly spend enormous resources to cultivate a new Holy Son or Holy Daughter-level figure to replace her in guarding the Origin Realm.

But which faction that person would belong to was uncertain.

Currently, as the overseer of the Origin Realm, the Yin-Yang Heavenly Demon Faction reaped countless benefits and absorbed vast amounts of immortal energy. But once she left, those advantages would vanish.

"I hope... you won’t let me down."

Sheng Kun summoned a leader and had them temporarily break through to the Void Mystical Stage using the Heavenly Demon Physique, leaving the Origin Realm to report the current situation back to the Yin-Yang Demon City.

......

Heavenly Demon Realm.

The sky was perpetually dark, occasionally streaked with blood-red lightning.

The Yin-Yang Demon City, as the territory of the Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor, was a formidable force within the Heavenly Demon Sect of the Heavenly Demon Realm.

At this moment, as a teleportation formation flashed within the city, a purple-haired female cultivator descended. Upon arrival, she immediately traversed the void and arrived outside the palace of the Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor.

"Disciple Mo Lin has brought important intelligence from the Origin Realm. I request an audience with the Ancestor!"

"The Ancestor is in seclusion. No visitors." Two demonic dragon guards glanced at the female cultivator and shooed her away.

"I come on behalf of Holy Son Sheng Kun to request an audience with the Ancestor..." the purple-haired cultivator insisted.

The demonic dragons looked impatient...

"Let her approach." Just then, an aged female voice echoed from within the palace. Seeing this, the guarding demonic dragons stepped aside, and the purple-haired Mo Lin let out a relieved sigh before entering the palace.

Inside the palace, a white-haired old woman leaned on an immortal artifact-grade cane, eyeing the entering cultivator. "What business does Sheng Kun have sending you here?"

"Greetings, Ancestor." The purple-haired cultivator immediately knelt. "The Holy Son has found a successor in the Origin Realm and seeks your support."

"A successor?" The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor shook her head. The Yin-Yang Demon City had controlled the Origin Realm for so long that other factions would likely not allow it to remain in their hands.

She hadn’t even planned to continue meddling in the Origin Realm after Sheng Kun’s return. Yet, her disciple refused to let go—even going so far as to cultivate a so-called successor.

Even she would struggle to nurture another figure like Sheng Kun. What was her disciple thinking?

Her support would likely be useless.

"This individual is of demonic bloodline, not just an ordinary Heavenly Demon Sect prodigy!" Mo Lin reported. "He is the inheritor of Demon Emperor Tianchou!!! Having mastered the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path, his talent, potential, and strength are all extraordinary."

"Demon Emperor Tianchou?!" The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor froze in shock.

Mo Lin continued, "After disappearing into the Star Abyss, Demon Emperor Tianchou did not die but instead fell into a remote cultivation world to recover. The inheritor was trained there and sent to the Origin Realm to gather Origin Sources to aid her recovery."

"The Holy Son believes this is an excellent opportunity to potentially ally with the notoriously solitary Demon Emperor Tian—"

"Stop!" The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor cut her off, her expression suspicious. "Demon Emperor Tianchou is currently recovering in a remote cultivation world? And sent an inheritor to the Origin Realm to gather Origin Sources for her?"

Mo Lin hesitated, then nodded.

The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor scoffed. "Nonsense! Half a year ago, Demon Emperor Tianchou returned to the Heavenly Demon Realm completely unharmed—she was merely lost in the Star Abyss for countless years!!!"

Of course, this news... was still known to very few. The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor’s expression darkened with suspicion.

Ignoring Mo Lin’s confusion, she felt something was amiss and quickly closed her eyes, projecting her consciousness across the Heavenly Demon Realm until she locked onto a sword-filled domain.

"Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor?" Within the sword domain, a woman with disheveled black hair sat cross-legged among countless broken blades, her sharp eyes opening.

"What do you want?"

"Demon Emperor Tianchou, did you train an inheritor and send them to the Origin Realm?"

"Inheritor?" Demon Emperor Tianchou said coolly, "I have no inheritor."

The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor’s expression darkened. "My disciple claims a demon-blooded cultivator wielding the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path is posing as your inheritor, using your name to gather Origin Sources in the Origin Realm... You truly don’t know this person?"

Demon Emperor Tianchou also paused, then laughed. "It seems someone took advantage of my absence to deceive you all under the guise of being my inheritor. How amusing—they even fabricated my Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path..."

BOOM.

The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor’s consciousness returned, her terrifying gaze fixed on the now-frightened Mo Lin.

"That fool Sheng Kun was deceived and didn’t even realize it! Whoever this impostor is, whatever their ambitions, daring to scam the Yin-Yang Demon City means they have a death wish! Tell Sheng Kun—if she can’t deal with this person, don’t bother returning!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 42: Assassination Attempt
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 42: Assassination Attempt

The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor flew into a rage, determined to eliminate Lin Jing.

"Reactivate the Origin Realm teleportation array and deliver my decree to Sheng Kun!"

"Yes..."

Mo Lin lowered her head in fear, never expecting things to unfold this way.

Not long after.

The Yin-Yang Demon Ancestor gathered several ordinary Seeking the Way cultivators and reopened a passage to the Origin Realm.

Mo Lin had originally left the Origin Realm through the Heavenly Demon Physique. Though her cultivation had regressed, she remained at the Nascent Soul Transformation stage and could return.

Upon arrival, she rushed anxiously toward the Holy Son's location, equal parts frantic and terrified.

Sheng Kun, who had been meditating amidst floating void rocks, frowned at his subordinate's abrupt intrusion.

"Back so soon?"

"What did our venerable master say?"

He found it strange—for something as significant as selecting a successor, he'd assumed the master would deliberate extensively with various factions. Yet barely any time had passed.

"Holy Son! Emergency report! Half a year ago, Demon Emperor Tianchou returned to the demon realm. Rumors say she wasn't injured abroad, and the ancestor confirmed she never took any disciples. That Mo Yu... is an impostor! Likely a Cultivation Alliance spy!!!" Mo Lin shouted excitedly, presenting the ancestor's decree.

BOOM!!!

The next instant, meteorites exploded throughout the void chamber as terrifying demonic energy erupted from Sheng Kun's body. His expression remained blank, yet Mo Lin felt an overwhelming pressure threatening to shatter heaven and earth.

"Is that so..." Sheng Kun spoke icily.

"The ancestor orders... the Holy Son must execute this impostor, strip his demonic bloodline... and return it to the demon city," Mo Lin whispered.

"Now that I think about it, I acted too hastily. Because Li Tianyi gained a powerful ally, I let my guard down completely against this so-called 'heir of Demon Emperor Tianchou'..."

"Mo Yu... you dared deceive me. Now... have you thought about how you want to die?"

Having just gifted Mo Yu the century-spanning Origin Source treasure and the spacetime banner artifact—both immensely valuable even to Yin-Yang Demon City—only to receive this shocking report, Sheng Kun could no longer contain his fury.

"I'll be right back."

His figure vanished instantly, tracing the mark he'd left on the artifact to hunt Mo Yu down.

Meanwhile, Mo Yu had just returned to Dragon Spine Snow Mountain, the territory he'd seized from the Snow God.

He had no particular requirements for cultivation sites—choosing this location solely for the Ice Soul Gu's feeding convenience.

Around the mountain, they'd previously set up multiple protective arrays for safer soul usurpation of the Slaughter Immortal Physique. These arrays now served to shield Mo Yu.

While Mo Yu specialized in assassination, Sheng Kun surpassed him in this art.

Just as Mo Yu began studying the spacetime banner, he suddenly sensed the arrays being breached at terrifying speeds—one layer, two layers, eight layers—shattered effortlessly as if nonexistent. A chill deeper than the mountain's frost shot through his mind.

"RUN!!"

His two external brains—the Ice Soul Gu and Spirit Mushroom—screamed in alarm. But the enraged Sheng Kun had already unleashed his full power.

This apex-level strength of the Origin Realm was beyond what ordinary cultivators could withstand.

BANG!!!

The void before Mo Yu exploded as a colossal finger projection stabbed toward him. In an instant, Mo Yu understood the gap between them.

"You—"

His perfected Slaughter Immortal Physique detonated instantly.

The invincible body obtained through soul usurpation crumbled within moments.

Fortunately, the array breach warning gave Mo Yu enough reaction time for his Heavenly Demon primordial spirit to evade the lethal strike.

The Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental fused with the fleeing primordial spirit, swallowing hard as they faced Sheng Kun's approach—realizing their cover might be blown.

Without fully restoring Mo Yu's memories, they forcibly controlled his spirit and fled.

As long as the mountain remains, firewood will never be scarce—losing a physical body meant little.

For Heavenly Demon cultivators, the primordial spirit held everything—bloodline essence, even the stolen Slaughter Immortal Physique's origin power.

They could always seize another body later.

The Ice Soul Gu immediately activated one of its copied artifacts from the main body—the randomly teleporting Celestial Palace Compass!

"Trying to escape?"

Seeing Mo Yu's spirit abandon its body, Sheng Kun snorted coldly and moved to intercept—when suddenly his expression changed drastically. A streak of starlight came crashing toward him from the heavens.

"Meteor Spirit Beast?!"

Confused why this entity would suddenly attack to aid Mo Yu's escape, Sheng Kun had no choice but to devote full attention to blocking the strike from this being whose foundations surpassed his own!

"Eh?" This unexpected assistance shocked the Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental. They'd doubted their chances against Sheng Kun, yet now had time for the Ice Soul Gu to spit silk threads and retrieve the banner artifact planted on the mountain before teleporting away!

"My timing seems impeccable."

The Meteor Spirit Beast chuckled at Sheng Kun—whose unstable cultivation fluctuated dangerously from emotional overexertion. Without needing to engineer an assassination opportunity, Sheng Kun now risked involuntary breakthrough to the Void Mystical Stage from failed cultivation control, which would expel him from the Origin Realm.

"Damn it!"

Sheng Kun's face darkened further. He even began suspecting Mo Yu wasn't a Cultivation Alliance spy, but rather the Meteor Spirit Beast's plant. Given how long this entity had existed in the Origin Realm, creating a fake demonic cultivator seemed plausible.

Regardless, Sheng Kun's mind was in turmoil. Mishandling this might brand him a traitor to Yin-Yang Demon City and burden his master greatly.

"Emotions controlled me again," he muttered bitterly. He should've pretended ignorance to lull Mo Yu into complacency before striking—not attacked recklessly in rage and allowed escape.

Before engaging the Meteor Spirit Beast, Sheng Kun issued a kill order against Mo Yu through the Holy Son Decree, mobilizing all Heavenly Demon Sect elites.

In primordial spirit form, Mo Yu was at his weakest—with less than 10% combat power. Even an ordinary Demon Star could eliminate him now.

"Meteor, clever move. I never imagined native Origin Realm spirits would extend their reach into Heavenly Demon Sect affairs..." Sheng Kun glared coldly at the stone figure while gripping his decree.

Meteor Spirit Beast: "Huh?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 43: Demon Sect''s Wanted Order
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 43: Demon Sect's Wanted Order

["Mo Yu, the inheritor of Demon Emperor Tianchou, is actually a spy planted by the Cultivation Alliance and Origin Realm spirits within the Heavenly Demon Sect. By the authority of the Sacred Son, I hereby issue a wanted order - any encounter with this person's Primordial Spirit must result in immediate annihilation!!!"]

["All Heavenly Demon Sect members must act immediately! Whatever you're currently doing, cease at once and begin searching for this escaped Primordial Spirit!!!"]

["This person's Primordial Spirit contains the essence of demonic bloodline. Whoever kills them and extracts this bloodline essence will receive my personal guarantee as Sacred Son to undergo demonic blood transformation and become a true demon!!!"]

At this moment, all Heavenly Demon Sect members across the Origin Realm received this shocking message. None could believe that the seemingly invincible inheritor of Demon Emperor Tianchou who had just seized the Origin Source was actually an impostor spy!!!

"Primordial Spirit?"

Some demonic geniuses' eyes gleamed with understanding - clearly Sacred Son Sheng Kun had already battled Mo Yu and severely wounded them, leaving only a fleeing Primordial Spirit.

While few would dare pursue Mo Yu at full strength, hunting down a damaged Primordial Spirit was an entirely different matter.

Meanwhile...

"What happened? Sacred Son Sheng Kun just lent us precious Origin Sources and immortal artifacts, yet suddenly saw through our disguise within moments!!!"

Lin Jing realized the Mo Yu identity was now useless. He analyzed carefully but found no flaws in their cover - they'd even cultivated the secret Yin-Yang Heavenly Demon technique Sheng Kun gifted them, permanently locking the avatar onto the demonic path.

"No idea," said the Ice Soul Gu. "Regardless, these years as spies weren't wasted - we actually profited. So what if we're exposed?"

It gleefully examined its masterpiece... the temporarily borrowed immortal artifact now permanently in their possession.

"Could Demon Emperor Tianchou have survived and returned to the Heavenly Demon Realm, exposing us?" murmured the little mushroom.

"Enough speculation. Let's reunite with the main body," Lin Jing sighed. Plans had changed - while they hadn't achieved the original goal of succeeding Sheng Kun to command the Origin Realm's Heavenly Demon Sect, the results weren't bad.

Precious Origin Sources... time-path immortal artifacts... even a sealed Limitless Immortal Physique in their storage.

"Where is this place... seems safe enough." The Primordial Spirit surveyed its surroundings.

As Sheng Kun predicted, the avatar was severely wounded with less than 10% combat power remaining. However, with the Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental's assistance, random nobodies still couldn't threaten them.

Still, the avatar's Primordial Spirit urgently needed a safe location to seize a new body.

After memory restoration, taking over the Limitless Immortal Physique was impossible - she was the Cultivation Alliance Vice-Leader's disciple. Since Lin Jing wasn't truly demonic, possessing her would mean angering both the Heavenly Demon Realm and Cultivation Alliance simultaneously.

In that scenario, no realm across existence would shelter Lin Jing - he'd become an enemy of all worlds.

......

Nether King.

At the boundary between life and death, Lin Jing's main body hovered in meditation, enveloped by opposing life and death energies. For five years, he'd studied Lady Nethersoil's signature technique - "Nether Domain".

When activated, this domain allowed Lady Nethersoil to perceive the "thread of life and death" connecting all living beings within range. This death thread didn't represent an entire lifespan - within the domain's bounds, she could arbitrarily sever it to deliver judgment.

When pressed by the Ice Soul Gu for methods to cultivate death essence, Lady Nethersoil had no choice but to teach this technique.

Mastering Nether Domain meant comprehending the Dao of Death. Though she taught it, Lady Nethersoil never believed Lin Jing could succeed.

"Your death energy originates from an incomplete rare beast's death essence, while your life energy has evolved to immortal physique level. I suggest simply reforging your Primordial Spirit rather than pursuing the Life-Death Primordial Spirit path."

"Developing your life energy to its peak would be far easier."

"Stubbornly pursuing perfection will only waste countless years!"

"Do I seem lacking in time?" Lin Jing's simple reply preceded five years of contemplation. Unknown to Lady Nethersoil, mastering Nether Domain alone would indeed have been difficult.

But Lin Jing possessed the Bodhi Tree. Especially now that the Pine Leaf Mouse could perform secondary synthesis, dramatically enhancing synthesized items' quality.

Moreover, with immortal energy fueling the process, synthesis proceeded astonishingly fast as long as energy supplies lasted.

Initially, Lin Jing considered having his main body mimic the avatar - freeloading from the Cultivation Alliance while coaxing investments from Young Alliance Master Li Tianyi. But after becoming Heaven-Earth Sect's sect master, he discovered these spirit creatures were equally wealthy.

Take Lady Nethersoil - though never actively competing for Origin Sources, countless transactions with various factions meant her immortal energy reserves rivaled Li Tianyi's.

By helping these spirits reproduce offspring, the Pine Leaf Mouse and Lin Jing achieved energy independence, eliminating any need to loiter around Xianlin City before Li Tianyi.

"After five years of study, this Nether Domain finally takes shape." Lin Jing licked his lips. With massive Bodhi leaf assistance, he'd mastered one of Lady Nethersoil's signature techniques.

However, post-mastery, Lin Jing realized Nether Domain wasn't as invincible as imagined. Against beings with sufficiently "hard fates", their death threads couldn't be easily severed - making it more of a bullying technique against weaker opponents.

Fortunately, mastering Nether Domain and fusing with the Death Gu genuinely balanced Lin Jing's Life-Death Primordial Spirit, eliminating previous activation difficulties.

This marked Lin Jing's life-death energies reaching new heights, allowing easier control of the immortal ox corpse for prolonged battles. His main body now preliminarily qualified to challenge the Four Heavenly Kings.

Only one regret remained... the avatar's unsatisfactory progress.

"Time to retrieve the avatar. With ten years remaining until the Millennium War, we must find a suitable immortal physique for possession."

Yet why would the Meteor Spirit Beast attack Sheng Kun now? Did it not fear mutual destruction allowing the Sea Spirit Beast to profit? Unless... the Sea Spirit Beast planned to move early as well?

Lin Jing's gaze intensified toward Xianlin City. If so...

Perfect! He needed to hurry and intervene!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 44: Realm in Chaos
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 44: Realm in Chaos

The moment the Meteor Spirit Beast attacked Sheng Kun, all cultivators in Xianlin City witnessed an unforgettable and shocking scene.

Above the city, countless clouds and water vapor condensed into a massive whirlpool, from which dazzling golden seawater cascaded down, illuminating the entire sky.

"This is..."

The city guards turned pale with fright as they watched the golden seawater rapidly corrode the protective formation that had been reinforced by generations of the Cultivation Alliance's prodigies.

"Enemy attack!!!"

The alarm spread throughout the city, rousing countless cultivators.

Compared to Sheng Kun, Li Tianyi's cultivation realm was far more unstable—a fact well-known throughout the Origin Realm.

For this reason, Li Tianyi had been in seclusion in Xianlin City. While it appeared he was guarding the city, in truth, the city was also protecting him, preventing enemies from disturbing him.

"Sea Spirit Beast..."

At the peak of the White Jade Tower, Li Tianyi gazed at the celestial phenomenon in the distance, his expression grave.

"Attacking ahead of schedule? Has something unexpected happened?" He was deeply puzzled. This was far from the optimal time for the Sea Spirit Beast to strike, as Li Tianyi could leverage the city's numerous formations and immortal artifacts—making Xianlin City a fortress.

Unless...

Boom!

In the next instant, Li Tianyi noticed a flash of light in the sky. A colossal comet, composed of ice, dust, and rock, descended from the starry void toward the Origin Realm's continent—directly targeting Xianlin City. His expression darkened.

"The two Spirit Beasts... have joined forces."

While the Cultivation Alliance's stronghold was indeed difficult to assault, Sheng Kun, being nomadic, had no fixed location to defend. Xianlin City, however, was a sitting duck.

If that massive comet struck, the consequences would be unimaginable. Even if shattered, the water spiritual energy within would greatly empower the invading sea monsters...

At this moment... chaos erupted in Xianlin City as cultivators emerged from their seclusion, abandoning their cultivation.

"What's happening?"

Inside the city, a group of cultivators from the Tianyuan Realm quickly gathered—Gu Xinghe, Gu Youran, Xu Qingyao, and others.

"What else? The Sea Spirit Beast is attacking," Wan Renzong couldn't help but remark.

"Should we join the Cultivation Alliance in defending the city?" asked Lu Qi, the Dao Child of the Spirit Dao Sect.

"Logically speaking, we haven't formally joined the Cultivation Alliance and have no obligation to fight alongside them," Dao Hui the monk clasped his hands together.

"This battle is perilous. The Origin Realm's beasts came prepared. We should prioritize our safety and avoid getting entangled in this conflict."

"Tch." Gu Xinghe glanced coldly at the bald monk. "Easy for you to say. Look outside—the city is completely surrounded by the 'Heavenly River.' Do you think you can leave?"

Torrential rain poured over Xianlin City as hordes of sea monsters emerged from the downpour. Under Yan Yunshuang's command, the city's cultivators launched a counterattack.

With no way out, the Tianyuan Realm cultivators had no choice but to join the resistance.

---

Several days earlier...

The Heavenly Demon's primordial spirit, the Ice Soul Gu, and the Spell Elemental reunited with Lin Jing's true form outside the Nethersoil. Lin Jing first sealed his avatar's primordial spirit within his body before merging the Ice Soul Gu and Spell Elemental into himself.

The legacy they brought back was also fully absorbed by Lin Jing.

The Time Dao Immortal Banner, precious Origin Sources, and the Limitless Immortal Physique!

The Time Dao Immortal Banner bore Sheng Kun's mark. The moment Lin Jing obtained it, he sealed it away to prevent Sheng Kun from tracking him.

He attempted to erase the mark but failed.

Until Sheng Kun left the Origin Realm, the banner couldn't be used—lest it draw unwanted attention.

"Sect Master!!"

Lady Nethersoil sensed the disturbance and arrived promptly. "Recently, deaths in the Origin Realm have spiked. Reports suggest the two Spirit Beasts attacked the Heavenly Demon Sect and the Cultivation Alliance. The prelude to the Millennium War has begun earlier than expected."

"Since you've emerged from seclusion, Sect Master, do you have plans?"

"Should our Heaven-Earth Sect make a move?"

"No moves." Lin Jing hovered mid-air, gazing toward the Cultivation Alliance's direction. "All of you should wait and observe..."

"I'll go take a look myself."

"But the elders are eager to scavenge corpses! To attack Xianlin City, the Sea Spirit Beast mobilized countless monsters!!" Lady Nethersoil grew anxious.

"Among them is a creature called 'Yellow Spring'—its bloodline is highly compatible with mine. If we could obtain its genes..."

"Besides, Li Tianyi's battle with the Sea Spirit Beast presents a golden opportunity."

"Sect Master, don't tell me you plan to hoard the materials and sell them to us later?"

"You all... what do you take me for?" Lin Jing sighed. The grandiose promises he'd made to these spirit creatures years ago were now coming back to bite him.

Lin Jing worried that revealing the Heaven-Earth Sect too soon would invite trouble. The outcome of the war between the Sea Spirit Beast and the Cultivation Alliance mattered little to him. Even if Li Tianyi were forced to leave the Origin Realm, it wouldn't affect Lin Jing's plans to seize the Millennium Origin Source.

In fact, Li Tianyi's departure would make it easier for Lin Jing to claim the prize. Otherwise, ownership of the Millennium Origin Source would be hotly contested.

"Fine." After a moment's contemplation, Lin Jing relented. "Gather all members of the Heaven-Earth Sect. We depart for Xianlin City in half a day."

"Yes!" Lady Nethersoil grinned. The spirit creatures of the Heaven-Earth Sect had been obsessively breeding, mixing bloodlines extensively within the sect. Now, they craved external bloodlines—this opportunity couldn't be missed.

After Lady Nethersoil left, Lin Jing returned to his cultivation site to prepare. Half a day later, the Heaven-Earth Sect followed him toward the Cultivation Alliance's stronghold.

At this time, many Cultivation Alliance members outside Xianlin City were rushing back, only to be blocked by the Heavenly River barrier. None could enter.

"I wonder how many from the Tianyuan Realm group survive. If any died... we'll have to ask Lady Nethersoil to resurrect them." Lin Jing arrived outside Xianlin City, curious about the battle's progress. Unfortunately, even his spiritual sense couldn't penetrate the Heavenly River.

It seemed the only option was to force their way in and adapt accordingly.

"Celestial Beast, appear!"

Boom!

The colossal corpse of the Celestial Ox materialized beyond the Heavenly River, drawing the gaze of countless cultivators.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 45: Emergency Appointment
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 45: Emergency Appointment

Chaos reigned throughout Xianlin City. The Sea Spirit Beast's invasion had purposes beyond just expelling Li Tianyi from the Origin Realm.

High above the city, Li Tianyi battled the Sea Spirit Beast while simultaneously balancing an enormous watery comet in his other hand, dominating the aerial battlefield. Collisions between chaotic light and primordial ocean energy shrouded the entire immortal city in mist.

Below, countless water spheres floated in the air, each containing defeated alliance cultivators. These spheres drained the life essences of human and demonic beast practitioners alike, continuously feeding power to various oceanic monsters.

"How delicious human life essence is," came a voice from the void sea. A massive octopus connected to the spheres with its tentacles. Though some cultivators recognized the threat and attempted to unite against it, they found themselves overwhelmed by the horde of monsters protecting the creature.

This was the Octopus Ancestor, an elder-class monster under the Sea Spirit Beast's command. Its terrifying ability allowed it to extract life essences from humans and demonic beasts, then redistribute them to strengthen other sea creatures.

"Ugh...ugh!" Under the Octopus Ancestor's control, hundreds of talented cultivators had already become nutrients. Dozens more, severely wounded but not yet dead, struggled helplessly within their watery prisons, watching their life forces slowly drain away.

Among the trapped were two Tianyuan Realm cultivators. Wan Renzong, successor of the Martial Emperor, had lost an arm in battle. His blood dyed the water sphere crimson as he weakly punched at his prison with his remaining strength. But fists that could shatter mountains struck the watery surface as harmlessly as cotton.

"Damn it..." Wan Renzong's heart filled with despair. Were it not for his body cultivation making his life essence exceptionally resilient, he would have already become a dried husk.

"Oh? Another 'Origin Body' type? No wonder you've lasted this long," the Octopus Ancestor remarked, having noticed Shui Lingsu. Water Moon Immortal Isle possessed techniques for cultivating acquired Origin Bodies - physiques capable of forming pacts with the ocean to control its most fundamental powers. This made the seas their absolute domain within the Tianyuan Realm, where even the Tianyuan Ancient Kingdom couldn't breach their island stronghold.

Yet against the Sea Spirit Beast's oceanic monsters - literal manifestations of the sea - Shui Lingsu's origin power proved nearly useless. Though her Origin Body had allowed her to resist dissolution longer than others, the Octopus Ancestor's gaze now sealed her fate.

"It's over," Shui Lingsu thought with dread as dozens of tentacles suddenly pierced her water prison, binding her completely.

"Kill me...and he won't spare you," the desperate woman managed to say, recalling her island master's words - if facing mortal danger in the Origin Realm, she could seek Lin Jing's help.

"Who? Li Tianyi? Hahaha! He can't even save himself!" The Octopus Ancestor laughed uproariously.

"Me."

The laughter died instantly.

"These two...have decent luck."

At some point, the Heavenly River enveloping the city had been breached by a massive hole. From beyond the opening came a voice both Wan Renzong and Shui Lingsu recognized instantly. Others across the battlefield, like Gu Xinghe, also identified the familiar voice.

BOOM!

Before the speaker appeared, a pair of bullhorn-like artifacts shot through the air toward the Octopus Ancestor. The protecting sea monsters instinctively moved to block, but the horns struck with terrifying force. Any monster grazed by their power instantly vaporized into mist, utterly annihilated.

"Celestial Beast! Ancestor!"

As two figures entered the city, the Octopus Ancestor paled in shock. Intelligence suggested Lin Jing of the Longevity Body should still be recovering from injuries, and his control over the Celestial Beast had seemed quite limited based on his battle with Demon Yu.

Yet now, Lin Jing strode into the city with hair half-black and half-white, his life-and-death energy rivaling Void Mystical Stage spiritual power. The Octopus Ancestor realized with horror that this man showed no signs of injury whatsoever. His terrifying spiritual power connecting him to the Celestial Beast seemed inexhaustible as the ocean itself.

Moreover, Lin Jing had achieved the ability to weaponize the Celestial Beast's natural armaments as artifacts. The bullhorns transformed into beams of light that pierced straight through the Octopus Ancestor's body. In its death throes, the creature dissolved into water and fled. Lin Jing paid no further attention - he had bigger prey in sight.

The imprisoned cultivators fell from their shattered water prisons like rain. Seeing Lin Jing's return, Wan Renzong, Shui Lingsu and others inexplicably relaxed, as if they'd found their pillar of strength.

"Longevity Immortal Physique! Haha, junior brother, you've grown stronger again!" Li Tianyi laughed upon sensing Lin Jing's current state, his previously dimming eyes regaining their spark.

"In your current condition, you should be able to freely control the Celestial Beast's form now?"

"This guy..." The Sea Spirit Beast glared at Lin Jing, this unexpected variable in its plans.

Suddenly, it felt Li Tianyi's power surge.

"You've come at the perfect time! As Young Alliance Master of the Cultivation Alliance, I hereby appoint you acting city lord of Xianlin City! You must lead the alliance forces arriving later to repel these monsters! We cannot let Xianlin fall!"

"You..." Lin Jing looked up at the figure battling the Sea Spirit Beast while balancing the comet, realizing Li Tianyi had likely reached his limit after days of combat. Not that he was about to lose, but that he could no longer suppress his breakthrough!

His arrival seemed to lift a weight from Li Tianyi's shoulders.

"Alliance members have already returned to Pangu Continent. Reinforcements will arrive as soon as possible. Junior Brother Lin...Xianlin City is in your hands now. I'll use my remaining strength to seal away part of the Sea Spirit Beast's power!"

With Lin Jing here, Li Tianyi could finally act without reservation. Though unsure exactly how much stronger Lin Jing had become, in this critical moment, he could think of no other cultivator capable of resisting the Sea Spirit Beast.

If Lin Jing could hold out just a little longer, it would buy Pangu Continent more time to prepare. Given the circumstances, Li Tianyi

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 46: Sect Master?
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 46: Sect Master?

"Chaos Seal, LOCK!!!"

After arranging everything, Li Tianyi no longer suppressed his cultivation realm, unleashing the full power of his Chaotic Immortal Physique.

In Li Tianyi's view, it didn't matter that he couldn't participate in the Millennium Origin Source War. It also didn't matter if the Alliance missed out on obtaining the supreme-grade Origin Source this millennium.

But one thing was absolutely certain—Xianlin City must not fall. The Sea Spirit Beast must not be allowed to leave unscathed. It had to pay a heavy price.

"Sealing technique?"

BOOM!

Terrifying chaotic energy instantly bound the Sea Spirit Beast, causing its power to rapidly decline at an alarming rate.

The Sea Spirit Beast struggled desperately, but faced with the final strike from the Chaotic Immortal Physique, even it was powerless to resist!

"The Origin Realm... finally time to leave."

At the same time, Li Tianyi could no longer hold on. His aura surged violently as his realm naturally ascended to the Void Mystical Stage. In that instant, a powerful spatial force ejected him from this world!!!

Before departing, he sighed with emotion, marveling at this extraordinary experience.

"Sea Spirit Beast, after leaving the Origin Realm, reaching Void Mystical, Seeking the Way, even the True Immortal realm will only be a matter of time for me. When I ascend to Immortal King, perhaps we'll meet again—but by then, I'll be coming as the one who sets the rules of the Origin Realm..."

From the very beginning, Li Tianyi had never regarded the creatures of the Origin Realm as equals. Even now, as he was being expelled by the Sea Spirit Beast, he spoke to it with undisguised arrogance, never considering them to be on the same level.

"If you have what it takes, come find me."

The Sea Spirit Beast, temporarily sealed, was extremely displeased. But seeing Li Tianyi successfully dealt with still brought it great satisfaction.

Though there remained that Lin Jing fellow who could control Celestial Beasts, compared to Li Tianyi, this Lin Jing was nothing. Even with 30% of its power sealed, no random nobody could challenge it. As far as it was concerned, Xianlin City was already in its grasp.

"Young Alliance Master!!!"

With the departure of Li Tianyi and his Chaotic Immortal Physique, panic spread through Xianlin City. Without Li Tianyi's protection, the geniuses suddenly found themselves leaderless. Though Li Tianyi had hastily appointed an acting city lord before leaving, most people had little faith in this newcomer Lin Jing.

In the eyes of most geniuses, Lin Jing was even the guy who'd had his spirit beast killed by a sneak attack from a Heavenly Demon Sect cultivator.

True, Lin Jing seemed stronger now, but compared to the sense of security Li Tianyi provided, he simply couldn't measure up.
