As Li Tianyi vanished into the sky, the Sea Spirit Beast turned its gaze toward Lin Jing, creating a standoff with this acting city lord.

"So little faith in me?"

Sensing the unease around him, Lin Jing smiled faintly.

Now serving as acting city lord of Xianlin City and the Cultivation Alliance's highest authority in the Origin Realm, he had no choice but to repel the Sea Spirit Beast today at minimal cost to solidify his position.

Let the Sea Spirit Beast occupy Xianlin City?

Don't be ridiculous.

Wouldn't that make him a city lord in name only?

How could he skim profits from Xianlin City then?

He knew perfectly well the Cultivation Alliance had substantial reserves of immortal techniques, elixirs, and magical treasures stored here.

As long as he maintained authority... all these could be at his disposal.

Standing beside his Celestial Beast, Lin Jing casually tied up his black-and-white hair that had grown wildly from manipulating life-and-death energy. Looking at the equally dismissive Sea Spirit Beast, he spoke slowly: "I suppose I'll reluctantly accept Senior Brother Li's commission."

"But this conflict has already claimed many lives. I'd prefer not to see Xianlin City suffer further damage from continued fighting."

"Sea Spirit Beast, you've... already achieved your objective, haven't you?"

"To prepare for the Millennium War in ten years, you allied with the Meteor Spirit Beast to simultaneously attack the Heavenly Demon Sect and Cultivation Alliance, forcing the Heavenly Demon Sacred Son and our Young Alliance Master to withdraw."

"Since your goal is accomplished, there's no need to seize Xianlin City. This place... isn't where you belong."

"Leave now. Consider it... doing me a favor."

"...And why should I?" The Sea Spirit Beast couldn't help but laugh at Lin Jing's words. Where did this brat come from? Some upstart who'd only emerged in recent years actually wanted it to give him face?

As the Sea Spirit Beast roared with laughter and Alliance cultivators broke out in cold sweat, everyone's expressions suddenly changed.

CRACK!

The entire sky darkened abruptly as massive void rifts tore open across the heavens.

One monstrous creature after another came pouring into the city, their eyes glowing crimson with insatiable greed.

"Kekekeke, it's the Milky Way Mountain! Quite pretty!"

A flamboyant voice rang out, startling the waterfall spirit known as Milky Way Mountain. Before it could react, a temporarily human-shaped mountain deity flashed past, snatching up its battle-damaged body and giving it a lick with its "mouth."

"What the hell is that?!"

"That's..."

"Wait, it's the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices! Why is that thing here?!"

The sudden appearance of the Mountain God of Lewd Sacrifices shocked both sides. This entity had always remained neutral, never involving itself in Origin Realm affairs. Due to its terrifying strength—being the largest mountain spirit in the realm—no one dared provoke it either.

"Little one, let this lady have a taste~"

Next, the ground of Xianlin City turned pitch black. From the endless dark earth emerged a svelte black silhouette. At this sight, people were even more astonished—it was actually Lady Nethersoil, ruler of life and death!

Her prestige among Origin Realm spirits was second only to the two great Spirit Beasts. Even human geniuses would show her respect. As an absolutely neutral entity, why had she appeared in Xianlin City now?!

"Eek!" A golden water spirit being embraced from behind by Lady Nethersoil shuddered violently.

Then, one after another, infamous rogue spirits who normally occupied their own territories independent of the two great Spirit Beasts began appearing as if they were free samples—one, two, three... over twenty powerful spirits arrived, each positioning themselves before their chosen targets. Their menacing presence made the already injured marine spirits extremely nervous.

"Don't move."

Faced with this horde of unexpected arrivals, both sides were stunned.

"This... this can't be!"

Who could possibly have gathered these rogue spirits that didn't even submit to the two great Spirit Beasts? And made them interfere in the war between the Sea Spirit Beast and Xianlin City?

Unless... Everyone suddenly shuddered with realization.

At this moment, the various members of the Heaven-Earth Sect who had found their respective targets all turned to look at Lin Jing.

"Sect Master!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 47: Repelling the Sea Spirit, Defending Xianlin City
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 47: Repelling the Sea Spirit, Defending Xianlin City

"Sect Master..."

As these spirit creatures addressed Lin Jing, not only did the prodigies of the Cultivation Alliance feel chills, even the mighty Sea Spirit Beast felt its scalp tingle.

What was happening...

Especially since among these spirit beings was one it had always been wary of.

"Nethersoil, what do you think you're doing?"

Lady Nethersoil.

Though she never participated in the competition for Origin Sources, she maintained trade with all factions and had accumulated no small amount of these resources. Her strength was unfathomable.

"Hmm?" Lady Nethersoil glanced at the Sea Spirit Beast. "Isn't it obvious?"

"I advise you to heed the Sect Master's warning and withdraw."

Truth be told, Lady Nethersoil wanted no part in this battle - she was here to scavenge!

The other spirit creatures felt the same!

Unnoticed by all, the dark earth had already consumed many of the scattered limbs and debris on the ground.

Hybrid offspring were simply too delicious.

Over these years, Lady Nethersoil had reaped substantial benefits. For instance, she had completely phased out the "Nether Physique" carriers from her schemes.

The hybrid descendants now provided better options for array cores than the Nether Physique bearers.

Various talented spirit creatures with inherited bloodline gifts gave Lady Nethersoil hope. Occasionally, some would even be born with extraordinarily monstrous talents.

About one in ten offspring would manifest as a mutant whose talent surpassed the other nine by an entire tier. This gambling-like thrill had Lady Nethersoil utterly addicted.

"Heed the Sect Master's words, and you shall remain unharmed."

The Heaven-Earth Sect spirit creatures prioritized intimidation.

"Have you all... gone mad?"

"Do you truly intend to oppose me for the sake of this human?" The Sea Spirit Beast's voice turned icy.

It couldn't comprehend what kind of bewitchment Lin Jing had cast upon these creatures.

Though the Heaven-Earth Sect spirits feared the Sea Spirit Beast, the temptation of remaining in the sect was too great. Breeding rights were just the beginning - beyond that lay the chance to leave the Origin Realm. If they could escape this plane and no longer share space with the Sea Spirit Beast, who cared about offending it?

"Sea Spirit Beast, I'll give you ten seconds."

"If you haven't withdrawn from Xianlin City by then, don't blame me for being impolite."

"Arrogant! Do you think this rabble can intimidate me?" The Sea Spirit Beast still refused to abandon Xianlin City, which held decades of Cultivation Alliance accumulation and countless treasures.

"Must you see the coffin to shed tears? Or do you mistake my mercy for fear?" Lin Jing's tone turned cold as he slowly raised a hand, producing a vessel containing a preserved body.

"This is your final chance."

"If I awaken her, your entire Sea Spirit lineage will be eradicated!"

What's this...

As Lin Jing produced the object, the Sea Spirit Beast scanned it with divine sense - then its pupils contracted violently.

It recognized that figure.

The previous ruler of Xianlin City before Li Tianyi - the Cultivation Alliance's mightiest prodigy who once guarded Xianlin City in the Origin Realm - the Limitless Immortal!

"How?!" The Sea Spirit Beast was stunned. Rumor had it the Limitless Immortal had been ambushed by Sheng Kun and slain by the Demon Sect's Sacred Son. How could she be in Lin Jing's possession?

Judging by the body's condition, it remained alive with the immortal physique's essence intact.

This was an existence whose power might not match Li Tianyi's, but wouldn't be far behind - certainly enough to threaten it.

Especially now, with thirty percent of its power sealed by Li Tianyi. If Lin Jing could truly awaken this Limitless Immortal Physique, the situation would turn dire indeed!

At this moment, the Sea Spirit Beast's mind churned. Though it suspected Lin Jing might be bluffing - reviving the Limitless Immortal's power wouldn't be easy - it hesitated nonetheless.

The proxy city lord had already displayed too many alarming capabilities.

Why?

Its gaze turned grave. When had this human appeared? How had he reached such heights?

"You... are interesting. We'll meet again." After a long pause, the Sea Spirit Beast finally gave the order, leading its forces away from Xianlin City. Witnessing this, the tense Alliance cultivators were universally astonished.

This proxy city lord, temporarily appointed by Senior Brother Tianyi, had actually forced the Sea Spirit Beast to retreat.

Moreover, not through continued warfare, but by making the Sea Spirit Beast withdraw without Xianlin City suffering further losses!

"Has he already reached such heights?"

Wan Renzong, saved by Lin Jing and sitting on the ground, took a deep breath as he watched Lin Jing's figure in the sky repelling the Sea Spirit Beast. When their group of Tianyuan cultivators first entered the Origin Realm, hadn't their goal been to join the Cultivation Alliance?

How had Lin Jing, in just a few years, become the highest authority of the Cultivation Alliance in the Origin Realm?

"City Lord!!" Now even the Alliance prodigies who'd held no special expectations of Lin Jing understood - Senior Brother Tianyi's discernment had been uniquely perceptive.

Current Xianlin City couldn't function without Lin Jing.

No one was more suited to be proxy city lord.

Even Lady Nethersoil had submitted to him.

How?

How had he accomplished this?

"City Lord, what now?" Yan Yunshuang's expression shifted repeatedly as he watched the sea creatures depart and regarded Lin Jing's newly elevated status. He had no choice but to follow Lin Jing's directives - these were Li Tianyi's final orders.

But now, he burned to know: how had Lin Jing subdued these spirit creatures?

Through beast taming?

Preposterous - when had beast tamers ever been so overpowered?

Unless... these creatures were part of some deeper Cultivation Alliance scheme that Li Tianyi had known about all along? Was that why he'd entrusted the proxy position to Lin Jing?

The Hall Master of Law Enforcement theorized endlessly, never imagining that Li Tianyi had temporarily appointed Lin Jing for the simple reason that he was currently the Alliance's strongest cultivator. He'd hoped the honorary title would motivate Lin Jing to resist the Sea Spirit Beast at all costs, buying time for the Pangu Continent.

Li Tianyi had held no real hope that Lin Jing could repel the Sea Spirit Beast.

Yet this miscalculation had allowed Lin Jing to successfully take control of Xianlin City.

A faint smile played on Lin Jing's lips as he calmly replied to Yan Yunshuang: "Many comrades must have fallen in the recent battle. They died defending Xianlin City - we cannot ignore them. Fortunately, Lady Nethersoil is now on our side."

"Next, I'll request her to resurrect as many fallen comrades as possible."

"However, reviving them will require substantial resources, especially for so many in such a short time!"

"I propose drawing the revival resources from the city treasury. Calculate the death toll, and I'll determine the required amount." Lin Jing planned to do some good... while collecting a modest broker's fee.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 48: The Dark Emperor
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 48: The Dark Emperor

Though he had now become the acting lord of Xianlin City, Lin Jing understood he couldn't appear too greedy.

If he blatantly emptied the immortal city's resources without justification, the Cultivation Alliance would come after him right after dealing with the Sea Spirit Beast.

But if he framed it as mobilizing the city's reserves to resurrect the alliance's fallen geniuses who had defended the city, that would change everything.

While the resurrection would require substantial resources, they'd ultimately be used for the alliance's benefit.

Regardless of Lin Jing's initial motives, the resurrected geniuses and their affiliated sects, families, and cultivation world would remember his favor.

After all, the old Xianlin City had never publicly funded the resurrection of fallen geniuses from the Origin Realm before.

Lin Jing was setting a precedent.

This was also related to Lady Nethersoil's previous exorbitant pricing—the cost of resurrecting a single cultivator had been astronomical.

In fact, with so many needing resurrection, the costs would skyrocket.

But Lin Jing considered lives priceless and worth the expense.

"Lord City Governor... is, is this appropriate?" Yan Yunshuang's mouth twitched. They were all old foxes—how could he not see Lin Jing's scheme?

No!

Brother, you're moving too fast!

You just became acting governor and already can't wait to raid the city's treasury???

With Lady Nethersoil on your side, won't you two split the resurrection fees?

"Does Brother Yan think we shouldn't resurrect these fallen comrades?"

"That's not it either." Yan Yunshuang took a deep breath, not daring to say such a thing.

Had Lin Jing not mentioned it, fine. But now that he had, if these people couldn't be resurrected because of Yan's objections, their affiliated factions would hold grudges against him!

Forget it.

Not my problem!

Yan decided to stay out of it—after all, it was Li Tianyi who'd handed the governorship to Lin Jing as Young Alliance Master.

If anything went wrong, Senior Brother Li would bear responsibility first.

"You tally the deceased, I'll inspect the treasury."

Lin Jing headed straight for the city's treasure vault, long coveted.

Heaven-Earth Sect members dispersed to trade their spoils, leaving Yan Yunshuang to helplessly manage the aftermath...

Soon after, Lin Jing stood before Xianlin Treasury's treasure pavilion... Li Tianyi had left in such haste he hadn't shared the access method. The pavilion was sealed by multiple grand arrays, but Lin Jing didn't need instructions—his acting governorship sufficed.

"Array Spirit, you're awake." Lin Jing spoke, and instantly a sphere-shaped spirit manifested outside.

"Greetings, Acting Governor."

"Senior Brother Tianyi left abruptly without teaching me the unlocking method. With Xianlin still in crisis, I need to mobilize treasury resources against external threats."

"Now that I'm acting governor, can you open the vault?"

The Array Spirit nodded. It had heard Li Tianyi's final arrangements and witnessed Lin Jing repelling the invaders.

"Please enter, Lord Governor." As the treasury's final safeguard, the spirit now obeyed Lin Jing's governorship authority.

Shortly inside, Lin Jing's eyes dazzled at the vault's riches.

"No wonder the Sea Spirit Beast still coveted the city after defeating Li Tianyi!"

Taking a deep breath, Lin Jing gazed hungrily at jade platforms shimmering with immortal light.

The first level alone housed dozens of ordinary Origin Sources, plus abundant rare Origin Realm materials.

More importantly, higher levels contained preserved remains of Origin Realm spirits!

These spirits were natural entities—mountains, rivers, plants—that had gained sentience. Even deceased, their remains were premium resources.

The Cultivation Alliance's long dealings with such spirits had amassed countless remains—perfect for alchemy, artifact forging, and cultivation techniques.

"Such pure dark energy..."

Suddenly noticing something, Lin Jing frowned and ascended swiftly to the pavilion's peak. There, encased in giant black amber, was a nine-tailed fox composed of dark mist, emitting profound dark undulations though seemingly lifeless.

"Array Spirit, what's this?" Lin Jing summoned the spirit, which appeared promptly.

"Lord Governor, I have a name—I'm Qiuqiu."

"Right. Array Spirit, what's this?"

"That's the Origin Realm spirit 'Dark Emperor,' an exceptionally powerful entity born from 'Night.' It ranked just below the Sea and Meteor Spirit Beasts in strength."

"When 'White Emperor' and 'Dark Emperor' simultaneously awakened with terrifying potential, their mutual hostility led to constant conflict. The established Sea and Meteor Spirit Beasts, fearing rivals, ambushed them during one such battle."

"The apocalyptic fight drew in both the Heavenly Demon Sect and Cultivation Alliance. Ultimately, both Emperors fell—White Emperor dissipated completely, perhaps to reform millennia later, while we secured Dark Emperor's remains before total annihilation."

"But lacking top geniuses cultivating dark-attributed techniques, the remains stayed here as exchange inventory until now..." After Qiuqiu's explanation, Lin Jing pondered.

"I'll take this."

"Eh?" Qiuqiu blinked. "Lord Governor wants the Dark Emperor's remains?"

"Yes." Lin Jing nodded. Xianlin likely had dark-attributed cultivators, but only governor-level geniuses could afford such priceless remains—and none matched that description.

Fortunately, the alliance had obtained it first—the Heavenly Demon Sect would have consumed it immediately.

Lin Jing had sensed it because his Heavenly Demon soul had stirred violently—the remains seemed like potent nourishment for it.

His luck truly held.

"I can revive the Dark Emperor. Against the two Spirit Beasts, its combat power would prove invaluable," Lin Jing claimed.

"Oh?" Qiuqiu gasped. "Can necromancy work on spirit remains? But even if possible, these couldn't compare to Celestial Beast corpses!"

"Children shouldn't ask so many questions," Lin Jing deflected.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 49: Revival! Revival!
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 49: Revival! Revival!

Lin Jing didn't take the Dark Emperor's remains to use with corpse driving techniques.

The Yin Corpse Sect's corpse driving techniques could only be used on humans and demonic beasts—after all, there weren't many other races in the Tianyuan Realm back then.

Lin Jing was drawn to the Dark Emperor's potential, which was no less than that of the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast...

Falling at the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage was truly a pity.

......

After inspecting the treasury's resources, Lin Jing took the Dark Emperor's remains and left first.

"Sect Master." Lady Nethersoil, who had been waiting outside Xianlin City, grinned upon seeing Lin Jing emerge. "This time... we've truly reaped bountiful rewards."

"A harvest is good." Lin Jing replied, "We'll discuss reproduction matters later. Can you accomplish what I mentioned earlier, Vice Sect Master?"

"No problem. These people haven't been dead long. With sufficient resources, I can do it." Lady Nethersoil said casually.

As the embodiment of death energy in the Origin Realm, she could pull back any creature that died within the realm, provided they hadn't been completely "digested" by the Origin Realm.

Of course, minor issues like missing limbs or souls were beyond her control.

Generally speaking, revival was possible.

"Good. Also... can you revive this?" Lin Jing produced the Dark Emperor's remains.

"This..." Seeing the nine-tailed fox composed entirely of dark elements, Lady Nethersoil froze momentarily before exclaiming in shock, "Could this be the Dark Emperor? Its remains still exist!"

"Correct." Lin Jing nodded seriously. "Is there a way?"

"Impossible. Sect Master, you know I can only revive flesh-and-blood creatures who died within a hundred years. Spirit beasts are beyond my power." Lady Nethersoil shook her head.

"But spirit beasts don't even need my help to revive! Unless they died of old age, creatures like this that fell in battle can resurrect on their own if placed in an environment rich with their element—just takes a few millennia!"

Lin Jing shook his head. "Ten thousand years is too long. I want immediate revival."

"This...this..."

"Forget it. Dead is dead." Seeing Lady Nethersoil's helplessness, Lin Jing sighed.

"Eh?" Under Lady Nethersoil's puzzled gaze, Lin Jing departed after saying, "I'll return later. Prepare yourself—I'll provide resources for reviving Xianlin City's war dead."

"Really now..." Lady Nethersoil cursed under her breath. Such a demanding taskmaster.

Damn it, she'd still ended up as manual labor...

............

In the blink of an eye, Lin Jing returned to his cave dwelling in Xianlin City. His intention to revive the Dark Emperor was to have the Heavenly Demon Avatar use it as the next body for soul usurpation.

Having abandoned the plan to usurp the Limitless Immortal, Lin Jing needed to find another suitable vessel. Among human immortal physiques, he hadn't found anything suitable yet.

Discovering the Dark Emperor's remains today had stirred his interest. Though not human, its dark attributes perfectly complemented the Heavenly Demon's power and demonic bloodline. Combined, they could elevate the avatar's strength to new heights.

The only drawback was not knowing how long the Dark Emperor had been dead.

Normal soul usurpation only worked on recently deceased members of the same species.

The Heavenly Demon Scripture's soul usurpation ability was more formidable—capable of perfectly taking over bodies of different species, including demons and spirit beasts... It could also usurp corpses that had been dead for some time.

However, the difficulty would be significantly higher than usurping a freshly dead body.

Lin Jing's original plan was to revive the Dark Emperor's remains first to make usurpation easier. But since even Lady Nethersoil couldn't help, Lin Jing would have to make do with the current state.

At least the avatar's spirit had nothing better to do—it could slowly work on usurping the Dark Emperor's remains.

Several days later.

News arrived—the battle between the Meteor Spirit Beast and the Demon Sect's Sacred Son Sheng Kun had concluded days ago with the Meteor Spirit Beast severely wounded and Sheng Kun expelled from the Origin Realm.

Thus, all four of the Origin Realm's top combatants had temporarily withdrawn in different ways.

Though Lin Jing knew the Sea Spirit Beast and Meteor Spirit Beast would recover quickly for the upcoming millennium war, and that the two major human factions would send more prodigies within ten years, none of that mattered.

This decade would be his stage. Lin Jing intended to rapidly increase his strength during these ten years, striving to reach Heavenly King level as soon as possible.

"Sheng Kun has left after all. In that case, this can be used now."

Lin Jing took out the Time Dao Immortal Banner and tossed it to the released Heavenly Demon Avatar spirit: "With this, no matter how difficult usurping the Dark Emperor's remains is, ten years should suffice."

"And we're not lacking immortal energy to power the banner now."

"Exactly." The Heavenly Demon Avatar grew excited. "With the Origin Sources from the city treasury, perhaps we won't need to wait for the premium-grade Origin Sources in ten years—the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and others might advance to Celestial Beasts early! Then we wouldn't need to rely so heavily on the immortal ox corpse!"

"True." Lin Jing nodded. His only current concern was that the Cultivation Alliance outside, upon learning how he was squandering the city treasury, might immediately send someone to replace him as acting city lord. Conflict would then be inevitable.

Recently, more alliance cultivators had broken through and left. After major battles, it was common for cultivators to fail suppressing their realms and depart abruptly.

...........

Pangu Star, Pangu Continent, Cultivation Alliance.

Several days had passed since Li Tianyi of the Chaotic Immortal Physique returned.

The alliance's powerhouses had basically learned about the Origin Realm's situation and were urgently summoning top-tier prodigies to send into the Origin Realm.

Over a hundred prodigies from different cultivation continents arrived at alliance headquarters via teleportation arrays. At their current strength, these prodigies couldn't change anything in the Origin Realm—unless the alliance employed unconventional methods to temporarily boost their power by overdrafting their potential.

But before the alliance could begin these forced enhancements, returning Origin Realm prodigies brought news that stunned the alliance's powerhouses and left Li Tianyi dumbfounded.

"The acting city lord appointed by Senior Brother Tianyi has recruited dozens of native Origin Realm spirit creatures led by Lady Nethersoil and the Mountain of Lewd Sacrifices, establishing the Heaven-Earth Sect!"

"Commanding these spirit creatures, the new city lord effortlessly repelled the Sea Spirit Beast! The war has ended!"

What's going on! Li Tianyi was flabbergasted. When had Lin Jing subjugated these spirit creatures—especially Lady Nethersoil? The Cultivation Alliance had previously failed to recruit her despite offering multiple immortal artifacts for her unique revival ability!

"Tianyi, you've rendered great service!" Some powerhouses began praising Li Tianyi. But soon, more reports arrived that made Li Tianyi and many alliance elders want to vomit blood.

"The new city lord is collaborating with Lady Nethersoil to systematically revive fallen cultivators... seems like... seems like the alliance treasury is being emptied."

"According to revived cultivators, the new city lord and Lady Nethersoil are operating at a loss—each revived person must sign an IOU for the revival cost difference... And there's a squirrel... it's even dug up all the immortal flowers and plants in the city, mobilizing the entire city's resources to revive those who shed blood for Xianlin City."

An elder raged: "That's the alliance's accumulated resources in the Origin Realm over many years! What's he doing reviving useless people? Stop him immediately!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 50: Zhou Banxian
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 50: Zhou Banxian

The Cultivation Alliance had three main alliance leaders and eight deputy alliance leaders, making eleven individuals who could be considered the most powerful cultivators within the alliance. Each of them was an absolute leader in their respective cultivation world, worthy of being called a hegemon of their realm.

Among them, Li Tianyi was one of the three main alliance leaders and a disciple of the Fishing Elder. It was said that Li Tianyi was a genius the Fishing Elder had "caught" from a minor realm while fishing in the Void Sea, later sending him to the Pangu Continent for training.

For the Cultivation Alliance, the three main alliance leaders rarely involved themselves in matters of the Origin Realm. Most affairs concerning the Origin Realm were handled by one of the deputy alliance leaders - Zhou Banxian.

Zhou Banxian was currently the only known cultivator from the lower realms capable of independently generating immortal energy. His power was incomparably strong, lacking only the lifespan of a True Immortal while possessing combat strength nearly equal to an actual immortal, earning him the title "Half-Immortal."

"Li Tianyi!"

"Senior Zhou..." A massive phantom descended outside Li Tianyi's grotto-heaven, and Li Tianyi immediately went to greet it. He had anticipated that Zhou Banxian would personally come to inquire about the recent events in the Origin Realm.

"I ask you - what exactly is the deal with this fellow called Lin Jing?"

Li Tianyi smiled wryly. "Reporting to Senior..." He quickly recounted Lin Jing's background and experiences in detail to Zhou Banxian before adding, "I never expected Junior Brother Lin would be capable of subduing so many spirit creatures. His mobilization of Xianlin City's resources to revive the alliance's prodigies... was likely well-intentioned."

"These are my resources! Meant for cultivating more valuable prodigies, not to be wasted on random nobodies!"

Li Tianyi sighed. Everyone had their own values, and Senior Zhou wasn't entirely wrong.

"What use is reviving these failures who couldn't even protect their own lives in battles against peers?" Zhou Banxian snorted coldly. "Those without the strength to seize immortal sources deserve to die."

Sending prodigies to the Origin Realm was precisely so they could compete for large amounts of immortal sources, especially the premium-grade immortal sources that appeared every thousand years - resources Zhou Banxian demanded must be obtained. Normally, when alliance prodigies acquired premium-grade immortal sources, Zhou Banxian wouldn't allow them to use it personally but required them to hand it over in exchange for equivalent resources.

"Senior Zhou, even if Junior Brother Lin truly intended to embezzle, he would surely use it to strengthen himself. Many alliance prodigies have witnessed his capabilities - resisting Sheng Kun, repelling the Sea Spirit Beast. With such enhancement from immortal sources, he could better defend Xianlin City, easing your concerns about the city falling."

"Moreover, the Tianyuan Realm and Junior Brother Lin intend to join the Cultivation Alliance. They could then better assist you in competing for immortal sources."

Zhou Banxian continued sneering. "If only they'd be so obedient. Tell me - do you know the coordinates of Tianyuan Continent?"

Li Tianyi shook his head. "Even Tianyuan Realm cultivators don't know their own world's coordinates. However, I've informed them of several methods to contact the Pangu Continent from beyond their realm."

Lin Jing's sneer grew more pronounced. "So you're saying even if this cultivator decides to ignore the Cultivation Alliance, monopolize Origin Realm resources, and refuse to hand over immortal sources, the alliance would be powerless to stop him?"

"First, we can't locate his Tianyuan Realm. Second, currently the Cultivation Alliance has no one who can defeat him in the Origin Realm!"

"Junior Brother Lin... surely wouldn't do that?" Li Tianyi said.

"Wouldn't?!" Zhou Banxian scoffed. "Are you an idiot? Go fishing with your master already - you're useless as a young alliance master. Someone capable of subduing numerous Origin Realm spirit creatures must have ambition!"

"Do you know how he recruited Lady Nethersoil?"

Li Tianyi pursed his lips. "I beg for Senior's guidance."

"By making promises to those spirit creatures!" Zhou Banxian declared. "That fellow cultivates the Immortal Palace's Beast Taming Art which allows bonded beasts to be treated as one with himself. From another perspective, he might be able to contract Origin Realm spirit creatures and take them out!"

"For those spirit creatures, only such an offer would be tempting enough to make them follow him!"

"After his persuasion, if half the Origin Realm's spirit creatures defect to him, what place would remain for the Cultivation Alliance or the Heavenly Demon Sect? The Origin Realm's benefits are enormous, and the alliance couldn't threaten him. Do you really think he'd obediently follow the alliance's orders?"

Li Tianyi's expression turned grave. He hadn't considered these possibilities, but Zhou Banxian's words made him realize Lin Jing indeed had the capability to break away from the Cultivation Alliance. With these spirit creatures' support, he could monopolize Origin Realm resources and establish his own power.

A cultivation world joining the alliance sought more resources and assistance to resist the Heavenly Demon Sect. But if monopolizing the Origin Realm offered greater benefits than alliance membership, would Lin Jing and his world still want to join?

"I hadn't paid attention to the 《Beast Taming Art》 before... I recall the Guanming Realm also has this technique. Immediately retrieve this technique and have a group of prodigies practice it before sending them to the Origin Realm. We cannot let Lin Jing exclusively cooperate with Origin Realm spirit creatures!"

"Additionally, I'll send people to the Origin Realm to reclaim the city lord position from Lin Jing. This will reveal the extent of his ambitions."

Having said this, Zhou Banxian departed. Although this situation had somewhat exceeded control, he wasn't overly worried. Over the years, many uncontrollable incidents had occurred in the Origin Realm, all eventually resolved as he wished. He only hoped this beast-taming cultivator Lin Jing would know his place.

"Who among you is willing to serve as Xianlin City's lord in the Origin Realm and confront this Lin Jing?" Zhou Banxian transmitted his voice to numerous disciples.

"Disciple is willing to ease Master's burdens!" came a reply shortly after.

"They're coming."

Several days later, while Lin Jing was rapidly consuming immortal sources, he received reports that a cultivator claiming to be Zhou Banxian's disciple had entered the Origin Realm with Zhou Banxian's decree, seeking to meet the new city lord Lin Jing.

"I know of this Zhou Banxian - he's the strong cultivator responsible for Origin Realm affairs in the Cultivation Alliance. I've heard of him from others."

"His disciple... this doesn't bode well. My city lord seat hasn't even warmed up before being snatched away." Lin Jing spoke calmly.

Beside him, the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse, Dragon Carp, and Ice Soul Gu who were absorbing immortal energy all turned to look at Lin Jing.

As if we were the ones with ill intentions.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 51: The New Spirit Beast
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 51: The New Spirit Beast

Lin Jing wasn't in a hurry to meet this disciple of Zhou Banxian, leaving him waiting while employing the supreme immortal technique of "delaying tactics." As long as he didn't personally accept the edict, he could feign ignorance.

Lin Jing and his group continued consuming the Origin Sources.

"Administrator Yan, what is the meaning of this? A full day has passed, yet this new city lord still refuses to see me!" Zhou Banxian's disciple angrily confronted Yan Yunshuang, who was responsible for relaying messages.

Yan Yunshuang could only sigh helplessly. "The demonic beasts guarding the new city lord reported that he's currently at a critical juncture in secluded cultivation. Disturbing him now risks qi deviation or even death! Perhaps I could prepare a cave abode for Brother Yang to wait a while longer?"

"Secluded cultivation..." Yang Lin narrowed his eyes, recognizing Lin Jing's ploy. This man truly lived up to his master's warnings—untrustworthy and ambitious for control over Xianlin City.

Seeing no point in following protocol, Yang Lin directly produced the edict. "Then we won't wait. By order of the Deputy Alliance Leader: Lin Jing's brief tenure in the Alliance leaves him insufficiently familiar with Xianlin City's affairs. Henceforth, I shall assume the role of city lord. Lin Jing is demoted to deputy city lord in recognition of his defensive contributions, with proper immortal rewards bestowed upon leaving the Origin Realm."

"Administrator Yan, I hereby issue my first decree: halt all resurrections of fallen cultivators and conduct a full inventory of the city's treasury!" Yang Lin commanded imperiously.

The response nearly made him vomit blood.

Yang Lin genuinely felt blood rising in his throat. How could everything be gone so quickly? What a beast! Such wolfish ambition!

With the treasury plundered, what use was removing Lin Jing from office?

"Even if emptied, the resources must still be nearby. Find Lady Nethersoil and stop her resurrections to recover those assets!" Yang Lin insisted.

"My lord... I must beg your forgiveness." Yan Yunshuang spread his hands. "Resurrecting fallen elites was the previous city lord's order. Though his authority has ended, such matters should be negotiated between you two directly. Preventing fellow cultivators' rebirths would stain my honor."

Wanting no part in this power struggle, Yan Yunshuang clasped his fists and withdrew. If Yang Lin wanted to halt the resurrections, let him do it himself.

"Your mother—!"

Watching the administrator depart, Yang Lin gnashed his teeth. How dare a mere hall master defy the city lord's orders?

Negotiate with Lin Jing? Preposterous.

Liu Xin glanced toward Yang Lin's cave abode. Yang Lin's spirit beast had clearly stated its master was in life-or-death seclusion—any disturbance risked fatal qi deviation. While obviously fabricated, this pretext meant forcibly summoning Lin Jing would constitute intentional harm against Xianlin City's recent hero.

Moreover, his justification—revoking resurrection permissions for fallen elites—would inevitably turn most Alliance talents against him, making governance impossible.

"What should I do now...?"

Yang Lin stood frozen. Despite possessing his master's edict, the reality within the Origin Realm proved far more complex than anticipated. That damned rogue had claimed the moral high ground, leaving no room for action!

Damn it all! He never should have taken this assignment just to curry favor with his master!

......

Two years passed in the blink of an eye.

Yang Lin periodically checked whether Lin Jing had emerged, only to receive the same response from the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse: "The Beast Tamer remains in life-or-death seclusion."

Meanwhile, resurrected Alliance elites kept mysteriously reappearing at regular intervals, each expressing profound gratitude toward Lin Jing's policies while showing indifference toward their new city lord—despite Yang Lin being Zhou Banxian's disciple.

"Embezzlement matters little if the embezzler actually delivers results."

"Elder Brother Li never used treasury resources to resurrect us during his tenure. Lin may have taken much, but he genuinely helped—he's reliable!"

"With that skinflint's disciple as city lord? Forget posthumous revival—he'd probably tax the Origin Sources we risk our lives to obtain!"

Overhearing these murmurs, Yang Lin's eyes reddened. His master's three-year deadline now had only one year remaining, and he remained powerless.

"Surprisingly obedient, this Yang Lin."

Meanwhile, Lin Jing had been monitoring events, prepared for Yang Lin to desperately storm his seclusion or attack Tianyuan cultivators to force him out. Yet after two years, the man had done nothing beyond periodic door-slamming tantrums outside his cave.

Not even successfully recruiting subordinates to act against him.

Pathetic.

"This is the downside of righteousness," Lin Jing mused. "As Elder Mo Pine said, the Cultivation Alliance's so-called virtue leaves Yang Lin paralyzed—unlike the Heavenly Demon Sect, who'd have slaughtered their way in by now."

Chuckling, Lin Jing examined the Chrono Dao formation flags, surprised his avatar had successfully usurped the Dark Emperor's remnants in just two centuries...

"This vessel is exceptional..."

A nine-tailed fox composed of black mist emerged from the flags. Lin Jing nodded approvingly. "Indeed. Come—time for our contract."

"The Beast Master Sect possesses a secret art to enhance spirit beast bloodlines. Originally limited to 'Monarch-grade,' this crude technique became far more potent after my immortal energy modifications these past two years. The Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp now approach Immortal-grade purity. Let's test whether demonic bloodlines can also reach perfection through this method..."

Who said demonic ascension required soul usurpation? If demons became spirit beasts, wouldn't enhancement arts equivalently elevate their demonic heritage?

"Very well." The avatar sighed, resigning itself to becoming a pet.

"Lin Jing! I know you can hear me! Returning the treasury's resources is Master Zhou Banxian's direct order! Do you truly fear no retribution for this theft and disobedience?"

"Here comes the cursing again..." Lin Jing sighed, pausing his contract ritual. The man's persistence was almost admirable.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 52: Perfected Demon Race
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 52: Perfected Demon Race

A Nascent Soul Transformation Stage beast tamer has five basic contract slots.

Lin Jing gained an additional slot due to reaching the extreme realm.

Currently, he can contract six spirit beasts in total.

Counting the Mechanized Turtle left in the Tianyuan Realm, he still has two vacant contract slots.

One of them, Lin Jing decided to reserve for the still-elusive Star Beast.

As for the other, after some consideration, he resolved to prioritize contracting an avatar.

Especially now that he had successfully modified the beast taming secret technique to enhance spirit beast bloodlines, the strategic value of contracting an avatar had increased exponentially.

"The connection with my avatar has grown even stronger than before."

As strands of immortal energy sealed within his body dissipated, a red glow emanated from his outstretched palm.

"It actually works!"

Moments later, sensing his avatar's demonic bloodline beginning to strengthen, Lin Jing couldn't contain his excitement.

Before reaching mastery, the demonic bloodline could steadily improve through normal cultivation of Heavenly Demon techniques.

But after mastery, Lin Jing discovered the progress of his Demon God Physique had hit an impenetrable bottleneck.

Until Sheng Kun taught him the soul usurpation secret technique.

The transition from mastery to perfection in demonic bloodlines represented a significant hurdle. Without specialized bloodline enhancement techniques, normal cultivation proved insufficient.

Techniques like the soul usurpation method Sheng Kun taught could perfect the bloodline through repeated body seizures and yin-yang destiny forging.

However, this method didn't suit Lin Jing, who had no intention of forging yin-yang destinies or ultimately seizing a woman's body.

Thus, he needed alternative rapid enhancement methods to empower his avatar sufficiently before the Millennium War.

Fortunately, his ingenious solution of treating the demon avatar as a spirit beast allowed him to apply bloodline enhancement techniques, achieving what would otherwise have taken immeasurable time.

"These two years weren't wasted. Not only has the avatar's demonic bloodline reached perfection, but the Pine Leaf Mouse, Dragon Carp, and Ice Soul Gu have all reached quasi-celestial grade."

Lin Jing smiled, though the cost had completely depleted Xianlin City's immortal energy reserves.

The bulk of consumption went toward activating immortal artifacts and modifying techniques - the former granted his avatar 200 extra years to seize remnants of the Dark Emperor, while the latter accelerated bloodline enhancements and provided experience modifying ordinary techniques into immortal energy-powered immortal techniques.

Another year passed.

Through Lin Jing's efforts, their last immortal energy source - the premium grade immortal source Sheng Kun gifted Mo Yu - was exhausted. The superior quality energy facilitated the natural perfection of the avatar's demonic bloodline.

Now equal to Sheng Kun as a Heavenly Demon cultivator with perfected demonic bloodline!

His combat power skyrocketed terrifyingly, with casually unleashed demonic energy rivaling immortal techniques in potency.

"Almost ready..."

Having squeezed Xianlin City dry, Lin Jing felt satisfied. Beyond immortal energy, miscellaneous resources had been fed to the Pine Leaf Mouse's Five Elements space to enhance its demon core abilities.

While the Gu God Sect's accumulated resources could make the Pine Leaf Mouse dominate peers in the Tianyuan Realm, they paled in the Origin Realm where even mediocre talents might be personal disciples of high-level cultivators.

But after plundering Xianlin City's treasury, the Pine Leaf Mouse's demon core had reached such strength that only Heavenly King-level beings could withstand its attacks without severe spiritual damage.

"This should suffice. With my avatar, even if the Cultivation Alliance sends another prodigy like Li Tianyi, I won't be at a disadvantage."

"It's time to negotiate with the Cultivation Alliance..."

Three years after becoming acting city lord, Lin Jing finally emerged from seclusion. During this period, his Tianyuan Realm companions had also been in closed-door cultivation on his advice.

However, Lin Jing had no intention of severing ties with the Cultivation Alliance.

Having exhausted resources, he planned to appease them while seeking new cultivation materials.

"Lin Jing! If you dare embezzle, dare to come out!" Yang Lin, the new city lord, was still shouting when Lin Jing emerged. As Zhou Banxian's disciple, Yang Lin's talent, potential, and strength were unquestionable.

His innate Five Elements Immortal Physique made him more versatile and powerful than Yan Yunshuang's Five Thunder Immortal Physique. However, having trained under a top expert like Zhou Banxian and reached Nascent Soul perfection in under a century, Yang Lin lacked experience in governance.

"You..." Yang Lin was stunned when Lin Jing actually appeared. He'd mentally prepared to face Zhou Banxian's wrath for failing to confront Lin Jing during his tenure.

"Senior Brother... what do you mean by this?" Lin Jing feigned ignorance, provoking Yang Lin's anger. "Lin Jing! Where are Xianlin Treasury's resources?"

"I paid them all to Lady Nethersoil. Did she fail to revive our fallen talents after taking payment?" Lin Jing countered.

The revivals had succeeded - but that wasn't the point! Yang Lin nearly spat blood.

"What revival costs so much? You must have embezzled! After subduing Lady Nethersoil, shouldn't prices be lower?"

Lin Jing scowled angrily. "Don't slander me! I didn't keep a single resource!"

"Subdued? We simply hit it off and formed an organization for convenience! Shouldn't we compensate her generously for reviving our comrades? We're not mortal landlords exploiting peasants!"

"Senior Brother, your mentality is problematic. With such low awareness, how can you lead cultivators against the Heavenly Demon Sect?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 53: The Demon Emperor Cultivation Plan
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 53: The Demon Emperor Cultivation Plan

"Are you telling me all the resources are gone? Not a single bit left?"

Yang Lin wasn't listening to Lin Jing's excuses. All he wanted to know was whether any resources remained.

"All gone." Lin Jing replied with a smile.

"Fine, fine, just fine." Yang Lin repeated the word several times before his expression darkened. "Alright, I won't hold you accountable for misusing the immortal treasury resources."

"But you must redeem yourself through meritorious service."

Yang Lin did some mental calculations. Over three years, between Lin Jing's personal embezzlement and distribution to those spirits, the resources had long been exhausted. Trying to recover any now seemed impossible.

As a man who knew when to bend and when to stand firm, since the immortal treasury resources couldn't be recovered and he couldn't afford to break with Lin Jing and Lady Nethersoil's faction, he needed to find compensation elsewhere. Only then could he avoid being beaten to death by his master.

"What fault have I committed?"

"City Lord Lin, do you have designs on the premium immortal source?"

Lin Jing didn't deny it: "Indeed I do, and plan to seize it."

"Perfect." Yang Lin said. "I hope after obtaining it, City Lord Lin will hand the premium immortal source over to me! More accurately, to the alliance!"

"Of course, not for free."

"The alliance will provide equivalent resources in exchange—immortal pills, artifacts, techniques, even immortal dao companions are possible."

"The premium immortal energy produced from this source is difficult for ordinary cultivators to utilize. Only in my master Zhou Banxian's hands can it reach maximum potential against the Heavenly Demon Sect's experts!"

"In the past, premium immortal sources obtained by alliance talents in the Origin Realm were typically handed over in exchange for equivalent resources. As City Lord Lin is new to the alliance, you might be unfamiliar with this custom. What are your thoughts?"

Since the treasury resources seemed irrecoverable, Yang Lin's sole demand now was utilizing Lin Jing's combat strength to secure this premium immortal source—only then could he provide an adequate account.

And if Lin Jing dared refuse... well, that would at least divert his master's wrath.

"Agreed." Lin Jing still smiled.

"Agreed?" Yang Lin was stunned by the easy acceptance.

"Indeed." Lin Jing said. "Since it's an equivalent exchange where I suffer no loss, and it helps the alliance better resist the Heavenly Demon Sect, why not?"

Yang Lin's eyes sharpened with suspicion, finding it hard to believe these words came from someone who had embezzled the immortal treasury.

"Rest assured." Lin Jing smiled as he walked past Yang Lin. "Neither I nor the Tianyuan Realm have any intention of opposing the Cultivation Alliance. We wouldn't commit such short-sighted mistakes."

"We will operate according to the rules."

Of course, this assumed Lin Jing could actually seize it in the first place.

......

Yang Lin wasn't being perfunctory—the current situation differed from before.

Previously, he coveted the millennium premium immortal source because it could likely help the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and others become Celestial Beasts.

But after obtaining numerous ordinary immortal sources from Lady Nethersoil and the immortal city treasury, Lin Jing realized they weren't far from Celestial Beast status even without that premium source.

Thus, that particular premium source wasn't absolutely necessary for personal use anymore.

If he could exchange it for more useful treasures from the Cultivation Alliance, Lin Jing could accept that.

However, rather than handing it to the alliance, Lin Jing had developed alternative plans should he obtain it.

"The Cultivation Alliance doesn't have Tianyuan Realm's coordinates. Even if we ignore them, Tianyuan wouldn't be affected."

"But the Heavenly Demon Sect genuinely possesses our coordinates, having already dispatched cultivators beforehand."

"Now with my high-profile actions in the Origin Realm, I might have drawn the sect's attention to the Tianyuan Continent prematurely."

"Although Tianyuan has many Seeking the Way experts, if the sect dispatches demon-blooded ones of that level, few in our realm could withstand them."

"The primary purpose Tianyuan's experts sent us here was to quickly establish contact with the Cultivation Alliance and secure their assistance..."

"But what if Tianyuan could independently resist the Heavenly Demon Sect? Wouldn't that make the alliance unnecessary?"

Walking through the void, Lin Jing knew the alliance resisted the sect mainly through eleven exceptionally powerful cultivators—the alliance's main and deputy leaders.

Tianyuan certainly lacked experts of that caliber.

Not the First Ancient Emperor.

Not even the Demon Emperor.

But if Tianyuan could produce someone rivaling an alliance leader's strength, they wouldn't need to fear the sect.

Moreover, joining the alliance would carry more weight if Tianyuan had such a powerhouse. Currently joining without one would relegate them to middle-tier status, mere cannon fodder. But with a leader-level expert, they'd enter as high-ranking decision-makers with real authority.

Thus, Lin Jing now believed neither personal use nor alliance exchange represented the optimal use for this premium source.

"The Demon Emperor."

"As a Rare Beast with combat-type Rare Beast Divine Abilities, her strength is astonishing. But her bloodline remains constrained by lower realm rules, preventing her breakthrough to immortal rank."

"Using immortal energy to activate Rare Beast Divine Abilities can elevate bloodlines. If the Demon Emperor used this premium source, she could certainly become a Celestial Beast and reach new heights."

"Though it's uncertain whether she could then rival the alliance's deputy leaders."

"But being fellow ascension-level experts, they'd at least share cultivation realms. Even if gaps remained, they wouldn't be vast—perhaps just lacking some suitable immortal artifacts?"

Lin Jing's thoughts grew active. Concentrating resources to forge Tianyuan a standard-bearer seemed best. With such backing, he could more easily dominate the Origin Realm for millennia...

"How exactly to ensure the Demon Emperor reaches deputy leader-level strength..."

He had to laugh at himself—destined to be a beast tamer indeed. Not content with just training his own spirit beasts, now he had to cultivate a Demon Emperor-level ruler of the monster court...

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 54: Yin Harvest
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 54: Yin Harvest

Nethersoil.

Lin Jing emerged from seclusion and headed straight for this place after leaving Xianlin City.

A wisp of black smoke rose from the Nethersoil, intercepting the approaching Lin Jing who was radiating Buddhist light, and coalesced into a humanoid figure.

"I thought you'd stay in seclusion until death."

Lady Nethersoil said, "Most of the people you wanted me to revive have been resurrected. When will you settle the payment?"

"I'm here for that very reason." Lin Jing smiled. "But same as before, you'll provide the immortal energy."

"Fine, I'll cover it!"

Lin Jing chuckled. As expected of Lady Nethersoil, always generous.

The Dragon Carp could also use immortal energy to fuel Immortal Fire for alchemy, but unfortunately, there weren't many pills requiring its skills currently. However, Lin Jing had an idea for later - refining higher quality Transformation Pills to help these spirits evolve into demonic beings.

Although this realm imposed no restrictions and they could cultivate human forms naturally, taking the pills would undoubtedly enhance their post-transformation talents. When they eventually left the Origin Realm, it would be easier to guide them into joining the Demon Court...

All creatures - whether beasts, plants, or even mountains and rivers gaining sentience - belonged to the demonic race once they took human form. Once the Transformation Pill production line was operational, the Dragon Carp would inevitably ascend to immortal-blooded status through this method.

The Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp were straightforward cases. The Ice Soul Gu posed more difficulties - lacking Rare Beast lineage, its bloodline could only be strengthened gradually through Lin Jing's Beast Taming Secret Arts. Its path to immortal-blooded status would undoubtedly be the slowest.

"Lady, there's one more matter."

"Those with Lunar Yin Physique... you don't need them anymore, right?" Lin Jing revealed his true purpose for this visit.

"Why wouldn't I need them?" Lady Nethersoil pouted. Even mosquitoes provided meat - was Lin Jing really eyeing these scraps?

Lin Jing nodded: "Better hand them over to me. Since you've already phased them out, I want them to assist me with one task... after which they'll regain their freedom."

"These individuals are after all prodigies from various realms, each with their own masters. Since you plan to leave the Origin Realm, keeping them forcibly serves no purpose. On the contrary, it would only accumulate enemies after departure."

"What do you want them for? Yin Harvesting? Several dozen Nether Physiques - could you even handle that???" Lady Nethersoil examined Lin Jing suspiciously. This was indeed an exceptional batch of cultivation vessels - harvesting them all could easily forge a Yang-attribute Postnatal Immortal Physique!

"What nonsense." Lin Jing shook his head. "Look at this."

He summoned his avatar. Lady Nethersoil's eyes widened as a living nine-tailed fox formed from black mist emerged from the void: "The Emperor!?"

"It's... truly alive?"

"Not the Dark Emperor, merely its shell. I usurped it with my avatar, so now it serves as my incarnation." Lin Jing explained. "Composed purely of dark elements, the power of these Nether Physiques would greatly nourish it."

"You want to use those Nether Maidens' energy to restore it to peak condition."

"Yin Harvesting for Yin then." Lady Nethersoil muttered - not much difference really. But then she scrutinized Lin Jing: "Sect Master, how is this possible? The Dark Emperor perished so long ago. For your avatar to usurp it... this shouldn't be feasible."

"Unless..." Suddenly, Lady Nethersoil recalled something.

The wanted order issued by the Demon Sect for a certain individual!

The supposedly favored inheritor of Demon Emperor Tianchou turned out to have a fabricated identity, suspected to be either a spy cultivated by the Meteor Spirit Beast or the Cultivation Alliance!

No conclusive evidence determined which side this person truly belonged to. However, rumors claimed that when Sheng Kun was about to kill Mo Yu, the Meteor Spirit Beast intervened, successfully enabling Mo Yu's primordial spirit to escape.

Thus most speculated this Mo Yu was likely a demonic bloodline cultivated through the Meteor Spirit Beast's long-term schemes.

Now, Lady Nethersoil gasped sharply, looking at Lin Jing with disbelief.

"Sect Master, don't tell me Mo Yu is your avatar... The only being capable of such rapid usurpation would be a Heavenly Demon's primordial spirit. Coincidentally, Mo Yu... had his primordial spirit severely damaged by Sheng Kun recently! He'd need a new vessel!"

Lin Jing smiled: "As expected of Lady Nethersoil. Correct guess."

"Truly?!" Lady Nethersoil felt shocked. She thought she'd already held this beast tamer in high esteem, but still underestimated him.

The two most sensational human prodigies in the Origin Realm these past years were actually the same person!

One deeply trusted by the Cultivation Alliance's Young Alliance Master Li Tianyi;
the other highly valued by the Demon Sect's Sacred Son.

Good heavens... Now she truly sensed her sect master was playing an enormous game.

"I won't take your Nether Physiques for free. Soon, I plan to challenge the Meteor Spirit Beast. If things go well, perhaps I can gift you a couple of its bloodline essence stones..."

"You're going to fight the Meteor Spirit Beast?!"

Lin Jing narrowed his eyes: "Testing my avatar's limits. With these Nether Physiques, the Dark Emperor's body should reach peak power. Then I'll use the avatar as bait to lure out those Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators wanting to capture it, allowing its Slaughter Immortal Physique's foundation to advance further. Finally, supplemented by... perfected demonic bloodline, why couldn't I battle the Meteor Spirit Beast, however strong it may be?"

"Moreover, after clashing with Sheng Kun, the Meteor Spirit Beast likely hasn't fully recovered yet."

Darkness, slaughter, demonic blood...

Gasp...

After Lin Jing outlined his avatar's configuration, Lady Nethersoil felt stomach pains. When had his avatar's demonic bloodline reached perfection?! During her long stay in the Origin Realm, she'd encountered only a countable number of prodigies with perfected demonic bloodlines - all Sacred Son-level figures. This sect master...

Recalling Lin Jing's true self's Longevity Immortal Physique, Lady Nethersoil sensed the future ruler of Origin Realm might truly be Lin Jing.

This time, Canghai and the Meteor Spirit Beast had met their match!

"Of course, my goal isn't to completely eliminate the Meteor Spirit Beast."

"We'll see how the battle goes."

"After all, it helped my avatar. I'm actually approaching it with sincerity."

Lin Jing also wanted to check if the Meteor Spirit Beast had any suitable Star Beasts for contracts...

After revealing some trump cards, Lady Nethersoil finally regarded Lin Jing with a trace of awe. Without another word, she summoned the long-vacationing Nether Physique cultivators.

These Lunar Yin Physique female cultivators had their powers sealed by Lady Nethersoil. Even attempting to break through to the Void Mystical Stage to leave the Origin Realm was impossible. Barring miracles, they'd spend lifetimes contributing their energy to Lady Nethersoil.

"Greetings, Lady." The Nether Maidens immediately kowtowed when Lady Nethersoil appeared.

"Hmph, consider yourselves fortunate to encounter nobility. You need only operate one final grand array to earn your freedom. Afterwards, I'll hand you over to Lin Jing, Deputy City Lord of Xianlin City from the Cultivation Alliance. With him, you may choose to continue cultivating in the Origin Realm or return to your native cultivation worlds as you wish!"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 55: Devil''s Delight
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 55: Devil's Delight

Freedom.

The Lunar Yin Physique prodigies present had resigned themselves to their fate, believing they would forever remain tools of Lady Nethersoil. Yet when another Lunar Yin Physique was recently taken away by Lady Nethersoil, a spark of hope for freedom had reignited within them.

Though the chance was slim, at least one of their kind had succeeded. They never expected hope would arrive so quickly.

Lin Jing, deputy city lord of Xianlin City from the Cultivation Alliance... Just who was this person who could take them from Lady Nethersoil's grasp? These Lunar Yin Physique holders had been isolated here for years, completely unaware of the outside world, knowing nothing of the Heaven-Earth Sect or any acting city lords.

"I won't go! I wish to serve Lady Nethersoil forever! She has treated us well, imparting secret techniques and providing resources. We've merely contributed some effort to operate the grand formation - how could we abandon her after all her nurturing?"

"We can never repay Her Ladyship's kindness! At least let us serve her for another thousand years!"

Among the Lunar Yin Physique holders, a beautiful female cultivator suddenly spoke up, plunging both Lady Nethersoil and the others into contemplation. If looks could kill, this woman would have died a hundred times over by now.

"What was your name again?" Lady Nethersoil inquired.

"Feng Lingwan... Excellent. The Nethersoil needs loyal talents like you. But whether you stay with me or go with City Lord Lin makes little difference. If your heart is true, then follow City Lord Lin faithfully." Lady Nethersoil declared, "Enough talk - prepare the 'Ten Shackles Yin-Gathering Immortal Formation'!"

The Nether Physique holders sighed in relief. This formation... using Immortal Sources as its core and Lunar Yin Physiques as its channels, would extract a portion of Yin origin power from each participant to strengthen the main operator's corresponding power. Operating it was relatively easy - far simpler than reviving the dead.

They had performed this formation several times before to strengthen Lady Nethersoil's spirits, becoming quite proficient. Yet this time, they couldn't discern the main operator's identity, obscured as they were by swirling dark mist. For the sake of their impending freedom, their only task now was to perfectly execute this final grand formation.

..........

One year later.

A rumor began circulating.

Someone had discovered Mo Yu - who had been severely wounded by Sheng Kun years ago - was attempting soul usurpation in a hidden cave dwelling. Upon hearing this, both righteous and demonic factions, along with mountain spirits and wild monsters, all mobilized!

Though some found it suspicious - if Mo Yu truly belonged to the Meteor Spirit Beast or the Cultivation Alliance, why would he choose some random location for soul usurpation? Surely it was a trap. Yet Mo Yu remained an irresistible target.

As someone valued by the Demon Sect's Sacred Son, he must possess numerous treasures. Even if he had nothing, his demonic bloodline alone made him coveted by many factions. Regardless of the rumor's veracity or potential traps, hordes of people descended upon the rumored location to hunt for Mo Yu, confident their strength would protect them from harm.

The demonic sect members turned out in greatest numbers, enticed by the bounty. Successfully killing Mo Yu would bring tremendous rewards. Within the Heavenly Demon Sect, not only had Sacred Son Sheng Kun issued a warrant for Mo Yu, but even the sect's upper echelons had ordered his execution. It was said whoever killed Mo Yu and extracted his demonic bloodline would almost certainly receive assistance from the sect's mighty ones to fuse with that bloodline, replacing Mo Yu as the new demonic entity.

Few demonic cultivators could resist such temptation.

"According to divination, Mo Yu was severely wounded by the Sacred Son and escaped with only his primordial spirit. It's reasonable he'd be preparing for soul usurpation - this might be genuine."

"In primordial spirit form during the critical usurpation moment - this is the perfect time to kill him. Miss this opportunity, and once he obtains a new body, eliminating him will become far more difficult."

"Indeed. I've also received intelligence from beyond our realm - they intend to send a new Sacred Son into the Origin Realm to seize premium Immortal Sources. Currently this new Sacred Son is still strengthening himself, receiving teachings from the sect's Demon Emperors. Once he arrives, we'll lose our chance at Mo Yu."

Demonic cultivators converged on the false location Lin Jing had spread, while deep in the void, a nine-tailed fox incarnation's eyes gleamed with bloodlust. Having received enhancements from dozens of Lunar Yin Physique holders, his dark power had fully revived, perfectly merging with his complete demonic energy to form terrifying dark demonic force.

In terms of strength, aside from the Four Heavenly Kings, no opponents remained. The cultivators coming to kill Mo Yu were, in Lin Jing's view, utterly insignificant - even if they united!

However, just as Lady Nethersoil had deduced the connection between Mo Yu and Lin Jing through the Dark Emperor, others might too. Lin Jing currently had no intention of revealing his incarnation had usurped the Dark Emperor's identity. Maintaining this deception was simple - he merely needed to avoid appearing in person.

Changing forms or using illusions would be unnecessarily complicated.

Slaughtering these cultivators required no personal appearance from Mo Yu.

As more and more cultivators gathered, everyone suddenly looked up toward a massive fissure appearing in the sky.

A gigantic arm phantom radiating terrifying demonic energy slowly descended from the heavens, gripping an executioner's sword condensed from substantial demonic qi..... Kill. Enjoy.

Heavenly Demon Realm.

This realm gathered over a hundred Seeking the Way cultivators with demonic bloodlines. Those without demonic heritage, even if they reached the Seeking the Way Stage, could never enter the demonic core, remaining forever as peripheral members.

The Heavenly Demon Assembly.

This supreme meeting of the Heavenly Demon Sect required both demonic bloodline and Seeking the Way cultivation to attend. Whenever the Heavenly Demon Realm received instructions from higher realms or needed new decisions, the Assembly would convene.

"We've heard that impostor claiming to be Demon Emperor Tianchou's successor has reappeared, committing massacres in the Origin Realm. Our sect has lost many disciples because of him."

"That stray demonic bloodline must be recovered. Send the new Sacred Son to eliminate him immediately..."

"After voting, our next invasion target will be the Tianyuan Realm. Years ago we sent an outstanding non-demonic disciple to infiltrate it, though he ultimately failed. According to his intelligence, the Tianyuan Realm suffers constant warfare with fragmented legacies and scattered resources - its strongest being merely a Postnatal Immortal Physique cultivating fortune."

"Our demonic armies could conquer it anytime, hence... we merely placed it on the invasion list without special attention, waiting its turn."

"Now we're advancing the schedule because the Tianyuan Realm has produced an exceptional talent - Lin Jing of the Longevity Body, currently a prominent figure in the Origin Realm. Once the Cultivation Alliance establishes teleportation arrays there, invasion will become difficult. Thus we must conquer the Tianyuan Realm with utmost speed."

"Which Demon Emperor will lead the expedition..."

"I'll go. Alone is sufficient." Among the Demon Emperors, a female spoke up: "Trapped in the Star Abyss so long, my sword's grown rusty. The Tianyuan Realm... barring unexpected delays, I can reach it within sixty years. Hopefully you'll have dealt with that impostor claiming my legacy by my return."

"Demon Emperor Tianchou..." The other Demon Emperors looked at her. No one voiced objections.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 56: Twenty-Three Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 56: Twenty-Three Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path

Origin Realm.

After Lin Jing's avatar suppressed and killed all the cultivators who came to hunt him, the power of the Slaughter Immortal Physique began to revive.

The previous Slaughter Immortal Physique wielder had relied on its perfected form to wreak havoc across the Origin Realm, with few besides the Four Heavenly Kings capable of restraining it.

After Lin Jing usurped the Slaughter Immortal Physique, its power had declined. The physique's vessel was later destroyed by Sheng Kun, leaving only fragments of its original essence.

However, after being nourished by recent killings, the Slaughter Immortal Physique quickly returned to its perfected state—after all, those who came to hunt Lin Jing were all high-quality nourishment.

"Almost done." After collecting all the spoils, Mo Yu's eyes flashed.

"But these battles also revealed some weaknesses that must be addressed."

After indulging in slaughter, Mo Yu left the area. Rumors began spreading across the Origin Realm about a terrifying development—Mo Yu's demonic bloodline might have reached perfection. Otherwise, how could he effortlessly slaughter dozens of cultivators at the same cultivation level?

Though none knew which side Mo Yu belonged to, they could at least confirm he wasn't allied with them.

"This is troublesome. Mo Yu is actually this powerful—no wonder he once killed one of Lin Jing's spirit beasts."

In Xianlin City, City Lord Yang Lin frowned deeply. Another unpredictable variable had emerged, and Lin Jing's whereabouts remained unknown—truly worrying.

"Here."

Elsewhere, Lin Jing's true form tossed a Transformation Pill to his avatar.

After recent battles, they'd realized the spirit form's body wasn't ideal.

Whether executing the Heavenly Demon Finger, Heavenly Demon Crossing, or Heavenly Demon Sword Arts, all were designed for humanoid cultivation.

While the Dark Emperor's form could perform them, the slight deviations created significant flaws.

This posed no issue against weaker cultivators, but would become a critical weakness when facing the Meteor Spirit Beast.

Thus, the true form had the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse and Dragon Carp procure a supreme-grade Transformation Pill to help the avatar regain human form.

After consuming the pill, the avatar's form rapidly transformed from a nine-tailed fox composed of black mist—first becoming a youth with whiskers and nine tails, then gradually losing those features as the pill took full effect, reverting to Mo Yu's original appearance.

"The human form is more comfortable," Mo Yu remarked casually, gazing skyward.

"Indeed."

"You go negotiate with the Meteor Spirit Beast first. Revealing your identity is acceptable if necessary—I'll appear when needed."

"Take the Ice Soul Gu with you. Leave the Spell Elemental behind—you two can revive if killed, but losing the Spell Elemental would be problematic."

After this soliloquy, Mo Yu took the Ice Soul Gu straight toward the extraterrestrial Star Dust Realm.

"Understood. I'll test its condition first."

Using Heavenly Demon Crossing, Mo Yu arrived instantly beyond the realm's boundaries, observing the Star Dust Realm's infinite spatial barriers.

Drawing his sword, he cleaved a massive fissure through the barriers with a single stroke, then blasted inward with a thunderous boom.

Meanwhile, the Meteor Spirit Beast—still recovering from its battle with Sheng Kun—suddenly opened its eyes upon its cosmic throne, casting its gaze downward.

"You."

Frowning, it recognized the aggressively approaching Mo Yu and sensed his overwhelming killing intent.

This visitor meant trouble...

But how could someone instantly defeated by Sheng Kun possibly pose a threat?

Without wasting words, Mo Yu attacked immediately after breaching the realm's barriers, while the Meteor Spirit Beast descended instantly to suppress the invader.

The spirit's punch fell like a meteor—with such speed and power that ordinary immortal physiques would perish instantly, just as the First Ancient Emperor had died from a meteor strike during his cosmic travels.

Yet as a sword light brimming with demonic energy flashed, the spirit was shocked to discover not only was its punch completely blocked, but an terrifying force actually cracked its fist before sending it flying back with overwhelming power.

"Perfected Demonic Bloodline?!" it exclaimed in astonishment.

"After all this time, haven't your subordinates informed you? Ah right—you've been recovering from injuries."

BOOM!

In their first exchange, the Meteor Spirit Beast went flying like a meteor itself, leaving the realm's other spirits dumbfounded.

"Meteor Spirit Beast, I am Mo Yu, here to express gratitude for saving my life."

Lin Jing's avatar hovered midair, sword in hand, laughing heartily. It seemed the spirit hadn't fully recovered yet.

This would make negotiations much easier.

[Heavenly Star Seal.]

As the avatar finished speaking, a deep voice seemed to resonate from the surrounding cosmos. Countless starlight converged at unimaginable speed, forming a celestial body before the avatar could react.

HUMMM!

A massive starlit boulder trapped Mo Yu inside, sealing him completely. The spirit floated calmly outside this astral prison, coldly observing its captive.

"Is this how you express gratitude?"

"Have you decided how you wish to die now?"

Though imprisoned within the celestial cage, Mo Yu remained calm: "Using such immortal techniques while injured must be terribly draining."

"If I break this, could we...talk?"

"With your Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path?"

"To be precise, the fake Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path," the spirit sneered. This seal was formed from a starstone it had refined for millennia, reinforced with immortal energy.

Even Sheng Kun would struggle to break free!

Though unsure how Mo Yu perfected his demonic bloodline, he surely couldn't compare to Sheng Kun.

Yet the next moment—

Hundreds of sword marks pierced outward from within the star, unleashing terrifying sword energy blending darkness, slaughter, and demonic power.

BOOOOOM!!!

The star exploded. Mo Yu emerged before the astonished spirit, surrounded by over twenty bizarre demonic arms radiating sinister energy like a demon god.

"You're right—the previous Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Arts were indeed fake."

"But I've since mastered something stronger—the Twenty-Three Armed Great Demon Sword Path, with even greater power!"

Meteor Spirit Beast: ???

The spirit was flabbergasted. What nonsense was this? Where did these twenty-plus arms come from?!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 57: The Path to Dominance
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 57: The Path to Dominance

These twenty-plus arms weren't illusions or the handiwork of the Spell Elemental. Mo Yu wasn't even carrying the Spell Elemental with him. Though he no longer had the Spell Elemental's help to manifest multiple arms for the Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path, in his current state, Mo Yu didn't need its assistance anymore.

The Slaughter Immortal Physique could enhance cultivation realms or mystical abilities during acts of slaughter. In the Origin Realm, he naturally wouldn't choose to improve his cultivation base. So during the killings, his avatar had been using the essence of slaughter to enhance the "Three Heads and Six Arms" technique. This divine ability had effortlessly reached perfection.

With Three Heads and Six Arms, Mo Yu could similarly execute the Multi-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path. But most crucially, after usurping the Dark Emperor's body, he'd actually gained nine tails as flexible as arms - these tails could also function as arms to wield sword techniques.

Moreover, since the avatar had now formed a contract with the main body, their connection had deepened not only with each other but also with the Ice Soul Gu. Compared to before, he could now merge with the Ice Soul Gu more seamlessly, effortlessly controlling its eight "arms" during fusion.

Six, nine, eight - in his current peak state, why would he need to manifest additional illusory arms? If he wished, he could produce over twenty arms without issue. And these twenty-plus arms weren't just for show - each could genuinely unleash formidable power!

The Three Heads and Six Arms provided artifact power bonuses, the nine tails granted dark energy enhancements, while the Ice Soul Gu itself bestowed sword technique mastery...

"The Eight-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path of Demon Emperor Tianchou can't compare to my Twenty-Three-Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Path."

Mo Yu's eyes flashed as he unleashed his full combat power, charging straight at the Meteor Spirit Beast. From their earlier clash, he'd discerned that the Meteor Spirit Beast was still injured, not yet restored to peak condition - this was undoubtedly the best opportunity to deal with it.

Facing Lin Jing's assault, the Meteor Spirit Beast struggled to comprehend - this guy... wasn't just about having perfected demonic bloodline. There was even a terrifying dark energy about him that felt strangely familiar yet unplaceable. Combined with that tyrannical killing intent, the fusion of three powers made the Meteor Spirit Beast feel like it was seeing another Sheng Kun.

This guy's strength... had definitely reached the level of the Demon Sect's Sacred Son! The Meteor Spirit Beast's assessment wasn't far off - Mo Yu alone might have lacked some foundation, but after fusing with the quasi-celestial grade Ice Soul Gu, his combat power had reached its peak.

Crash!

The twenty-three-armed Mo Yu relentlessly pursued the stone-bodied Meteor Spirit Beast, exemplifying the principle of striking while the iron was hot. As the Meteor Spirit Beast retreated step by step, Lin Jing was also astonished.
