Though he could sense the Meteor Spirit Beast struggling against Mo Yu's full-powered assault, its terrifying defensive capabilities baffled him - this thing... endured countless sword strikes with only superficial cracks, showing no signs of sustaining any substantial damage!

Tens of thousands of years had tempered the Meteor Spirit Beast's body to something even more formidable than perfected demonic physique.

"Enough!"

Amid the fierce battle, the Meteor Spirit Beast shouted, "Coming here, you shouldn't have intended just to fight me. Speak! What do you want to discuss? If you don't stop now, I'll definitely annihilate you here!" Killing intent radiated from the Meteor Spirit Beast too. Though currently not in optimal condition, one shouldn't forget - this was the Star Dust Realm, its stronghold, with countless spirits stationed here.

Facing this threat, Mo Yu halted because his spiritual sense had detected countless spirits of the Star Dust Realm unknowingly taking positions within numerous grand formations. At the Meteor Spirit Beast's mere thought, countless stellar killing arrays would activate, trapping and eliminating him instantly.

Not being one to fight two against one, Mo Yu naturally wouldn't accuse the other of treachery. He spoke calmly, "My purpose here is simple - I wish to discuss cooperation with you!"

"Cooperation?" The Meteor Spirit Beast coldly regarded Mo Yu. "What possible cooperation could we have?"

"Heaven-Earth Sect." Mo Yu stated, "I want to invite you to join the Heaven-Earth Sect."

"Heaven-Earth Sect?" The unfamiliar term initially puzzled the Meteor Spirit Beast, but it soon recalled what this organization was - established by the acting city lord of Xianlin City, with Lady Nethersoil and dozens of other spirits having joined it!

The Meteor Spirit Beast couldn't comprehend why beings like Lady Nethersoil would join such an organization. It had sent agents to investigate but found nothing.

Wait... Mo Yu was a demonic-blooded cultivator. How could he be connected to Lin Jing and the Heaven-Earth Sect?

"A spy... you're actually a Cultivation Alliance spy planted in the Demon Sect!" The next moment, the Meteor Spirit Beast exclaimed in realization. If Mo Yu wasn't its own planted agent, then he could only be a spy cultivated by the Cultivation Alliance!

"I'm not a Cultivation Alliance spy," Mo Yu said, "but I am indeed a member of the Heaven-Earth Sect."

"Meteor Spirit Beast, consider this - you're leading these spirits in rebellion precisely because you don't want to become nourishment for external cultivators, because you want to break free from immortal restraints, right? Join the Heaven-Earth Sect. We can grant you freedom, help you leave the Origin Realm!"

"Is this what you wanted to discuss?" The Meteor Spirit Beast chuckled darkly. "And if I say no?"

"Then the Star Dust Realm need not exist anymore, and you'll die today." Mo Yu declared. A fully-powered Meteor Spirit Beast would indeed be troublesome to deal with, but after its battle with Sheng Kun, he believed he could handle it!

Plans had changed - he'd decided that if the Meteor Spirit Beast wouldn't submit today, he'd follow the example of those two celestial spirits and eliminate a competitor early. But if he could subdue it, he'd be one step closer to dominating the Origin Realm!

"You? Do you realize your life hangs by my whim right now?" The Meteor Spirit Beast laughed heartily as the entire realm's formations began glowing.

But the next moment, its laughter abruptly ceased.

The Mo Yu before it had reverted to his original form - a fox it recognized all too well.

This fox...

Then, a phantom appeared beside the fox - the projection of Lin Jing, sect master of Heaven-Earth Sect and deputy city lord of Xianlin City. Standing beside his avatar, Lin Jing's projection spoke, "Meteor Spirit Beast, you don't actually think killing my beast with these formations would end matters, do you?"

"My Beast Master Sect possesses a secret art - at the cost of cultivation realm regression, a beastmaster can revive their contracted beast. Meaning even if you kill him, I can resurrect him indefinitely."

"I possess the Longevity Immortal Physique with infinite lifespan, and have mastered the Heavenly Demon Body. Even if my realm falls to mortal level, I can easily return to the Nascent Soul Transformation stage."

"How many times can you kill him?"

"Choose now - cooperation or destruction. I'll even let you try killing him once at full power before deciding. Go ahead."

"Mo Yu... is actually your contracted beast?!!!" The Meteor Spirit Beast, which had been confident until now, hadn't been shaken even upon learning Mo Yu was part of Heaven-Earth Sect and allied with Lin Jing. But discovering that Mo Yu - whose combat power approached its own peak - was merely this Lin Jing's beast caused violent tremors in its dao heart!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 58: The Mysterious Master
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 58: The Mysterious Master

From the Meteor Spirit Beast's perspective, Mo Yu's strength was undoubtedly formidable. No matter what, it couldn't believe such an existence was merely a tamed beast!

[I'll allow you to attempt killing him at full power once before deciding. Go ahead.]

Yet Lin Jing's confidence made the Meteor Spirit Beast hesitate. If Lin Jing spoke the truth, it would be terrifying. A single Mo Yu was already this powerful - if he could continuously revive, he'd become an even more unsolvable existence.

Moreover, the Meteor Spirit Beast knew Lin Jing still had a Celestial Beast corpse at his disposal! Setting everything else aside, if Lin Jing controlled the Celestial Beast corpse to attack now, forcing the Star Dust Realm to face both Mo Yu and Lin Jing simultaneously, the realm would undoubtedly suffer devastating losses.

Then...

But... it absolutely couldn't submit to Lin Jing either! Leaving the Origin Realm... while many spirits might yearn for this, it held no appeal. What it needed to accomplish could only be done by remaining in the Origin Realm!

Therefore...

Array... activate!

Putting himself in the Origin Realm spirits' position, joining the Heaven-Earth Sect for a chance to leave should offer countless benefits with no drawbacks. Especially when facing another powerful threat - this relatively harmless option should be the obvious choice.

Had he overlooked something? The Meteor Spirit Beast's refusal was astonishingly decisive.

"Then let's fight." Though Lin Jing had exaggerated somewhat, he hadn't lied. He could indeed revive fallen beasts, but the revival cost wasn't as trivial as he'd implied. Not only would the beast tamer's realm drop, the revived beast's cultivation would decline even more severely!

Fortunately, Mo Yu possessed the Heavenly Demon Physique. Even if each revival dropped him a major realm, by burning lifespan, he could temporarily reach the peak of Nascent Soul Transformation after every revival! Afterwards, it would just require resources to rebuild his cultivation.

After all, in the Origin Realm, cultivation level meant little.

"Twenty-Three Armed Heavenly Demon Sword Domain—!"

"Cease..."

Just as this battle - which would severely damage both sides - was about to erupt, a clear young girl's voice suddenly emerged from the Star Dust Realm's core.

"Who?"

Hearing this voice, Lin Jing's heart lurched, his sword intent failing to properly condense. The Meteor Spirit Beast also visibly froze, then its stony face displayed indescribable delight!

"Master, you've awakened!"

The half-activated formation abruptly halted as the Meteor Spirit Beast looked at Lin Jing with joyous anticipation, its gaze already treating him as dead.

"Master, help me eliminate this person."

What the hell?

Lin Jing shuddered, an involuntary sense of crisis surfacing. The Star Dust Realm's killing formation hadn't evoked this feeling - after all, only his avatar would perish there. But this unknown voice made even his true body outside the realm feel hairs stand on end.

Master?!

No time to analyze why the Meteor Spirit Beast had an unheard-of master. But undoubtedly, any existence it called master, trusted so completely, and could trigger Lin Jing's danger instincts must surpass even the Meteor Spirit Beast at full power!

"Retreat!"

Mo Yu turned to flee, but upon entering the void, golden chains bound him completely. Lin Jing recognized these as the immortal technique Immortal Binding Chains - his true body had practiced them too. Yet Mo Yu's struggles revealed these chains were several times stronger than Lin Jing could produce, surpassing even the Meteor Spirit Beast's Heavenly Star Seal in restraining power.

Attempting to break free with Heavenly Demon Crossing, he found spatial power completely sealed.

"Just who is the Meteor Spirit Beast's master?" Mo Yu's eyes flashed as he urgently summoned his true body. The next instant, powerful spatial energy from a leaf token on his avatar attempted to teleport him away.

This spatial energy proved exceptionally unique, managing to teleport even the binding chains away.

Successful escape made Lin Jing exhale in relief, realizing he'd underestimated the situation. Who knew the Star Dust Realm hid such a terrifying existence?

But he couldn't blame his carelessness - neither the Heavenly Demon Sect nor the Cultivation Alliance had such intelligence despite years in the Origin Realm. Lin Jing now sensed the realm's depths exceeded his understanding.

"I can't repeat this. The Longevity Body's advantage is time - I was too impatient."

"Retreat first, we'll deal with the chains later." Lin Jing examined his bound avatar, but before he could breathe easy, a golden light descended from above - the enemy's pursuit speed defied expectations.

"Why leave in such haste?"

"Rest assured, I bear you no hostility."

The golden figure appeared before them. The "master" the Meteor Spirit Beast spoke of resembled a white ball of fluff - like spherical wool or cotton, its race unidentifiable.

Shrouded in starlight, it radiated profound mystery and unfathomable power, making Lin Jing completely unable to gauge its origins.

"Might I ask your purpose?" Lin Jing maintained composure. Thankfully, the upgraded spatial leaves from his Pine Leaf Mouse proved more effective than Heavenly Demon Crossing, or he'd be done for today.

With spatial leaves and Heavenly Demon Physique as safeguards, Lin Jing could face this being with relative calm.

Who exactly was this? No records in the Cultivation Alliance, never mentioned by underworld spirits either...

"Indeed her legacy..." The white orb seemed indifferent to Lin Jing, its attention locked on the Pine Leaf Mouse perched on his shoulder, clutching a leaf ready to escape!

"Your luck... is quite remarkable."

From these fragments, Lin Jing's mind raced to deduce its identity. It seemed fixated on the Pine Leaf Mouse's power - likely the Rare Beast Divine Abilities. These abilities were embryonic immortal techniques passed down from celestial immortals... meaning it probably recognized the original owner of the Glazed Immortal Eye inherited by the mouse!

"You're an immortal from the Immortal Realm who descended!"

Lin Jing concluded. Indeed, this being felt stronger than Li Tianyi or Sheng Kun. Only an immortal could command the Meteor Spirit Beast's reverence.

The questions remained: when had it descended? Why reside in the Origin Realm? And how became the Meteor Spirit Beast's master?

"Good deduction."

"Successor of Glazed Immortal King... I'd never harm you. Considering the effort required to manifest a power like Glazed Immortal Eye in the lower realm..."

"Among all inherited abilities, this likely ranks top three? No wonder you bullied little Stone... But given its years gathering Origin Sources to sustain my remnant soul, let's consider this matter closed, shall we?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 59: The Pocket Elder
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 59: The Pocket Elder

"Stop testing me. Just state your intentions directly." Lin Jing spoke to the unknown entity before him.

"You've revealed so much to me and even blocked my path to prevent me from leaving. Do you need something from me?" The fragments of information from the other party carried tremendous weight.

First, the master of the Glazed Immortal Eye was actually an Immortal King-level existence. In the Immortal Realm, Immortal Emperors stood at the pinnacle, while Immortal Kings ranked just below them as the most powerful beings. Even the master of the Celestial Palace was merely an Immortal King.

Moreover, this Glazed Immortal King was likely no ordinary Immortal King. If the Glazed Immortal Eye ranked among the top three of all Rare Beast Divine Abilities, then its master must be among the foremost of Immortal Kings. Otherwise, this immortal remnant soul wouldn't have shown them such courtesy out of fear for the Glazed Immortal King's existence.

"Hehe, why don't you guess what I might need?"

Lin Jing pondered: "You're in remnant soul form, which means you didn't descend to the mortal realm through normal means. Even as an immortal remnant, you probably can't maintain existence here for long. I suspect every action you take—no, even just staying conscious—consumes tremendous energy."

"So you cultivated the Meteor Spirit Beast to collect Origin Sources for you. In the lower realm, only the Origin Sources produced by the Origin Realm can meet your survival requirements..."

"But it seems even with the Meteor Spirit Beast gathering Origin Sources for you, you still can't remain awake for extended periods. Otherwise, given your power, there wouldn't be so few legends about you in the Origin Realm."

The mysterious immortal replied: "You're quite clever... I suppose I'm fortunate. There aren't many methods for me to recover in this lower realm. After waiting tens of thousands of years, I've finally found one."

"Exactly."

"The Glazed Immortal Eye."

"If there's sufficient immortal energy to synthesize through the Glazed Immortal Eye, then there's a chance to create an immortal power crystal that could fully restore me!"

"Additionally, if its Glazed Immortal Eye advances to the level of life and soul synthesis, that would also present an opportunity for my recovery."

"So, I wonder if you'd be willing to help me with this."

The Pine Leaf Mouse's face darkened—why did it have to be the one doing all the work!

This was bad. There was no way Lin Jing would refuse now.

"If you want our help, shouldn't you first reveal your origins and what you can offer in return?" Lin Jing inquired.

"Helping me brings you only benefits, no harm. My identity wouldn't mean anything to you even if I told you. Just know that I participated in the transformation of the Origin Realm long ago. That's why, after encountering misfortune in the Immortal Realm, I was able to escape to the Origin Realm as a remnant wisp of soul—though that was all very long ago."

"Moreover, I also participated in the Heavenly Demon Mountain's Great Plan of the Demon Star—the project to send legacies to the lower realms and strengthen demonic beasts to resist the Heavenly Demon Sect..."

"You could say I'm one of the good demons who's contributed much to the development and safety of the lower realms."

Listening to the other party's self-praise, Lin Jing judged that this being's cultivation must be at least at the Immortal Lord level, possibly even Immortal King, rather than just an ordinary True Immortal from the Immortal Realm.

"If you're willing to help me, I can have Little Stone assist you in gaining more benefits within the Origin Realm."

"Of course, the greatest benefit would be me helping you grow stronger directly!"

"For example?"

"For example, I can influence the type of Rare Beast Divine Abilities that demonic beasts awaken!"

"Most demonic beasts awakening Rare Beast bloodlines depends largely on fate and luck—though destiny also plays a role."

"The Heavenly Demon Mountain collaborated with countless demon immortals to send down innumerable divine abilities to the lower realms. But most of these were merely legacies from True Immortal-level Celestial Beasts. Only a minority came from Immortal Lord-level Celestial Beasts. As for Immortal King-level legacies—those numbered fewer than five successfully transmitted. The Glazed Immortal Eye was one of them."

"So you should understand now. Because I participated in the Great Plan of the Demon Star, I can turn this random awakening into a targeted one! I can help you obtain those powerful legacies that haven't yet found inheritors!"

"You just need to find a demonic beast with suitable talent and potential, and I can help awaken it as a Rare Beast!"

Lin Jing took a deep breath. Could this mysterious being truly accomplish such things?

Should he trust the other party...

The Heavenly Demon's divine sense naturally had no effect on such an existence, leaving Lin Jing unable to verify the truth of its claims... However...

After some thought, Lin Jing set aside his hostility and clasped his hands respectfully: "This junior has been presumptuous. Since Senior was one of the architects of the Origin Realm and even planned the birth of Rare Beasts, this junior's cultivation journey owes much to Senior's contributions."

"Now that Senior faces difficulties, I'll naturally assist to my utmost ability. However, the Pine Leaf Mouse currently lacks the capability to synthesize immortal energy or achieve so-called life synthesis..."

The mysterious immortal said: "No matter. It's just a matter of sleeping a while longer. After waiting this long, waiting until it reaches the Ascension stage where it can synthesize Origin Sources will be but the blink of an eye."

"What you should worry about now is how to keep it alive long enough to reach the Ascension realm." The mysterious immortal continued: "With the Glazed Immortal King's legacy, your current strength is respectable, but you're far from invincible in this lower realm."

"Ordinary True Immortals from the Heavenly Demon Sect can descend to the mortal realm at any time. If their experts learn you possess the Glazed Immortal King's legacy, you'll be dead men walking!"

"Fortunately, most Heavenly Demon Sect cultivators in the lower realms probably wouldn't detect it. Only because I've had close contact with the Glazed Immortal King did I notice you."

"The Heavenly Demon Sect..." Lin Jing said: "If the Heavenly Demon Sect is so powerful, can the lower realms truly succeed in overthrowing them?"

"Who knows." The mysterious immortal replied: "The Immortal Realm certainly can't. Although the Demon Lord is only at the Immortal Emperor realm, he somehow obtained the Heavenly Dao's Supreme Treasure, leaving even other Immortal Emperors powerless against him. They can only pin their hopes on the lower realms not falling completely to thwart his ambitions."

"The demonic beast faction adopted the Great Plan of the Demon Star to bestow legacies upon lower realm beasts. As for humans, they chose to have some True Immortals and Immortal Lords abandon all power and memories, retaining only their talents to reincarnate into the lower realms. Oh, several alliance leaders of the Cultivation Alliance are reincarnated immortals. With the ascension channels blocked by the Heavenly Demon Sect, it's incredibly difficult for the Immortal Realm to extend its reach downward—too many restrictions. I suspect I might be the only loophole that slipped through."

After hearing this, Lin Jing couldn't help but marvel at how much this mysterious immortal knew. If it could remain awake and accompany him, it would be like having a "pocket elder" always at hand.

"Anyway, to demonstrate my sincerity, I'll first help you obtain an upper realm legacy. In return, you need only make an oath. How about it?"

"Senior, could you help awaken a Rare Beast Divine Ability for it then?" Lin Jing summoned the only companion without such an ability—the Ice Soul Gu.

The creature looked on eagerly.

"This... it's a bit too old. Legacies bond better with young beasts, and it would be less effort for me with higher success rates. Bring me a young beast instead!"

Ice Soul Gu: ??

I'm old? Your entire family is old!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 60: Rare Beast Divine Abilities
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 60: Rare Beast Divine Abilities

Age

The inheritance of celestial beast divine abilities in the Immortal Realm truly correlates with age.

Lin Jing recalled Old Man Heavenly Secrets' deduction—it seemed his inference was correct.

Considering the Ice Soul Gu, even just counting this lifetime, its age was actually quite advanced.

If accounting for its previous reincarnations, its age was even greater, absolutely disqualifying it from being considered a young beast.

Lin Jing couldn't help but look at the Ice Soul Gu with regret.

Sensing Lin Jing's gaze, the Ice Soul Gu widened its eyes in alarm.

What what what...

Lin Jing looked at the Ice Soul Gu.

He had indeed momentarily considered finding a young beast—after all, one purpose of his trip to the Star Dust Realm was to acquire a juvenile Star Beast.

But to make his old companion sacrifice this rare opportunity to grow stronger for the sake of some unknown new beast... he simply couldn't bear it.

"Even if the awakened Rare Beast Divine Ability is weaker with fewer options available, I wonder if Senior could help it awaken the Rare Beast bloodline?" Lin Jing still wanted the Ice Soul Gu to try first.

Even if it only received the inheritance of a True Immortal-grade Celestial Beast, Lin Jing would accept it—he couldn't betray the Ice Soul Gu's expectations.

Moreover, his original purpose in seeking a young beast was gambling on whether it could awaken the Rare Beast bloodline.

If he gave this 100% awakening opportunity to a new beast, it would defeat the whole purpose of gambling!

"Waaah!!!" The Ice Soul Gu shed tiny ice pearls as it looked at Lin Jing.

"Don't look at me—Senior, is this possible?" Lin Jing asked the mysterious immortal, who now fell into deep thought.

"Up to you, but I can't guarantee it'll find suitable Rare Beast bloodline!"

"For better plasticity, the Celestial Demon Mountain naturally prioritizes young beasts with fate connections for inheritance..."

"No problem." Lin Jing cupped his fists. "Then I'll trouble you, Senior."

"Oh, right." Lin Jing suddenly remembered something. "Senior, are you familiar with the Flame Emperor Divine Ability?"

"My other contracted beast also has Rare Beast bloodline and obtained the Flame Emperor inheritance. This divine ability must be quite formidable too!"

Curious, Lin Jing summoned the Dragon Carp, whose eyes sparkled with starlight.

The Flame Emperor Divine Ability—just hearing the name sounded impressive! Could it be that some Immortal Emperor later successfully projected their inheritance down, which it coincidentally obtained?

"Flame Emperor..." The mysterious fuzzy immortal glanced at the Dragon Carp. "There does seem to be such a divine ability."

"But it's rather weak—just a True Immortal-grade Celestial Beast inheritance. Its ceiling is far below the Glazed Immortal Eye."

Dragon Carp: QAQ??

"WHATTTTT!!!!" The Dragon Carp panicked. What? Just a True Immortal inheritance?!

True Immortals were the weakest immortals!

All newly ascended were True Immortals!

It thought the Flame Emperor Divine Ability was quite powerful, not inferior to the Pine Leaf Mouse's Glazed Immortal Eye—how could it be the lowest grade inheritance?

Even if not at Immortal Emperor level, it should at least be Immortal King grade, or Immortal Lord at minimum!

The Pine Leaf Mouse gave the Dragon Carp a glance and shook its head.

The Ice Soul Gu froze momentarily before also shaking its head. It seemed even receiving the most ordinary immortal-grade inheritance wouldn't be so bad after all.

After all, it too had thought the Dragon Carp's Flame Emperor Divine Ability quite strong.

"That weak?" Lin Jing was equally surprised.

The fuzzy immortal explained: "It's also related to how recently the Flame Emperor Divine Ability's owner ascended. That was an arrogant little demon who kept boasting about having Immortal Emperor potential, giving all its divine abilities exaggerated names. Though its talent was indeed exceptional—a rising star of Celestial Demon Mountain. Given time, while Immortal King isn't guaranteed, reaching Immortal Lord shouldn't be difficult."

"While the Flame Emperor Divine Ability isn't remarkable in the Immortal Realm, having certain limitations like inability to endlessly fuse flames, in the lower realm it should be considered quite powerful. Some Immortal Lord-grade inheritances might even be inferior to it in terms of pure might."

It tried comforting the Dragon Carp, who remained somewhat disheartened.

"Alright, that's enough." Lin Jing regretted asking, but it didn't matter—in the lower realm, obtaining immortal-grade flames in advance and freely switching flame attributes with the Flame Emperor Divine Ability had proven extremely useful, greatly aiding their alchemy and artifact forging which fundamentally relied on fire.

"Please help it awaken the Rare Beast bloodline, Senior." Lin Jing returned to the main matter.

The fuzzy immortal said: "Easy. First make an oath."

"Swear in the name of the Glazed Immortal King's successor: If I awaken the Rare Beast bloodline for you all, you must fulfill our agreement—when the eye technique reaches mastery, restore my true form!"

To swear using the Glazed Immortal King successor's identity...

Lin Jing and the Pine Leaf Mouse exchanged glances—these matters seemed too distant. Casually raising a paw, they made the oath.

Satisfied with the pledge, the fuzzy immortal nodded and summoned the Ice Soul Gu forward.

Then, through some unknown demonic method, the sky around them suddenly darkened as starlight shimmered. The fuzzy immortal separated glowing filaments that descended upon the nervous Ice Soul Gu—the next instant—

It felt violently plunged into stellar illusions, its pupils piercing through darkness to behold hundreds of dazzling stars in the cosmos!!!

Sharing its perception, Lin Jing similarly saw these eerie demonic stars filling the sky—among hundreds, three shone with particular brilliance!

"See? I told you it's too old."

"The Celestial Demon Mountain inheritances it can perceive are limited—no Immortal King-grade ones, possibly already claimed by others."

"But fortunately, there are three Immortal Lord-grade ones."

"Don't bother sensing the True Immortal-grade ones—quickly perceive those three Immortal Lord-grade Celestial Beast/Demon inheritances! Choose one swiftly."

The fuzzy immortal's voice grew urgent and strained, making Lin Jing and the Ice Soul Gu focus intensely.

Though only three inheritances remained, having Immortal Lord-grade options already exceeded their expectations.

Perceive!

Under Lin Jing's urging, the Ice Soul Gu rapidly perceived—details of three divine abilities materialized in its mind.

Unlike ordinary immortal techniques from the Immortal Realm requiring personal cultivation, these Rare Beast Divine Ability inheritances were directly imparted by supreme experts transferring their experiential knowledge, allowing inheritors to reach heights nearly matching the original owners with minimal deviation.

[Moon Pluck: Pluck lunar stars at will, refining them into handy immortal tools for manipulation.]

[Dao Fruit: Plant dao seeds within enemies that absorb their spell mastery as they grow. When bearing dao fruits, targets completely forget the spell while fruit consumers gain partial mastery.]

[Domain Lord: Manifest as Heaven's Domain Lord, establishing *rules* within a territory. Violators suffer severe backlash while the Domain Lord gains heavenly tribulation power boosts.]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 61: Star Longevity Hatchling
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 61: Star Longevity Hatchling

The three Immortal Lord-level inheritances left Ice Soul Gu and Lin Jing momentarily indecisive.

As the Fuzzy Immortal's urging echoed in his ears, Lin Jing fell into deep thought.

Moon Pluck appeared to be a refining-oriented divine ability. It wasn't completely incompatible with a poisonous insect like Ice Soul Gu, since artifacts could enhance any spell. Choosing this ability would allow Ice Soul Gu to specialize further in sword techniques, condensing countless lunar swords or crafting artifacts to strengthen its Gu poison.

However, artifact acquisition channels were plentiful—there was no need to obtain them through a divine ability. Moreover, divine abilities required development;
Ice Soul Gu couldn't immediately refine large lunar stars to produce immortal-grade artifacts. At best, quasi-immortal artifacts would be its initial limit.

"Then we'll just have to make Dragon Carp suffer a bit more," Lin Jing mused. "Have it learn artifact forging—it's all about destruction anyway." Whether Dragon Carp had the energy for additional studies became irrelevant when considering the second divine ability: Dao Fruit.

This eliminated the need to enhance Dragon Carp's comprehension for gradual learning. Simply find a talented blacksmith and strip away their forging expertise! Even in the inheritance-deprived Tianyuan Realm, many could craft quasi-immortal artifacts. Across the lower realms, finding someone capable of forging immortal-grade artifacts shouldn't be difficult—the Heavenly Demon Realm undoubtedly housed such demonic cultivators, given their intact connection to the Immortal Realm unlike other cultivation worlds.

Dao Fruit seemed more practical than Moon Pluck in Lin Jing's eyes—it could harvest other geniuses' cultivation achievements for personal use, even strengthening one's faction. Yet he hesitated, for the third option, Calamity Lord, also tempted him.

"Wasn't this essentially becoming the Heavenly Dao's will?" Lin Jing recalled how the Immortal Palace had suppressed Tianyuan Realm's rebels using similar methods, establishing rules like "no shapeshifting" and "plants cannot gain sentience," punishing violators with heavenly tribulations. While Ice Soul Gu couldn't immediately dictate rules across entire realms, this ability would grow with its cultivation, invaluable for monopolizing the Origin Realm and later protecting Tianyuan Realm by establishing favorable heavenly rules.

"Decision paralysis—Dao Fruit or Calamity Lord?" Lin Jing broke into cold sweat, as did Ice Soul Gu. "Senior, any suggestions?"

"Pick Dao Fruit," the Fuzzy Immortal said.

"Why?" Lin Jing asked.

"Simple—even at the same realm, cultivators vary in strength. Before my descent, the Dao Fruit's master was stronger, with potential to reach Immortal King! Choosing this makes your insect their successor—upon reaching the Immortal Realm, immediate patronage awaits. For newly ascended cultivators, having a powerful master and faction is invaluable!"

"Moreover, while Calamity Lord isn't wrong, rule-establishing tribulation manipulation isn't unique to that demon lord—most factions possess similar methods, though he specialized in it. You'll have chances to learn such abilities later. In contrast, Dao Fruit is rarer—few similar spells exist."

"Understood." Having heard this, Lin Jing instructed Ice Soul Gu to select Dao Fruit.

"Precisely. Since the Immortal Palace could casually establish rules, we could either have Mechanized Turtle revive such ancients using the Divine Scripture or steal related abilities from other cultivation worlds via Dao Fruit. Though their mastery wouldn't match the original demon immortal's, having the framework would allow independent cultivation."

"Dao Fruit!" Ice Soul Gu hissed excitedly, further sensing the demon star energy representing this ability—it favored this choice too. First priority: find some Heavenly Demon Sect swordsmen and plunder their sword mastery...

In an instant, Ice Soul Gu fully received the Dao Fruit inheritance, awakening its Rare Beast bloodline. The ability's applications imprinted directly into its veins, ready for immediate use—this exemplified Rare Beast inheritances' might. Just as the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse could use Glazed Immortal Eye at Qi Refining stage, expecting a normal Qi Refining demon beast to self-learn an Immortal King-level ability was pure fantasy.

"Mission accomplished!" The Fuzzy Immortal exhaled in relief, sounding exhausted. "The contract's established. I'll await your immortal technique mastery... Time grows short—ask any final questions quickly."

Lin Jing asked, "By the time its Glazed Immortal Eye reaches your described level, we'll have long surpassed Nascent Soul Transformation. How should we find you then?"

"Hence your alliance with Little Stone. When the time comes, notify it—it will awaken me. I'll then leave the Origin Realm to find you."

"Good!" Lin Jing posed a final question: "Senior, having resided here so long, are there any talented Star Beast hatchlings in the Star Dust Realm? While I didn't choose a demon beast hatchling this time, I'd like to contract a Star Beast as a new familiar."

The Fuzzy Immortal paused before replying, "Forget it. This godforsaken Origin Realm lacks noteworthy Star Beasts. Didn't you see that rock? Despite my training and awakening a Rare Beast ability, it couldn't become the Origin Realm's ruler—it's the most talented celestial lifeform here, and this is its performance."

Lin Jing almost defended the Meteor Spirit Beast: "Didn't you take all its Origin Sources to maintain your condition?"

"What use are

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 62: Alliance
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 62: Alliance

"I've already given instructions to Little Stone."

"He's an honest and simple fellow—don't bully him."

After saying this, the Fuzzy Immortal fell silent.

These words seemed to have drained her last remaining strength.

Lin Jing remained silent.

Star Longevity Cranes?

In some ancient ascension murals of the Tianyuan Realm, celestial cranes did appear when cultivators ascended to the Immortal Realm.

However, unlike what the Fuzzy Immortal described, Tianyuan's records stated these cranes were auspicious celestial beasts raised by immortal palaces.

Living as long as the stars... the Longevity Body among demonic beasts. These terms genuinely piqued Lin Jing's interest.

After all, the mysterious Fuzzy Immortal was a celestial being. In that case, he might as well heed her advice.

It wasn't like he was in any urgent need to contract new spirit beasts anyway.

"Of course, if I could directly contract the Meteor Spirit Beast, I wouldn't complain—I'm not picky," Lin Jing muttered to himself.

Although the Fuzzy Immortal had been disparaging the Meteor Spirit Beast earlier, Lin Jing thought the stone creature seemed quite decent.

If it could fight evenly with a Chaotic Immortal Physique at the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage, then once it reached the Seeking the Way realm, it would at least possess combat power comparable to the Cultivation Alliance's leader.

Moreover, the stone creature wasn't as violent as rumors suggested.

"If the Meteor Spirit Beast has been collecting Origin Sources all these years primarily to offer them to its 'master,' aiming to prolong her life rather than out of personal ambition, then it truly qualifies as an honest and simple fellow," Lin Jing shook his head.

The outside world portrayed the Meteor Spirit Beast as utterly ambitious.

No wonder it remained unmoved by the temptation of leaving the Origin Realm.

If it departed, no one would gather Origin Sources for the Fuzzy Immortal anymore. Without the immortal energy sustaining her life, the Fuzzy Immortal wouldn't last long.

"I'll make another trip to the Star Dust Realm," Lin Jing gazed at the starry void.

"Unbind me first!!" Mo Yu shouted.

When Lin Jing returned to the Star Dust Realm, the Meteor Spirit Beast had already resumed its seat upon the Starry Throne, its master's words still echoing in its mind:

"Set aside your grievances for now. This person can completely resolve my current predicament. I've established a contract with him—henceforth, the two of you may form an alliance to jointly dominate the Origin Realm and strive for my revival."

"Brother Stone, shall we... have a more heartfelt discussion now?" Lin Jing smiled. "I never imagined Brother Stone had such a formidable master. My earlier offense was uncalled for."

"Speak your mind," the Meteor Spirit Beast snorted. Since its master had spoken, it would let bygones be bygones.

"As your esteemed master mentioned, I can resolve her current predicament. However, everything depends on having sufficient Origin Sources and adequate strength," Lin Jing said.

"With our combined forces, dominating the Origin Realm would be effortless. But Brother Stone, your stronghold is established here, free from external threats—unlike my situation."

"My homeland lies beyond. If we monopolize the Origin Realm's resources to save your master, I'll inevitably antagonize both the Cultivation Alliance and the Heavenly Demon Sect."

"Therefore, I have one request."

"Let us first use the Origin Sources we obtain to strengthen my home cultivation world, ensuring my homeland has sufficient foundation to stand firm across the realms. Only afterward would we store Origin Sources... for reviving your master."

The Meteor Spirit Beast frowned, about to speak, but Lin Jing quickly added:

"Of course, I won't let Brother Stone suffer losses during this phase," Lin Jing said. "I won't endlessly invest in my home cultivation world—just nurturing one powerhouse comparable to the Cultivation Alliance's leader would suffice."

"The remaining core forces could be filled by Brother Stone's spirit creatures. If we cooperate, your subordinates would become expendable anyway—surely some among them desire to leave the Origin Realm?"

"Once they leave, returning would be difficult. They'd need a new homeland."

"The Tianyuan Realm would suit them perfectly. With their aptitudes, reaching the Void Mystical Stage would come easily, with hopes of Seeking the Way too. We could use remaining resources to nurture these spirit creatures leaving the Origin Realm, integrating them into Tianyuan to strengthen its power. They'd still remain under Brother Stone's command—this arrangement shouldn't disadvantage you, right?"

"Later, I could formally introduce the Star Dust Realm to collectively join my sect—either the Beast Master Sect or the Demon Court."

"This is already my greatest concession."

Initially reluctant, the Meteor Spirit Beast found Lin Jing's words addressing its concerns perfectly. Indeed, its subordinates knew nothing about its mysterious master.

When recruiting them, besides promising protection, it had vowed to eventually free them from the Origin Realm's constraints.

Now Lin Jing's proposal fulfilled that promise, giving its spirit creatures a proper resolution.

Venturing outside recklessly, these rootless spirit creatures would be devoured by the Cultivation Alliance or Heavenly Demon Sect. But joining an established cultivation world would be completely different.

"Very well... we'll proceed as you suggest," the Meteor Spirit Beast agreed, knowing its master could wait centuries or millennia.

"Then let me welcome Brother Stone and the Star Dust Realm into my Heaven-Earth Sect," Lin Jing applauded cheerfully. "This lightens my burdens considerably—at least I won't face Brother Stone in the coming Millennium War. Once we deal with the Sea Spirit Beast, I can bring the millennium's Origin Sources back to Tianyuan to nurture its powerhouses."

"Don't underestimate the Sea Spirit Beast," the Meteor Spirit Beast warned. "Master said originally over ninety-nine percent of the Origin Realm was ocean—its current geography was artificially reshaped. In terms of primordial roots, it's undoubtedly the most profound among Origin Realm's spirit creatures."

"Is that so?" Lin Jing remarked. "Then Brother Stone is quite remarkable too—managing to contend with it while offering Origin Sources to your master."

The Meteor Spirit Beast shook its head: "Our cultivation here is capped at the Nascent Soul Transformation Stage—there's an upper limit to how much we can benefit from Origin Sources. A fixed amount can thoroughly enhance us until reaching diminishing returns. Only by breaking through to Void Mystical or Seeking the Way could we utilize more."

"Even if I hoarded Origin Sources without offering them to Master, my personal usage would still be limited—the excess would just go to subordinates."

"The Sea Spirit Beast faces the same constraints."

"Besides self-enhancement, it uses most plundered Origin Sources to expand the oceans—attempting to restore marine dominance over the entire Origin Realm. When we first emerged, seas covered about thirty percent of this realm. After millennia of effort, it's reclaimed fifty percent. You'd better hope this batch of Origin Sources doesn't emerge above the ocean."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Book 5: Chapter 63: Fat Meat Delivered on a Silver Platter
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Vol 5 Chapter 63: Fat Meat Delivered on a Silver Platter

After scheming with the Meteor Spirit Beast, Lin Jing did not rush back to Xianlin City but patiently awaited the start of the Millennium War.

During this outing, he also heard that the Heavenly Demon Sect planned to send a new Heavenly Demon Sacred Son to the Origin Realm to kill him, their undercover agent.

Having just acquired the Dao Fruit Divine Ability, how could Lin Jing miss such a perfect target to seize?

It was just unfortunate that this Dao Fruit was obtained a bit late.

Before heading to the Star Dust Realm, he had killed many people to nourish his Slaughter Immortal Physique. If those people hadn’t been killed, Lin Jing dared not imagine how many useful spells he could have extracted.

A desolate plain had already become the resting place of the Heavenly Demon Avatar of the demon race, sitting peacefully in the void, while Lin Jing himself was training the Dao Fruit Divine Ability of the Ice Soul Gu beyond the stars, preparing for its upcoming use.

His training method was simple: letting the Ice Soul Gu implant its Dao Seed into his body. After cultivation until now, Lin Jing had accumulated some spells that were useful back then but useless now, such as the Vajra Fist, which could be used for experimentation.

“The weaker the parasitized target’s condition, the faster the Dao Fruit matures...”

“Only weaker cultivation spells can be stripped away. For powerful spells, the Ice Soul Gu’s current Dao Fruit mastery is far from enough. It might need to level up like the Wood-attribute Pine Leaf Mouse’s Glazed Immortal Eye to make the opponent forget quickly.”

“This is troublesome. The powerful Divine Ability of the new Sacred Son probably won’t be easy to strip.”

“But as expected of a Rare Beast Divine Ability, the strongest point is that after the Dao Seed is implanted into my body, I can’t separate it. I can only suppress it with spiritual power, having no means to remove the Dao Seed.”

Lin Jing was amazed. He originally thought the Dao Seed had many limitations, but after discovering this characteristic, he realized the Dao Fruit technique was truly powerful.

The conditions for separating the Dao Seed were so harsh that if it could not be separated and only suppressed, as long as the Dao Seed was successfully implanted, sooner or later, the Ice Soul Gu could successfully seize the Dao Fruit.

After all, who could guarantee their peak state for life without injury? Even if one never got injured in a lifetime, aging and declining status would eventually prevent suppressing the Dao Seed, allowing the Dao Fruit to form.

Perhaps there are ways to strip the Dao Seed, but such methods against Immortal Lord-level Divine Abilities are certainly rare in the lower realms.

“The Dao Fruit technique combined with the Ice Soul Gu’s Gu poison can guarantee the fastest Dao Fruit extraction. Unfortunately, the Ice Soul Gu’s poison is useless against perfected demonic bloodlines,” Lin Jing murmured to himself, suddenly turning his gaze toward a direction.

“It’s finally here.”

“Let me see how this Sacred Son of the Heavenly Demon Sect compares to Sheng Kun.”

Having been beaten by Sheng Kun before, Lin Jing needed to reclaim his ground from the new Sacred Son.

Boom!!!

In the void, the seated avatar Mo Yu opened his eyes. The void before him was torn apart as a solemn, burly young man with a pair of black wings descended in front of him.

At the moment of arrival, Mo Yu sensed through his bloodline that the newcomer also possessed a perfected demonic bloodline, and perhaps, hidden within that demonic bloodline were at least two other bloodline powers comparable to Immortal Physique-level strength.

“You are Mo Yu?” The new Sacred Son spoke slowly. “Not suppressing your demonic bloodline power seems like you’ve been waiting for me here. You’ve got some nerve.”

“Isn’t he the Heavenly Demon Sect’s new Sacred Son? Knowing you’re here and still daring to come over, does he want to be cut down by you like the other Heavenly Demon Sect members?” Mo Yu hurriedly retorted.

Bang!

At their verbal exchange, the two immediately clashed. The new Sacred Son was likely a Sacred Son with a demonic path fate, part human part demon in appearance. During the battle, his Heavenly Demon Finger fully transformed into claw techniques, his head turning into a dragon’s head.

Mo Yu used seven powers to condense a magic sword to block the attacks. In an instant of clashing, the outcome was undecided as the two figures disappeared from the spot and reappeared in another part of the void to collide again.

Lights flashed in the void as their shockwaves shattered dozens of scattered rocks. Sheng E was secretly shocked during the process. The earliest intelligence he received about Mo Yu from the Heavenly Demon Sect was that Mo Yu’s physical body had been shattered by Sheng Kun’s blow, his Nascent Soul escaped, and he was considered a mere fleeting foe.

After retreating to the Origin Realm, although he heard Mo Yu’s strength hadn’t declined and that his demonic bloodline was perfected, even with his own perfected demonic bloodline and having usurped two quasi-celestial bloodlines of previous Demon Emperors, Sheng E still hadn’t taken him lightly.

But during the battle, Sheng E was shocked to discover that Mo Yu’s current power was in no way inferior to his own, much weaker than expected!

“You are not as good as Sheng Kun.” After several clashes, Mo Yu gave his evaluation. Maybe Sheng Kun was too enraged when he broke Mo Yu’s physical body with that finger, leaving Lin Jing still wary.

However, this new Sacred Son had just entered the Origin Realm and was not like Sheng Kun, who had accumulated strength there for a long time.

Of course, this did not mean he was weak. For other Nascent Soul cultivators, he was still extremely terrifying.

Moreover, Lin Jing felt that the opponent definitely still had hidden cards.

Sure enough, after failing to suppress Lin Jing for a long time, Sheng E quickly retreated, summoning a pagoda and sneering coldly.

“You say I’m not as good as Sheng Kun? Isn’t that premature?” The pagoda exuded overwhelming demonic power. Judging by its quality, it seemed to be a quasi-immortal artifact. But this pagoda was closely connected to Sheng E’s demonic beast bloodline. Through bloodline resonance, it even unleashed power comparable to an immortal-grade artifact.

“Forcing me to use an imperial weapon is enough for you to be proud.”

Determined to defeat Lin Jing, Sheng E’s rise to Sacred Son was mainly due not to his perfected demon blood, but because he had usurped a very special demonic beast species. This species had forged imperial weapons through bloodline rituals for generations. As long as the bloodline matched, they could unleash imperial weapons’ immortal-grade power!

“Seal!” He activated the pagoda, aiming to suppress Mo Yu. The most troublesome part of hunting Heavenly Demon Physique cultivators in the Origin Realm was the fear they might break through the realm and escape, making pursuit impossible. But Sheng E was confident that once Mo Yu was sealed inside the tower, he would no longer be able to cast any spells!

Sure enough!

Seeing Sheng E’s treasure, Mo Yu knew the opponent was not as simple as he appeared, but...

Immortal Binding Chains.

However, Sheng E did not expect that while he was fully focusing on activating the imperial weapon to trap Mo Yu inside the pagoda, a powerful binding force suddenly enveloped his entire body, rendering him immobile.

Like a mantis stalking a cicada, unaware of the oriole behind, Lin Jing used his avatar as bait to successfully find Sheng E’s flaw. The technique and treasure he used did not come from himself but were taken from the avatar, the Immortal Binding Chains cast by the Fuzzy Immortal!

Lin Jing later discovered that the Immortal Binding Chains had reached the level of becoming a solid object, with quality comparable to quasi-immortal artifacts. Naturally, after obtaining it, Lin Jing took possession of it as his own!

Now, it was just right to use it to seal Sheng E, preventing him from breaking through the realm and escaping with the Heavenly Demon Physique!

“Who goes there!” Sheng E, completely sealed, was shocked, then saw Lin Jing himself descending from the sky through falling leaves.

“Was the fight with my avatar enjoyable?”

“You are... the Longevity Body, Lin Jing!” Sheng E’s pupils shrank.
